name: =?utf-8?Q?Reed=20Olson=20for=20MN=202A?=
subject: May Roundup
body:
What's on Reed's mind? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/dced64508b09/a-birthday-wish-9077717?e=0ba866af2d)
---
## May Roundup
|
---
Hello, What a great May for the Campaign! On opening weekend, I had the opportunity to fish with the Governor, the Leech Lake Tribal Chairman and angling enthusiasts from all over Minnesota. Not only did I get to catch and release a beautiful 21-inch walleye, I got to spend a night under a near-full moon in the middle of the Chippewa National Forest- one of my favorite places.Less than a week later, I was in Rochester for the DFL State Convention. It was energizing to meet with my fellow Minnesotans to promote a positive message. Speeches by our US Senators, members of Congress, the Governor. Lt Governor—and so many others—gave me faith that Minnesota is on the path to a bright future. We will be able to get so much done for regular Minnesotans next year.**We have the policies. We have the people. We have** _**you**_**.** As I write this, it is Memorial Day. I have found myself reflecting on my many ancestors who fought and suffered for our nation. As we remember all those who gave their lives for our country, let us also work to create a world where that sacrifice need never be asked of us again.Thank you for your continued support of my campaign. We will see you soon on the trail!-Reed
|
---
| | | | | |
# Makin’ Moves in May
---
| | | | | |
The Governor’s Fishing Opener on May 14th was an absolute blast. Miigwech to the Leech Lake Band of Ojibwe and Chairman Jackson (congrats to his wife who landed the biggest catch of the day)!
---
| | | | | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | I officially filed for office at the Beltrami County Courthouse bright and early May 17th. Later that day I came back for a burger (or two) to celebrate National Beef Month with the Beltrami Farm Bureau.
---
| | | | | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | We rounded out convention season with a bang at the DFL State Convention in Rochester May 20-22nd. I lucked out and scored front row seats!
---
| | | | | |
---
| | | | | | I attended the Leech Lake Memorial Pow Wow in Cass Lake on May 27th. I’m also looking forward to attending the Ain Dah Yung Pow Wow this weekend in St. Paul!
---
| | | | | |
---
| | | | | | I also took a moment to reflect and remember on Memorial Day at Greenwood Cemetery in Bemidji with the American Legion.
---
| | | | | |
---
# Knock Knock!
_Fancy a meandering stroll down the beach block and some lively conversation with yours truly? _We are currently looking for door knockers here at Vote Reed Olson. Door knockers will be deployed in teams, so sign up with a friend—or make a new one. Door knocking not your cup of tea? Good news- there are many ways to help support the campaign! Would you be willing to phone bank? Drop off literature? Host a mixer with your friends? Display a yard sign? Click the button below to find out more.
| [Get Involved!](https://gmail.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f55dc7af213002cce7e62bd8&id=0d94b55e22&e=0ba866af2d)
---
| | | | | |
---
| | | | | | _30/50...30/50...30/50...In order to qualify for the public subsidy award from the State of MN, our campaign must demonstrate strong public support by securing 30 separate donations of $50 or more. The good news:**these donations are refundable!**_ Learn more about the **Political Contribution Refund** process [here](https://gmail.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f55dc7af213002cce7e62bd8&id=31f3941e13&e=0ba866af2d) and click the button below to make a $50 refundable donation to the campaign today. We really appreciate it. Have a wonderful June.
---

name: Ted Cruz
subject: I’m worried
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc
body:
I spoke with my team earlier and I’m worried we’re not going to be able to win back the Senate majority without your help.
Hey Peter,

I wanted to make a point of personally touching base with you today. I spoke with my team earlier and **_I’m worried_** we’re not going to be able to win back the Senate majority [**without your help.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c330b1a206b547cfbfd1e08da6d7d9fe&_e=lj9h7cq0hwJO2oRHgHKlJ-IMbLierbmjYxeN-tNE7UJ122aP45POHVWg-vzUmPKUen1CjRAcXB-x0ZBuhzU6aCDt-a5CyNG13f6wmVxfNkKUSae42QOGrzpkoOW9K3Bcj_KCHAtJd1w8Y_bGnyptE9R957FasSQH4rDKsjbkZZOJOj5dtzGzRIfkFr8jJ6Y2llxmosrHT-IKcesT1c_zGIjpMQJe4ZvqOzGEeflqD7Kh9X2JoEolmygMaeR0wNgpxNHCiowl7HRgem2BeVPNUT8z0Lb9ImHQ2zfuyuxraK49MMCxRiF-lruEd6zptQaqISo1suARydmZ_wDinb-YNwLxuutnzYfqW9bekce-KRt7htHQPVpdsiSLwWhwZ8l8)

The Democrats are dumping HUNDREDS OF MILLIONS OF DOLLARS into red states and [**the only way we can win is if you and 250 donors give $5 or $10 before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c330b1a206b547cfbfd1e08da6d7d9fe&_e=lj9h7cq0hwJO2oRHgHKlJ-IMbLierbmjYxeN-tNE7UJ122aP45POHVWg-vzUmPKUen1CjRAcXB-x0ZBuhzU6aCDt-a5CyNG13f6wmVxfNkKUSae42QOGrzpkoOW9K3Bcj_KCHAtJd1w8Y_bGnyptE9R957FasSQH4rDKsjbkZZO7P4Yxj0PhZr66-ZwlUues-8OU3-z8Q0HHSRYKEqnJeeFz_9Cok7WDpNsY8hwda3waLpZ0I4NWylODJEpg1IMQoEhTSq0-6FwdRqzCkLIRKiOF8rOROPp2EulnQzLC7BB-Wc_bIbD3tGzhU2QcWbjFPYQOsaQKA19PL5Ka9HgpTo144Rr8ePeBwRukWcChrry0AdtUOIq-65r-RwIk_ES5)

Can you step up and help me and Senator Mike Lee win our races and Save America? We’re counting on hearing from you before time runs out and we fall short.

[**GIVE NOW ⇒**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c330b1a206b547cfbfd1e08da6d7d9fe&_e=lj9h7cq0hwJO2oRHgHKlJ-IMbLierbmjYxeN-tNE7UJ122aP45POHVWg-vzUmPKUen1CjRAcXB-x0ZBuhzU6aCDt-a5CyNG13f6wmVxfNkKUSae42QOGrzpkoOW9K3Bcj_KCHAtJd1w8Y_bGnyptE9R957FasSQH4rDKsjbkZZMXFtYP_Kz5LchZn-YKVfLLZRLjDkhiH3Lo-A3s_VgGsOIptmiB0U44WXEjjVm5iawGvPEcyXrAO_gyUqwgEajtTyyrm8rRvI83lWYQqwOoJ45JHqe202BaAm3mYTfRGMiWIMOQxpkxe8LmXEs8dZ_niSTjD6vBZyacvvYiXK2Ejfp1zl0pnagmIr_Ljrn2AMM9sljbxCtdDfjDJyfrlgEZ)
It’s not just me, Peter, everyone I’ve been talking to is concerned about this election. It’s going to be close and I’m counting on hearing from every single one of my supporters in order to help push us over the finish line.

But the Democrats are doubling their efforts and dumping MILLIONS into red states.

We cannot take anything for granted and we’re falling short of our midnight goal. [**Will you give $5 or $10 and be one of the 250 donors I need to win?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c330b1a206b547cfbfd1e08da6d7d9fe&_e=lj9h7cq0hwJO2oRHgHKlJ-IMbLierbmjYxeN-tNE7UJ122aP45POHVWg-vzUmPKUen1CjRAcXB-x0ZBuhzU6aCDt-a5CyNG13f6wmVxfNkKUSae42QOGrzpkoOW9K3Bcj_KCHAtJd1w8Y_bGnyptE9R957FasSQH4rDKsjbkZZMLD_qk1EaYAHmcPHt96ayyhI1WEI7zh1sUDd89b0tSk9aQC5gzeW6XlbW74rLuyFot9yDEQ2aquF8IeZS8KXgmi9M0CLzf-Y83iIJ9k4uVqOHrPQMcz6Mx3N929qslpPJbKUf1tbDw_Knm4mNvOcClQMsIEREGBe2oAmk3PBCY7bpDlp5kkEwCRO6_1jCECn4dWRqtEvbZjzW6LwF6ElIT)

[**GIVE NOW ⇒**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c330b1a206b547cfbfd1e08da6d7d9fe&_e=lj9h7cq0hwJO2oRHgHKlJ-IMbLierbmjYxeN-tNE7UJ122aP45POHVWg-vzUmPKUen1CjRAcXB-x0ZBuhzU6aCDt-a5CyNG13f6wmVxfNkKUSae42QOGrzpkoOW9K3Bcj_KCHAtJd1w8Y_bGnyptE9R957FasSQH4rDKsjbkZZMU8TgBGqW180FIUK0XuaXXPTGkl7sHX_CUcI991EUfIHiq9L8dp1FSNkpq92MiUZ0m6yPk5DB2r9la_a53h_qPOrhnZV8121mQa3RIF0OhkV0sX_moBdwK7oLnoO0GZjPkWhDs3NFy_t48j19_Lfx0QDVlbFfCOQzI9DxVGioChTi2e_UH-bNPUNkbkRxwJq1A7YwPL916MK2jyBWIH88i)

Hey Peter, I wanted to make a point of personally touching base with you today. I spoke with my team earlier and I’m worried we’re not going to be able to win back the Senate majority The Democrats are dumping HUNDREDS OF MILLIONS OF DOLLARS into red states and Can you step up and help me and Senator Mike Lee win our races and Save America? We’re counting on hearing from you before time runs out and we fall short. It’s not just me, Peter, everyone I’ve been talking to is concerned about this election. It’s going to be close and I’m counting on hearing from every single one of my supporters in order to help push us over the finish line. But the Democrats are doubling their efforts and dumping MILLIONS into red states. We cannot take anything for granted and we’re falling short of our midnight goal. Thanks, Ted Cruz | Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc. Don't want to receive our emails? I spoke with my team earlier and I’m worried we’re not going to be able to win back the Senate majority without your help.

body:
[1]Charles Booker

Here’s the latest update,
Peter:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220531-3?refcode=em20220531-3-2001&t=1001&refcode2=2001_346206_ux0jJC&akid=2001%2E346206%2Eux0jJC ][IMG]

Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is in less than five hours. This is
the FIRST fundraising goal we’ve set ever since Charles won the primary on
the 17th. Now that we’re officially kicking off the race: It’s critical we
send a loud message about the strength of our grassroots, progressive
movement to defeat Rand Paul.

We’re cutting it close but if at least one quarter of the people reading
this email right now chip in we’ll be on track to reach our goal.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220531-3?refcode=em20220531-3-2001&t=1002&refcode2=2001_346206_ux0jJC&akid=2001%2E346206%2Eux0jJC ]Will you chip in $5 or anything you can to help us reach
our first fundraising goal of the general election? Because we don’t
accept a single cent from corporate PACs or special interests — we’re
relying on people like you to fund this campaign.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220531-3?refcode=em20220531-3-2001&t=1021&refcode2=2001_346206_ux0jJC&akid=2001%2E346206%2Eux0jJC ]Contribute $5

As a grassroots campaign, we rely on the generosity and support from
individual donors like you who chip in what they can to emails like this
one.

Your donation of $5, or any other amount, helps us:

* Train our organizers so we can effectively (and directly) reach out to
voters in all 120 counties of our Commonwealth
* Hire key campaign staff to expand our capacity
* Acquire digital tools so we can get our message out to millions of
Kentuckians
* Provide PPE for our campaign office
* Reimburse our organizers for gas as they travel across Kentucky
* Grow our historic movement to unite Kentuckians, from the hood to the
holler

That’s why reaching our goals is so important,
Peter. This is how we make sure
we can fund all of our campaign expenses and compete against Rand’s
corporate donors.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220531-3?refcode=em20220531-3-2001&t=1023&refcode2=2001_346206_ux0jJC&akid=2001%2E346206%2Eux0jJC ]Every dollar makes a difference when it comes to achieving these
goals. Will you chip in $5 or any amount you can afford to
our campaign before midnight tonight?

Together,

Team Booker

subject: Midnight Fundraising Deadline
body:
Peter, only a FEW MORE HOURS left until our FUNDRAISING DEADLINE at midnight tonight! We are close, but I need your help to reach my fundraising goal.

BECOME A GROUNDBREAKING SUPPORTER >> [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=first+button&utm_campaign=Midnight+Deadline+Email]

While Democrats and the rest of the Biden team are focused on the Build Back Better plan, we'll be working very hard to make sure we win the house in November. We expect to exceed our fundraising goals, meet you in this district, and get more people to vote.

When elected with your help:

- I will CHALLENGE the nonsense in Washington.

- I will OPPOSE price increases.

- I will ADVOCATE for energy independence.

name: Tim Ryan (personal)
subject: re: Senate control
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3981%2E3611125%2ELswAxb ][IMG]

Folks, we got some great news today. I'm up in the polls against far-right
extremist JD Vance.

This polling is a testament to our grassroots momentum and you’re a big
part of our success, folks. I’m so grateful for the trust you’ve
put in me as Ohio’s Democratic nominee for Senate and I take the
responsibility seriously.

My battleground race will decide Senate control—so we can’t hold back one
bit if we want to chart a new course here in Ohio.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13884?t=1015&amount=25&akid=3981%2E3611125%2ELswAxb ]Our first End-of-Month deadline of the General Election is at midnight.
Can I count on you to chip in
$25 so we
have the resources to flip this open Senate seat and expand our Democratic
majority?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13884?t=1016&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=3981%2E3611125%2ELswAxb ]Donate $25
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13884?t=1017&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=3981%2E3611125%2ELswAxb ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13884?t=1018&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=3981%2E3611125%2ELswAxb ]Donate $100
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13884?t=1019&express_lane=true&amount=200&akid=3981%2E3611125%2ELswAxb ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13884?t=1020&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=3981%2E3611125%2ELswAxb ]Donate $250
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13884?t=1021&express_lane=true&amount=30&akid=3981%2E3611125%2ELswAxb ]Other Amount

Folks, we’re closing out a tough month. We found out that the Supreme
Court plans to overturn Roe v. Wade and as a nation, we’ve experienced a
series of senseless tragedies.

And right now we have a Senate majority that doesn’t have the votes to do
a damn thing about it.

My Republican opponent, JD Vance, would be disastrous for Ohio and a vote
for McConnell’s obstructionist agenda. But he’ll continue to be propped up
by outside interests and billionaire backers that want a “yes man” in the
Senate—not a fighter for Ohio families.

I am Democrats’ best shot at flipping a seat and you can take my word for
it: I’ll work like hell to cut workers in on the deal by winning this
race.

There'll be more attacks and obstacles thrown our way, but
folks, I’m up to the challenge.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13884?t=1022&amount=25&akid=3981%2E3611125%2ELswAxb ]That’s why I’m humbly asking: Will you chip in toward my campaign’s
$175,000 End-of-Month goal before midnight? We’re counting on folks like
you to step up to make a big showing in our first fundraising deadline of
the General Election.

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13884?t=1009&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=3981%2E3611125%2ELswAxb ]Donate $25
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13884?t=1010&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=3981%2E3611125%2ELswAxb ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13884?t=1011&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=3981%2E3611125%2ELswAxb ]Donate $100
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13884?t=1012&express_lane=true&amount=200&akid=3981%2E3611125%2ELswAxb ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13884?t=1013&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=3981%2E3611125%2ELswAxb ]Donate $250
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13884?t=1014&express_lane=true&amount=30&akid=3981%2E3611125%2ELswAxb ]Other Amount

We can win this thing, but only if we stick together.

Thanks,

Tim Ryan

touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,

name: Beto for Texas
subject: The last 7 years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

We have to get really serious about winning political
power.
If we want to get Texas on the right track, then we must win this
election.
There’s a concrete action you can take before midnight tonight to help
Beto defeat Greg Abbott in November: By making a contribution right now,
you’ll help us reach our $1,200,000 end-of-month fundraising goal. So what
do you say?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220531-2?refcode=ema20220531-191858&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=191858_444211_6EanEB&akid=191858%2E444211%2E6EanEB ]Will you pitch in $3 right now? Every single contribution
will help us build the biggest organizing operation that Texas has ever
seen in order to defeat Greg Abbott.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220531-2?refcode=ema20220531-191858&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&refcode2=191858_444211_6EanEB&akid=191858%2E444211%2E6EanEB ]Contribute $3

Greg Abbott has spent the last 7 years hurting the people of Texas. He’s
focused on an extreme agenda that doesn’t help Texans — and he's failed to
take meaningful action to prevent mass shootings in our state.
With your support, we will defeat Greg Abbott in November. But it’s going
to take each of us pitching in what we can to get the job done.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220531-2?refcode=ema20220531-191858&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=191858_444211_6EanEB&akid=191858%2E444211%2E6EanEB ]Please make a $3 contribution right now as we race
towards our end-of-month fundraising deadline.

Together, we will organize and fight for every vote.

Thank you,
Team Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=191858%2E444211%2E6EanEB

name: John Fetterman
subject: I know these emails are piling up, but I want you to hear this straight from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
You’ve had my back every step of the way, especially lately.
#
Hi, Derek. It’s John.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220531-3?refcode=em20220531-6057&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6057_434096_tXmmqA&akid=6057%2E434096%2EtXmmqA)
As I type this, I realize these emails can *really* start to pile up, but I wanted you to hear straight from me why we keep reaching out. 👍
**At midnight tonight, we'll face our very first end-of-month fundraising deadline of Pennsylvania’s U.S. Senate general election. And right now, we're *super close* to our goal of raising $3 million in online donations before midnight.**
I know yinz + youse have what it takes to get us over the finish line — because you've had my back every step of the way, especially lately. I can't tell you how unbelievably grateful I am for every bit of support + message of encouragement, Derek.
**So, for the very last time before midnight, I need to personally + humbly ask:**
[**Will you donate any amount you can before midnight to help us reach our end-of-month goal? We're reallllllly close to a really huge number, and I mean it when I say your contribution from Cresco could be the one to take us over the edge.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220531-3?refcode=em20220531-6057&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6057_434096_tXmmqA&akid=6057%2E434096%2EtXmmqA)
**[Donate Now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220531-3?refcode=em20220531-6057&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6057_434096_tXmmqA&akid=6057%2E434096%2EtXmmqA)**
Thank you, thank you, thank you. This team is simply the best. 😭
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220531-6057-footer&t=2&refcode2=6057_434096_tXmmqA&akid=6057%2E434096%2EtXmmqA)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=3&akid=6057%2E434096%2EtXmmqA)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=6057%2E434096%2EtXmmqA)

name: Team Schrier
subject: A final request before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
We're just hours away from the end of May, and our campaign shifted things into high gear this month. We started the month by kicking off Kim's re-election campaign with events across the district, and then Kim filed her paperwork to officially appear on the ballot! [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45971970/348286023/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjk2MTVmZC00MWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mbKh5TNyyI79bLB6Venp3RhfJikVRoO4y0yNbM4LlEE=&emci=a4f9ce43-37e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=2b9615fd-41e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter, We're just hours away from the end of May, and our campaign shifted things into high gear this month. We started the month by kicking off Kim's re-election campaign with events across the district, and then Kim filed her paperwork to officially appear on the ballot!

It's been an exciting few weeks, but before we enter June, we're reaching out to ask for your support in reaching our end-of-month fundraising deadline before midnight. Let us explain why it's crucial we don't come up short:

The National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) has made Kim's seat a top target, four conservative Republican opponents have entered the race against her, and now the Congressional Leadership Fund – a Kevin McCarthy-aligned super PAC – is spending at least $3.9 million on attack ads in our district.

So much is on the line this November, from defending a woman’s right to choose to reducing gun violence to lowering costs for families. With election experts calling this race a "toss-up," Kim needs your help.

Reaching tonight's goal ensures we enter this next phase of our campaign in a strong position and ready to take on whatever national Republicans and my opponents throw our way.

**[Will you chip in $5 or more before our end-of-month fundraising deadline at midnight tonight to help us reach our goal? With your support, we can protect Kim's seat and our Democratic House majority this November.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45971971/348286024/151529031?refcode=em22_220531_eom5_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220531_eom5_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjk2MTVmZC00MWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mbKh5TNyyI79bLB6Venp3RhfJikVRoO4y0yNbM4LlEE=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [EXPRESS DONATE $5→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45971972/348286025/151529031?refcode=em22_220531_eom5_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220531_eom5_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjk2MTVmZC00MWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mbKh5TNyyI79bLB6Venp3RhfJikVRoO4y0yNbM4LlEE=)

Derek,

There are just a few hours left until midnight and our campaign's last
fundraising deadline before the California jungle primary next Tuesday.

This cycle, we have invested the most resources since 2020 to introduce me
to the tens of thousands of voters in my new district before next
Tuesday's election.

We need this funding in order to fund our grassroots effort, air digital
ads, and make our last get-out-the-vote push. We don’t want to give an
inch when it comes to defending our Democratic majorities in the general
election.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220531_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&refcode2=297_5257348_X1NFBW&akid=297%2E5257348%2EX1NFBW ]Can you help us make up some ground? Pitch in $10 or any amount that
works for you before midnight:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220531_PM2_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=250&t=1009&refcode2=297_5257348_X1NFBW&akid=297%2E5257348%2EX1NFBW ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

I’m not taking anything for granted this year. Running in a new district
is a challenge in itself, but I’m also facing 8 opponents including one
backed by QAnon supporters and Trump cronies Roger Stone and Michael
Flynn.

After what they did to our democracy — pushing the Big Lie until it led to
an attack on our Capitol — we can’t afford to let them gain power. Winning
this jungle primary is the first step in showing the GOP that the people
refuse to let conspiracy-driven quacks represent our communities.

But in order to do that, we need to build up our resources.

subject: I won’t make it without your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Annie Andrews for Congress
body:
| Hey,

It’s getting late and I wanted to reach you because I’ve been on the phone with my finance director, Bri, and we still have about $2,500 left to raise tonight.

Our opponents are focused solely on tearing each other down — and are making this campaign a MAGA circus with their attack ads, taxpayer funded promotion, and terrible stances on healthcare, education, gun violence, and even supporting babies whose parents can’t get formula.

We have a small window while this plays out to really up our campaign. The general election will be here in just a few weeks and then it’s all hands on deck.

I’m ready to represent Lowcountry families and make a positive difference — but I won’t make it to Congress without your support.

**[Can you help us prove our strength by chipping in $15 before midnight tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45972382/348294961/-312997880?amount=15&refcode=AA_EM_FR_3MO_220531_2_9&refcode2=&contactdata=HL3I3WF9qdB78SpMlD8xJCXb1iWliIDmPHGsMdfLy5OeMBkbwQAtTthmw03SU0No&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWNmNzg3Ni00NWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pXz8yJnQeWrxS0oTsWj68xjvwzl-KB-_EbULGG-V6WM=)**

Annie

**MAY END-OF-MONTH FUNDRAISING DEADLINE**

Peter,

Here we are - it’s May 31st and we’ve got a midnight fundraising deadline that has our campaign a bit worried. While we’ve been in this position more than 20 times before, it never really gets easy trying to close the gap between what we’ve raised in a particular month and what is left to raise before the clock strikes midnight.

Here is where we stand as of right now:
1. May was always going to be a hard month. We’re not going to match what we raised in April.

2. Democrats have already spent more than $6 million in Oregon to elect Democrats and smear the reputation of respectable Republicans.

3. With only six seats standing between Republicans and the House majority, every seat matters. I’ve said this time and again – but our fundraising has been suffering a bit.

[**CHIP IN BEFORE MIDNIGHT ->**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=bc15e7998c6c4f51aae2f1edabd1bd3e&_e=8TXHoVvGSdhwvMdf3IOj7N7zRAEQ1diQ6t7Mbt-QXZOn07n49JOh_L9IYkOFFlHuwgHzregch5uAUzibnMWzFWhp60nYesCyY99wZfSMxTZwwa87wAEzHMEz9DmBHZBubuW6TFo3RGbcd-OkKfzqF5fI7-gmKgsNlifsHE0cJ0RPZBMXZGAlshvNaDymLp7DZJudafgOlacPlK1xFmfrDd9KfDfFJy_rQ8ucHv2o6CEUwOnet4ZrBTUeafRaBkBqqv1frTHCQVkMOzB3w2LVxqTBTRl111qYBRavIcfRVWTu8hyyH5SZFM5CJNIKIbGrP2eS9aI5BTSzjiCDyFNeAsspQJr9X5Rynkm6DPUkv4b-98pTH_YdoYKjsC1omqffAnUKK2ylcA2yagMXHbRlb0PL6oOqURSEN0JdWFnTCKrXL2jSlsj_Kiz-_lpMbBr4)
I officially have an opponent now and we’ve begun to receive emails from her with greater frequency, so we know that’s she raising money for herself. While we don’t have her numbers for the last two months, the one thing I know is that we’ve got to outraise her this quarter to continue the momentum we’ve built over the last year.

**[I’m sending this email to 38,000 supporters and if just 250 of you reading this right now would make a donation of $5 or more, we’d be able to end the month in in decent shape.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=bc15e7998c6c4f51aae2f1edabd1bd3e&_e=8TXHoVvGSdhwvMdf3IOj7N7zRAEQ1diQ6t7Mbt-QXZOn07n49JOh_L9IYkOFFlHuwgHzregch5uAUzibnMWzFWhp60nYesCyY99wZfSMxTZwwa87wAEzHMEz9DmBHZBubuW6TFo3RGbcd-OkKfzqF5fI7-gmKgsNlifsHE0cJ0RPZBMXZGAlshvNaDymLp7DZJudafgOlacPlK1xFmfrDd9KfDfFJy_rQ8ucHv2o6CF7opwL6lYAKIipoIkZq0tmv7u5O9FT5_81WM9kMse2d2nOwU0-jCdL43V3DzmQZxt0StsyoALo06jvg6kWnCGleJGtvjAdlCBPcKq_KgB7bKdX-kthK-nWcEAddc0JFY5SaEpbh74otYPgvY7JAq14eQOHlYxf0qdZN_eHk_OE9p9gZI_A9RZKXDnocvlZXpPLlb_XPZrJ2BOC1uV2uuMn)**

[**CHIP IN BEFORE MIDNIGHT ->**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=bc15e7998c6c4f51aae2f1edabd1bd3e&_e=8TXHoVvGSdhwvMdf3IOj7N7zRAEQ1diQ6t7Mbt-QXZOn07n49JOh_L9IYkOFFlHuwgHzregch5uAUzibnMWzFWhp60nYesCyY99wZfSMxTZwwa87wAEzHMEz9DmBHZBubuW6TFo3RGbcd-OkKfzqF5fI7-gmKgsNlifsHE0cJ0RPZBMXZGAlshvNaDymLp7DZJudafgOlacPlK1xFmfrDd9KfDfFJy_rQ8ucHv2o6CF0L9PTBaGGEBjFaD67YDh0vf430UEWmL7XtVJu9WQDWJeX8kdERlK3iURerQbP881DsbewM9k4ZQ6U_UbcoAl-Xix0aWvsU167gXo8XbLYdeIqghf_Dfua3uKoJmyT1TsmVkErAtRwg58mLkeo2U4dTYpAgsZCRiam4TQXA3IdMRTyl5PIYhbbc5OxmKY84p-728LVlSRTZ_A5MFPlt6Fm)

name: Campaign Update (via Team Sarah)
subject: not-so-great news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
In the last few weeks alone, Wisconsin's U.S. Senate race has been flooded with $15 million from Mitch McConnell’s Super PAC and $9 million from the National Republican Senatorial Committee. Sorry to bother you so late, but we have some news to share with you.

**First, the good news:** _CNN_ , _Roll Call_ , and _The Cook Political Report_ are all saying Ron Johnson is in trouble. _The Hill_ reported our race has shot “to the top of Senate Republicans' defensive priorities.” And _The Washington Post_ called Sarah Godlewski "the best chance” to defeat him.

**Even better:** Sarah is the ONLY Democrat Ron Johnson is losing to based on the most recent head-to-head poll. If Democrats win in Wisconsin, we are virtually guaranteed to hold and expand the majority. That’s why our race is so important.

**Now, the not-so-great news:** The GOP has more than $200 million to take back the Senate majority, and they’ve already started flooding money into Wisconsin — $15 million from Mitch McConnell’s Super PAC and $9 million from the National Republican Senatorial Committee in the last few weeks alone.

**Even worse:** The latest ActBlue report shows we’ve fallen behind on our fundraising goals, and we're facing a big deadline at midnight. We can't afford to come up short right now — not when Ron Johnson has more cash on hand than anyone in this race and the entire GOP establishment behind him.

**[A contribution of $2 could make a big difference if everyone pitches in before midnight. Please rush a donation to Sarah Godlewski’s campaign to help us defeat Ron Johnson, flip Wisconsin’s Senate seat blue, and expand our 50/50 Senate majority. clean_body: In the last few weeks alone, Wisconsin's U.S. Senate race has been flooded with $15 million from Mitch McConnell’s Super PAC and $9 million from the National Republican Senatorial Committee. Sorry to bother you so late, but we have some news to share with you. First, the good news: CNN , Roll Call , and The Cook Political Report are all saying Ron Johnson is in trouble. The Hill reported our race has shot “to the top of Senate Republicans' defensive priorities.” And The Washington Post called Sarah Godlewski "the best chance” to defeat him. Even better: Sarah is the ONLY Democrat Ron Johnson is losing to based on the most recent head-to-head poll. If Democrats win in Wisconsin, we are virtually guaranteed to hold and expand the majority. That’s why our race is so important. Now, the not-so-great news: The GOP has more than $200 million to take back the Senate majority, and they’ve already started flooding money into Wisconsin — $15 million from Mitch McConnell’s Super PAC and $9 million from the National Republican Senatorial Committee in the last few weeks alone. Even worse: The latest ActBlue report shows we’ve fallen behind on our fundraising goals, and we're facing a big deadline at midnight. We can't afford to come up short right now — not when Ron Johnson has more cash on hand than anyone in this race and the entire GOP establishment behind him. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Anything you can give, no matter how large or small, will get us one step closer to our goal, and it will put us in the strongest position possible to return this Senate seat to the people of Wisconsin. Our campaign isn't taking a dime from corporate PACs. Instead, we're counting on lots and lots of grassroots supporters like you to keep our momentum going strong into the critical months ahead. Thanks for reading and pitching in today. — Team Sarah Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put Wisconsin workers and families first. She's the only Democrat who is beating Ron Johnson in the latest head-to-head poll of our race. With your help, we can flip this seat. Chip in to join us: | = Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin

| | | **Tanya For Arizona Campaign Round-Up**
From discussing the border crisis with ranchers at the border to speaking at the Kiwanis Nuevo Club of Tempe meeting and attending as many LD meetings as possible in between, Team Tanya covered a lot of ground this week, but Tanya's fight for the American Dream remains the same.

If you want Team Tanya to stop by your group next time or you are interested in volunteering, email us at info@tanyaforarizona.com

**AZ-04 ALERT: Race Rating Changed in Our Favor!**

Cook Political changed the race rating for AZ-04 in our favor! East Valley families are tired of Greg Stanton and his rubber-stamp of Biden’s failing policies and it shows.

Cook Political said, "Republicans are ecstatic about the candidacy of Tanya Wheeless, a Latina former Arizona Bankers' Association CEO and Phoenix Suns executive."

Read more [HERE](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=7bbcd4ca96&e=bd2b55b0e3)!

**Get your Tanya for Arizona yard sign!!**

BIG NEWS! Team Tanya officially has yard signs!

If you live in the district and would like a yard sign, hit REPLY and someone from our team will connect with you and coordinate getting one to you.

name: Ted Cruz
subject: We’re losing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc
body:
I spoke with my team earlier and I’m worried we’re not going to be able to win back the Senate majority without your help.
Hey Fellow American,

I wanted to make a point of personally touching base with you today. I spoke with my team earlier and **_I’m worried_** we’re not going to be able to win back the Senate majority [**without your help.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=199a444ed5a74fd5b46cb0669afcba41&_e=uYJWfqvxcQBWZADh2KIa2SipE547XdOCIqTMzo6YFJAuLYxTBX5K0yYFgG5Rsr0MnT3v0D5srqsXHreG-8DrAQ2l4cdKe9SOcFEQVU1tKW1djNKvkgc41KfsqkgOcmqCSmS2cYQ8D1dAn_PykzS24Iol8LLFvhnRPnkVc95eBfUkpLpGLGh0nb3p8QjbLauOVQsc1whl7xdvSSwr_dPLwThWtdaxpEYRiui2jIy8rd80LqqF-eQ93dZmskZOnKOrhJ8SomuEP7DuqK-XqwnDbUk-G0y6d68fpDPQ7AUI12EqsqKeyJnnvGt0iOVNWcHYTHnOLRRMANX2uTDRYWDTdm3RN_-Bg4f1xFKy60EjHD7Ne1IAkJci_idpF7x2yIlQ)

The Democrats are dumping HUNDREDS OF MILLIONS OF DOLLARS into red states and [**the only way we can win is if you and 250 donors give $5 or $10 before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=199a444ed5a74fd5b46cb0669afcba41&_e=uYJWfqvxcQBWZADh2KIa2SipE547XdOCIqTMzo6YFJAuLYxTBX5K0yYFgG5Rsr0MnT3v0D5srqsXHreG-8DrAQ2l4cdKe9SOcFEQVU1tKW1djNKvkgc41KfsqkgOcmqCSmS2cYQ8D1dAn_PykzS24D_hiz6wy6yPFiy9QzhpQEf6dnt214SvC_dVzRHAdgq0XU95306-utbBXuqk9PI6mjDWkBLkmBtsiLaMfP0frCMJV1iQFMqGIOp5fIqKjvnaF31JM7PL_XsERoHvQfmCb-GK_OmCVXXGlXxKWPmrWD5r-mAnUlptu7HT-gWelEXN6aZABHPSKaL3WI9HaW5ShHxBfDiBNvrZdntoVm7fKYGMDW_x2txk98eVwuX1Lr3c)

Can you step up and help me and Senator Mike Lee win our races and Save America? We’re counting on hearing from you before time runs out and we fall short.

[**GIVE NOW ⇒**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=199a444ed5a74fd5b46cb0669afcba41&_e=uYJWfqvxcQBWZADh2KIa2SipE547XdOCIqTMzo6YFJAuLYxTBX5K0yYFgG5Rsr0MnT3v0D5srqsXHreG-8DrAQ2l4cdKe9SOcFEQVU1tKW1djNKvkgc41KfsqkgOcmqCSmS2cYQ8D1dAn_PykzS24JPU1IGkHSznpAKOvqCXW5ScR3elLTaavn4EuJZRsrz5-Mj1msk9x_p5U7NBxwfrCNQDMzMxcEXjKTpqEuLc_ZTz95eU1cryaEysfvZc5eZdGUNH9GtDqwGzpByt5pkMzfoJ9iW9qZdoaqKVG_pc08rPT7uKB632C7SR9yBXwrnTP_zdEQoM01mu-LOg8IouVY-37CIyIiEZUaxUAbT9n8pNtyQSXwX9AxV54iIOZEcs)
It’s not just me, Fellow American, everyone I’ve been talking to is concerned about this election. It’s going to be close and I’m counting on hearing from every single one of my supporters in order to help push us over the finish line.

But the Democrats are doubling their efforts and dumping MILLIONS into red states.

We cannot take anything for granted and we’re falling short of our midnight goal. [**Will you give $5 or $10 and be one of the 250 donors I need to win?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=199a444ed5a74fd5b46cb0669afcba41&_e=uYJWfqvxcQBWZADh2KIa2SipE547XdOCIqTMzo6YFJAuLYxTBX5K0yYFgG5Rsr0MnT3v0D5srqsXHreG-8DrAQ2l4cdKe9SOcFEQVU1tKW1djNKvkgc41KfsqkgOcmqCSmS2cYQ8D1dAn_PykzS24GKhv_1Ad9ee1B5UBf1MTLEAPAJ9fNfUv0U0mvUV2bsTahNH3QRqcfS7kFn6U8OCVF8vbEyFR-2cuM7qsWPiZfulat6zsZbPZ_or5RNhj265nso8-zjKWASD33UBxw6Tf4S1bljNzu4S7nUNh3aalbQDW191CxyVKgkzI2cvYu8svS_1LPhLUSgFrm8GMEEoyQo1NutJ7ygUl0oBDYhr4p0wPqnbsPt-V2pn82W5gNqi)

[**GIVE NOW ⇒**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=199a444ed5a74fd5b46cb0669afcba41&_e=uYJWfqvxcQBWZADh2KIa2SipE547XdOCIqTMzo6YFJAuLYxTBX5K0yYFgG5Rsr0MnT3v0D5srqsXHreG-8DrAQ2l4cdKe9SOcFEQVU1tKW1djNKvkgc41KfsqkgOcmqCSmS2cYQ8D1dAn_PykzS24EM4znJhrMyH9SRoieUehBBWNBDowMyZy1wlAEKY4VjBHj5BQFdRdXX6Ab-3G83eu3ZtWVqopwHZPP5Dn7aJV8AE7kfQ7Q7Y55QZJnX0mOeaOvtUVGWo26UaW8IP8lNoGus67T-TrQTw565RiLMCQ7B04UP8FBQgaRr0mnX4Y3VND7dFcgLow0OHECMcfM66dARyoVq4-XqpJ_k1ghqtFqKW-8lBQGcoxNBOokIg4e61)

* 6/12: [Oconto County Dairy Breakfast](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0SsIN05Kq52csGqnQtqVEFs&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=roundup_5_31_22_v1&n=20)

* * *
******WisGOP State Convention** The WisGOP held its annual State Convention in Middleton with nearly 1600 conservatives in attendance – the highest in a decade! Delegates and guests heard from speakers like Senator Ron Johnson, watched state and federal legislative panels, and more. Thanks to everyone who joined us for our 2022 event! **Brown County Golf Scramble** Brown County Republicans held their first annual Golf Scramble event! **Monroe County Police Week Events** Monroe County Republicans thanked law enforcement officers at the Tomah Police Department, Sparta Police Department, and the Monroe County Sheriff’s Department. **Shawano County Veterans Memorial Dedication** Senator Ron Johnson spoke and thanked our veterans at the dedication of the Veterans Memorial in Bonduel on Memorial Day. **Door County Lincoln Day Dinner** Over 150 Door County patriots attended this year’s Lincoln Day Dinner event, which featured remarks from Senator Ron Johnson, Congressman Mike Gallagher, State Senator Andre Jacque, State Representative Joel Kitchens, and statewide candidates. **Trempealeau County Broiler Days Festival** Trempealeau County Republicans participated in the annual Broiler Days Festival in Arcadia, with a great turnout! Third Congressional District candidate Derrick Van Orden, State Representative Treig Pronschinske, and State Senate candidate Dave Estenson joined volunteers on the parade route. **Shawano County Lincoln-Reagan Day Dinner** Senator Ron Johnson headlined the Shawano County Republican Party’s annual Lincoln Day Dinner in Cecil. **Kenosha County Memorial Day Parade Float** Kenosha County Republican volunteers constructed a beautiful parade float for Memorial Day! **Monroe County Movie Screening** Monroe County Republicans held a movie screening highlighting the importance of election integrity.
* * *
### Don’t miss the next big event in your community! Visit our website [here](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=VsLgeNFrtuHusRivV19v3W9XFAkFywiSe_gHG6hiCtA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=roundup_5_31_22_v1&n=23) to stay up-to-date on the newest opportunities, or sign up to volunteer [here](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=VsLgeNFrtuHusRivV19v3aCXxtdEYxug7BpyM8N6AZw&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=roundup_5_31_22_v1&n=24).
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6myz1ydj26pS20sqllUBZd4&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=roundup_5_31_22_v1&n=25) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tr24D9XbJYDft_QizpripYs&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=roundup_5_31_22_v1&n=26) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y0VJVp2OCKNw8zDVmWeSo7yP6jlGmDIaYIm5b1oT1T4S&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=roundup_5_31_22_v1&n=27) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=roundup_5_31_22_v1&n=28)

Door County Lincoln Day Dinner Over 150 Door County patriots attended this year’s Lincoln Day Dinner event, which featured remarks from Senator Ron Johnson, Congressman Mike Gallagher, State Senator Andre Jacque, State Representative Joel Kitchens, and statewide candidates. Trempealeau County Broiler Days Festival Trempealeau County Republicans participated in the annual Broiler Days Festival in Arcadia, with a great turnout! Third Congressional District candidate Derrick Van Orden, State Representative Treig Pronschinske, and State Senate candidate Dave Estenson joined volunteers on the parade route. Shawano County Lincoln-Reagan Day Dinner Senator Ron Johnson headlined the Shawano County Republican Party’s annual Lincoln Day Dinner in Cecil. Kenosha County Memorial Day Parade Float Kenosha County Republican volunteers constructed a beautiful parade float for Memorial Day! Monroe County Movie Screening Monroe County Republicans held a movie screening highlighting the importance of election integrity. * Don’t miss the next big event in your community! Visit our website to stay up-to-date on the newest opportunities, or sign up to volunteer . Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin. Not Authorized by any Candidate or Candidate's Committee. 148 E Johnson St, Madison, WI 53703 | (608) 257 - 4765

Hey there - it's Heather from VPP.

Earlier this week, we sent you an urgent petition to stand with Liz Cheney for subpoenaing GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy before the January 6th Committee.

But you didn't sign - and we missed our goal by just **108** signatures...

_If we don 't show massive grassroots support for Liz Cheney, she'll be silenced by GOP attacks and Kevin McCarthy will escape accountability for his crimes._

**Please, we 're giving you _one last chance_ to sign! Click [**HERE**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand_with_cheney/?source=VPP_20220531_EMPET_E5_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=2749%2E878179%2Elu9GyM) or use the buttons below to confirm your signature »** | [108 SIGNATURES NEEDED: STAND WITH LIZ CHENEY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand_with_cheney/?source=VPP_20220531_EMPET_E5_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=2749%2E878179%2Elu9GyM)

Heather,
_Executive Director

Subject: re: McCarthy subpoenaed
To: Top Democrats

| **BREAKING** **Liz Cheney and Jan. 6 Committee Subpoena GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy**
---

Liz Cheney's BRAVE decision to subpoena MAGA minion Kevin McCarthy and stand up for our democracy has the GOP _**IN SHAMBLES.**_

_They 're already ramping up their vicious attacks to take down Cheney and DESTROY the investigation! **NO!!!**_

[**So we 're launching an urgent petition to show MASSIVE grassroots support for Cheney's brave work on the Jan. 6th Committee. But if we fail to get 30,000 signatures, the MAGA Party will SILENCE her! ****PLEASE: Sign NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand_with_cheney/?source=VPP_20220531_EMPET_E5_T0_NS_RS&t=9&akid=2749%2E878179%2Elu9GyM)

[**I STAND WITH LIZ CHENEY** »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand_with_cheney/?source=VPP_20220531_EMPET_E5_T0_NS_RS&t=11&akid=2749%2E878179%2Elu9GyM)
---

We don't agree with Liz Cheney on everything, but she's been a vital force in the fight for our democracy on the Jan. 6th Committee.

**This could FINALLY be our chance to hold Trump 's favorite Congressman, Kevin McCarthy, accountable for his role in the deadly Jan. 6th insurrection. _But if we don 't step up now, the MAGA caucus will SILENCE Cheney for good._**

[**Unless 30,000 good Democrats stand with Liz Cheney by MIDNIGHT, Kevin McCarthy and Trump 's cronies will get off SCOT-FREE! Rep. Cheney needs us now - SIGN IMMEDIATELY TO STAND WITH LIZ CHENEY »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand_with_cheney/?source=VPP_20220531_EMPET_E5_T0_NS_RS&t=12&akid=2749%2E878179%2Elu9GyM)

_VPP_

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Please help me stand up to these attacks!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
___ |
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60497877:JnFquZoNR:m:1:3317145305:1C4390DB61ED1227FD3953698CFF201A:r)

---
Peter,

The race-based attacks against me just keep coming.

As much as we try to focus this campaign on the issues that matter to voters like gas prices, record-high inflation, and crime, the Democrats and their allies in the media only want to talk about race.

Check out this recent headline from _The New York Times_ :

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60497877:JnFquZoNR:m:1:3317145305:1C4390DB61ED1227FD3953698CFF201A:r)
The liberal "journalists" at the _Times_ just don't understand Black Republicans, so they build their stories about our Senate race around quotes like this one:

| _**" Mr. Walker was merely a vessel for the G.O.P. and Mr. Trump's ambitions."**_
---

And this:

_**" He's a puppet on a string, and somebody's pulling those strings really good."**_
---

**That's absolutely ridiculous.**

Let me be clear about something: I'm Herschel Walker, and I make my own decisions. Nobody tells me what to do.

**[I need your help to defend myself from these insane attacks.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60497877:JnFquZoNR:m:1:3317145305:1C4390DB61ED1227FD3953698CFF201A:r)**

[** Chip in $3 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60497878:JnFquZoNR:m:1:3317145305:1C4390DB61ED1227FD3953698CFF201A:r)
[** Chip in $15 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60497879:JnFquZoNR:m:1:3317145305:1C4390DB61ED1227FD3953698CFF201A:r)
**I'm running for the Senate because Raphael Warnock is taking our country in the wrong direction and does not represent Georgia values.** I'm running to unite Americans and get our nation back on track before it's too late.

It's becoming clearer by the day the Democrats and the liberal media are going to do everything in their power to distract voters from real issues and the disastrous Biden agenda. After all, if this race is a referendum on our unstable economy, record-high prices of groceries, unsecure border, or catastrophic pullout of troops from Afghanistan, Democrats will lose...and they know it.

**[Can we count on you to send in $5, $25, or even $100 right now?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60497877:JnFquZoNR:m:1:3317145305:1C4390DB61ED1227FD3953698CFF201A:r)** Your donation will help us ensure that voters understand who I am and what I stand for. Peter,

The race-based attacks against me just keep coming.

As much as we try to focus this campaign on the issues that matter to voters like gas prices, record-high inflation, and crime, the Democrats and their allies in the media only want to talk about race.

Check out this recent headline from _The New York Times_ :

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60497718:6kvIlZoNJ:m:1:3253819041:1F497AA7D20CF74246A80DFD98FF036A:r)
The liberal "journalists" at the _Times_ just don't understand Black Republicans, so they build their stories about our Senate race around quotes like this one:

| _**" Mr. Walker was merely a vessel for the G.O.P. and Mr. Trump's ambitions."**_
---

And this:

_**" He's a puppet on a string, and somebody's pulling those strings really good."**_
---

**That's absolutely ridiculous.**

Let me be clear about something: I'm Herschel Walker, and I make my own decisions. Nobody tells me what to do.

**[I need your help to defend myself from these insane attacks.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60497718:6kvIlZoNJ:m:1:3253819041:1F497AA7D20CF74246A80DFD98FF036A:r)**

**I'm running for the Senate because Raphael Warnock is taking our country in the wrong direction and does not represent Georgia values.** I'm running to unite Americans and get our nation back on track before it's too late.

It's becoming clearer by the day the Democrats and the liberal media are going to do everything in their power to distract voters from real issues and the disastrous Biden agenda. After all, if this race is a referendum on our unstable economy, record-high prices of groceries, unsecure border, or catastrophic pullout of troops from Afghanistan, Democrats will lose...and they know it.

**[Can we count on you to send in $5, $25, or even $100 right now?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60497718:6kvIlZoNJ:m:1:3253819041:1F497AA7D20CF74246A80DFD98FF036A:r)** Your donation will help us ensure that voters understand who I am and what I stand for. If we're going to win this race, IT'S CRITICAL WE GO ON OFFENSE AND FOCUS THIS RACE ON ISSUES - NOT DISTRACTIONS.

Please me stand up to these attacks. I am honored to have you in my corner.

Thank you,

| | As long as we keep up our pace and follow our planned path to victory, this seat **_is_** flippable. But, Jack Bergman has an unfair windfall. He's using tens of thousands of **taxpayer dollars** to virtually fund his campaign. In just the last year, he spent more taxpayer money on self-promoting Meta ads than the **_combined_** Meta spending of every Congressperson and Senator in the state. From '21 - '22 his Meta spending exceeded more than all 15 Representatives and Senators. **Yes, this year, he spent more than all of them _combined._** Since 2018, the average amount of federal dollars spent by all other members of the Michigan delegation was **$13K**. In four years, Bergman's office spent **$141K**. It's **11 times** the average, and, remember, it's not coming from his campaign donors. It's at taxpayer expense.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45974343/348309625/-1222122770?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjUwYmE2Mi04ZmUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jZ8wMA_qt38_PfuOyBGvxZ4En6u9UZw5O_xdpAQiorA=&emci=be15e966-85e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=eb50ba62-8fe1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=15167427)
---
The ads aren't helping connect constituents to federal resources, e.g., after a devastating tornado. Instead, they're**divisive, self-promoting ads about wedge issues,** deviating entirely from the purpose of the office's expense. **[Why can they use taxpayer dollars?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45974344/348309626/-1222122770?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjUwYmE2Mi04ZmUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jZ8wMA_qt38_PfuOyBGvxZ4En6u9UZw5O_xdpAQiorA=&emci=be15e966-85e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=eb50ba62-8fe1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=15167427)****[Read more. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45974345/348309627/-1222122770?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjUwYmE2Mi04ZmUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jZ8wMA_qt38_PfuOyBGvxZ4En6u9UZw5O_xdpAQiorA=&emci=be15e966-85e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=eb50ba62-8fe1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=15167427)** This expense is just a small sample and does not include frivolous spending on ads on other websites, mailers, or radio spots. There are a lot. Before we can send Dr. Bob to Congress and fight for campaign finance reform to curb this unethical behavior, we ask you to help fund our honest campaign. Your contribution today will directly benefit our outreach staff and volunteers. We need to take care of our people and fuel our tanks so we can knock on doors, phonebank, text, write postcards, and galvanize voters all summer. [Help us](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45974346/348309628/1280001822?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjUwYmE2Mi04ZmUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jZ8wMA_qt38_PfuOyBGvxZ4En6u9UZw5O_xdpAQiorA=) defeat Jack Bergman so he can't take advantage of citizens in Northern Michigan and the U.P. ever again. Please give anything you can, and it will go a long way to kick off June with a bang. Thank you for joining our fight! -Team Lorinser
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45974347/348309629/1280001822?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjUwYmE2Mi04ZmUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jZ8wMA_qt38_PfuOyBGvxZ4En6u9UZw5O_xdpAQiorA=)

clean_body: You're not going to like this. | | | If we don't hit our fundraising goals in the next few days, our team will struggle to maintain momentum. Cutting resources for our volunteers right now will cost Doc a lot of votes. Here's what we're up against: Bergman's ads cost taxpayers 11 times state average, this year exceeding all other Michigan reps combined = We are expanding rapidly — Which also means expenses are piling up. Can you help us catch up with an more? = | | = | = | | As long as we keep up our pace and follow our planned path to victory, this seat is flippable. But, Jack Bergman has an unfair windfall. He's using tens of thousands of taxpayer dollars to virtually fund his campaign. In just the last year, he spent more taxpayer money on self-promoting Meta ads than the combined Meta spending of every Congressperson and Senator in the state. From '21 - '22 his Meta spending exceeded more than all 15 Representatives and Senators. Yes, this year, he spent more than all of them combined. Since 2018, the average amount of federal dollars spent by all other members of the Michigan delegation was $13K. In four years, Bergman's office spent $141K. It's 11 times the average, and, remember, it's not coming from his campaign donors. It's at taxpayer expense. The ads aren't helping connect constituents to federal resources, e.g., after a devastating tornado. Instead, they'redivisive, self-promoting ads about wedge issues, deviating entirely from the purpose of the office's expense. This expense is just a small sample and does not include frivolous spending on ads on other websites, mailers, or radio spots. There are a lot. Before we can send Dr. Bob to Congress and fight for campaign finance reform to curb this unethical behavior, we ask you to help fund our honest campaign. name: T.W. Shannon
subject: These 3 ideas are destroying young Americans

body:
We’re hearing a lot of horrible things after recent tragedies around the country. But let me tell you what our nation needs to
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7desk3fc0euckp9ec8c8vvfe3mqc1n86v9njmlo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c1jmeor1chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tj46dij1ptksprjedjjmqpbas30clq72stjm4o71odjcaq3dcpmm2pb8tb0sqrrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33dplm1g74tr664rjbc77m2qmash5u)
| | | Friend, We’re hearing a lot of horrible things after recent tragedies around the country. _But let me tell you what our nation needs to hear right now._ **America’s young men and women need hope –– and better role models. But the Woke Left can’t stop corrupting our children with perverted ideas like:**
* You can change your gender to whatever you feel like it.
* Killing an unborn child is “healthcare.”
* America is an irredeemable “racist” country.

---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsudrqroql0vh7poccomn3r2qk9pl55em3r0i29g_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c1jmeor1chh2bs)
---
| | **My name is T.W. Shannon. I’m a lifelong Christian, conservative Oklahoman that believes in protecting our constitutional rights and going ALL IN for America. ** I’ve spent my life spreading the gospel of the power of capitalism and the goodness and opportunity this country has to offer. When I was elected to represent House District 64 in 2006, I was the very first Republican to hold the seat. At the age of 33, I became the youngest person elected as Speaker of the State House in the reddest place in the country, a nationwide first.
---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgt713n39nks1jdaq6ft2njg2bd4uejq87nelhjg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c1jmeor1chh2bs)
---
[**SUPPORT T.W. SHANNON >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zj29lq1riulabr2agqdlr522pr0kquru001vhkg8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c1jmeor1chh2bs)
---
During my time in the state legislature, I successfully...
* Led Oklahoma’s fight to repeal affirmative action, which puts students’ skin color over merit.
* Reformed our welfare system and successfully mandated a 20-hour workweek for able-bodied adult recipients – which became the national model.
* Passed legislation that provided a first-in-the-nation $5K tax deduction to parents of foster children.
* Passed a tax cut to put more money in the pockets of everyday Oklahomans.
* Balanced the Oklahoma state budget.

**_And when President Trump needed someone to step up and replace Herman Cain as the national chair of Black Voices for Trump, I was there, ready to help._**
---
[**FEND OFF WOKE POLITICS**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7l01m15c5edn5s01s2t60eb41pnffaiub5sns9o_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c1jmeor1chh2bs)
---
Even though I’ve been successful in the legislative arena, I’ve also had great success in the private sector. I started my own public relations consulting firm, Shannon Strategies, which I managed for 10 years. And then I went back to my banking roots and led the investment team at Premier Consulting. For the last 5 years, I was CEO of a Community Bank in Oklahoma City. In my first year as CEO, the bank grew 45%, from $130 million in assets to nearly a half-billion in assets – an accomplishment I’m extremely proud of.
**What makes my story so remarkable, friend, is that the woke Left tells people who look like me that achieving the American Dream is**** _impossible, yet here I am!_**
---
[**SEND A PROVEN LEADER TO DC**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3n4gf0uogn7075gbvale4fp4b63bs765ofodjq8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c1jmeor1chh2bs)
---
**Friend, I’m running for the U.S. Senate so I can take on the woke Left, tell our kids the truth about America, and fight for the America First agenda.** **[Can I count on your support?](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z36rpl3178qjpoor5s8hc3ktiv06ea71uovi8l0o_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c1jmeor1chh2bs)**
---
[**DONATE $150 >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zci65fihmc9tucdc9ubcuplvnnp34dagvlvi2bc8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c1jmeor1chh2bs)

clean_body: We’re hearing a lot of horrible things after recent tragedies around the country. But let me tell you what our nation needs to | | | Friend, We’re hearing a lot of horrible things after recent tragedies around the country. But let me tell you what our nation needs to hear right now. America’s young men and women need hope –– and better role models. But the Woke Left can’t stop corrupting our children with perverted ideas like: You can change your gender to whatever you feel like it. Killing an unborn child is “healthcare.” America is an irredeemable “racist” country. | | My name is T.W. Shannon. I’m a lifelong Christian, conservative Oklahoman that believes in protecting our constitutional rights and going ALL IN for America. I’ve spent my life spreading the gospel of the power of capitalism and the goodness and opportunity this country has to offer. When I was elected to represent House District 64 in 2006, I was the very first Republican to hold the seat. At the age of 33, I became the youngest person elected as Speaker of the State House in the reddest place in the country, a nationwide first. During my time in the state legislature, I successfully... Led Oklahoma’s fight to repeal affirmative action, which puts students’ skin color over merit. Reformed our welfare system and successfully mandated a 20-hour workweek for able-bodied adult recipients – which became the national model. Passed legislation that provided a first-in-the-nation $5K tax deduction to parents of foster children. Passed a tax cut to put more money in the pockets of everyday Oklahomans. Balanced the Oklahoma state budget. And when President Trump needed someone to step up and replace Herman Cain as the national chair of Black Voices for Trump, I was there, ready to help. Even though I’ve been successful in the legislative arena, I’ve also had great success in the private sector. I started my own public relations consulting firm, Shannon Strategies, which I managed for 10 years. And then I went back to my banking roots and led the investment team at Premier Consulting. For the last 5 years, I was CEO of a Community Bank in Oklahoma City. In my first year as CEO, the bank grew 45%, from $130 million in assets to nearly a half-billion in assets – an accomplishment I’m extremely proud of. What makes my story so remarkable, friend, is that the woke Left tells people who look like me that achieving the American Dream is impossible, yet here I am! Friend, I’m running for the U.S. Senate so I can take on the woke Left, tell our kids the truth about America, and fight for the America First agenda. Thank you for going All In for America, T.W. subject: My favorite
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, cons
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8lrra7t439b4lo4l76i49alvd92pmr37098id7o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrb7cdge9j74orhchgnasdncgoe9cpk6pi7apdgc2oe2c3i6dp3ap5gc4qe8cjgsv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6hj38ollmkrr4sr66pgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933clgm0pr7cdj61oh5u)
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znmfov9u16ld29mc70lrtt72unqtc7mq2rjpobh8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c1jmeor6c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkhoi9ojkkqp74u4lj6ocv04d4vbj87el43p99g0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c1jmeor6c3h2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ziec8p2mk6t25bc2nv2p0nmpmcare2kjgc679hig_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c1jmeor6c3h2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zplrn6tprr038kf5jlspl9pg6dg10a1tn6cms0i0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c1jmeor6c3h2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9urm9nmktigtfvahom036u7qoo9vpa6h241q9t0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c1jmeor6c3h2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za8t4igcrm3armpb9ofmfpdbv1v5rhur9u3qoshg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c1jmeor6c3h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are the Biden administration’s energy policies affecting you?
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlr4d1tn9g1csqnvkiqn7duirjbf7c5t53fktl8g_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c1jmeor1c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf4s3n6upr8t3lciqeepthcoomdcb2cco74dhk6thm4cpimip65dj4clr76sthe3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6cooreddgc1p7ephh6sqr4ptgmlin49fg)
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znlima1d7fdcamel1m55rq3bhuo55a9ke298ango_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c1jmeor1c5h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpgagpsua58d7ji5oin8ho4m6amha4511bv3mk00_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c1jmeor1c5h2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z60pekejlrh6c49j94lf3n0qgkbqf2ka3pt0aahg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c1jmeor1c5h2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: American Action News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7cen56juqrjo8ljtdnhh71rt0f4qeh0vskfh430_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ulr32olh6pi7adj46dg79cbncdie2d9jesp74dbkm2ob7c356spr8d5n6pqb1c77q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0shkcoq65ddl6up78phkc2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or5c5g6epr3c5g649fg)
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z10eiqlpb0l43d2m69o31i3bscmsgqqeh93e4a28_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c1jmeor1c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkqr5lqlnb3dl7jhn9sl86hjacuhvtimko0utip0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c1jmeor1c1h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zts2cqbfgqohs8p659bnp8nl5fidau2b7nsr0k1o_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c1jmeor1c1h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Brent Bozell
subject: I’m done with these commies
body:
We're in the information age and there is a war being waged against you by radical communists hell-bent on destroying our country. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6083%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=Hb6wYf62iIlihZpxQsk1uA&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62830%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qVZ1NrpIWx%2bSQftRE9e%2buQ&sysid=1)

Friend,

We're in the information age and there is a war being waged against you by radical communists hell-bent on destroying our country.

Today, the media--including Big Tech-are participating in a radical coup against our country.

They’re lying to you, and not even trying to hide it.
* They lied about the Covid pandemic--and we’re still paying the price.
* They lied about Trump colluding with Russia.
* They lie about inflation and say our economy is booming.

They censor conservative voices:
* President Trump was banned from social media, while China and Iran continue their propaganda online.
* Republican Marjorie Taylor Greene was suspended from both Facebook and Twitter.
* Speakers like Ben Shapiro and Ann Coulter have been kicked off college campuses.

They want to destroy America and replace it with a socialist hellhole using Marxist and Maoist tactics.

That’s why the Media Research Center (MRC) is going on offense, and we need your help to lead the way.

[_**Friend, MRC is fighting blatant lies, censorship, and manipulation from the Media and Big Tech. Can you join the fight with a donation of $25, $50, $100, or any amount? Click here to donate today >>> **_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62831%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VCn29iIhV9xUAgjBcZ91bw&sysid=1)

Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the MRC.

MRC is committed to neutralizing leftist bias in the news media and popular culture by educating the public about how it has been integrated into the media.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the leftwing media ... now, 90% DO NOT trust the Fake News media.**

Even though the Media is spending millions of dollars to force their agenda on America, MRC is on the front lines of this information war, and we’re winning.

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62830%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qVZ1NrpIWx%2bSQftRE9e%2buQ&sysid=1)

We’re battling this every day. And, we’ve had some major victories, including a big win against Big Tech.

The MRC’s groundbreaking _**Censored!**_ report exposed attempts by Big Tech to silence conservative speech online and was cited four times in House Judiciary Committee hearings investigating the issue.

The success of this report evolved into further research by MRC staff. This research was then used as a primary source by the Administration to enact 2020’s Executive Order on Preventing Online Censorship.

Friend, this is what your support makes possible. And we have more fights in progress, so you’ll want to stay tuned in for breaking developments. **Click any link below to donate. **

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62832%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=brQhHY%2fSzxbkPsNcEx%2bd6A&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62833%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V%2bK%2b%2bOzyPpAQUeCMcF7lfw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62834%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ap7sGfWtRELYvg8GFDLZaA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62845%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bb5AqfLPwDIF3A0cXtxvvQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62846%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1Prt3JIZ2KnCag8QBV2%2bEA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62847%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OL5wrfJ98HLo6ekTGT3LDg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62848%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pgkFualw3tQsSu%2fM8a7BMw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $5,000 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62849%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4V%2fpgBqXUzJbcnYg%2fpSkGA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62840%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SLprkoF%2fEmkfKlc9Nh2uow&sysid=1)

Thank you,

Brent Bozell
Founder and President of MRC
