name: Roca for Congress
subject: What Happened This Week On The Campaign Trail?
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Roca for Congress | P
body:
Protesting Trone, Meet and Greet, Parades, Volunteering, Fundraising!
---
| | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YSyqg0LpQEkmVtBWKIegnjmdW8EcpkV5pH1vMLXPCmV3ij9mluK-ybQDxca7rqAYYo8b4yxMjYvlPH1zuneOfHud7AttKXiiQeIjwnPA5T4S4yXQX35oLNMbBwZFGds1d8Tz2rRGYfJb6cGHZrQkig==&c=Vkhm8PsavE4-yvDvueQy8xmS_XmHmou6saCl-tdQvxOXgxP5M0a8Zg==&ch=AGKwlT8TuqAiNqEaW2H9trTGz1T0vthm2HzeuBdyYsdotKntzZTBYA==)
---
| | |
---
| WE WORKED HARD THIS PAST WEEK! AND WE NEED YOUR SUPPORT!
---
| | |
---
|
---
| MEET AND GREET AND MEMORIAL DAY PARADES!
---
| | |
---
| It was a big week on the Roca for Congress campaign trail.
We protested in front of part-time congressman David Trone's seemingly forever closed Frederick office on Thursday morning. Some people in the Maryland GOP attempted to astroturf an "MD GOP" event by only inviting one candidate, and having guest speakers from that said candidate's campaign. But we showed up anyway, along with another candidate's campaign. But only Mariela called out the obvious tricks, in her speech while streaming live!
That's because she's a FIGHTER. She doesn't back down from lame political BS, and she won't let attacks from Democrats or other candidates get to her. Mariela stands up for other candidates running against her who are being wronged or unfairly excluded. That's just who she is.
On Thursday evening, we had a great "meet Mariela" event at Mi Rancho Restaurant in Germantown. Thank YOU to everyone who came out and met Mariela and a bunch of other great GOP candidates. The Montgomery County Hispanic Chamber of Commerce did a great job helping with this event!
Saturday, Mariela attended a Latino Veterans event in Beltsville, then headed over to the Sharpsburg Memorial Day parade, where we met plenty of enthusiastic voters tired of the disastrous Biden-Trone agenda and ready for something new in western Maryland. Same story at the Woodsboro Memorial Day parade on Sunday. We loved the outpouring of support and love for our veterans, our fallen, and their families. Memorial Day is an extremely important day to Mariela, who served in Afghanistan in the Air Force. She worked hard during both parades to get her pro-vet, America-first message to as many parade-goers as possible!
If you want to be a part of the team that will send ACLU-funding, open border-promoting, sad trombone David Trone packing in November, WE WANT YOU! Please volunteer by clicking the sign-up button below and we'll get you started right away.
Not much time left until the July 19th primary and we need to get more boots on the ground for Mariela!
Got an event you want to see the Mariela at?
Please email us at info@rocaforcongress.com and we'll be in touch!
---

| WE ARE HALFWAY TO OUR FUNDRAISING GOAL!
It's important for us to finish strong each month with campaign fundraising! This grassroots campaign is being funded by small individual donations and WE NEED YOUR HELP!
Other campaigns have beltway elite fundraisers and wealthy lobbyist parents, and some have funds from many previous runs for office. We don't! We're a small team that's getting our donations from knocking on doors, making calls, texting, and getting to voters where they are.
ANYTHING YOU CAN DO to help us meet our goals for this month will help! If you can chip in $25, $50, $100, or even $500 TODAY you can help send David Trone home to his (out of the district) mansion and elect a strong conservative, proven fighter like Mariela Roca to Congress!

clean_body: Protesting Trone, Meet and Greet, Parades, Volunteering, Fundraising! | | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | WE WORKED HARD THIS PAST WEEK! AND WE NEED YOUR SUPPORT! | | | | | MEET AND GREET AND MEMORIAL DAY PARADES! | | | | It was a big week on the Roca for Congress campaign trail. We protested in front of part-time congressman David Trone's seemingly forever closed Frederick office on Thursday morning. Some people in the Maryland GOP attempted to astroturf an "MD GOP" event by only inviting one candidate, and having guest speakers from that said candidate's campaign. But we showed up anyway, along with another candidate's campaign. But only Mariela called out the obvious tricks, in her speech while streaming live! That's because she's a FIGHTER. She doesn't back down from lame political BS, and she won't let attacks from Democrats or other candidates get to her. Mariela stands up for other candidates running against her who are being wronged or unfairly excluded. That's just who she is. On Thursday evening, we had a great "meet Mariela" event at Mi Rancho Restaurant in Germantown. Thank YOU to everyone who came out and met Mariela and a bunch of other great GOP candidates. The Montgomery County Hispanic Chamber of Commerce did a great job helping with this event! Saturday, Mariela attended a Latino Veterans event in Beltsville, then headed over to the Sharpsburg Memorial Day parade, where we met plenty of enthusiastic voters tired of the disastrous Biden-Trone agenda and ready for something new in western Maryland. Same story at the Woodsboro Memorial Day parade on Sunday. We loved the outpouring of support and love for our veterans, our fallen, and their families. Memorial Day is an extremely important day to Mariela, who served in Afghanistan in the Air Force. She worked hard during both parades to get her pro-vet, America-first message to as many parade-goers as possible! If you want to be a part of the team that will send ACLU-funding, open border-promoting, sad trombone David Trone packing in November, WE WANT YOU! Please volunteer by clicking the sign-up button below and we'll get you started right away. Not much time left until the July 19th primary and we need to get more boots on the ground for Mariela! Got an event you want to see the Mariela at? Please email us at info@rocaforcongress.com and we'll be in touch! | | | == | | | | FUNDRAISING STATUS | | | | | WE ARE HALFWAY TO OUR FUNDRAISING GOAL! It's important for us to finish strong each month with campaign fundraising! This grassroots campaign is being funded by small individual donations and WE NEED YOUR HELP! Other campaigns have beltway elite fundraisers and wealthy lobbyist parents, and some have funds from many previous runs for office. We don't! We're a small team that's getting our donations from knocking on doors, making calls, texting, and getting to voters where they are. ANYTHING YOU CAN DO to help us meet our goals for this month will help! If you can chip in $25, $50, $100, or even $500 TODAY you can help send David Trone home to his (out of the district) mansion and elect a strong conservative, proven fighter like Mariela Roca to Congress! | | | == | | | | DOOR-KNOCKING! | | | | | Want to knock on doors for Mariela? WE NEED YOU! It's fun, it's great exercise, and it's all about meeting new people! We've got a small, dedicated team but we need more people to help us reach thousands of voters in the district. Help us send David Trone packing by talking to voters about Mariela's inspiring story and her America-First agenda on the economy, border and schools! Get in touch by signing up below! | | | == | | | | WE HAVE SIGNS! | | | | | | | | We've got beautiful yard signs in three different sizes! If you want to support Mariela, putting a sign in your yard or in front of your business is one of the best ways you can do that! Click the button below to request a sign! | | == | | JOIN THE ROCA CAMPAIGN AND PLEASE SUPPORT US! | | GET TO KNOW MARIELA == == SIGN UP TO RECEIVE THE ROCA FOR CONGRESS NEWSLETTER == AND PLEASE SUPPORT MARIELA BY MAKING A DONATION BELOW!! | | | == | | | | == == == == | | Paid for By Roca for Congress | P.O. name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Take the National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zk7jqj923q8dhcgiq2bg9i3de88lrnbskvjp8fro_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4ongsdp7ao5meionbdr3mlqecojjcthr6p71ecp34dbhe1gmddj0e1pm6cllmhq70puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg74d366hjjac77maomcc9gm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi46h22sh2s8i66pb1c1ge8oj4cdh2bs)
| | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zkqhmd1uc7itip15inndd3agsgcgs92gudfublkg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c1ge8oj4cdh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zctgb028c1d5q1hqddg0v9cfkqthsai828nh42io_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c1ge8oj4cdh2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztl6vtlnirbpn7e40n6a65afgv3nvm2ku4hhrgq8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1c1ge8oj4cdh2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmm3t8f66hl5t1r4jbor0o8mrem7ce382otjrse0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or5c5g61p32chhm49fg)

subject: Grassley is attacking us on TV

Hello,
A few weeks ago, we made the very hard decision to go up on TV a few weeks early against Chuck Grassley – even though we don’t technically have all the money in our budget to do so just yet.
We needed to introduce Admiral Mike Franken to Iowa voters before Grassley and McConnell’s Super PACs began burying us in lie-filled attack ads.
And our strategy is working: Chuck Grassley has been falling in the polls, and Mike has been surging – the latest poll shows us just three points behind Grassley!
But we got the news that we knew was coming: **Chuck Grassley just launched his first massive TV ad buy attacking us!**
In order to expand our own ad buy and fight back, we’ve set an emergency rapid response fundraising goal of raising $35,000. But Mike’s not taking corporate PAC money. **The only way we’ll hit our goal and turn Iowa blue is if grassroot donors like you give now:**

name: Greg Stamps
subject: The history of capitalism and socialism
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsep7UTh5N

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osep7UTh5N

Dear
Friend,
Over the
last century, free-market capitalism and socialism have provided
the dominant interpretations, and conflicting visions, of
political and economic freedom. In the past few years, we've seen
a growing trend among young Americans in favor of socialism and
against capitalism.

But do
they truly understand the history and outcomes of socialism and
capitalism?

This is
precisely why we put together this brand new eBook, The History
Of Socialism And Capitalism, from Hoover Institution senior
fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.

This
eBook consists of two papers-one from each scholar-written in
conjunction with The Human Prosperity Project on Socialism and
Free-Market Capitalism. This project provides objective and
scholarly analyses of free-market capitalism, socialism, and
hybrid systems and provides evidence on the effectiveness of the
various systems on outcomes that affect prosperity and
well-being.

I think
you will find this new eBook particularly important and timely,
given the recent interest in policies that are radical from a US
historical perspective, some of which are advocated by political
leaders.

Simply
click here to request your free copy of The History Of Socialism
And Capitalism.

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

Peter:
**Is the bogus January 6 Committee just an elaborate scheme to shut down the House Freedom Caucus?**
With the latest round of subpoenas, the Committee has now targeted _every single House Freedom Caucus chairman_ in the group's seven-year history:
▶︎ Jim Jordan,
▶︎ Mark Meadows,
▶︎ Andy Biggs, and
▶︎ Scott Perry.
That's a full Freedom Caucus "BINGO!" on my card.
It's no coincidence that Nancy Pelosi and Liz Cheney's witch hunt found a way to target the four most effective conservative Representatives of the last decade.
And it makes sense given that principled, fighting conservatism is vindicated every day by the failures of the woke, socialist Left and the squishy, corporate right.
[**Please support the House Freedom Caucus today!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60498472:JvPvIZoUN:m:1:3317145305:E86955A24AEDB22A565685AC19BA43E8:r)
The House Freedom Fund was founded by U.S. Rep. Jim Jordan (R-OH), and it's the only grassroots organization exclusively dedicated to defending and growing the House Freedom Caucus.
This is more important than ever. Just look at our country today:
▶︎ Galloping inflation
▶︎ A baby formula shortage
▶︎ Unchecked illegal immigration
▶︎ Spiking crime rates
▶︎ Big Tech collusion and censorship
▶︎ The FBI targeting parents as "domestic terrorists"
The country is crying out for rescue. And what are Nancy Pelosi and Liz Cheney obsessed with? Destroying the Freedom Caucus!
**[Please help us fight back against the anti-American Left!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60498472:JvPvIZoUN:m:1:3317145305:E86955A24AEDB22A565685AC19BA43E8:r)**
They think conservatives are the real threat - not the economy or the border or our kids' educations. No, they only care about punishing, persecuting, and harassing constitutional conservatives, moms and dads, churchgoers, and patriots.
Why? Because they are losing.
Disney stock has plummeted since they decided to be woke activists instead of a family company. Principled conservatives are winning critical primary elections. And Americans greeted the possible overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ with a cheer!
**[Join the fight for freedom!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60498472:JvPvIZoUN:m:1:3317145305:E86955A24AEDB22A565685AC19BA43E8:r)**
The J6 Committee's smear campaign is just the last gasp of the Beltway establishment on its way out of power. Their disastrous rule over our country is coming to an end - and they want to hurt the true leaders who made it happen.
But the House Freedom Fund has their backs. It's our mission to ensure Jordan, Biggs, and Perry win their re-elections.
These men represent the best that America has to offer, and all four will build America's next conservative majority. When Nancy and Liz are put out to pasture, the targets of their subpoenas will still be fighting, leading, and winning the future.
And House Freedom Fund will be with them every step of the way.
Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future. Sincerely,

body:
Peter, it’s Josh Shapiro here — Democratic nominee for Pennsylvania Governor.

**I asked to reach out to you because Doug Mastriano — the most extreme candidate running for Governor in the country — just became the GOP nominee running against me in Pennsylvania.**

Mastriano would ban abortion with no exceptions. He’d end no-excuse vote by mail, and rip away our freedoms. He participated in the insurrection at our nation’s Capitol. When police told him to stop, he defied them. He crossed their barricades.

But despite all that, this race is going to be _close._ Elections analysts have declared the Pennsylvania Governor’s race a Toss Up — which means that having the resources to persuade and turn out every voter we can will make the difference in winning or losing.

**[I need your help to win this incredibly consequential race — and that means building up a war chest ready to defeat Mastriano. | | Hi Peter, Because of your support, we have made it into the June 21st runoff. We couldn't have done this without you! If you are voting absentee, or intend to vote absentee, we want to make sure you submit your request for a ballot ASAP and are able to cast your vote on time! Your absentee ballot request form MUST be received by the voter registration office by JUNE 10th. Completed absentee ballots MUST be received by 7 PM on election day, JUNE 21st. You can learn more about how to submit your absentee ballot request online, via email, mail or in-person here: **[https://georgia.gov/vote-absentee-ballot](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45980334/348327747/-1993801922?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2Q1ZDE4OS1hZGUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q1m0bfoZkXIJED8LSBTBFbHUD38wrEm165aA2bYf8x0=&emci=44991f6d-a5e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=37d5d189-ade1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=23694845)** If you have any more questions, please contact us at (912) 996-9354 or [info@wadeherringforcongress.com](mailto:info@wadeherringforcongress.com "info@wadeherringforcongress.com") Thank you for your continued support. name: Team D'Esposito for Congress
subject: FWD:Midnight Fundraising Deadline
body:
Hi Peter,

Hi Peter,

I wanted to make sure you saw Anthony's email about our midnight deadline from this morning. We need your help to take back the house this November. If there is any way you could rush in a small contribution, it will help us flip this seat. Chip-In [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=first+button&utm_campaign=FWD+Midnight+Deadline+Email]

Thank You,

Team D'Esposito for Congress

---------- Forwarded message ---------

From: Anthony D'Esposito for Congress <anthonydesposito@despositoforcongress.com>

Subject: Fwd: Midnight Fundraising Deadline

---
**Peter,****I’ve been a proud fighter for LGBTQ+ rights for decades now – and as your attorney general, I’ve spent every moment fighting to protect the community from harm.**

In 2019, I led a 22-state coalition that called for federal anti-discrimination laws to protect LGBTQ+ individuals in the workplace. In 2021, I led a coalition of 20 attorneys general against an anti-trans lawsuit in Connecticut and scored a statewide victory for the LGBTQ+ community by ruling that all New Yorkers are entitled to equal access to goods and services. And, most recently, I urged the U.S. Department of Justice to launch a federal investigation into Governor Abbott’s anti-trans law for civil rights violations.

**Peter, the accomplishments above are only a handful of all the victories I’ve won for the LGBTQ+ community in my three and a half years as your attorney general – but this work is far from over. And, with the increase in the GOP’s extremist anti-LGBTQ+ laws that have sprung up across the country, we need to work harder than ever to protect our neighbors and loved ones.**

Peter, I will never flinch in my fight for the voiceless and vulnerable, but I need to know how many fearless fighters I have on my side during this critical moment.
**That’s why, with Pride Month officially underway, I need to collect 5,000 survey responses before midnight. So please, take a moment now to let me know: **
| | **Do you think LGBTQ rights should be protected?**

subject: You’re Invited: We’re celebrating Pride near you!
body:
Join our local Pride events in Pennsylvania.

| | Friend, **Pride is the time to honor the joy and resilience of the LGBTQ+ community.** It’s also an opportunity to remember the hard-earned progress that has been made through the efforts of queer activists, community organizers, and changemakers. **For this year’s Pride, we can’t wait to join the party! We’re joining Pride events in Pennsylvania to celebrate the LGBTQ+ community and the power of our vote. ** **[Act now: Join us at a Pride event near you in Pennsylvania.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45984752/348346605/1689764194?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGJlYWQyMy1iM2UxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6vJO-dtmPLr9GzghTu2IJ66mGLl7G9ye816JOka-H7U=&emci=5549d5a7-fedd-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=68bead23-b3e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=6787172)** **Along with Pride festivities, you'll get the chance to register to vote or update your existing registration at our table.** With the upcoming midterm elections, it’s important that we make our voices heard on the issues we care about. Together, we can use our voices to tell lawmakers to prioritize the dignity and safety of the LGBTQ+ community — across all levels of government. From Pennsylvania and beyond, let’s make a difference in our communities. You don’t want to miss our Pride celebrations! There will be plenty of fun to go around so don’t forget to bring along your friends, family, and loved ones, too. **[Sign up to join an upcoming event near you in Pennsylvania.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45984754/348346608/123680253?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGJlYWQyMy1iM2UxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6vJO-dtmPLr9GzghTu2IJ66mGLl7G9ye816JOka-H7U=&emci=5549d5a7-fedd-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=68bead23-b3e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=6787172)** | [Sign up](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45984755/348346610/-1798634048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGJlYWQyMy1iM2UxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6vJO-dtmPLr9GzghTu2IJ66mGLl7G9ye816JOka-H7U=&emci=5549d5a7-fedd-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=68bead23-b3e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=6787172 "CTA Button")

name: Dan Goldman
subject: I’m proud to announce I’m running for Congress, and I hope you’ll join our team.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DAN GOLDMAN FOR NY
body:
Peter,

There is no doubt that our democracy is under imminent threat from Donald Trump and the Republican party he controls. The attack on the Capitol on January 6 was the beginning, not the end, of Republican efforts to undermine our free and fair elections – the bedrock of our democracy. I say this without exaggeration: the future of our republic depends on electing leaders who will stand up to the most powerful to uphold the will of the people.

That’s why I want you to be among the first to know: I’m running for Congress in New York’s 10th district to defend our democracy and our fundamental rights from existential threats.

When I led the first impeachment investigation of Donald Trump, we proved that a corrupt president had abused the power of his office to undermine our democratic process in a bid to stay in power. The threat hasn’t been extinguished with his forced exit from the White House. Donald Trump and the Republican party he controls are not only trying to take away our rights but are tearing down the foundations of democracy itself. It’s up to all of us to stand up and fight back.

I'm compelled to return to Washington to stand up to Republicans again and serve our community in Congress, and I hope I can count on your support. Please join me and become a Founding Donor of our campaign today >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dg_email_foundingdonor?refcode=em_gld_FR_Launch1_060122_l1]

MAKE A FOUNDING DONATION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dg_email_foundingdonor?refcode=em_gld_FR_Launch1_060122_b1]

Peter, we have a great deal of work to do.

The Supreme Court is poised to overturn Roe v. Wade and reverse a woman’s fundamental right to control her own body and health care. Republicans across the country are scheming to disenfranchise voters and find backdoor ways to overturn the will of the people in the next presidential election. An epidemic of gun violence is terrorizing our streets, subways, grocery stores, houses of worship, and schools — and Republicans are standing in the way of the changes we need to make to keep people safe.

The existential threats to our democracy and our fundamental rights are clear and imminent. We need new voices in Congress with the strength, experience, and courage to stop Republicans and fight for our future.

That means taking on the NRA and getting guns off our streets. It means securing reproductive rights for all at the federal level because we cannot allow the Supreme Court and far-right politicians to take us backwards. And it means passing federal voting rights protections to make sure that every one of us can have a say in our government – and that the vote of the people decides who wins.

I’ve devoted my life to public service — a decade as a federal prosecutor in New York and then as Director of Investigations for the House Intelligence Committee in Congress.

I’ve proudly worked on cases of racial discrimination, taken down mob bosses, and taken on big banks and corporate fraud. I prosecuted cases of gun violence and organized crime to keep New Yorkers safe. Then came Trump’s impeachment. We used aggressive and creative tactics to make our case, and that’s what I plan to do again in Washington.

Through it all, I’ve never been afraid of a fight, especially after staring down the most powerful person on the planet on behalf of the American people.

As your representative, I won’t back down from anyone — and I’ll always fight for our values, for our Constitution, for truth and justice, and for the rights and freedoms that Americans hold dear.

That’s my promise to you, and now I’m hoping I can count on you to join me.

This is a campaign for the people, and by the people, and that’s why I’m not accepting a single penny from corporate PACs. If our movement is going to succeed, I need you to make a contribution of any size to become a Founding Donor of our campaign for Congress. Click here to donate >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dg_email_foundingdonor?refcode=em_gld_FR_Launch1_060122_l2]

MAKE A FOUNDING DONATION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dg_email_foundingdonor?refcode=em_gld_FR_Launch1_060122_b2]

I will always believe that our democracy is worth fighting for.

Thank you for your support, and let’s get to work!

Dan

Dan Goldman is running for Congress to protect our democracy and defend our fundamental rights at a moment when there have never been greater threats to both.

Paid for by DAN GOLDMAN FOR NY
Dan Goldman for NY
PO BOX 3306
New York, NY 10008

body:
Thanks to the generosity of this incredible grassroots team, I was able to hit my May fundraising goal (and then some)! |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45987245/348355663/-1259897921?amount=25&refcode=20220601_f_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2IxYTZlZC1iNWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KLZA9EAXYJ0MncNUQRGjEN6EtVCl2q-NLxG5gqSCLyo=)

Folks,

Thanks to the generosity of this incredible grassroots team, I was able to hit my May fundraising goal (and then some)!

So I’m coming to you with a grateful heart today to say, **_thank you, thank you, thank you!_**

I’m proud to have you by my side in the trenches, and I know that — together — we _will_ win this race, defeat Gov. Ron DeSantis, and build a Florida for All.

— Charlie Crist

**_[P.S. Before you go, will you consider making a donation to my campaign? Gov. DeSantis is working overtime to enact his dangerous, far-right agenda, so we can’t let up now. I hope you’ll make a contribution ASAP. We already know the governor’s army of billionaires is ready to spend whatever it takes to ensure he wins reelection, so every grassroots donation will help my team and I prepare for the inevitable blizzard of attack ads. Please pitch in if you can. Thanks again!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45987247/348355664/-1259897921?amount=25&refcode=20220601_f_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2IxYTZlZC1iNWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KLZA9EAXYJ0MncNUQRGjEN6EtVCl2q-NLxG5gqSCLyo=)_**

subject: Did you miss his message?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee - Washington PAC,
body:
|
---
| | | Peter, Governor DeSantis reached out. Did you miss his message? See his important message on Biden's Border Crisis below:
---
| | [SECURE THE BORDER](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60500175:JURBdZopN:m:1:3317145305:61C7DA31730A4F77842F7A79CBF314F5:r)
---

\---------- Forwarded message ----------From: Ron DeSantisSubject: Reject Biden's Open BordersTo: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60500175:JURBdZopN:m:1:3317145305:61C7DA31730A4F77842F7A79CBF314F5:r "data-amp-placeholder-2-amp-end")**
Peter, this is Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis.

_**[I just sued Biden over his brazen disregard for our immigration laws.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60500175:JURBdZopN:m:1:3317145305:61C7DA31730A4F77842F7A79CBF314F5:r "I just sued Biden over his brazen disregard for our immigration laws.")**_

Biden's border crisis is out of control, and states like Florida are taking a stand against the Administration's reckless policy of open borders and mass illegal immigration.
---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60500175:JURBdZopN:m:1:3317145305:61C7DA31730A4F77842F7A79CBF314F5:r)
---
While the Biden Administration restricts your rights, wastes your money, and forces draconian mandates on its citizens, illegal migrants are being given a free pass on all of the above. Not only did Biden turn his back on the border crisis he created, but he's also using state resources to prop up his failed policies.

_**[State Republicans across the country need your support to secure our borders.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60500175:JURBdZopN:m:1:3317145305:61C7DA31730A4F77842F7A79CBF314F5:r "State Republicans across the country need your support to secure our borders.")**_
_**[ALL STATES ARE BORDER STATES](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60500176:JURBdZopN:m:1:3317145305:61C7DA31730A4F77842F7A79CBF314F5:r "ALL STATES ARE BORDER STATES")**_
**[$250 TO SAVE OUR STATES](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60500177:JURBdZopN:m:1:3317145305:61C7DA31730A4F77842F7A79CBF314F5:r "$250 TO SAVE
OUR STATES")

[$100 TO SAVE OUR STATES](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60500178:JURBdZopN:m:1:3317145305:61C7DA31730A4F77842F7A79CBF314F5:r "$100 TO SAVE
OUR STATES")

[$75 TO SAVE OUR STATES](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60500179:JURBdZopN:m:1:3317145305:61C7DA31730A4F77842F7A79CBF314F5:r "$75 TO SAVE
OUR STATES")

[$50 TO SAVE OUR STATES](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60500180:JURBdZopN:m:1:3317145305:61C7DA31730A4F77842F7A79CBF314F5:r "$50 TO SAVE
OUR STATES")

[$25 TO SAVE OUR STATES](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60500175:JURBdZopN:m:1:3317145305:61C7DA31730A4F77842F7A79CBF314F5:r "$25 TO SAVE
OUR STATES")**
YOU shouldn't bear the brunt of Biden's recklessness, and that's why State GOP are fighting back. **[Stand with us today to protect our states from Open Borders Biden's dangerous agenda.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60500175:JURBdZopN:m:1:3317145305:61C7DA31730A4F77842F7A79CBF314F5:r "Stand with us today to protect our states from Open Borders Biden's dangerous agenda.")**

Best,
Governor Ron DeSantis

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.

body:
[](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiytkkd-bjututkitk-r/) Friends, We wanted to make sure you saw Mark's email and also to provide a slightly lengthier explanation for why this financial deadline is so important.[**Tonight is a major end-of-month financial deadline for our campaign, and we are still $2,330 behind. Please click here to help.**](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiytkkd-bjututkitk-y/) Mark is running as an America First candidate for U.S. Senate in Missouri, and he is the only one in the race who isn't a career politician.That means his opponents have access to mega-bundlers who can cut million-dollar checks, and they also have ties to party insiders like Kevin McCarthy and Mitch McConnell who have proven to be complete RINOs.If Mark is going to have any chance of competing against these politicians (should call them criminals) then he needs our support before this critical deadline.Coming up short would mean budget cuts with not much time left before the election. **So, knowing how important this is, can Mark count on your support?** [DONATE NOW](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiytkkd-bjututkitk-j/) Thank you,McCloskey Finance Team \---------Forwarded Message-------
From: **Mark McCloskey**
Date: Sun. May 29, 2022 at 10:00 AM

May 29, 2022 at 10:00 AM Subject: This email is just two sentences - please read it Friend, We have an urgent end-of-month financial deadline Tuesday that will impact our campaign's operations for the coming months and we 're still $3,980 behind funding our budget needs.Please, will you help us make up the deficit with an urgently needed donation of or Thank you,Mark McCloskey | | 4579 Laclede Ave PMB 335, Saint Louis, MO 63108 |

name: Peter Franchot
subject: I’ve been endorsed by the North Baltimore County Democratic Club!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
Major announcement – I’m thrilled to have been endorsed by the North Baltimore County Democratic Club! The NBCDC is an incredible grassroots organization dedicated to giving voice to our local communities by electing Democrats up and down the ballot. As Maryland’s next Governor, I’ll proudly partner with groups like them to deliver the bold solutions and concrete results that our working families deserve. To our Democratic Club members, I am honored to have received your trust and friendship.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/northbaltimorecountydemclubendorsement?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/northbaltimorecountydemclubendorsement?amount=20.22]
This latest endorsement adds to the growing strength of our inclusive, statewide coalition of support. I’ve been endorsed by more than 120 current and former elected officials, local Democratic organizations, and labor unions – the most of any candidate for Governor in this race. And I am so proud that the overwhelming majority of our donations come from within the state of Maryland. As the Local Candidate for Governor, I’m building a movement powered at the grassroots by local Maryland workers, activists, allies, friends, and neighbors.
Our movement is closer to the finish line than any other team in this race. We’re leading in the polls, and with your help, we’re going to widen our lead even further. Fresh off the heels of this major announcement, will you chip in a small amount to power our movement to victory? We’re looking to gain 50 new grassroots donations by 11:59 PM tonight, and your support can help get us to our goal.
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/northbaltimorecountydemclubendorsement?amount=10]
CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/northbaltimorecountydemclubendorsement?amount=20.22]
CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/northbaltimorecountydemclubendorsement?amount=50]
CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/northbaltimorecountydemclubendorsement?amount=100]
CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/northbaltimorecountydemclubendorsement]
From combating the student debt crisis, to lowering the costs of healthcare and housing, to making Maryland the first carbon neutral state in the nation, we have an exciting opportunity to lift our communities into the high quality of life that they deserve.
Your contribution will help pay for the critical tools we need to reach out to voters and secure our victory, including:
*
Printing
more
yard
signs,
field
literature,
and
mail
pieces
*
Running
more
ads
online
and
on
television
*
Creating
more
T-shirts,
stickers
and
bumper
magnets
*
Opening
future
field
offices
*
Hiring
more
field
organizers
*
Recruiting
more
volunteers
*
And
so
much
more!
Our challenges are sweeping. So too must be our solutions. Enough talk – let’s get it done! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/northbaltimorecountydemclubendorsement?amount=20.22]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/northbaltimorecountydemclubendorsement?amount=20.22]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

name: Team Hageman
subject: Weekly Wyoming Wrap-Up & Upcoming Events
body: | | | | --- [](https://u23309276.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=s0AEtEaIpshapt9Xu8LFfsDNvMm2mWEtLHGkZhNoK3essNIODZCR8QgwAPj8QnLU-Ln6_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6cT7oJDn3U-2FLfqS-2FGClcPmvChv58mBJ373Zv7epB7IYltJN4VgVvdHbUsK2d1517aAZq8tFWNPu71OMIZSVIzwBAHtrjQk5-2Fuwfeezo3QqOP5FtbvsDecmr9OAcAksQABiNb4gF2kA7M-2F8GdWPAay1ZCkWWCXY5MGPXoT73RfL5bX2cNSz6cGaMudWQwO-2FY5xW-2FvxbqmJyQizXhXNZh6Wp29E8HTVHniSFCYnEZ-2FmKhGyQcmwPvPx2rvVOYipdLoq-2B-2BwPzRp6amFG5uUtV9-2B1qIVtXyTvpIuI4lf8GlMBmNDfSMrXUxOt-2FpchgFEFd-2BApYh3FOU1PzfbTlG5tS4xKGTCNxGu1C-2BJed8rkbVJaj5aOEMJlRd8V1X-2BtSHc5W-2BHWYNdV6S98EsapBkJVEe7YNsnKpIlx9rwqKr7pwUWNFIFAstu9vJWGEAozqyzFfSVLMHxJvt0GdaXTBjS8PvR4oko6ClYe2yuAopHcCO0UKD2UKrsgifdFEP9J3jLAs-2FvfKKrTPq1velt-2F3exeXgPf4oGoAxPnxA6mwlvOfvOZuC0RKPq3UlKoGXSvSj6iU5dBWZS-2B0JtkgpWaNQVH1RX-2BuH9XNMivLv-2FNJgEGgLt0qI5Pd3njlEHUCrmjkM8D8FZFerEP0EcPmfANZHDGfgquPDIOjZvhFgqKY3gShu9gzwz6A1ipQRux9v-2FOa7eWkQoWC9jasWFrBLG1V7y3w9SR23T9DjOnvtSE74NiMz5RQoI629MdNXpe8dnjpKfrb0SnkNX4qSmHmMvP0E13CPl3qn9tzVX7-2FLZHWeOVNi9bDe-2F2XQ9dlwyAQ4HvUNn65N-2B79nBR203m39CuLbW6Djpe9Q-3D-3D) --- Friends, Welcome back to the “Weekly Wyoming Wrap-Up.” It was a great week for the campaign with President Trump’s “Save Wyoming” rally in Casper. Our field program is ramping up in full force. If you would like to support Harriet through voter contact, please get in touch with Kael at [Kael@hagemanforwyoming.com](mailto:kael@hagemanforwyoming.com?subject=&body=). We will be using the Campaign Sidekick phone application for both door-to-door contact and phone calls. The app is very easy to use, and you can make phone calls from your own home! As we move in to parade season, please let us know if you would like to help us with putting together a float or a group of parade walkers in your area to represent Hageman for Wyoming! For Wyoming, Team Hageman --- **Around Wyoming! ** Over 150 supporters joined Harriet at a barn dance in Wheatland with delicious food from Miner’s and Stockman’s in Hartville. --- --- --- --- --- --- --- President Trump was in Casper on Saturday for a Save Wyoming rally in which Harriet was a guest speaker. The event was the largest at the Casper Ford Event Center- drawing a bigger crowd than Garth Brooks! Lots of friends and family and folks from across the state made their way to Casper to hear our 45th President in person. --- --- --- --- --- --- --- --- --- --- **Views From the Road ** On Sunday, Harriet visited the horse sale at the Pitchfork Ranch in Meeteetse. It was a beautiful day! --- --- --- --- --- In the News Harriet’s full speech from the Save Wyoming rally can be found clean_body: | | | | Friends, Welcome back to the “Weekly Wyoming Wrap-Up.” It was a great week for the campaign with President Trump’s “Save Wyoming” rally in Casper. Our field program is ramping up in full force. If you would like to support Harriet through voter contact, please get in touch with Kael at mailto:kael@hagemanforwyoming.com?subject=&body=. We will be using the Campaign Sidekick phone application for both door-to-door contact and phone calls. The app is very easy to use, and you can make phone calls from your own home! As we move in to parade season, please let us know if you would like to help us with putting together a float or a group of parade walkers in your area to represent Hageman for Wyoming! For Wyoming, Team Hageman Around Wyoming! Over 150 supporters joined Harriet at a barn dance in Wheatland with delicious food from Miner’s and Stockman’s in Hartville. President Trump was in Casper on Saturday for a Save Wyoming rally in which Harriet was a guest speaker. The event was the largest at the Casper Ford Event Center- drawing a bigger crowd than Garth Brooks! Lots of friends and family and folks from across the state made their way to Casper to hear our 45th President in person. Views From the Road On Sunday, Harriet visited the horse sale at the Pitchfork Ranch in Meeteetse. It was a beautiful day! In the News Harriet’s full speech from the Save Wyoming rally can be found "HERE") "This is MAGA County: Donald Trump Takes the Ford Wyoming Center Stage in Casper") "Cheney reelection video ignores inflation, domestic energy production curbs under Biden") Upcoming Events! We have numerous planned events throughout this spring and summer, with more being added each week. Please help us spread the word by sharing this information. You can stay informed about our upcoming events by visiting our "Facebook") page or our website, ""). Wednesday, June 1st 6:00 pm Newcastle Townhall Newcastle Lodge and Convention Center 22918 U.S. Highway 85, Newcastle Saturday, June 4th 2:30 pm 30x30 Discussion Big Horn County Weed and Pest 4782 US-310, Greybull Monday, June 6th 7:00 am Breakfast with Representative Jim Banks in Cheyenne Little America 2800 Lincoln Way Cheyenne WY 82009 (RSVP Requested to mailto:Carly@hagemanforwyoming.com "Carly@hagemanforwyoming.com")) Wednesday, June 9th Campaign for Liberty Casper, WY Saturday, June 11th 9:00 am Glendo Townhall Micke’s Restaurant 302 B St, Glendo Friday, June 17th 2:00 pm Cody Meet & Greet Big Horn Medical Center 1728 8th St., Cody Saturday, June 18th 1:00 pm Cokeville Candidate Forum Wednesday, June 22nd 5:00 pm Gillette Chamber Candidate Ice Cream Social Thursday, June 23rd 5:30 pm Buffalo Town Hall Bomber Mountain Civic Center 63 N Burritt Ave, Buffalo Friday, June 24th Sheridan County GOP Statewide Candidate Q&A Best Western Sheridan Center 612 N Main St, Sheridan Sunday, June 26th Pine Bluffs Candidate Pie Social hagemanforwyoming.com | | | | DONATE BY MAIL: Hageman for Wyoming P.O. name: Bob Casey
subject: The last week has been challenging, but here's why I'm hopeful.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
It's going to take all of us to support the campaigns that need us the most. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45989623/348367138/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDE5Zjk4NS1iYmUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FCxrC6W_8oRzs1UZ-mJKGZO8g0RmlRIFCVWkWGtuzSA=&emci=e88ceff6-24e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=dd19f985-bbe1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=8943725) Peter,

The last few weeks have been hard. The last two years as well.

It would be tempting right now for many of us to disengage, but despite all the challenges we face, I remain hopeful.

The relief that we fought for over the past few years has helped families pay the rent and put food on the table. We've invested in new jobs, stronger communities, and more opportunity for all. You've helped make a real difference in the lives of your neighbors, and, I hope, you haven't given up.

Because if we keep moving forward and grow our majority, there is so much more we can accomplish. We've already found ourselves just a handful of votes away from victory on so many issues, like common sense gun reforms and health care. And if we expand our majority, we will win.

I'm as committed as ever to defending the victories we've already won, and to supporting the next generation of leaders who are fighting to break new ground and flip red seats across the Nation.

Now, more than ever, we have to stand together. It's going to take all of us and it's going to take a strong financial foundation to support the campaigns that need us the most.

[**Will you hold onto hope and keep fighting alongside me? If you're ready to win on the issues that matter today and every day, please chip in to help my team and I expand the Senate majority and fight for our future.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45989624/348367140/1342156313?refcode=em22_220531_EOM5bc_fndd_gq_act___bc_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220531_EOM5bc_fndd_gq_act___bc_ettx&utm_medium=email&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDE5Zjk4NS1iYmUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FCxrC6W_8oRzs1UZ-mJKGZO8g0RmlRIFCVWkWGtuzSA=)

Thank you for doing your part,

name: John King
subject: I’m proud to say…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
I am humbled by the surge of support that came through to push us across the finish line. Every one of you has been instrumental in helping us reach our goal in time last night.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45989661/348367286/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220601-srv_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220601-srv_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220601&&&&utm_content=srv_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=c119f985-bbe1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTE5Zjk4NS1iYmUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=amEiN4FCZo2bbfqMNgkKjd73OCJttyDDlxBrcLywXos=) | Peter — thank you! **Last night, I am proud to say that we reached our May goal just in time. ** I am humbled by the surge of support that came through to push us across the finish line. Every one of you has been instrumental in helping us reach our goal in time last night. The support that you’ve shown our campaign over the past few days and your commitment to helping us build a more equitable Maryland reaffirms to my team and me that our momentum is only growing. **I also wanted to reach out to let you know that later tonight, I will be participating in the Maryland State Bar Association gubernatorial debate in Ocean City!** I’m looking forward to heading down to the ocean and sharing not just the policies I believe in for Maryland but the precise steps a King-Siri administration would take to lead our state toward a more just future. I hope you’ll consider tuning in to see for yourself the radical juxtaposition between my ambitious, progressive agenda and that of my insider, establishment opponents. [_**If you have a moment, will you submit whatever questions YOU think should be asked tonight?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45989662/348367287/1146804323?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTE5Zjk4NS1iYmUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=amEiN4FCZo2bbfqMNgkKjd73OCJttyDDlxBrcLywXos=&emci=6edabed8-afe1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=c119f985-bbe1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=24635484) | | [LET US KNOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45989663/348367288/1146804323?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTE5Zjk4NS1iYmUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=amEiN4FCZo2bbfqMNgkKjd73OCJttyDDlxBrcLywXos=&emci=6edabed8-afe1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=c119f985-bbe1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=24635484)
---
From reproductive rights to education reform to cannabis legalization, there’s plenty on the ballot this year. Marylanders deserve a governor with actual plans and policies to address the big challenges in our state, and I would really appreciate hearing what issues matter most to you and your family. [_**What do you think our debate should touch on?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45989665/348367289/-1644883326?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTE5Zjk4NS1iYmUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=amEiN4FCZo2bbfqMNgkKjd73OCJttyDDlxBrcLywXos=&emci=6edabed8-afe1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=c119f985-bbe1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=24635484)
I look forward to reading your responses before I take the stage tonight.
Thank you,
John King

clean_body: I am humbled by the surge of support that came through to push us across the finish line. Every one of you has been instrumental in helping us reach our goal in time last night. = | Peter — thank you! Last night, I am proud to say that we reached our May goal just in time. I am humbled by the surge of support that came through to push us across the finish line. Every one of you has been instrumental in helping us reach our goal in time last night. The support that you’ve shown our campaign over the past few days and your commitment to helping us build a more equitable Maryland reaffirms to my team and me that our momentum is only growing. I also wanted to reach out to let you know that later tonight, I will be participating in the Maryland State Bar Association gubernatorial debate in Ocean City! I’m looking forward to heading down to the ocean and sharing not just the policies I believe in for Maryland but the precise steps a King-Siri administration would take to lead our state toward a more just future. I hope you’ll consider tuning in to see for yourself the radical juxtaposition between my ambitious, progressive agenda and that of my insider, establishment opponents. | | From reproductive rights to education reform to cannabis legalization, there’s plenty on the ballot this year. Marylanders deserve a governor with actual plans and policies to address the big challenges in our state, and I would really appreciate hearing what issues matter most to you and your family. I look forward to reading your responses before I take the stage tonight. name: Nat Flanagan, United Rural Democrats
subject: Happy Pride, Peter 🏳️‍🌈🏳️‍⚧️
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
We need to celebrate & then get to work

| |
---
Hi Peter – I wanted to be the first to wish you an early Happy Pride Month! As a proud young trans woman, June serves as an incredible time to celebrate LGBTQ folks and show support for our community. **But it also serves as a reminder of the discrimination and injustice happening to queer, specifically transgender, individuals.** Since the start of 2022 alone, Republicans across the country have introduced more than 300 bills targeting LGBTQ individuals in state legislatures. [__**Join me in protecting LGBTQ+ rights here →**__](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45990035/348369326/311099802?refcode2=df33613a-bce1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&refcode=220601_nf_pridemonth_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkzMDg1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRmMzM2MTNhLWJjZTEtZWMxMS1iNjU2LTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TPw44OPJM_L1tTbUP1xJ58DN4iqaV1cUwCEU-ZLnnek=) Republicans have already passed legislation to limit our reproductive rights, access to basic healthcare, and our ability to be who we are. The fact of the matter is that the GOP has launched an anti-LGBTQ culture war – and it's growing in momentum. This is personal, Peter. **I’m also a resident of rural America. I live in the Appalachian Hills of Southeast Ohio, and I’ve seen what happens when young people like me feel left behind by their own representatives.** Rural America needs the focus, support, and action of local, state, and federal officials. We need our representatives to be proud to serve us and make our communities a better place to live, work, learn, and raise families. **These are basic needs — no matter who we are, who we love, what we look like or how we identify ourselves.** That’s why this Pride Month, I encourage you to join me and the United Rural Democrats in fighting for that vision of rural America. [**Peter, this election year is critical, especially for the LGBTQ+ community. This Pride Month, can you contribute any amount to protect our name: South Bay CRA
subject: Special Announcement: CRA Endorsement of Matt Rodriguez for Sheriff of LA County
body:
Special Announcement: CRA Endorsement of Matt Rodriguez for Sheriff of LA County South Bay CRA News Last night, Delegates from all nine CRA Chapters
| |
---
|
---
## Special Announcement: CRA Endorsement of Matt Rodriguez for Sheriff of LA County
---
|
---
|
---
# **South Bay CRA News**
Last night, Delegates from all nine CRA Chapters in Los Angeles County met with County Sheriff Candidate, Matt Rodriguez, and voted to endorse Matt for LA County Sheriff.
Matt received more than the required two/thirds majority of votes required for endorsement by the California Republican Assembly.
Matt is the only Republican running for Sheriff. He is a true life-long conservative who stands 100% behind public safety. Matt holds an impressive record as a Sheriff Deputy for 20 years,Transportation Public Safety Administrator for Metrolink, and Chief of Police for the City of Commerce. He will arrest and detain the criminals, and uphold the 2nd Amendment rights of law abiding citizens.
Matt is the Sheriff we need!
Vote Centers are now open.
Show your support for a true conservative and Vote for Matt.
**Remember our club meets the 4th Monday of every month.**
Blessed and Free
**Nena Gates**
President
nenarenae2@gmail.com
|
---
We meet on the 4th Monday of every month, And currently, we meet at the Walteria Business Club 24004 Neece Ave, Torrance, CA at 6:15pm This location will be changing back to the El Segundo Library in July.
If you want to Join the fight, you can get started at this link!
[CLICK TO JOIN THE SOUTH BAY CRA](https://sable.madmimi.com/c/436516?id=40299.97.1.5f26c19ff8c321c4a40b01e9d1685346)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
This year's Pride Month is particularly important
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45992234/348378331/1488084921?code=jtk3333-ot-nd&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&refcode=jtk3333-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmM1Njk2OS1jMGUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MCVl-pMoOuTGFXjE0uhKcbsdC8kNx-xFMdbIMGYYMZw=&emci=a1b5d1c3-29e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=42c56969-c0e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=20244100)
---
Friend,

Today is the first day of Pride Month, and I'm proud to stand alongside LGBTQ+ advocates who are fighting every day for equitable treatment.
This year's Pride Month is particularly important: GOP state legislatures have introduced a record number of bills that attack LGBTQ+ people for just being who they are.**And right here in Florida, Ron DeSantis and Marco Rubio have supported some truly repulsive and discriminatory laws.**
This year alone, Florida passed the "Don't Say Gay" bill to erase and silence LGBTQ+ kids and teachers in the classroom – just as ultraconservative politicians are doing everything in their power to stop teachers, parents and doctors from supporting transgender youth.
**That's why I'm working to pass the Equality Act, which would federally protect LGBTQ+ rights – so that one day, every American can love who they love and freely express their true identities without facing discrimination. And I'm asking 4 more supporters from your area to sign my petition by midnight tonight.**
**[If you're with me, will you please kick off Pride Month by calling on the U.S. Senate to pass the Equality Act? The GOP is pulling out all the stops to block this bill, so we need all hands on deck to get it passed.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45992235/348378332/1488084921?code=jtk3333-ot-nd&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&refcode=jtk3333-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmM1Njk2OS1jMGUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MCVl-pMoOuTGFXjE0uhKcbsdC8kNx-xFMdbIMGYYMZw=&emci=a1b5d1c3-29e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=42c56969-c0e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=20244100)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45992236/348378333/1488084921?code=jtk3333-ot-nd&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&refcode=jtk3333-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmM1Njk2OS1jMGUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MCVl-pMoOuTGFXjE0uhKcbsdC8kNx-xFMdbIMGYYMZw=&emci=a1b5d1c3-29e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=42c56969-c0e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=20244100)
_That's me at last year's Pride parade. I'll never stop fighting for LGBTQ+ equality._
Thank you for joining the fight for LGBTQ+ equality.

– Congresswoman Val Demings

subject: Quick question,
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brian Dahle for Governor 2022
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=d8d05b0654&e=f9133ea432)
---
|
Hi , Today I want to say thank you for your support.

Our campaign couldn’t have made it this far without you, and we have one big finish line in sight: **June 7th.**

I’m hoping I can ask you a favor: [I really need your help to make sure our campaign has the funding it needs to win the primary vote on June 7th.](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=b883040d84&e=f9133ea432)

While we are proud to have set a record of uniting the party around a single candidate prior to the primary election, we still desperately need the funding to get our message out to California voters.

And after what we’ve seen from Newsom over the last 4 years, there has never been a more critical year for Californians to take a stance for change.

Your funding will go straight towards ads, social media, radio, tv, mailers, etc. encouraging Californians to raise their voice.

Can I count on you to help us out? Any donation amount is helpful!
---
| [I CAN HELP!](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=7ae2a9b8eb&e=f9133ea432 "I CAN HELP!")
---
| With just two weeks left, I want to finish strong, and I can with your support.

If you could make a donation today, we will put it to good use immediately!
---
| [DONATE HERE](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=a02b08c919&e=f9133ea432 "DONATE HERE")
---
| Thank you,

Senator Brian Dahle
---

name: Dr. Yadira Caraveo
subject: We need more pro-choice women in Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45992933/348381372/748461398?refcode=fl_em_ta_20220601split314_dyc_allop_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmIwOGYzNi1jM2UxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WXHrmFDPNB9eVZHEEz6chVFnwILekEyIhKcYc_C5T64=)
---
Peter, With the Supreme Court poised to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , it’s never been more important to elect pro-choice, pro-science women to office. **The same Republicans who championed overturning Roe and defunding Planned Parenthood are just 5 seats shy of winning a majority in the House this November.** That’s why I’m asking if you’ll split a donation between my campaign for Congress here in Colorado’s 8th District, Lauren Underwood in Illinois’ 14th Congressional District, Dr. Kim Schrier in Washington’s 8th Congressional District, Dr. Annie Andrews in South Carolina’s 1st Congressional District, and 314 Action Fund — the only group working to elect Democratic scientists like us to office at all levels. [**We need pro-choice women with backgrounds in healthcare in Congress more than ever before. A donation of $5 might not seem like it will make too much of a difference by itself. But when thousands of you chip in, in races as close as ours, it will make all the difference. Pitch in now →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45992934/348381373/748461398?refcode=fl_em_ta_20220601split314_dyc_allop_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmIwOGYzNi1jM2UxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WXHrmFDPNB9eVZHEEz6chVFnwILekEyIhKcYc_C5T64=) | [DONATE TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45992935/348381374/748461398?refcode=fl_em_ta_20220601split314_dyc_allop_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmIwOGYzNi1jM2UxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WXHrmFDPNB9eVZHEEz6chVFnwILekEyIhKcYc_C5T64=)
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45992936/348381375/748461398?refcode=fl_em_ta_20220601split314_dyc_allop_xx_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmIwOGYzNi1jM2UxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WXHrmFDPNB9eVZHEEz6chVFnwILekEyIhKcYc_C5T64=) **Lauren Underwood (IL-14)** – When Lauren Underwood announced she was running as a first-time candidate against a Republican incumbent who won re-election by nearly 20 points in 2016, she was considered a long shot. But Lauren is no stranger to tough fights. She’s a registered nurse, she helped the Obama administration implement the Affordable Care Act, and like tens of millions of Americans living with a pre-existing condition, she refused to sit on the sidelines as Republicans (like her Congressman at the time) voted repeatedly to destroy those protections. Lauren’s victory in Illinois’ 14th Congressional District helped Democrats flip the House in 2018 – and her re-election in 2020 was one of the closest races in the country. We’ll need to re-elect Lauren in this critical seat if we want to hold onto our House majority.
---

clean_body: | = Peter, With the Supreme Court poised to overturn Roe v. Wade , it’s never been more important to elect pro-choice, pro-science women to office. The same Republicans who championed overturning Roe and defunding Planned Parenthood are just 5 seats shy of winning a majority in the House this November. That’s why I’m asking if you’ll split a donation between my campaign for Congress here in Colorado’s 8th District, Lauren Underwood in Illinois’ 14th Congressional District, Dr. Kim Schrier in Washington’s 8th Congressional District, Dr. Annie Andrews in South Carolina’s 1st Congressional District, and 314 Action Fund — the only group working to elect Democratic scientists like us to office at all levels. = | = = Lauren Underwood (IL-14) – When Lauren Underwood announced she was running as a first-time candidate against a Republican incumbent who won re-election by nearly 20 points in 2016, she was considered a long shot. But Lauren is no stranger to tough fights. She’s a registered nurse, she helped the Obama administration implement the Affordable Care Act, and like tens of millions of Americans living with a pre-existing condition, she refused to sit on the sidelines as Republicans (like her Congressman at the time) voted repeatedly to destroy those protections. Lauren’s victory in Illinois’ 14th Congressional District helped Democrats flip the House in 2018 – and her re-election in 2020 was one of the closest races in the country. We’ll need to re-elect Lauren in this critical seat if we want to hold onto our House majority. = Dr. Kim Schrier (WA-8) – Washington’s 8th Congressional District had never been represented by a Democrat in our country’s history. That is, until Dr. Kim Schrier, a local pediatrician, ran as a first-time candidate and ended up winning one of the most competitive and most expensive House races in 2018. When Kim was sworn into office, she became the only woman physician serving in the entire U.S. Congress. Republicans have made unseating Kim a top priority of theirs as she represents a historically Republican-held seat. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/martinlaunch [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/martinlaunch]
Dear Peter,
Let me be crystal clear, I will NEVER neglect the safety of Tennesseeans to win the approval of groups like NRA.
Recently, I was approached to answer an endorsement application sent by none other than the NRA. ( You can read my full statement here. [https://twitter.com/jasonbmartin/status/1530310014975582208] )
Here's what I'll tell you...when elected as the 51st Governor of Tennessee I will work tirelessly to ensure that every radical gun law that groups like the NRA have sponsored and lobbied for in our state is repealed and revoked. We have a moral obligation to protect children from the epedemic that is gun violence.
Let me reiterate, I AM LIVID AS HELL that groups like the NRA are able to profit off of the deaths of members of our state and our community, and I will do everything in my power to protect every single Tennessean in this state.
All the best,
Dr. Jason Martin

name: Brent Bozell
subject: I’m done with these commies
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60501087:6vd37ZoZN:m:1:3317145305:976D0BD73E3C1BEE3D35B5027BCD1B4C:r)

Peter,

We're in the information age and there is a war being waged against you by radical communists hell-bent on destroying our country.

Today, the media--including Big Tech-are participating in a radical coup against our country.

They're lying to you, and not even trying to hide it.
* They lied about the Covid pandemic--and we're still paying the price.
* They lied about Trump colluding with Russia.
* They lie about inflation and say our economy is booming.

They censor conservative voices:
* President Trump was banned from social media, while China and Iran continue their propaganda online.
* Republican Marjorie Taylor Greene was suspended from both Facebook and Twitter.
* Speakers like Ben Shapiro and Ann Coulter have been kicked off college campuses.

They want to destroy America and replace it with a socialist hellhole using Marxist and Maoist tactics.

That's why the Media Research Center (MRC) is going on offense, and we need your help to lead the way.

[_**Peter, MRC is fighting blatant lies, censorship, and manipulation from the Media and Big Tech. Can you join the fight with a donation of $25, $50, $100, or any amount? Click here to donate today >>> **_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60501087:6vd37ZoZN:m:1:3317145305:976D0BD73E3C1BEE3D35B5027BCD1B4C:r)

Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the MRC.

MRC is committed to neutralizing leftist bias in the news media and popular culture by educating the public about how it has been integrated into the media.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the leftwing media ... now, 90% DO NOT trust the Fake News media.**

Even though the Media is spending millions of dollars to force their agenda on America, MRC is on the front lines of this information war, and we're winning.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60501087:6vd37ZoZN:m:1:3317145305:976D0BD73E3C1BEE3D35B5027BCD1B4C:r)

We're battling this every day. And, we've had some major victories, including a big win against Big Tech.

The MRC's groundbreaking _**Censored!**_ report exposed attempts by Big Tech to silence conservative speech online and was cited four times in House Judiciary Committee hearings investigating the issue.

The success of this report evolved into further research by MRC staff. This research was then used as a primary source by the Administration to enact 2020's Executive Order on Preventing Online Censorship.

Peter, this is what your support makes possible. And we have more fights in progress, so you'll want to stay tuned in for breaking developments. **Click any link below to donate. **

clean_body: Peter, We're in the information age and there is a war being waged against you by radical communists hell-bent on destroying our country. Today, the media--including Big Tech-are participating in a radical coup against our country. They're lying to you, and not even trying to hide it. They lied about the Covid pandemic--and we're still paying the price. They lied about Trump colluding with Russia. They lie about inflation and say our economy is booming. They censor conservative voices: President Trump was banned from social media, while China and Iran continue their propaganda online. Republican Marjorie Taylor Greene was suspended from both Facebook and Twitter. Speakers like Ben Shapiro and Ann Coulter have been kicked off college campuses. They want to destroy America and replace it with a socialist hellhole using Marxist and Maoist tactics. That's why the Media Research Center (MRC) is going on offense, and we need your help to lead the way. Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the MRC. MRC is committed to neutralizing leftist bias in the news media and popular culture by educating the public about how it has been integrated into the media. When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the leftwing media ... now, 90% DO NOT trust the Fake News media. Even though the Media is spending millions of dollars to force their agenda on America, MRC is on the front lines of this information war, and we're winning. We're battling this every day. And, we've had some major victories, including a big win against Big Tech. The MRC's groundbreaking Censored! report exposed attempts by Big Tech to silence conservative speech online and was cited four times in House Judiciary Committee hearings investigating the issue. The success of this report evolved into further research by MRC staff. This research was then used as a primary source by the Administration to enact 2020's Executive Order on Preventing Online Censorship. Peter, this is what your support makes possible. And we have more fights in progress, so you'll want to stay tuned in for breaking developments. Click any link below to donate. Thank you, Brent Bozell Founder and President of MRC This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 1, 2022. body:
As always, my family and I voted for candidates that don't represent corporations | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45995423/348392826/-1122995658?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220110affhousing_TO_full_SLB_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGQ5MjUyOS1jOWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1tp_WN_P4MdupvysmmkKfVvFsKXJ_CcKmGYzigPn2Nw=)

Friends,
_***Less than 1 week until Election Day, June 7th!***_ Today, my family sat around the kitchen table to do what we always do for election season: vote for candidates and leaders that represent the people, not special interests. In many races this can be a difficult process - with so many candidates taking corporate PAC and lobbyist money, sometimes you're left picking between two uninspiring candidates. One race was easy to decide this year: the race for US House of Representatives in CA-46. My family has sacrificed a lot to get my name on the ballot - and I'm proud to be the _**only candidate**_ in this race that:
* **Pledges to not take corporate PAC or lobbyist money**
* **Supports an expanded and strengthened Medicare For All**
* **Supports a Green New Deal**
* **Support immediate amnesty for all undocument workers**
* **Supports the abolishment of ICE**
* **Supports a national rent control**

These are "must-haves" for candidates in the Ortega house. Not "nice-to-haves" - that's why you won't find us voting for career politicians like Lou Correa that have become millionaires off of real estate yet don't support appropriate measures for affordable housing. We hope you join us wherever you are and vote our corporate incumbents and elect leaders that will fight on the side of working people everywhere. _____________________________ [_Help us Reach More Voters this final week!_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45995424/348392827/-571937355?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGQ5MjUyOS1jOWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1tp_WN_P4MdupvysmmkKfVvFsKXJ_CcKmGYzigPn2Nw=)

clean_body: As always, my family and I voted for candidates that don't represent corporations | = Friends, *Less than 1 week until Election Day, June 7th! Today, my family sat around the kitchen table to do what we always do for election season: vote for candidates and leaders that represent the people, not special interests. In many races this can be a difficult process - with so many candidates taking corporate PAC and lobbyist money, sometimes you're left picking between two uninspiring candidates. One race was easy to decide this year: the race for US House of Representatives in CA-46. My family has sacrificed a lot to get my name on the ballot - and I'm proud to be the only candidate in this race that: Pledges to not take corporate PAC or lobbyist money Supports an expanded and strengthened Medicare For All Supports a Green New Deal Support immediate amnesty for all undocument workers Supports the abolishment of ICE Supports a national rent control These are "must-haves" for candidates in the Ortega house. Not "nice-to-haves" - that's why you won't find us voting for career politicians like Lou Correa that have become millionaires off of real estate yet don't support appropriate measures for affordable housing. We hope you join us wherever you are and vote our corporate incumbents and elect leaders that will fight on the side of working people everywhere. ___________________________ = Sign up to Canvass with Team Ortega, or Virtual Phonebanking with Our Revolution - In case you missed it, please check out our campaign video and share on social media and with with friends, family: Yours In Solidarity, Mike Ortega | Our campaign is fueled by everyday people like you chipping in whatever they can. Can you give $25 or whatever you can right now to help us stay on track on our campaign costs? =** | = | Paid for by Ortega For Congress Ortega For Congress PO Box 1271 Anaheim, CA 92815 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .
