body:
With the primary election behind us, the stakes are as high as ever.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45995455/348393084/1383944506?refcode=em_fr_2022.06.01_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Mjg0NTJhMi1jOWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P42GwAKI4CFlhUM8R6cligp2jbZljxe6swFNLROFzho=) Derek, I just got an exciting update from my team.

Thanks to your support, we reached our fundraising goal for May. This is a major accomplishment for our team, and it wouldn’t have been possible without grassroots supporters like you, Derek.

With the primary election behind us, the stakes are as high as ever. Everything is on the line this November – common-sense gun laws, protecting _Roe_ , the union way of life, and healthcare that isn’t a ripoff, for starters. **We are fighting for the common good, and I’m glad to have you standing by my side.**

The truth is, my right-wing opponent Jeremy Shaffer has _nothing_ to offer working families. We need to continue building our grassroots movement to defeat Jeremy Shaffer and the radical right in November, and keeping up with our fundraising is how we do just that.

**[If you’re ready to elect a leader who will fight _for_ our common good, not against it, chip in a few dollars today to ensure my campaign keeps up this momentum.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45995456/348393085/1383944506?refcode=em_fr_2022.06.01_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Mjg0NTJhMi1jOWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P42GwAKI4CFlhUM8R6cligp2jbZljxe6swFNLROFzho=)**

Thanks again for your support,

Chris Deluzio | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45995457/348393086/1383944506?refcode=em_fr_2022.06.01_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Mjg0NTJhMi1jOWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P42GwAKI4CFlhUM8R6cligp2jbZljxe6swFNLROFzho=)

clean_body: With the primary election behind us, the stakes are as high as ever. | = Derek, I just got an exciting update from my team. Thanks to your support, we reached our fundraising goal for May. This is a major accomplishment for our team, and it wouldn’t have been possible without grassroots supporters like you, Derek. With the primary election behind us, the stakes are as high as ever. Everything is on the line this November – common-sense gun laws, protecting Roe , the union way of life, and healthcare that isn’t a ripoff, for starters. We are fighting for the common good, and I’m glad to have you standing by my side. The truth is, my right-wing opponent Jeremy Shaffer has nothing to offer working families. We need to continue building our grassroots movement to defeat Jeremy Shaffer and the radical right in November, and keeping up with our fundraising is how we do just that. = Thanks again for your support, Chris Deluzio | = | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, and Democrats have to hold it in order to keep their House majority in 2022. = | = | Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress Chris Deluzio for Congress PO Box 16210 Pittsburgh, PA 15242 United States Chris Deluzio is a United States Veteran. Biden's border crisis is out of control, and states like Florida are taking a stand against the Administration's reckless policy of open borders and mass illegal immigration.

YOU shouldn't bear the brunt of Biden's recklessness, and that's why State GOP are fighting back. **[Stand with us today to protect our states from Open Borders Biden's dangerous agenda.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zldjl36m8eug00si0jjsv0cdko0olo8d41ql0aqg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chg68o36c9h2bs "Stand with us today to protect our states from Open Borders Biden's dangerous agenda.")**

But first, I wanted to reach out personally to give you an update on all of the recent developments in our race.

Elise Stefanik has been in the headlines non-stop recently, claiming she’s proud to be “ultra-MAGA” before proving her MAGA credentials by leaning into QAnon conspiracy theories and doubling down on her campaign ads promoting the same “replacement theory” that inspired violence in our state.

Yeah, I know, it’s a lot!

**If all that wasn’t enough, CNN is reporting that the buzz at Mar-a-Lago is that Donald Trump is seriously considering making Stefanik his running mate in 2024.**

_Suddenly Stefanik’s decision to up the ante on her deplorable behavior in recent weeks makes more sense._

And if all that isn’t bad enough, Stefanik and Trump are teaming up next week for a fundraiser where tickets go as high as $25,000.

_**But here’s the good news: the new district maps were released, and Elise Stefanik is more vulnerable than ever given how extreme she has become. This race is winnable if we have the resources to compete.**_

I’ll be honest, I don’t have the connections to raise as much as Stefanik has. Instead, I’m relying on folks like you to give what you can. [_**Will you please ensure that we have the resources to stop Stefanik at the ballot box this November by pitching in $10 or $25 today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45995473/348393272/-1336798533?refcode=BLU-PUT-20220601-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTEwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODI2ZGVlNi1jOWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w0VInoCDlh9m7dpy-bEhLW11-eOcw_hl6VKUWIcDPIQ=)

clean_body: Elise Stefanik has been in the headlines non-stop this month. | = | =. But first, I wanted to reach out personally to give you an update on all of the recent developments in our race. Elise Stefanik has been in the headlines non-stop recently, claiming she’s proud to be “ultra-MAGA” before proving her MAGA credentials by leaning into QAnon conspiracy theories and doubling down on her campaign ads promoting the same “replacement theory” that inspired violence in our state. Yeah, I know, it’s a lot! If all that wasn’t enough, CNN is reporting that the buzz at Mar-a-Lago is that Donald Trump is seriously considering making Stefanik his running mate in 2024. Suddenly Stefanik’s decision to up the ante on her deplorable behavior in recent weeks makes more sense. And if all that isn’t bad enough, Stefanik and Trump are teaming up next week for a fundraiser where tickets go as high as $25,000. But here’s the good news: the new district maps were released, and Elise Stefanik is more vulnerable than ever given how extreme she has become. This race is winnable if we have the resources to compete. I’ll be honest, I don’t have the connections to raise as much as Stefanik has. Instead, I’m relying on folks like you to give what you can. = | = Thanks for joining me on this wild ride, Matt * | | = Paid for by Matt Putorti for Congress Matt Putorti for Congress PO Box 45 Whitehall, NY 12887 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = Email communication is a crucial part of our campaign, but if you no longer wish to receive emails about how you can be a part of the movement to defeat Elise Stefanik, please

body:
Each morning Team Thelander is greeted with headlines from around Maine and the nation. These news items remind me daily why I am running for Congress | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/thelanderforcongress/a-strong-finish-to-9077402?e=f8a0a76a2b)

|
# **Why I'm Running for Congress,
and Need Your Help, Pt. 2**
* * *
> _(Due to popular demand, I'm sharing another batch of the daily headlines we read on Team Thelander)_
> * * *
>
> Each morning during the campaign, Team Thelander wakes up to the headlines of the day from around Maine and the nation, gathered and organized by one of our many loyal and talented volunteers. _**These news items highlight the reason why I am running for Congress.**_
>
> Double-standards of Justice. Record high gas and food prices. Soaring heating oil prices. The disappearance of our energy independence. Empty shelves in grocery stores. Baby formula shortages. The porous southern border. More than 100,000 deaths from drug overdose. An epidemic of mental health crises. Rising crime rates. Veteran suicides. Soaring inflation. Fear of a coming recession...
>
> I could go on, but you get the picture. These headlines serve as a daily reminder of how Progressive Democrat policies have failed the average American. We need to make things right. Under the current Congress, with the unwavering support of my opponent, America is in a free fall toward economic disaster.
>
> _**That is why I need your help.**_ We need to raise enough money to put up a decent fight and continue getting my name out there. Election Day is a little more than 5-months away, and we have a lot of work to do. With your help, we can turn things around!
>
> As I travel the district, I can tell you what they are saying about a Red Wave coming in 2022 is true! Click the donate button to help make sure Maine's First Congressional District rides that Red Wave to victory!
---
| [CLICK HERE TO DONATE](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=6d140ea4ab&e=f8a0a76a2b "CLICK HERE TO DONATE")
---

body:
As a diplomat in the Obama administration, Tom Malinowski stood up to dictators overseas. Now experts say his re-election could be THE deciding race for control of the House this year. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.malinowskifornj.com/p/Bix_Do8Sr0m0vj5sQl0SCA2?unsubscribedata=c1vpDL7Fl7cuZI8G5AfKEXytXFM88fJdez%2Fik7E0e5M%2BF2BXop%2FfXwClRAIRQVkVWtvHhnbKwWQVapLEtNZqYeiMvNAgUMFZmgsA2dwFSpRgM8GMlrA85v2Agm4jSGx0y%2FTVyU%2Bly%2BnEIRHSkIhG5RBf38KxQjb6s%2F1HIjW4QZL%2B%2BYA8%2Fz9V9M%2B4N9WcnNLKKMEi6UHvkMQhtOxTa%2BiNzOiuk78a6Fm%2BTqIxnKtPMfHmySkqLRu0cs0YHEl2Q0ISipABW%2BueRlhlbAbDeNtOx0rpRMxWhddxFR5iPZKXMKXRZmppvdeSkzCuswu0wqfTIpyouaLtSynMnIiMxPyINESGCcmjvG8G6DKNedwjezGJUlp35HRwdJ9Hpzxoi9DJKG2v9NJk8bweEozk%2Bm8pFS1Yh9ANqEvgFa2py%2BGQO3cvWW0SABckefRe30CuNnTG)

| |
---
Hi, I wanted to share the good news with you personally.

Our May fundraising numbers are in — and WOW! We put out the call, and this incredible grassroots team stepped up.

**Because of you, we smashed our May target — and I can’t thank you enough.** Every single dollar this team raised will boost our non-stop voter outreach over the next few months, from knocking doors and registering the new voters in our district, to holding GOP extremism to the light of public scrutiny.

**I need to be honest with you: the fight ahead won’t be easy.** Holding onto our Democratic House majority depends on holding this seat — and that’s why the GOP is targeting us relentlessly. They know my district is the bellwether House race in the country, and Republican Super PACs — including Kevin McCarthy’s — have already reserved millions of dollars of time on local TV stations to run attack ads against me.

The good news is that this team is no stranger to a tough fight. In 2018 and 2020, we made history together — one door knock and phone call at a time. If we keep our shoulder to the wheel, that’s exactly what we’ll do again in November.

As you know, I don’t take a cent of corporate PAC money. So I’m depending on this community to step up, as you always have, and secure another victory for New Jersey and for our Democratic majority. [**In less than a week, the Republicans will be choosing my opponent in their primary, so this is an important time to show our strength. If you can, please chip in $10 today:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45996325/348397211/-1267168965?refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_20220601_1_1&refcode2=492313fe-cce1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTIzMTNmZS1jY2UxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S7ZP5nwnY40eBhR7oq3PLHpDDaovhzn8nqfA_gXfx-c=)

**[https://act.malinowskifornj.com/a/primary-push](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45996326/348397212/-1267168965?amount=10&refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_20220601_1_1&refcode2=492313fe-cce1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTIzMTNmZS1jY2UxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S7ZP5nwnY40eBhR7oq3PLHpDDaovhzn8nqfA_gXfx-c=)**

Thanks again for all your help,

Tom

Now he's standing up for our democracy as a Congressman representing New Jersey's 7th district — which experts say could be THE deciding race for control of the House this year. = = Paid for by Tom Malinowski for Congress Tom Malinowski for Congress P.O. name: Mark McCloskey
subject: Please read this ASAP
body:
[](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyidchy-bjututkitk-r/) Friends, We have a critical end-of-month financial deadline in just a few hours, and I'm terrified we're going to miss it. **We need to raise another $1,030 to avoid painful budget cuts. **Please can you help? [DONATE NOW](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyidchy-bjututkitk-y/) I hate it when career politicians cry wolf over fake fundraising deadlines that are just designed to milk the American people of all that they are worth.So, when I tell you that this is a real dire moment for our campaign, I mean it. If we fall short tonight, we may not have the resources needed to continue fighting beyond today. But from the moment I stood in front of my house to protect my family to now, I know you have always had my back... clean_body: Friends, We have a critical end-of-month financial deadline in just a few hours, and I'm terrified we're going to miss it. We need to raise another $1,030 to avoid painful budget cuts. Please can you help? I hate it when career politicians cry wolf over fake fundraising deadlines that are just designed to milk the American people of all that they are worth.So, when I tell you that this is a real dire moment for our campaign, I mean it. If we fall short tonight, we may not have the resources needed to continue fighting beyond today. But from the moment I stood in front of my house to protect my family to now, I know you have always had my back... That 's why I'm reaching out now - please, will you help my family in this moment of need? Thank you,Mark McCloskey | | 4579 Laclede Ave PMB 335, Saint Louis, MO 63108 |

Friend,

It’s not the easiest thing to admit, but I’m getting beat like a rented mule in fundraising by my new Radical Opponent. It’s not a good sign for me, you, or any other conservative in Louisiana.

I’ll be blunt: If I don’t catch up to him and catch up quick, he’s going to blow me out of the water come November and threaten to turn Louisiana and the U.S. Senate into a Socialist safe haven. I won’t have it, and I hope you won’t either, but I’m coming to you in all sincerity when I say I can’t do this by myself.

I’ve got to have your help if I’m going to have a chance. I’ve got to have your help if we’re going to save America. It’s not up for debate. Your support is the answer. Your support is the only thing standing in the way of Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate wiping the floor with me this coming November. I’m humbly asking for your help. **Without it, they’ll keep burying me with their unlimited dollars.

I’M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP.

WITHOUT IT I CAN’T STOP THE LEFT. **

name: American Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9153%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=EonNHlCbZcxKpBwOTt7BbA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c23634%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CzKfQC3ONFqVczCoRPpD1A&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c23645%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=l8AbJc%2f406PRM9b5caj5Vg&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c23645%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=l8AbJc%2f406PRM9b5caj5Vg&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9153%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=EonNHlCbZcxKpBwOTt7BbA&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9153%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=EonNHlCbZcxKpBwOTt7BbA&sysid=1)

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: Let’s get this win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#]Hi, it’s Josh.

I wanted to reach out and thank you for your support this past month. Thanks to you, we were able to reach our $10,000 goal before my primary in just a few days – so thank you.

Protecting our House majority is so crucial this year. There is so much on the line. I’m incredibly proud of the bipartisan work I have done in Congress, and I want more than anything to continue making important progress for the people of New Jersey. Reaching our goal brings us that much closer to making it happen.

But the fight to win the general election is far from over. We still have so much work to do if we want to keep far-right extremists and their dark money away from my seat and out of the House.

Thank you again, and if you haven’t had a chance to chip in yet, you can click here to do so now (our primary is just days away!) → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2205?amount=20]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2205?amount=20]

– Josh
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. clean_body: [#]Hi, it’s Josh. I wanted to reach out and thank you for your support this past month. Thanks to you, we were able to reach our $10,000 goal before my primary in just a few days – so thank you. Protecting our House majority is so crucial this year. There is so much on the line. I’m incredibly proud of the bipartisan work I have done in Congress, and I want more than anything to continue making important progress for the people of New Jersey. Reaching our goal brings us that much closer to making it happen. But the fight to win the general election is far from over. We still have so much work to do if we want to keep far-right extremists and their dark money away from my seat and out of the House. Thank you again, and if you haven’t had a chance to chip in yet, you can click here to do so now (our primary is just days away!) → [] DONATE [] – Josh Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. ---
Folks,

**Let me just start by saying,** _I would have nothing if I didn’t have your support._

Right now, Joe Biden is blowing around from town to town like a feather in the wind, trying to round up support for the Radical Left in November. Based on the way things have been going for his administration, **_they look to be in for a real “shellacking.”_**

From what I can tell, it looks like he’s crawling back around asking for people to take him back because of how much he’s managed to fail in the short time he’s been in office.

**[Will you show your support for America and all the great things about it by chipping in a few dollars for my re-election campaign?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62975%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cfWH1uKVp5VcOnOyfaO9MQ&sysid=1)**

name: Nikki Fried
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Peter,
I wanted to take a moment to wish all of you a happy Pride Month! 🏳️🌈
Today marks the start of a month-long celebration of our LGBTQ+ community — a chance for us to celebrate all the progress we’ve made and how far we’ve come in the fight for equality.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jun-2022?refcode=601pride [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jun-2022?refcode=601pride]
But this year in particular, we have to remember that, while Pride is a celebration, it began as a protest against injustice. And here in Florida, injustice, discrimination, and hatred against the LGBTQ+ community are on the rise.
Ron DeSantis has attacked Florida’s LGBTQ+ community at every turn, and he’s not going to stop unless we stop him.
So, while I’m excited to spend this month celebrating Florida’s LGBTQ+ community and uplifting diverse voices, I’m also ready to continue my fight to end DeSantis’ authoritarian dictatorship and get our state on the right side of history.
And I know that, with this team by my side, we can get this done and win the fight for full equality.
With thanks,
Nikki

name: Friends of Maggie
subject: Celebrate Pride Month in ABQ!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Maggie_
body:
PrideFest runs next week from June 6th - June 11th.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45999637/348403493/647229833?refcode=EM_C_220601PrideMonth_H_FOM_90DO_3_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODVmMjE2My1kM2UxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5YC0PKvfoAf29s63qJ3ls8ISxwp0Druir9HbdK9Phuc=&emci=3d009efe-55e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=585f2163-d3e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=3583156)
Friend,
Today is the start of Pride Month! This is a month to celebrate the LGBTQIA+ community and all of the progress they have made. The fight for equity is not over, but we are so proud of the strides the LGBTQIA+ community has made, and we will continue to strive towards a better future for all.

Next week, Albuquerque is celebrating our LGBTQIA+ community with a whole week of pride at PrideFest! From social events for the whole community to a candlelight vigil that honors those we have lost – PrideFest provides a safe, healing, fun space for all. [**_Click here to learn more! →_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45999638/348403494/647229833?refcode=EM_C_220601PrideMonth_H_FOM_90DO_3_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODVmMjE2My1kM2UxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5YC0PKvfoAf29s63qJ3ls8ISxwp0Druir9HbdK9Phuc=&emci=3d009efe-55e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=585f2163-d3e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=3583156)
**[ABQ PrideFest](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45999639/348403495/647229833?refcode=EM_C_220601PrideMonth_H_FOM_90DO_3_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODVmMjE2My1kM2UxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5YC0PKvfoAf29s63qJ3ls8ISxwp0Druir9HbdK9Phuc=&emci=3d009efe-55e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=585f2163-d3e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=3583156)**
While it’s clear we still have massive ground to cover, this is a chance to gather and celebrate the hard-fought road from silence to solidarity. We hope to see you there!
Together,

Friends of Maggie
_Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence.

She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. **Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy! Make a contribution today >>**_ _**______[DONATE $25 MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45999640/348403496/-532505380?refcode=EM_C_220601PrideMonth_H_FOM_90DO_3_NG_N_BIO&amount=25&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODVmMjE2My1kM2UxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5YC0PKvfoAf29s63qJ3ls8ISxwp0Druir9HbdK9Phuc=)**_

| "Governor Greitens is the clear frontrunner for the U.S. Senate race in Missouri because he has something no other campaign has: the support of grassroots conservatives in every corner of Missouri. He's the only one hosting grassroots events with voters... because he's the only candidate that can actually draw a crowd," said Greitens campaign manager Dylan Johnson.
Last week, Governor Greitens kicked off the No MO RINOs Statewide Tour in northeast Missouri with successful stops in Hannibal and Bowling Green.

|
---
| Governor Youngkin signs my Senate Bill 769 - Virginia Employment Commission Reform - Into Law
---
| | |
---
|
---
| Friends, Yesterday I had the opportunity to join Governor Youngkin for a bill signing ceremony of my Senate Bill 769 - Virginia Employment Commission Reform. The COVID 19 pandemic exposed a lot of inefficiencies in our state agencies. The Virginia Unemployment Commission was tasked with delivering millions of dollars of unemployment benefits when Virginians were out of work because of government imposed shutdowns. Unfortunately, the agency was ripe for fraud and abuse. News reports cited over $40 million being paid to prisoners and improper payment rates over 11%. Senate Bill 769 puts proper guardrails at VEC and requires them to work with other state agencies to verify unemployment claims and perform system integrity checks. We have a fiduciary responsibility to the taxpayers of Virginia and this bipartisan legislation will produce some much needed accountability. Improved program integrity means less waste, fraud and abuse. Remember, every dollar wasted in unemployment is a dollar taken directly out of small business in Virginia. Yesterday’s signing of Senate Bill 769 sends a message to all the important stakeholders: • The safety net will be protected for the truly needy. • The system will be protected so we don’t overstress our employers. • The door will always be closed to people looking to defraud Virginia and its people.
---
| | |
---
| Today, the General Assembly convenes in Richmond to take up the conference state budget. Stay tuned in my next email about the budget details and the events that will transpire today. As I'm working hard in Richmond to fight for my constituents as a State Senator, my campaign team for Congress is working tireless hours back in the district. We officially have less than three weeks until the 7th District Republican primary on June 21st. If you support our efforts, please consider volunteering for Team Reeves in these last critical weeks. You can assist our efforts by making phone calls, knocking doors, or even putting up a few of our yard signs.[ Please reach out to my campaign staff to get signed up to volunteer!](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.brycereeves.com%2Fvolunteer%2F/1/010001811f8c09b7-9f92fb4d-701d-4b52-867a-6490b094a885-000000/DTEMvFbv04IL_s48Bsw8HkZ_5Pk=272) I'll be in touch soon. Sincerely,
---
| | |
---
| Bryce Reeves

Peter,

Oregon is a political hotbed this year, and one of the most consequential elections _in the country_ is our state's race for governor.

In 2022, we're facing the first gubernatorial election in two decades that doesn't feature a current or former governor in the race. And on top of that, we've got a wealthy self-funding third-party candidate that's picking up huge six-figure donations from corporate interests.

_All that makes it the most competitive race for Governor in a generation._

**Oregon Democrats have nominated my good friend Tina Kotek. She's experienced, she's ready, and she's a powerhouse progressive that will make us proud.**

[**Donate $10 today to make history with Tina Kotek.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46001116/348405519/1485193592?refcode=em22_220601_merkley&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGE3ODBkNy1kNGUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CjyqECvz_HfXdTiCqvBas69xqVmk23tDiq4VhZeRRT0=)

---
I know we've had Democratic governors for many years, but make no mistake: This is going to be a really tough race for Tina to win. **The Oregon governor's race is unique this year in that Tina's not just facing a single Republican, she has two major opponents on the ballot —**

1) an anti-choice Republican who will do the bidding of corporate special interests (no matter who wins the nomination, you know this will be accurate), and

2) a third-party candidate who is terrible on climate and gun safety, and who will be pulling in great gobs of cash from corporate special interests.

That's why it's supremely important to unite behind Tina Kotek now. She's a proven progressive fighter who will lead Oregon into the future. **This is going to be a tough, tough race – and we need to do all we can to help Tina.**

We can't turn the keys of the state capitol over to her backwards-looking opponents. [**Chip in now, and protect Oregon's future.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46001119/348405522/1485193592?refcode=em22_220601_merkley&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGE3ODBkNy1kNGUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CjyqECvz_HfXdTiCqvBas69xqVmk23tDiq4VhZeRRT0=)

Onward!

_Jeff_

| | Friend, You’ve been with our campaign from the very beginning. Katie's intellect, values, tenacity, and passion for serving Kansans are what we need to leave our state better than we found it.** ** To help welcome Katie to our team, **[I’m asking you to step up and chip in just $10 to support our campaign.](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=380a42efd5dd4d3ab26662211d27c733&_e=XOKFj-s_cOSEx1oh-iIcQL664TSycXmNxzM2bldeRwm-MhRfifyDWHsCn9fE_4Z_8XlKar48pom1Qd5j55kkOadxffJviCavSRW3Pzr-0MSLNdoW3Xyavp9qBtLQg0KDQ9ciC9cRw6R38K9jM3IqBUeGCyg3k7lajXE_R3m07L89sLdEIqclJb88Y6upnpoYSWyKJUChdyzgyWXlYiQtKMNs9qc3Ad8N0K3QgTT6DDdkMN5LQQMut9tZgHhB_6fRNsy31aTnSVIiyWLpSTOG_c245nxnnUYAWLoTPPEdr1G5nJabpa7eJ6U6yhhIBsY2kGiSEGBgehB6odMqvzAgvT2mtk1wRK_Jesf23EAZuvodcVbREzGYzFCu38262Tujh_frv80Fv7rRIhoT3i8F7erHt6k9cMUav5awnIyXtim-HeS_qMLkRhohqhS1uLO90lQ30pEGtvMUWybzBSkZ-Ku06t-Eg3sxqQDxF7F2eBovOBXFs9Xr-ossArQKkqJuLeFBSj4Ty0FwR6CKdso97g%3D%3D)** **

She is a fifth-generation Kansan and, along with her husband, is a fourth-generation owner and operator of their family farm in McPherson County. Katie joins our team after serving almost six years as director of all in-state operations and constituent services for our now-U.S. Senator Roger Marshall, where she’s worked with Kansans in all 105 counties and developed a keen understanding of our state and its diverse needs and interests. Prior to her public service, Katie also worked as an educator, in agribusiness and economic development, and in journalism. Every campaign is shaped by a few defining moments... name: Imani Oakley
subject: Celebrate Pride 🏳️‍🌈
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oakley for Congress
body:
Peter,
Today marks the start of Pride Month, when we commemorate the 1969 Stonewall Riots and the movement that put us on a path towards equality.
As a proud ally of the LGBTQ+ community, I’m excited to spend this month celebrating how far we’ve come and the progress we’ve made in the fight for equality. But I also recognize that, almost 50 years after Stonewall, we still have a long way to go.
The fight for justice isn’t easy, and too often, it feels like we’re moving backwards. Across the country, bigotry is on the rise. Violence against members of the LGBTQ+ community — particularly against people of color — is on the rise. And corporate politicians like Donald Payne Jr. have failed to take the action necessary to meet this moment.
But I’ve been a political organizer for a long time. I’ve seen what it takes to make progress, and I know that, if we continue to stand together, take action, and demand change, we can win the fight for equality and justice.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-jun-2022?refcode=601pride [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-jun-2022?refcode=601pride]
I’ve always stood with the LGBTQ+ community. I’ve always fought for LGBTQ+ equality. And I’m running for Congress to continue that fight.
Thank you for standing with me, and happy Pride! 🏳️🌈
— Imani

clean_body: Peter, Today marks the start of Pride Month, when we commemorate the 1969 Stonewall Riots and the movement that put us on a path towards equality. As a proud ally of the LGBTQ+ community, I’m excited to spend this month celebrating how far we’ve come and the progress we’ve made in the fight for equality. But I also recognize that, almost 50 years after Stonewall, we still have a long way to go. The fight for justice isn’t easy, and too often, it feels like we’re moving backwards. Across the country, bigotry is on the rise. Violence against members of the LGBTQ+ community — particularly against people of color — is on the rise. And corporate politicians like Donald Payne Jr. have failed to take the action necessary to meet this moment. But I’ve been a political organizer for a long time. I’ve seen what it takes to make progress, and I know that, if we continue to stand together, take action, and demand change, we can win the fight for equality and justice. [] I’ve always stood with the LGBTQ+ community. I’ve always fought for LGBTQ+ equality. And I’m running for Congress to continue that fight. Thank you for standing with me, and happy Pride! 🏳️🌈 — Imani Donate [] Volunteer [] Paid for by Oakley for Congress Oakley for Congress PO Box 1181 Montclair, NJ 07042 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . Folks,

I’m a little embarrassed. You know my parents always taught me to be grateful, not ask for too much, and thank those who were nice enough to give me a gift. So, before I get to the bad news, let me just say that your strong support in May made me happier than a penguin in an ice chest.

Your donations gave me the resources to fight the Left’s agenda, and your kind words gave me the support to keep fighting. I couldn’t do it without you. That’s why I hate to have to ask for your support so soon again, right after you did everything you could to help me in May, but there’s just too much on the line not to ask.

_I missed my May fundraising goals_ , and my Radical Left opponents noticed. They’ve not only taken notice, but they’re taking action. They’ve called in the big guns to pour sickening amounts of money into their campaigns to try and beat me in 2022 and push their Socialist Agenda. This can’t happen.

**I NEED YOUR HELP. I’M HUMBLY ASKING.**
The only way we’re going to save America, Take Back the Senate, and stop the Left’s Liberal Agenda is by standing together. We’ve got to start February off right, and I’m hoping you can help me do just that by rushing what you can below.

name: Val Demings (personal)
subject: I know a thing or two about persevering
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
This may be my toughest challenge yet
| | |
---
Friend: Each and every day it is not lost on me that I'm in what will undoubtedly be the most expensive 2022 race for the U.S. Senate – a race that can decide the Senate majority and will be anything but easy.
But I know a thing or two about persevering, and _winning_ , even if the odds are stacked against me.
I've overcome plenty of adversity in my life, friend. **There is nothing easy about growing up as a poor, Black girl in the segregated South.** But my family's faith, and faith in opportunity, taught me perseverance. It was my family, particularly my mother's words of "Never tire of doing good, Val" that pushed me to where I am.
I carry the spirit of her words with me even today – as I reflect about my career of service to Floridians and my path to being a candidate for U.S. Senate.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46002681/348408816/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3321-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWY5MDQ1Zi1kNWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lz5iC04djwo-AXt1qPY56BubYTciRrfIu2HBWdkCL5I=)
**There was nothing easy about being a first-generation college graduate** – nor was it easy working my way up the ranks of the Orlando Police Department. For 27 years, I served when it wasn't exactly ordinary to see a woman on the force, let alone a Black woman. But I never tired, and eventually, I became the first woman to lead my department as chief of police.
And friend, I know firsthand there's nothing easy about winning elections in Florida. My first run for Congress was one of my toughest fights – but even in defeat I never tired because I knew I could do good for my community. And it certainly wasn't easy to hold a lawless president – a habitual offender – to account. But I served as an impeachment manager, prosecuting Donald Trump in the Senate because no one should be above the law.
My road to this moment was not easy. But I'm not sure that there’s anywhere except America where a little Black girl – the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the '60s South – could have a story so filled with opportunities like these. And I am determined to meet this moment, to win, to never tire of doing good, so that anyone can have a story of opportunity.
This may be my toughest challenge yet, which is why I'm urging you – every last person reading this email – to chip in whatever they can to ensure I have the resources to defeat Marco Rubio and win in Florida: [**Please, will you give $5 or more to help me flip Florida blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority? Every dollar you give increases our ability to compete and win this tough battleground race.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46002682/348408817/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3321-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWY5MDQ1Zi1kNWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lz5iC04djwo-AXt1qPY56BubYTciRrfIu2HBWdkCL5I=)
With so much gratitude for all you do,

–Val Demings
| | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, **[click here if you’re on mobile](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46002683/348408820/1417698435?refcode=jtk3321-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWY5MDQ1Zi1kNWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lz5iC04djwo-AXt1qPY56BubYTciRrfIu2HBWdkCL5I=&emci=d7f5efc2-cddb-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=def9045f-d5e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=20244100) or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates.**

I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider [making a donation today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46002690/348408827/-890400302?recurring=0&refcode=jtk3321-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWY5MDQ1Zi1kNWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lz5iC04djwo-AXt1qPY56BubYTciRrfIu2HBWdkCL5I=). You can also click here to [receive fewer emails](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46002691/348408829/-144803992?refcode=jtk3321-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWY5MDQ1Zi1kNWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lz5iC04djwo-AXt1qPY56BubYTciRrfIu2HBWdkCL5I=&emci=d7f5efc2-cddb-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=def9045f-d5e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=20244100) or click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/hmC0qfqgmEqyHNrEYyYQgg2?unsubscribedata=XizJAXs8fL5yrJMKkNeuRXdYsSZvmWQFgqNiTQWPnv7YOP9cekS3HT01FRvnVCkxuX71%2Bk%2B3KR%2Bd0p2gKKdFXHDr886RYSq0uNvZAHAKYnYYpCe2PeUUPu%2BsTpuSLSFReMMA35%2FlNY%2FokrrfU5mgsEYfeZwyeRYSQ7wqyF5z%2BE0JJqVKT4vz0KY7kNEV4de1q3sHkO5XMLUKOF438TctI%2BctLE5dQfhnkvLZmW1TQO6XdeEjgOQ005Xbu%2FWIXvbY80urPJT7P2xHFHFzIi0z0YmeP3ceQiWW6whiSqvtP2YAibEP%2BNnRgnbjOVp697CDy2fbMEIaRLoGRTsi3Rtzb%2BoIRJRB8e%2FISyOe5iLlZ2TyPJXtDFca9zeuTN5z12A22UgX52U2HcRCoVzYlRAOZLthYB3zo83atJdaZio58WIFiy8Lod0UxIUMqi0Dx5kl).

But I'm not sure that there’s anywhere except America where a little Black girl – the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the '60s South – could have a story so filled with opportunities like these. And I am determined to meet this moment, to win, to never tire of doing good, so that anyone can have a story of opportunity. This may be my toughest challenge yet, which is why I'm urging you – every last person reading this email – to chip in whatever they can to ensure I have the resources to defeat Marco Rubio and win in Florida: = With so much gratitude for all you do, –Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. & . I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider =. You can also click here to or click here to . Val Demings for U.S. Senate P. O. Box 536926 Orlando, FL 32853 United States Paid for by Val Demings for U.S. Senate

name: =?utf-8?Q?Matthew?=
subject: Knowing is step 1, and step 2 is up to you…
body:
We can work together to bring real reform, Peter! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e1f22d0b37c5/we-have-to-talk-if-we-want-to-fix-this-9020593?e=027190410e)
---
| | Hello Peter,
---
| | The first step of gun legislation has to be knowing the lay of the land. Last week I sent an email about the proposed (and already passed) gun laws that will affect the lives of everyday Ohioans.

We need to make sure that people are being educated about guns, and have assurances that they’re not ending up in the hands of people who are ignorant to the serious precautions that must be made.

Red flag laws are essential: if someone has ever been a danger to themselves or others, they must never be able to get their hands on a gun. Healthcare and mental health must play critical roles in the solving of this crisis before people hurt themselves or others.

And there are many more things we can do, but most importantly we can’t pass patchwork legislation that doesn’t effectively solve the problem; we need to work systematically to solve the crisis. Donating today will help ensure that if I go to Congress I will find systematic solutions that make America a safer place to all its citizens.
---
| [Donate now](https://diemerforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aaf2631a8176763bdbadf06e5&id=ade59a1b48&e=027190410e "Donate now")
---
| [Are there other issues that are important to you, Peter? Please let me know by replying to this email](mailto:info@diemerforcongress.com?subject=%5BFeedback%5D%20These%20are%20the%20issues%20I%20care%20about&body=Hello%20Matthew%2C%0A%0AThese%20are%20the%20issues%20I%20care%20about%3A).
---
| Talk soon,
Matthew Diemer
---
|
---
| PS: I would love to hear back from you about this. Please [reply to this email](mailto:info@diemerforcongress.com?subject=RE%3A%20Your%20recent%20email&body=Hello%20Matthew...) and tell me your thoughts.

This is a campaign of inclusion and discussion. A dialogue, not a monologue.

Only together can we move America forward.
---

Friend, Si Se Pudo: we reached our last fundraising deadline ahead of next Tuesday’s primary election! From the bottom of my heart, I can’t thank you enough for your incredible support. Nine months ago, I decided to run for Congress to represent the state and community I love and fight for all New Mexicans. I knew that if we were going to take on the MAGA extremist and incumbent Yvette Herrell, we would need to build a powerful grassroots movement of people ready for change. Now, we’re less than one week away from the New Mexico primary, and I’m so proud of what we’ve built together. name: Betsy Johnson
subject: Stand with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Run Betsy Run The Betsy Brigade needs you to recapture Oregon’s independent spirit
body:
[](https://www.runbetsyrun.com/?e=40b20d4397498f3af7dfb5987b4a98d3&utm_source=rbr&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220601_f&n=1) | Dear Friend, The tragic shooting in Texas has once again laid bare our polarized politics. Extremism and polarization are why we need to make a big change in our politics and leadership. Our campaign is about making the biggest change possible — electing an independent governor loyal only to the people, rejecting the ideological extremes and leading with the best ideas from both parties to move Oregon forward. That is how I will lead to ensure the safety of our communities and our schools. I am a lifelong gun owner and supporter of the Second Amendment. That will never change. What has changed is not where I stand — but where I sit. As governor, my job is to represent the majority of Oregonians — and not just my personal views. I must practice what I preach in moving beyond partisan divides to find common ground for the common good. [CHANGE OUR POLITICS](https://www.runbetsyrun.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4wuZ-2t-UfLCO31ykNad3IpZEmWqyffPUGUGo7kVPPkAacKZ6St4NkcRw7yA3_kadXEIGnk9o0HxRxgYAMOVTEZQwOBOGH3L0qjrLELG2Uw&e=40b20d4397498f3af7dfb5987b4a98d3&utm_source=rbr&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220601_f&n=2) As governor, I will support and enforce stronger background checks for gun purchases and raising the age to purchase certain firearms from eighteen to twenty-one. These are both practical ideas to help keep guns away from people who could be a danger to themselves or others. But new gun laws alone are not enough. Oregon’s mental health system is the worst in the nation — I will lead to change that. We need more trained counselors in our schools and empower them to intervene when there are warning signs of trouble. I will support local school districts that want safer school buildings to prevent unauthorized access. We need to support — not demonize or defund — our police. I will put an immediate end to Governor Brown’s early release of dangerous criminals onto our streets. We’re not going to get anywhere until we stop coddling criminals and lock up the bad guys. [DONATE](https://www.runbetsyrun.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4wuZ-2t-UfLCO31ykNad3IpZEmWqyffPUGUGo7kVPPkAacKZ6St4NkcRw7yA3_kadXEIGnk9o0HxRxgYAMOVTEZQwOBOGH3L0qjrLELG2Uw&e=40b20d4397498f3af7dfb5987b4a98d3&utm_source=rbr&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220601_f&n=3) I left the Republican Party because it moved too far right in restricting a woman’s right to choose — I am strongly pro-choice. I left the Democrats because they moved too far left on issues like crime and jobs. Over the years — supporting both a woman’s right to choose and woman’s right to bear arms — I’ve pissed-off the extremes on both sides of the aisle. I can take the heat. But to change Oregon for the better — I need you with me. Both sides are attacking me because they fear the big change we will make in Salem. A no-nonsense, independent governor — loyal only to the people — scares the entrenched interests on the far left and far right. They should be afraid. Don’t be a spectator this year. _Betsy_
---
* * *
Paid for by Run Betsy Run The Betsy Brigade needs you to recapture Oregon’s independent spirit. But if you no longer want to receive emails from our campaign, you can update your email preferences or unsubscribe by [clicking here](https://www.runbetsyrun.com/unsubscribe?e=40b20d4397498f3af7dfb5987b4a98d3&utm_source=rbr&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220601_f&n=4). This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
clean_body: | Dear Friend, The tragic shooting in Texas has once again laid bare our polarized politics. Extremism and polarization are why we need to make a big change in our politics and leadership. Our campaign is about making the biggest change possible — electing an independent governor loyal only to the people, rejecting the ideological extremes and leading with the best ideas from both parties to move Oregon forward. That is how I will lead to ensure the safety of our communities and our schools. I am a lifelong gun owner and supporter of the Second Amendment. That will never change. What has changed is not where I stand — but where I sit. As governor, my job is to represent the majority of Oregonians — and not just my personal views. I must practice what I preach in moving beyond partisan divides to find common ground for the common good. As governor, I will support and enforce stronger background checks for gun purchases and raising the age to purchase certain firearms from eighteen to twenty-one. These are both practical ideas to help keep guns away from people who could be a danger to themselves or others. But new gun laws alone are not enough. Oregon’s mental health system is the worst in the nation — I will lead to change that. We need more trained counselors in our schools and empower them to intervene when there are warning signs of trouble. I will support local school districts that want safer school buildings to prevent unauthorized access. We need to support — not demonize or defund — our police. I will put an immediate end to Governor Brown’s early release of dangerous criminals onto our streets. We’re not going to get anywhere until we stop coddling criminals and lock up the bad guys. I left the Republican Party because it moved too far right in restricting a woman’s right to choose — I am strongly pro-choice. I left the Democrats because they moved too far left on issues like crime and jobs. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
We sent a number of fundraising emails ahead of last night’s fundraising deadline, so the least I could do was send one more to say thank you.
We received tens of thousands of donations in those final days ahead of our May deadline. It all adds up to help us fight back against the attack ads running right now, and that’s how we win.
So, when you see us on television or running ads online, or when you see us rising in the polls and we celebrate our victory in November, it’s these donations that made it possible.
So, thank you again. When I first decided to run for Senate, I never imagined in my wildest dreams we’d run a campaign where almost every donation we received came from someone chipping in just a few bucks — but that’s what’s happened.
I am very proud of that fact, and you should be too.
Thanks again,
Mark

* * *
**We’re starting off the month of June looking for 15,000 people to add their names as personal endorsers of Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign. Can you click on “Endorse Mark” below and get your name on the list? It would mean a lot.**
**[ENDORSE MARK](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-june22/?source=em220601-1-7&t=1&akid=2961%2E6688874%2Ead4N_J)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=2961%2E6688874%2Ead4N_J).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Team Vanuch
subject: Our deadline is TONIGHT. This race is a TOSS UP!
body:
| | |
---
Friend, Here's the facts:
* This race will come down to the wire, just like elections in Virginia always do.
* To stay on track to win the Republican Primary on Tuesday, June 21st, and defeat extreme liberal Abigail Spanberger in November, we need to hit each and every one of our goals.
* **We have to raise only $2,153 before tonight's midnight deadline to reach our end-of-quarter fundraising goal.**

**_We're sitting down with Crystal today at 5pm to review our progress._ ** Our worst fear is that we wake up after the 2022 elections and have two more years of full Democrat control in Washington. body:

---

---
| | | Millions of Americans are being crushed by the weight of student loan debt – with $1.75 trillion in debt across 45 million borrowers. Students are leaving school with massive financial burdens that leave them worse off than their parents and unable to get ahead. That’s why some Democrats are calling for student debt to be forgiven – to offer relief from these crushing burdens and shrink the wealth gap. A new poll shows that 64% of voters support student loan forgiveness – but talks about student loan debt forgiveness have stirred up a lot of controversy. As President Biden considers various policies to cancel some or all federal student loan debt, we want to know what our top activists think about this issue. Take the poll: Do you support student loan debt forgiveness?
---
| | | | [YES >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4fbaa65c-2b11-4fcb-9d90-d08d4e3876e9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Stand for those with no voice
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of h
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8dfbd65vlienloirs0an7c1vk08envrpe6l5mq8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uarb8dtlccq32cb3cqqrfd5gmgo66o5lcdhj2s35cgoe7dlkc9jjcsjieur7atpnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0shkcoob9cr0cur66phim2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or5c5i68o30cpie49fg)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z02jbla9r0sqolrk6f44u9kb4smqp8gi6k75ehm0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chi60o36cjh2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1f3rtoua25ii1l96c3vibu9al8b49htvvaniu2o_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chi60o36cjh2bs) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1ieg7rnlm9pllonhrp5fbd3k9ukregv4kqgvah0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chi60o36cjh2bs) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

clean_body: I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of h | | | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive. Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens. | | Copyright © 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. name: aadlandforcolorado
subject: Sending veteran to Washington
body:
Read why that is a very good idea
| | | |
---
|
---
|
# Duty Honor Country
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---|---
|
One of the major decision-making powers of Congress, according to the US Constitution, is the ability to declare war. This power rests with no other branch, although it has been largely ignored and abused by the executive branch for decades without repercussions.

The consequences of federal decisions, or lack thereof, do not end in the halls of the Capitol or White House, however. That is only where things begin, and often is the root place of many of our national problems.

Unfortunately, it is not our elected officials who fight our nation's wars. Otherwise, they might think more carefully about getting us embroiled in conflicts halfway around the world.
| | |
---|---
|
No, America's sons and daughters fight our wars and spend years deployed to far off lands on behalf of the American people. Only those who have served can fully appreciate the sacrifice and the traumas of war that are rarely ever healed completely.

Those who have served in a combat theater deeply understand how lives are affected by war even long after a deployment. This experience clearly makes combat veterans best suited to make judicious decisions on the use of our military and to lead our nation in wartime.

I have experienced firsthand the effects of war on my fellow Soldiers, families, our allies, civilians and even on the enemy. Such knowledge, which is only gained by direct experience, is crucial when contemplating warfare, because the consequences are extreme.
| | |
---|---
|
No one else in this race can speak with authority on national security, combat or how to effectively win our nation's wars.

Veterans also recognize the dangers of divisiveness in society, having seen it rip apart other nations, and many of us desire to lead the nation in healing our deep divisions. We have been bound in service with men and women from across the nation consisting of multiple ethnicities, races, and religions in ways unlike any other institution in America. We look for the content of one's character, not the color of one's skin, or one's gender.

Veterans also have an abiding understanding of our oath to support and defend the US Constitution. We had to live the oath, not just hollowly repeat words at ceremonies. A wartime Soldier understands duty and sacrifice for the greater good in ways most others cannot.

| | |
---|---
|
Veterans understand courage and honor in the face of adversity, taking on dangerous, difficult missions, most often outside the sight of our fellow citizens. We are accustomed to doing the right thing even when no one is watching. Our watchwords are Duty, Honor, Country...

And I will do my duty as your member of Congress. Whether or not it is popular with the Washington crowd or my own party, I will do my duty as prescribed by the US Constitution. I will always strive to do what is right for America.

No one in this race has been tested in the ways I have on the battlefield. I am a proven warrior, and my combat experiences cannot be replicated by those who have not served.

I will go to Washington ready for action from day one.
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| | [Send Erik your feedback](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Np2OhzgqqVbj0ur_3itdprF1wEZBukC6Mcne88i1Hwz4PBCaFHcOA6ivhabaBgGWSfIfSgb88WxbIHPZAU4qCOhnUPNk1ORjAhUSVBNoocx4EQWmZzgy1aukTJDy0DQkWprIBAoupMVhIA8V8nLkbsRCPcPQxowkbhl3ZO3JNCf7ciLvRa8n61iLlOaedXD8l-Yd0hygKXJMJ8MBkXSz442ft8gsS5VaIHRG_fONDTwdx5QT9L6l58I7w4JXLonz&c=bXzAnZjl7fHF7hPFWSXXqpKwRezjQ4g-ys-cRo0wE_G1Bgi1lutN9w==&ch=_we6WU_3lgAg-cyqohiUOwH3WX3qrygq4aOEK_UYod_xN9gsZ4Beew==)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
# Campaign Update
---
| |
---
| Last Thursday, Erik joined the other candidates for the Republican nomination to Congress at an open forum debate in Teller County. The Ute Pass Cultural Center in Woodland Park hosted the event which was attended by over 120 of our high-country neighbors (yes, I counted them). Another handful watched the debate on Zoom. Erik's answers were received with exuberant applause and some attendees contacted the Aadland for Congress campaign (via [aadlandforcolorado.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Np2OhzgqqVbj0ur_3itdprF1wEZBukC6Mcne88i1Hwz4PBCaFHcOAw7aTrZeu21no6DRFOub0RhOUVlvcu4suAzyn14oCEQ827EmQ8YmpTc2WMjdDMaxyJ8hTe29O2FNVKWPbOMbA1yLL7C0nNY4gjSFQgQyESFiqRZKfyGX3D0=&c=bXzAnZjl7fHF7hPFWSXXqpKwRezjQ4g-ys-cRo0wE_G1Bgi1lutN9w==&ch=_we6WU_3lgAg-cyqohiUOwH3WX3qrygq4aOEK_UYod_xN9gsZ4Beew==)) to express the opinion that Erik "won" the debate handily.
---
| |
---|---
|
Friday morning Erik joined Jimmy Lakey on his acclaimed radio show. Jimmy broadcasts on 600AM KCOL in Greeley and always presents a lively discussion.

Dark and early on Saturday morning, Erik headed to Salida to join campaign volunteers and knock on doors for talk with our neighbors in the south. The troupe visited homes and businesses around Salida and hosted almost 30 folks for lunch; many of them meeting Erik for the first time.
After the "walkabout", some local supporters hosted a Meet & Greet with Erik in their home. Another successful chat with Q&A!
| |
---|---
|
Also on Saturday, Aadland for Congress volunteers and staff knocked on neighborhood doors in Arvada. Many folks shared their knowledge of Erik and support for his bid to be the Republican nominee in the Primary Election next week!

Watch for the Aadland Army Redshirts in your neighborhood soon!

If you'd like to join the fun, read about volunteer opportunities with this button:
| [Learn More](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Np2OhzgqqVbj0ur_3itdprF1wEZBukC6Mcne88i1Hwz4PBCaFHcOAxClqj0xkFSCUAg7kaQd9fD0MBc7nerNfqbj2XYpKp5qlF32-EiHlMFvg61xWkDdlnoN2ftrFWPPfpnGV_eGO8reE1e7ycTspWhZPa8iCP60crt5c4YqjIk8R6b1xSTBM8HJ-7g9huXO&c=bXzAnZjl7fHF7hPFWSXXqpKwRezjQ4g-ys-cRo0wE_G1Bgi1lutN9w==&ch=_we6WU_3lgAg-cyqohiUOwH3WX3qrygq4aOEK_UYod_xN9gsZ4Beew==)
---
| |
---
|
## About Erik
---
| |
---
| Jefferson County resident Erik Aadland is a West Point graduate and a twice-decorated Bronze Star veteran--one for valor--from his time in Iraq and Afghanistan. Concluding his army career in 2011 as a Captain, he pursued a career in the oil and natural gas industry with his work culminating as a project manager directing the onshore construction of the Leviathan Project in Dor, Israel. This project resulted in Israel being a net exporter of natural gas and becoming energy independent. Erik holds a master's degree in the field of psychology. He is a devoted husband and proud father of three children.
---
|
---
|
## About Aadland For Congress
---
| |
---
| Erik's effort to represent Colorado District 7 (CD7) is a true grass-roots campaign. There is no family fortune behind this drive; no generations of beer barons, or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization. Volunteers and professionals began joining the cause to help send Erik to Washington in March of 2021. Staff personnel now cross the spectrum of political pundits, professionals, friends and neighbors.
You can stand with Erik by contributing to our cause. We can't do it alone, but together we can do anything.
---

clean_body: Read why that is a very good idea | | | | | | Duty Honor Country | | | | | ---|--- | One of the major decision-making powers of Congress, according to the US Constitution, is the ability to declare war. This power rests with no other branch, although it has been largely ignored and abused by the executive branch for decades without repercussions. The consequences of federal decisions, or lack thereof, do not end in the halls of the Capitol or White House, however. That is only where things begin, and often is the root place of many of our national problems. Unfortunately, it is not our elected officials who fight our nation's wars. Otherwise, they might think more carefully about getting us embroiled in conflicts halfway around the world. | | | ---|--- | No, America's sons and daughters fight our wars and spend years deployed to far off lands on behalf of the American people. Only those who have served can fully appreciate the sacrifice and the traumas of war that are rarely ever healed completely. Those who have served in a combat theater deeply understand how lives are affected by war even long after a deployment. This experience clearly makes combat veterans best suited to make judicious decisions on the use of our military and to lead our nation in wartime. I have experienced firsthand the effects of war on my fellow Soldiers, families, our allies, civilians and even on the enemy. Such knowledge, which is only gained by direct experience, is crucial when contemplating warfare, because the consequences are extreme. | | | ---|--- | No one else in this race can speak with authority on national security, combat or how to effectively win our nation's wars. Veterans also recognize the dangers of divisiveness in society, having seen it rip apart other nations, and many of us desire to lead the nation in healing our deep divisions. We have been bound in service with men and women from across the nation consisting of multiple ethnicities, races, and religions in ways unlike any other institution in America. We look for the content of one's character, not the color of one's skin, or one's gender. Veterans also have an abiding understanding of our oath to support and defend the US Constitution. We had to live the oath, not just hollowly repeat words at ceremonies. A wartime Soldier understands duty and sacrifice for the greater good in ways most others cannot. | | | ---|--- | Veterans understand courage and honor in the face of adversity, taking on dangerous, difficult missions, most often outside the sight of our fellow citizens. We are accustomed to doing the right thing even when no one is watching. Our watchwords are Duty, Honor, Country... And I will do my duty as your member of Congress. Whether or not it is popular with the Washington crowd or my own party, I will do my duty as prescribed by the US Constitution. I will always strive to do what is right for America. No one in this race has been tested in the ways I have on the battlefield. I am a proven warrior, and my combat experiences cannot be replicated by those who have not served. I will go to Washington ready for action from day one. | | | | | | == | | | | Campaign Update | | | Last Thursday, Erik joined the other candidates for the Republican nomination to Congress at an open forum debate in Teller County. The Ute Pass Cultural Center in Woodland Park hosted the event which was attended by over 120 of our high-country neighbors (yes, I counted them). Another handful watched the debate on Zoom. Erik's answers were received with exuberant applause and some attendees contacted the Aadland for Congress campaign (via ==) to express the opinion that Erik "won" the debate handily. | | ---|--- | Friday morning Erik joined Jimmy Lakey on his acclaimed radio show. Jimmy broadcasts on 600AM KCOL in Greeley and always presents a lively discussion. Dark and early on Saturday morning, Erik headed to Salida to join campaign volunteers and knock on doors for talk with our neighbors in the south. The troupe visited homes and businesses around Salida and hosted almost 30 folks for lunch; many of them meeting Erik for the first time. After the "walkabout", some local supporters hosted a Meet & Greet with Erik in their home. Another successful chat with Q&A! | | ---|--- | Also on Saturday, Aadland for Congress volunteers and staff knocked on neighborhood doors in Arvada. Many folks shared their knowledge of Erik and support for his bid to be the Republican nominee in the Primary Election next week! Watch for the Aadland Army Redshirts in your neighborhood soon! If you'd like to join the fun, read about volunteer opportunities with this button: | == | | | About Erik | | | Jefferson County resident Erik Aadland is a West Point graduate and a twice-decorated Bronze Star veteran--one for valor--from his time in Iraq and Afghanistan. Concluding his army career in 2011 as a Captain, he pursued a career in the oil and natural gas industry with his work culminating as a project manager directing the onshore construction of the Leviathan Project in Dor, Israel. This project resulted in Israel being a net exporter of natural gas and becoming energy independent. Erik holds a master's degree in the field of psychology. He is a devoted husband and proud father of three children. | | About Aadland For Congress | | | Erik's effort to represent Colorado District 7 (CD7) is a true grass-roots campaign. There is no family fortune behind this drive; no generations of beer barons, or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization. Volunteers and professionals began joining the cause to help send Erik to Washington in March of 2021. Staff personnel now cross the spectrum of political pundits, professionals, friends and neighbors. You can stand with Erik by contributing to our cause. We can't do it alone, but together we can do anything. | == Please use the button below to provide your financial support and help insure Erik Aadland is our Republican candidate to the U.S. House of Representatives. | | == | | Upcoming Events | | | Wednesday Jun 1 3:00PM -- The Chuck & Julie Show Erik will Talk with Chuck Bonniwell and Julie Hayden on their acclaimed live podcast "The Chuck & Julie Show". Connect to the live stream at 3:00 today using the link below for audio and video of this podcast. Remember that Primary election voting begins next week and this you could get good information to help you decide how to cast your vote from this show. | == | | Wednesday Jun 1 5:30-7:30PM -- Meet and talk with Erik in Arvada Erik will host a Meet & Greet event in Arvada. This is a great opportunity to talk one-on-one with the frontrunner in the race to represent us in the U.S. House. Please RSVP with the button below to let us know you're coming, and to get the details and directions. | == | | Friday Jun 3rd 6:00AM -- The Kim Monson Show on 560 KLZ Kim Monson will host Erik once again for a fascinating interview. Kim is a distinguished personality on Denver radio and always conducts an insightful and informative interview. This is one more opportunity to learn about Erik Aadland and why he deserves your vote in the Primary Election that starts next week! Tune your AM radio to 560 at 6:00AM or hear the live stream below | == | | Saturday Jun 4th 9:30-Noon -- Knocking on Doors in Lakewood Erik and the Aadland for Congress staff will be visiting our neighbors in Lakewood Saturday from 9:30 to Noon. If you'd like to join the fun, contact the staff at the email address below: mailto:staff@aadlandforcolorado.com | | Tuesday Jun 7th 6:30-7:30PM -- Telephone Town Hall Meeting #5 Erik will host his fifth Telephone Town Hall Meeting beginning at 6:30PM next Tuesday. You can hear Erik's views, and ask your questions live. Use the button below to sign up for the meeting. At 6:30 on Tuesday, the system will call the number you provide and connect you to the conference call. This is a great opportunity to talk with Erik from the comfort of your home. The Primary Election starts next week, so please join Erik and learn why he best deserves your vote! | == | | Wednesday Jun 8th 10:00AM -- The Ross Kaminsky Show Ross brings great ideas, freedom talk and fun to the Denver radio waves every weekday on "The Blowtorch" 850 KOA.
