name: Jared Moskowitz
subject: My op-ed on Uvalde →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz for Congress
body:
Dear Friends,

Yesterday, my op-ed on last week’s tragic shooting in Uvalde was published in the Sun Sentinel. In it, I explain how we can pass life-saving gun safety legislation.

I hope you’ll take some time to read the op-ed, which is included below.

Thank you,

Jared

When the Marjory Stoneman Douglas school shooting happened in 2018, my son was learning how to write at his pre-school around the corner from MSD. Local schools were put on lockdown, and my son’s teacher, Jen Guttenberg, put him in a closet to keep him safe. While she sought to protect my son and other children in her care, Jen’s own daughter was murdered in a stairwell two traffic lights away in a preventable and horrific act of gun violence. I think about this every day.

After every school shooting, I relive the Parkland tragedy in some way. I was at the hotel where families and friends of “missing children” gathered, but I knew those children weren't missing. When authorities confirmed the deaths, I didn’t hear crying, I heard screaming. It haunts me. Parents like Jen and her husband Fred relive it in ways I can’t even imagine. This week, yet another new set of parents in Texas joined an exclusive club that no one ever wants to belong to.

The United States of America should be able to keep a simple promise to parents: when you drop your kids off at school, you get to pick them up alive.

When I fought for the Marjory Stoneman Douglas Public Safety Act – the most comprehensive gun violence prevention, mental health, and school safety bill ever passed in Florida – I cast my vote as a Democratic State Representative, but I advocated as a parent and member of a community that was hurting.

Our bill raised the minimum age to purchase firearms from 18 to 21, mandated 3-day waiting periods for gun purchases, created “Red Flag” laws empowering law enforcement to withhold guns from dangerous individuals, improved school resource officer programs, funded new mental health programs, and more. In the four years since the bill’s passage, all of its provisions have saved lives across our state. The red flag laws have been used over 5,000 times to confiscate weapons from potentially dangerous people. Let that sink in for a moment. How many Parklands or Pulses or Buffalos have been prevented?

Here is my advice to legislators in Texas and across the country about how to prevent gun violence: appeal to legislators as parents. Make them meet with victims’ families and push them to see the crime scene.

I did not get a Republican Legislature and Republican Governor (Rick Scott) to pass the MSD bill by calling them names or lambasting their connections to the NRA (although I admit there were times when I wanted to do both). Instead, I personally reached out to leaders of both parties in the House and Senate and asked Republican leadership to visit the school with me. Upon seeing the carnage, many of them cried.

A great deal of my colleagues in the Legislature were parents. I told them about the righteous anger and unfathomable sadness of the parents from my own community who would never see their children again except while visiting the cemetery. I talked about the boxes the parents picked out for the kids and the empty rooms in their houses. No graduations, no weddings, no life. If it happened in my neighborhood, it could happen in their neighborhoods too.

I told my colleagues that it would be easy to do nothing and please their most ardent supporters, but this time, we needed to show the world that we could find solutions together. I reminded them that children don’t belong to political parties, they belong to families. I will always give them credit for doing the right thing.

We cannot accept the fatalistic view that legislation aimed at preventing gun violence is impossible to pass, even in states with Republican legislatures and governors. None of my legislative colleagues – Democrats or Republicans – paid a political price for keeping families safe. I refuse to believe that what we accomplished in Florida cannot be done again in other states or at the federal level.

This, pure and simple, is why I’m running for Congress.

I cannot sit idly by while the threat of gun violence remains so prevalent. We cannot place the alleged importance of the filibuster over the lives of elementary school students.

Politicians have failed every family who has lost a loved one to gun violence.

The words of a Parkland parent whose daughter was murdered ring true: “There should have been one school shooting and we should have fixed it.”

Paid for by Jared Moskowitz for Congress
Jared Moskowitz for Congress
PO Box 8784
Coral Springs, FL 33065
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/xijQj8Ub_ESyHtRt33sKYA2?unsubscribedata=sZpun7A3qcNOt8AKbTYRzVbOpXSFYUwa3qGZGxSNHVaMXO5qgxOE0OKNAymg8F07Zboxt8%2FVZsUzKmrgZMbe3Ndn7WYKo1bxNQq4C5JZrDxlbow3TgKCtb%2FdBP38PHPsF8Cl3WVBs%2BSHlVuCCRHCP812wmVvMrU1WnYm797Zs3f0TY4XGG5BPKd7OKWSsO%2FVEFY3n796bBDD8Bd6%2Bz7bsJGYzUXtH461vqwHbtxJT%2BXLc76cgRg5vEsRxIe0IFcbCLtHLMq%2BklTPPvcCOUtBOPXndEzCOvTGL4xqZR7owudLFdoPSgpW0cX6NbOidVa2K9dTEAbS0Cw19lmuu2lXkE%2F1ctlad3A%2BRRFhewpMLWw7a%2BTDBx8JGU0XHb5ez2g6aFhkX5ol86G8lR%2FHfXusa0l9CfSfoeU9zkmLPR3jMKI%3D .
clean_body: Dear Friends, Yesterday, my op-ed on last week’s tragic shooting in Uvalde was published in the Sun Sentinel. In it, I explain how we can pass life-saving gun safety legislation. I hope you’ll take some time to read the op-ed, which is included below. Thank you, Jared When the Marjory Stoneman Douglas school shooting happened in 2018, my son was learning how to write at his pre-school around the corner from MSD. Local schools were put on lockdown, and my son’s teacher, Jen Guttenberg, put him in a closet to keep him safe. While she sought to protect my son and other children in her care, Jen’s own daughter was murdered in a stairwell two traffic lights away in a preventable and horrific act of gun violence. I think about this every day. After every school shooting, I relive the Parkland tragedy in some way. I was at the hotel where families and friends of “missing children” gathered, but I knew those children weren't missing. When authorities confirmed the deaths, I didn’t hear crying, I heard screaming. It haunts me. Parents like Jen and her husband Fred relive it in ways I can’t even imagine. This week, yet another new set of parents in Texas joined an exclusive club that no one ever wants to belong to. The United States of America should be able to keep a simple promise to parents: when you drop your kids off at school, you get to pick them up alive. When I fought for the Marjory Stoneman Douglas Public Safety Act – the most comprehensive gun violence prevention, mental health, and school safety bill ever passed in Florida – I cast my vote as a Democratic State Representative, but I advocated as a parent and member of a community that was hurting. Our bill raised the minimum age to purchase firearms from 18 to 21, mandated 3-day waiting periods for gun purchases, created “Red Flag” laws empowering law enforcement to withhold guns from dangerous individuals, improved school resource officer programs, funded new mental health programs, and more. In the four years since the bill’s passage, all of its provisions have saved lives across our state. The red flag laws have been used over 5,000 times to confiscate weapons from potentially dangerous people. Let that sink in for a moment. How many Parklands or Pulses or Buffalos have been prevented? name: Diehl for Governor
subject: Please join me in supporting parents and kids across our state
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DIEHL FOR MASSACHUSETTS
body:
| | | |
---
Dear Friend,
If you know anything about me, it's that I am not afraid to stand up and speak out when it comes to protecting kids \-- especially my own.
That's what happened recently when I spoke about a pledge my daughter (a student at the public high school where we live) was forced to sign when she enrolled to play sports last fall. If you have a high school athlete in your family, you were probably faced with this as well.
To nobody's surprise, The Boston Globe was quick to pounce on the story and suggest that I had it all wrong and it never happened. The local Superintendent was also eager to look past the situation.
Unfortunately for them, we have proof.
Here's the pledge, copied from the school district's Website, and which was required of every single MIAA athlete across the state:
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NSM8Z6hU7S5pPdewyAqxu9hDkBeuuFXYONE_NBsRtMqoJHzLmjfNJQtfSn6IEE0orOn4YawWCjNe07HWKDuWPZXKJXmcXzLLxgtIRVLgWsgkt0ZKe91yH1jEIgLX9G_yK-o3DEpThakGtCXlft-Kl83SUoJrMPAtshkvlqbs8pvu8SWlhruw1wS8fvscLFXE&c=3fZTwUqu-uLukAbUUNAa9SzskPRatXXxtOfDu7v_uiXdXMbs1P--Lw==&ch=aaC8l-WD6c9cG4NJquxkZN0NodQsLLu3q_4ZK1RI2TzRLnSPciyRSQ==)
---
| And, here's an overview of the course on "implicit bias" that every athlete was required to complete, from the National Federation of State High School Associations:
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NSM8Z6hU7S5pPdewyAqxu9hDkBeuuFXYONE_NBsRtMqoJHzLmjfNJQtfSn6IEE0og5Nni1faoQRSdtwekycgT1jUoHkFJ_86sl2GhzSv9SmLoaf5U1KlbXX-_jD3ZBVmNOW-0ArUhWdcNY6nnaLDKn2xGvfUTiCkaRiH-hV3fNw=&c=3fZTwUqu-uLukAbUUNAa9SzskPRatXXxtOfDu7v_uiXdXMbs1P--Lw==&ch=aaC8l-WD6c9cG4NJquxkZN0NodQsLLu3q_4ZK1RI2TzRLnSPciyRSQ==)
---
| Don't just take my word for it. This controversial pledge and course have been the subject of reporting by[ Mass Family Institute](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NSM8Z6hU7S5pPdewyAqxu9hDkBeuuFXYONE_NBsRtMqoJHzLmjfNJQtfSn6IEE0oNp6TRaooSZQxPFod4g1xwxNBOd_lzDqMGbkX4dZnINN38bN0izpJrgrpYYKI2VNG3VS-Ha21wQSpeCNSmuwAXk4lZ9EGVycL73K7Uf57e-Wb2s_Tp5RfhuWRcZLxKUknyEd-xjsNUF3XIbO34GoU0_GSIXGX2I_Rpvp9d-U2FPnd6nH445f2Cg==&c=3fZTwUqu-uLukAbUUNAa9SzskPRatXXxtOfDu7v_uiXdXMbs1P--Lw==&ch=aaC8l-WD6c9cG4NJquxkZN0NodQsLLu3q_4ZK1RI2TzRLnSPciyRSQ==) and [The New Boston Post](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NSM8Z6hU7S5pPdewyAqxu9hDkBeuuFXYONE_NBsRtMqoJHzLmjfNJQtfSn6IEE0obzSUYAwHYroQr5cZjZlaahR3f81FG1_wZninqaqYWbkGAJNEU7WnYritqHFwAkIQQ2TRdN8UeftdWvU9ZDhR-9iaDzUuWRZrzFJkY6E7Zo147fpLead0z51Z6Lc9YGOwdw8XEw_clzKNF8VvcFiMUo0ZyKhRlnyd42zz914POWlpUBg9CJjWh_N_6neynMpQ3PMweB7yXLLKq_hx5bNI00-jfxpNmiHR&c=3fZTwUqu-uLukAbUUNAa9SzskPRatXXxtOfDu7v_uiXdXMbs1P--Lw==&ch=aaC8l-WD6c9cG4NJquxkZN0NodQsLLu3q_4ZK1RI2TzRLnSPciyRSQ==). And, of course, it comes as no surprise to families of high school athletes like mine, who were required to sign the pledge to participate. (There are reports that the MIAA does not currently require student athletes to sign the pledge, however, as you can clearly see above, the town where we live still requires it today.)
Here is the point. KathyJo and I have worked very hard to teach our children to be accepting of all people and to model good values. We denounce any form of discrimination, anywhere, and we teach our kids to do the same. However, I strongly believe that our schools should not be used to teach kids a political agenda. That means a high school student like my daughter should not be forced to admit an implicit bias toward another race, gender, disability, or sexuality, or to hold the community accountable for the use or exhibition of discriminatory practices, as a prerequisite for participating in high school sports. The place for these values-driven lessons is within the home.
Obviously, this is just one of many examples, but it was personal to me and my family. All across our state, schools are doing a disservice to kids by teaching them a political agenda against their will, and they are doing parents a disservice by cutting them out of the decision-making process. That's wrong, and I oppose it.
If you are a parent or a grandparent and you're worried about what your kids are learning in school and your ability to have a stake in the process, I would appreciate your support.
Please visit my Website to learn more about the [Parents for Diehl Coalition](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NSM8Z6hU7S5pPdewyAqxu9hDkBeuuFXYONE_NBsRtMqoJHzLmjfNJdiNbXKdXGRLpnwCEIDAlSTsOFwmzhXAD8zBW3XhtTWw7N-SMnU88e5aLaEgsEBVXMw-giZd44YJxMEk5ej5v0Ndnl9xEAm1m1pJc65SWtaAHSZnzGYa2Tk=&c=3fZTwUqu-uLukAbUUNAa9SzskPRatXXxtOfDu7v_uiXdXMbs1P--Lw==&ch=aaC8l-WD6c9cG4NJquxkZN0NodQsLLu3q_4ZK1RI2TzRLnSPciyRSQ==), which is fighting hard for parents and students across Massachusetts.
Thanks for your support.
Sincerely,
---
|
---
|
---
| PAID FOR BY DIEHL FOR MASSACHUSETTS
---
| |
---
|

---

All across our state, schools are doing a disservice to kids by teaching them a political agenda against their will, and they are doing parents a disservice by cutting them out of the decision-making process. That's wrong, and I oppose it. If you are a parent or a grandparent and you're worried about what your kids are learning in school and your ability to have a stake in the process, I would appreciate your support. Please visit my Website to learn more about the ==, which is fighting hard for parents and students across Massachusetts. Thanks for your support. Sincerely, | | | PAID FOR BY DIEHL FOR MASSACHUSETTS | | | Diehl for MA == | == == == | | | | | | | Diehl for Massachusetts | PO Box 60362, Worcester, MA 01606 | | Sent by mailto:info@geoffdiehl.com in collaboration with

name: Brent Bozell
subject: Radical communists are waging war.
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60501129:6Z8tMZoNN:m:1:3253819041:8AE74977D3353054EBE300C95CC376DE:r)

Peter,

We're in the information age and there is a war being waged against you by radical communists hell-bent on destroying our country.

Today, the media--including Big Tech-are participating in a radical coup against our country.

They're lying to you, and not even trying to hide it.
* They lied about the Covid pandemic--and we're still paying the price.
* They lied about Trump colluding with Russia.
* They lie about inflation and say our economy is booming.

They censor conservative voices:
* President Trump was banned from social media, while China and Iran continue their propaganda online.
* Republican Marjorie Taylor Greene was suspended from both Facebook and Twitter.
* Speakers like Ben Shapiro and Ann Coulter have been kicked off college campuses.

They want to destroy America and replace it with a socialist hellhole using Marxist and Maoist tactics.

That's why the Media Research Center (MRC) is going on offense, and we need your help to lead the way.

[_**Peter, MRC is fighting blatant lies, censorship, and manipulation from the Media and Big Tech. Can you join the fight with a donation of $25, $50, $100, or any amount? Click here to donate today >>> **_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60501129:6Z8tMZoNN:m:1:3253819041:8AE74977D3353054EBE300C95CC376DE:r)

Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the MRC.

MRC is committed to neutralizing leftist bias in the news media and popular culture by educating the public about how it has been integrated into the media.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the leftwing media ... now, 90% DO NOT trust the Fake News media.**

Even though the Media is spending millions of dollars to force their agenda on America, MRC is on the front lines of this information war, and we're winning.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60501129:6Z8tMZoNN:m:1:3253819041:8AE74977D3353054EBE300C95CC376DE:r)

We're battling this every day. And, we've had some major victories, including a big win against Big Tech.

The MRC's groundbreaking _**Censored!**_ report exposed attempts by Big Tech to silence conservative speech online and was cited four times in House Judiciary Committee hearings investigating the issue.

The success of this report evolved into further research by MRC staff. This research was then used as a primary source by the Administration to enact 2020's Executive Order on Preventing Online Censorship.

Peter, this is what your support makes possible. And we have more fights in progress, so you'll want to stay tuned in for breaking developments. **Click any link below to donate. **

name: Paul Farrow - Chairman
subject: My new op-ed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=paul_op_ed_soft_ask_v1&n=1)
---
Friend -- I wanted to make sure you saw my [**new op-ed**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=5wg3don5l6_J12hXkf3HPcNYT6lUz2m18CPWRl8AJrwbK7LrM1ycBSFVMNK5eOXXFLrqH9fNDS7-KOHH_a5vAOE5eEdY7330p-AqEzFqZxo&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=paul_op_ed_soft_ask_v1&n=2) in Wisconsin Right Now discussing the Republican Party of Wisconsin’s recent State Convention in Middleton: [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=5wg3don5l6_J12hXkf3HPcNYT6lUz2m18CPWRl8AJrwbK7LrM1ycBSFVMNK5eOXXFLrqH9fNDS7-KOHH_a5vAOE5eEdY7330p-AqEzFqZxo&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=paul_op_ed_soft_ask_v1&n=3) As I wrote in the piece: _“While in Middleton, I appreciated hearing the diverse perspectives of the Party Faithful and discussing what conservatives can do to win in November, and how we can make Wisconsin a better place to live for families today and for generations to come._ _I’ve learned a lot from these conversations. My biggest takeaway? Republicans have more in common than we give ourselves credit for._ _The Republican Party was born in Ripon, Wisconsin of a group of independent thinkers who sought to end the evil of slavery in the United States. To this day, Wisconsin Republicans are still independent thinkers – and even rabble-rousers – motivated by a love of country and a desire to strengthen our communities through tried-and-true conservative policies. These conservative ideals are what unite us, and if we effectively spread our message, they are our key to success in these crucial 2022 elections._ _..._ _Over the next several months, outside forces will seek to highlight the areas where Republicans disagree rather than the opportunities for us to come together. Democrats will try to exploit our divisions to weaken us, and the media will sell controversy for headlines and clicks. We won’t let these forces distract us from the mission that we know is paramount – to re-elect Senator Ron Johnson, defeat failed Governor Tony Evers, send a Republican to Washington from the third congressional district, and elect conservatives in local races across Wisconsin – all in our quest to defend America.”_ True to our history, Wisconsin Republicans remain independent thinkers motivated by a love of country and a desire to make our state a better place. Yet issues like election integrity, protecting life, public safety, and education all form a common bond among us – and if we effectively spread our message, they’re our key to success in November. I hope you’ll give the op-ed a read, and that you’ll join us in our fight to re-elect Senator Ron Johnson, defeat Tony Evers, and win at all levels of the ballot this fall. You can sign up to volunteer [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=VsLgeNFrtuHusRivV19v3aCXxtdEYxug7BpyM8N6AZw&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=paul_op_ed_soft_ask_v1&n=4) , or if you cannot volunteer, but would like to support our efforts financially, click [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDV7DxRC_TCxyWDO7uO037xjYdYjg4ErGdYKV1_ZI7KQj4&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=paul_op_ed_soft_ask_v1&n=5). Forward, Paul Farrow
Chairman
Republican Party of Wisconsin | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDV7DxRC_TCxyWDO7uO037xjYdYjg4ErGdYKV1_ZI7KQj4&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=paul_op_ed_soft_ask_v1&n=6 "CONTRIBUTE") [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDV7DxRC_TCxyWDO7uO037xjYdYjg4ErGdYKV1_ZI7KQj4&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=paul_op_ed_soft_ask_v1&n=6)
---
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6myz1ydj26pS20sqllUBZd4&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=paul_op_ed_soft_ask_v1&n=7) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tr24D9XbJYDft_QizpripYs&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=paul_op_ed_soft_ask_v1&n=8) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y0VJVp2OCKNw8zDVmWeSo7yP6jlGmDIaYIm5b1oT1T4S&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=paul_op_ed_soft_ask_v1&n=9) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=paul_op_ed_soft_ask_v1&n=10)

name: John Fetterman
subject: I’m officially the Democratic nominee in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46006628/348419605/934264986?refcode=220601&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2MxNTNmNS1lMGUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1kh84WelblWzRSZNxW516HclZ3t3fhf-E_Ok9jruZVY=)
I am so deeply honored, team. And trust me, I do NOT take being the *official* Democratic candidate for the #1 Most Likely to Flip U.S. Senate seat in the country for granted. Nor do I take going up against the Republicans in November lightly. Look, I can win in places other Democrats can't because I’m a different kind of Democrat. I’ve already run + won statewide before, and I can do it again in November. I just need your support, which is why I have to ask: [**Will you donate any amount right now to my campaign and Seth Moulton and become a Fetterman for PA Founding Donor? name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Stand for those with no voice
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6098%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=ygodgtqEYT6og9QKpvOw%2fg&sysid=1)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten--or ignored--some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62988%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xVL6POvvzi6Z4h5NGfzjyA&sysid=1)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62989%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V8MFvqaxOdOKWYN6LDLHug&sysid=1) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62980%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yYIQHf45yrC3QKYcyCYDxQ&sysid=1) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---

---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---

| | Joe Biden is out of his depths. He’s talking about feeding our troops, but he can’t even feed our babies here at home. President Reagan warned us that America’s downfall could only come from within: ** ****“Our surrender will be voluntary, because by that time we will have been weakened from within spiritually, morally, and economically”** **** And Biden reeks of weakness. ** **** Our enemies smell blood in the water - it’s time to stand up and take back our country before it’s too late. ** **** [Co-Pilot, will you commit $5 or $10 to send me to Congress and make America strong at home again?](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zau69spvoj5ltfjgp2ke0j3ivlb1ok9nu70st4ug_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chi68o72c9h2bs) I know I can lead and win this fight in Congress. Here’s why:
---
My real-life experience in leading others. >From my time as an Apache pilot to my success in growing and expanding my supply chain business. Leaders not only need relevant experience but know how to take risks and sacrifice when needed. _**And we need a leader in this seat.**_ With **ONLY 5 SEATS** needed to take back the majority, winning this seat will mean the difference between defeating Pelosi or allowing her to continue to rule Congress with an iron fist. **[Co-Pilot, will you join these TOP CONSERVATIVE LEADERS and endorse my campaign by chipping in $5 right now?](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za62pcbqnv2h3dte8t52h06f4dsu1hqu25os2s60_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chi68o72c9h2bs)** Let’s Fly!John James

body:
We wanted to take a moment... We wanted to take a moment and thank you for once again coming through for us.

**This past month,** our country saw the results of the Trump administration's war on reproductive choice, more devastating and senseless acts of gun violence, and more attempts from the Treason Caucus to evade justice.

Yet, in this time of duress, when the corrupt members of the Treason Caucus are hell-bent on erasing the truth of January 6th and limiting our rights, we know that the fight will continue because we know we have your support.

**The good news is that this past week, we met and exceeded our end-of-month fundraising goal for May.**

Thanks to the generous donations from supporters like Marie from Florida, Kent from Hawaii, Annette from Texas, and many, many more, we are starting June strong and ready to take on whatever challenges are thrown at us. We are grateful for having you on our side, and we hope you will continue to stand with us as we continue to defend our democracy and fight the Treason Caucus.

Thank you,
Team Never Again
Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, Lauren Boebert, Mo Brooks, Andy Biggs. Those are just a few of the Republicans in Congress that Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from. | | | Folks,

**Exciting news — we submitted well over the required number of signatures and have been approved to be on the ballot this fall.** Nothing we’ve done to date could’ve been done without all of you so thank you for all of your help!
---
| [ ](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=11ce617a25&e=356c0699dd)

| The work is just beginning though, and we are working to secure the resources necessary to get our message out that the middle class deserves a break and reach as many voters as possible between now and November. [**Can you help us by donating $100, $50, or $25 to my campaign today? **](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=03f53b839d&e=356c0699dd)

| For too long our concerns have gone unanswered by Scott Fitzgerald — he simply refuses to do his job, and work for us. It’s time to move our state and country forward by seeking solutions regardless of which side of the aisle they come from instead holding us back by playing partisan games.

**If you’re tired of the same old same old and excited to vote for a candidate that will answer to you and help push the government back into the middle class’s corner, please consider contributing whatever you can to my campaign for Congress today. **

Your grassroots support is what will make this campaign successful so that we can win back OUR seat in November.

Thanks again,

Mike

name: Pennsylvania Infrastructure Audit - Team Ruiz
subject: You have been selected to represent Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
| | |

After a rigorous selection process, Dr. Ruiz and the team chose you to participate in our new Listen, Secretary Buttigieg is leading the charge to fix America’s crumbling infrastructure. But he needs a foolproof strategy to ensure things go according to plan. So we’re asking for your immediate input. We’re depending on your insight to help us answer crucial questions: • Do you support electric vehicles or high-speed rail? • Do you have problems with bridges or potholes in your community? • Are there any issues specific to your area that you don’t want overlooked? We chose you as one of only [5] Pennsylvania Democrats for this exclusive survey, so please make sure to fully submit your response to ensure accurate data for your area. Thanks in advance, \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? subject: I'm in trouble.

body:
It’s worse than I thought.

| [](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyNUctugzAQ_Bq4gcAGEh84VKpyS689WsbegBu_ZC-N8vc1aVCl9lLZB2s8O7szq0YllWhlqUfSENIMTdv2Pe1p3RJKYWLAOnaZKDsUXSMMRKwjhHUyWgqHIl0vPkqopbflMlKmGsaYVMdj30ySNvIgQQ50OBw7Amoo38_8LLTRbn4TFsaIFx4TRzHzKzgH6l5h9Fkc-FC1FSG8Lc24IIZU0JeCnPJNINcI9U27CGrrm7FncX49PORTafdUqkKQuJXSk_UO7jwYUDMU9BXjCgUZLPcBtfsBVrTcgtKrzViEz7SIuOPJr9luxr9VHxhC3JgffnG7CyOqBO75L4UNQs9bh7_j7RzvEBzulLyFXw6qnFUZRxVu2hidhm0ds81ZPqLH_0T5Bc85pF8)
---

Friend,

It’s not the easiest thing to admit, but I’m getting beat like a rented mule in fundraising by my new Radical Opponent. It’s not a good sign for me, you, or any other conservative in Louisiana.

I’ll be blunt: If I don’t catch up to him and catch up quick, he’s going to blow me out of the water come November and threaten to turn Louisiana and the U.S. Senate into a Socialist safe haven. I won’t have it, and I hope you won’t either, but I’m coming to you in all sincerity when I say I can’t do this by myself.

I’ve got to have your help if I’m going to have a chance. I’ve got to have your help if we’re going to save America. It’s not up for debate. Your support is the answer. Your support is the only thing standing in the way of Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate wiping the floor with me this coming November. I’m humbly asking for your help. **Without it, they’ll keep burying me with their unlimited dollars.

I’M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP.

WITHOUT IT I CAN’T STOP THE LEFT. **

clean_body: It’s worse than I thought. | Friend, It’s not the easiest thing to admit, but I’m getting beat like a rented mule in fundraising by my new Radical Opponent. It’s not a good sign for me, you, or any other conservative in Louisiana. I’ll be blunt: If I don’t catch up to him and catch up quick, he’s going to blow me out of the water come November and threaten to turn Louisiana and the U.S. Senate into a Socialist safe haven. I won’t have it, and I hope you won’t either, but I’m coming to you in all sincerity when I say I can’t do this by myself. I’ve got to have your help if I’m going to have a chance. I’ve got to have your help if we’re going to save America. It’s not up for debate. Your support is the answer. Your support is the only thing standing in the way of Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate wiping the floor with me this coming November. I’m humbly asking for your help. Without it, they’ll keep burying me with their unlimited dollars. I’M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP. WITHOUT IT I CAN’T STOP THE LEFT. | | | | | | Thank you for your help. Thank you for your encouragement. Peter, if you turn on the news, there's a good chance you'll hear my name. Typically, it’s alongside a dishonest legacy media headline misrepresenting my agenda, insulting the people of Florida, or implying FREEDOM is the latest and greatest threat to America. It is an insulting and absurd way to distort the truth and mislead you, the American public. Their attempts at intimidation won’t work on me though. I am not backing down. Not even a little bit. I welcome the "insults" and the hard work to refute them because I know the importance of strong leadership in a time like this. That is why I’m running for re-election, and I hope you’ll **_[pledge your support for my campaign.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=662b0642805243f7840cad7a1ec8f9ba&_e=6X4mRvPHlvnEYVjHXRt6OpClgMX8cPEHoNy0nQD2lOTOYThRToyykfeaj8I51nI-2lalnovihtXTlOXOy9hSC6Kg8wBHxVd9TR7JHPoSxcdgyaztbIpzbJs6ro4GDcHcoVRT2ptycAtZIEL-7k7Cf7tnJ_BDSMqdagQzt0eksZtwG46TTDFJ_AEYWouPzmqIbqy5P9NIr4XrNVBDBIMBkEB9ps_oS7n6onOj_5xBXOxEFM1pPONNwc-nLzlgV7D4KSbJ_CvSSRVVkZJx_0gH7eepEjUscHcg-Nj9z6e5iX3tV2laCHCb9Qt3qMh3eara7L8rqxsJkifdymwNwfXMk31SOTNZPMPn46u8Y523MWdruNehlSM3cJbq78ws2ehJn0Nd9nIbXjp9dAnAWmuiru4Bqj4PsB73mHo9DCfr4-0%3D)_** If you’re still hesitant about getting involved, I’d like to remind you what we’re up against. It is evident how far to the left the media has gone by looking at how they define “radical.”
* Allowing grown men and women to assess personal risk and decide to wear a mask or not: **RADICAL**.
* Allowing CHILDREN under 9 years old to make life-altering, sometimes irreversible, decisions about their "gender identity": **__JUST FINE!__**
* Encouraging an educational environment focused on learning and preparing students for the real world: **RADICAL**.
* Encouraging students to hate themselves, their peers, and our country: **__JUST FINE!__**

The stakes could not be higher.

These out-of-touch liberal elites are so threatened by rational thought that they will call me radical for standing with everyday people on the side of common sense and sanity. If that makes me a radical, so be it.

I will always defend our liberty, protect our children, and promote the ideals of our Constitution which make our country the greatest on earth. No amount of intimidation or petty name-calling is going to change that.
_**[>> SUPPORT RON DESANTIS NOW >>](https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/imge-data-rvs ">>SUPPORT RON DESANTIS NOW >>")**_
From my time in the Navy to my time in Congress, I have always been committed to preserving our freedom and building a better future for our children.__
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=662b0642805243f7840cad7a1ec8f9ba&_e=6X4mRvPHlvnEYVjHXRt6OpClgMX8cPEHoNy0nQD2lOTOYThRToyykfeaj8I51nI-2lalnovihtXTlOXOy9hSC6Kg8wBHxVd9TR7JHPoSxcdgyaztbIpzbJs6ro4GDcHcoVRT2ptycAtZIEL-7k7Cf7tnJ_BDSMqdagQzt0eksZtwG46TTDFJ_AEYWouPzmqIbqy5P9NIr4XrNVBDBIMBkBWWQ2rfPIcazUTiVCyejF816b9chNOEB470NvTzgOS2o1JOA96QrL5fw7lF6YQozC4y9JSQ_nmf4BB91QfAEQZONfZLLxLoeNgwK-lsMOhxl5jCK7IEFyxMSRStUH4IW70228L00LIkum18h-g_E-YvM9V5XO3XcZCPihNBzDo8XIJrBSxfWlviu8VM4EHxkKK8HVWe4ULh5MNS45eJBG0%3D)

I have three children, and I worry every day about the consequences that progressive policies could have on their lives. We have open borders inviting millions of illegal aliens, potential criminals, and thousands of pounds of illegal drugs into our country. At the same time, liberals try to defund our police forces and appoint judges who are soft on crime. We’re experiencing record-high inflation which threatens families with higher costs at the pump and the grocery store, all while the Biden administration spends your tax dollars into oblivion. We have kids – who are just trying to get an education – being injected by the anti-American agenda of woke corporations, woke politicians, and fraudulent media elites who have lost their grip on reality. I will never let these out-of-touch fanatical liberals win. _**[JOIN RON DESANTIS NOW!](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=662b0642805243f7840cad7a1ec8f9ba&_e=6X4mRvPHlvnEYVjHXRt6OpClgMX8cPEHoNy0nQD2lOTOYThRToyykfeaj8I51nI-2lalnovihtXTlOXOy9hSC6Kg8wBHxVd9TR7JHPoSxcdgyaztbIpzbJs6ro4GDcHcoVRT2ptycAtZIEL-7k7Cf7tnJ_BDSMqdagQzt0eksZtwG46TTDFJ_AEYWouPzmqIbqy5P9NIr4XrNVBDBIMBkATQb41Ftj8PJG8fGQKqy-HMPrfXexL6UQWc3Xk04-lgHm6BKnJY9VC9bX1zVY9qvv7HMT6Crq3pJlLr9V_taytejkuicy-3Mq7i167sI3WOQVNUfWiJ-us_L3hvZyzvn-t8NT_jttWBQSBfaJUnbh8TjRAwyt8nkPZl-cY353AgJysp4mjdX5ExMprcJgRI8wdFTpgRzw0_Jhq8s6hP7E4%3D)**_ As a federal prosecutor, I dedicated my time to convicting child predators and removing dangerous criminals from our Florida streets. I continued my mission in Congress by authoring bills that ended the secret taxpayer-billed slush funds members of Congress were using to pay off those who accused them of sexual harassment. Our law enforcement, prosecutors, judges, and elected officials should work to protect us - not to protect criminals. Now, as Governor, I am standing by our law enforcement officers and holding the Soros-funded, soft-on-crime prosecutors accountable to keep our communities and our families safe. I took immediate action to end the COVID theater which crippled our nation and focused on empowering small businesses with common-sense tax policies which made it easy to hire American and fuel our Florida economy. _**Florida is in a better place now than it was before the pandemic - and that’s not something liberal governors can say today.**_ I’m also leading the fight for parents and students against the poisonous, WOKE elitists to ensure our education system is NOT an indoctrination camp. It’s simple: **we’re not going to tell kindergarteners they are racist or they are oppressed.** And we’re not going to force-feed our children progressive ideologies that are confusing and wildly inappropriate for their age. We will prepare the next generation **for greatness** by teaching real history instead of perverting our past to serve the ideological goals of far-left activists who would like our children to hate America and each other. Every student should feel empowered to succeed - and together, we can make sure that they do. If all this is “RADICAL,” then Peter, I think you and I have something in common: we’re both _**RADICAL**_. I could use your help continuing what we started here in Florida. Will you chip in now to become an official supporter of my campaign? **_[YES, I WILL: $100](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=662b0642805243f7840cad7a1ec8f9ba&_e=6X4mRvPHlvnEYVjHXRt6OpClgMX8cPEHoNy0nQD2lOTOYThRToyykfeaj8I51nI-LF3B1hegYpM0TrObxSIMQiZmSltZQVA_tOmWraL8T0c4n4BWTwtCQL_vfvl5yMvlaiY742wJN5kM7arn9v_U6Eh1FIA6j2oLM1XmsLKKBqXwtOidU5Ou_ir7KppSOAcruw-welm2ahLNnhy6o3UnQpHBsSFqrbusIabQMuztuSjDStWmicMaApAAXyQV8DjAVxenHymKuAG-9VqqTCoVDHhtJIEBr2QkXYGoFqJ6uJWX2d4F0t97EMTHktdSempG2AjzTESGRcLrQWEImsvu6jRbMLepWo7EzXvmzUx2Fj_HfV7rwBUaPlmgkJBwbdKhAMigmCeXbVuF8Ck1UJ8YKQC3vALwt0mPt-pwL7oF7eI%3D)_**
**_[YES, I WILL: $75](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=662b0642805243f7840cad7a1ec8f9ba&_e=6X4mRvPHlvnEYVjHXRt6OpClgMX8cPEHoNy0nQD2lOTOYThRToyykfeaj8I51nI-LF3B1hegYpM0TrObxSIMQktFnrPjcSX8a54bWzhrcsjgB16H_K7n0tYJL6veR46FGCOVcWAmjWpSTqGaAMkEL05m4tuXmeHoZ-mrda-oDq4hFHi2Ewb9Xp9AXFC9D05aGLddYXQdrfSpS12n_oWtVEnm3XhnSsREA_gAvNsDipbVj9sac8KqEBYksFTJEloDfRWeg99EVY9cRVGf1_Qb1IyiylYBMI8Bhl4bTDGwLsAWLSbLqS1YZPoNgsnEOVBrHfwdiaS-FAI4FXWmhqcE_0BNW7epGGRGHZPlS4x1bSKdPNh0CBAM9yZvPD0dIpHwAvgkX2GKGhyxlQdsBo49dnpF6e9nNade5oKInAN5vyU%3D)_**
** _[YES, I WILL: $50](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=662b0642805243f7840cad7a1ec8f9ba&_e=6X4mRvPHlvnEYVjHXRt6OpClgMX8cPEHoNy0nQD2lOTOYThRToyykfeaj8I51nI-LF3B1hegYpM0TrObxSIMQlL5TmPSva7wuZ86l3F4RNX5njI8Rtj8NTbDrY6hEgNZ3XR01dqQFFhVq87wIV845QOGjuZkrwz1dK4kUl0PKGdj_bredsHsss20NcoJXO4gvvLj5OlvznfliWZntMJkbAQwKuAVo0t4E5rF9fYeFjbo7J2yonBnn9vtQ_W0Jgc79AiwWBSjzo57kVxQH9oR1uCmoYivzA68Il9_ozEd9ciEyGk06Bd8KrVCvb80AeUkhP4zHNdRI27p8yUPHx_tqaVeGRqlTqAqdM01Marnf85aBPJZaR0fC5AMKeTeO3NE0JDEX2_cOrN3jKFt2TjWJ1XH8ppGeDza-W798kutlCg%3D)_**
**_[YES, I WILL: $35](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=662b0642805243f7840cad7a1ec8f9ba&_e=6X4mRvPHlvnEYVjHXRt6OpClgMX8cPEHoNy0nQD2lOTOYThRToyykfeaj8I51nI-LF3B1hegYpM0TrObxSIMQlLafOJAdH-DDF4z8VNHOaJ2RIJToJRK2XmopK8ar2xvK6dw1_w09IABBl6w3ee67quH6T3b4ZHTERlcE4ifaG6FYwA9lb5HefSTi59B1AQm-Aa4m7k9i975WtMH-u2R_NVyWb4oOiIqf8Pqoz_VuuiTtQ4c5LbzjbIM2oHVOUZRlrv2D6tg1ICEv2mqlXke8vywSt0d3Mdm-Tdk3JXENsiLXNp6GODNGjJgVhRJ8fJAEwnB9CQoSTLI1_Kh99cZ1fafX5WFdszzTdavrjhk1sFNWPjv_Al-9yXyp_CxV6Ehd6capjJ-F4ypTdagq1t2eGR6zyoYDp6OEQ4PvOT2-Cs%3D)_** Make no mistake: this race won't be easy. We know liberals will do anything to win when they’re afraid of the opposition. And they’re VERY afraid of me. They’ve already proven they’ll try anything to keep me out of the Governor’s mansion.
Since I became Governor, we have made big moves to ensure Florida’s election laws are free and fair. **We made it HARDER TO CHEAT by banning ballot harvesting, strengthening voter ID, and prohibiting "Zuckerbucks."** I have no doubt they’ll try harder to make sure we don’t outsmart and outfight them in 2022. That’s why I need the support of patriots like you, to make sure we’re prepared to win whatever battles we face next.
**_[URGENT DONATION: $35](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=662b0642805243f7840cad7a1ec8f9ba&_e=6X4mRvPHlvnEYVjHXRt6OpClgMX8cPEHoNy0nQD2lOTOYThRToyykfeaj8I51nI-LF3B1hegYpM0TrObxSIMQlLafOJAdH-DDF4z8VNHOaJ2RIJToJRK2XmopK8ar2xvK6dw1_w09IABBl6w3ee67quH6T3b4ZHTERlcE4ifaG6FYwA9lb5HefSTi59B1AQm-Aa4m7k9i975WtMH-u2R_EatzyhmJj-bV4aT-QfJz6MUMLdzLGUVG2kGz9Q4yzFi_arRZzkrKpblFqN6r5JsQeJiEiLqj5sgZZF4AcsnNbtiFUmXNM-7SUbNdH1MofTjrvAzp1ZPXHdUPnIBqNds5YZQSMALHqcimIuocvjggjBdcY4JX21TawLxJ7Ddw8QMgc3-_9M9on8_cVF4pxSXdxANiY4x1SZF_S2ekVuP-6w%3D)_** Peter, I've seen what we can accomplish in just a short period of time. I've watched us win and lay the foundation for future successes. _But I also know that this is just the beginning._ That's why I am asking you for your help now. It’s time for patriots like you and me to come together and ensure this “radical” freedom we’re fighting for continues for another four years.
In an election year like this one, we cannot afford to give one inch. We cannot lose Florida to the woke progressives who would destroy everything we've worked so hard for. _Are you with me?_ **Please donate to my campaign today using this secure _[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=662b0642805243f7840cad7a1ec8f9ba&_e=6X4mRvPHlvnEYVjHXRt6OpClgMX8cPEHoNy0nQD2lOTOYThRToyykfeaj8I51nI-2lalnovihtXTlOXOy9hSC6Kg8wBHxVd9TR7JHPoSxcdgyaztbIpzbJs6ro4GDcHcoVRT2ptycAtZIEL-7k7Cf7tnJ_BDSMqdagQzt0eksZtwG46TTDFJ_AEYWouPzmqIbqy5P9NIr4XrNVBDBIMBkGDmVPxDnqZjErE8PKvnMz4bt6UUZWlyHyn98vRQRU2uawzi0q6XYThb42o9YzQvpG49AJx2zYeccEtGcQkTHjORXhyIs4BU-x-nSGVv4s_WfwF6bzCOcgXDmPMxpkhyyNQhplcxvDNn06cmVkTOOjaudO-O1IBs2wl--Lit8KwPOCtGogEQAG1ND5CAaCKrt7G2hdvfpmK48Rp2YAbVr2A%3D)_.** I appreciate you reading my whole letter, Peter. If that makes me a radical, so be it. I will always defend our liberty, protect our children, and promote the ideals of our Constitution which make our country the greatest on earth. No amount of intimidation or petty name-calling is going to change that. ">>SUPPORT RON DESANTIS NOW >>" From my time in the Navy to my time in Congress, I have always been committed to preserving our freedom and building a better future for our children. I have three children, and I worry every day about the consequences that progressive policies could have on their lives. We have open borders inviting millions of illegal aliens, potential criminals, and thousands of pounds of illegal drugs into our country. At the same time, liberals try to defund our police forces and appoint judges who are soft on crime. We’re experiencing record-high inflation which threatens families with higher costs at the pump and the grocery store, all while the Biden administration spends your tax dollars into oblivion. We have kids – who are just trying to get an education – being injected by the anti-American agenda of woke corporations, woke politicians, and fraudulent media elites who have lost their grip on reality. I will never let these out-of-touch fanatical liberals win. As a federal prosecutor, I dedicated my time to convicting child predators and removing dangerous criminals from our Florida streets. I continued my mission in Congress by authoring bills that ended the secret taxpayer-billed slush funds members of Congress were using to pay off those who accused them of sexual harassment. Our law enforcement, prosecutors, judges, and elected officials should work to protect us - not to protect criminals. Now, as Governor, I am standing by our law enforcement officers and holding the Soros-funded, soft-on-crime prosecutors accountable to keep our communities and our families safe. I took immediate action to end the COVID theater which crippled our nation and focused on empowering small businesses with common-sense tax policies which made it easy to hire American and fuel our Florida economy. Florida is in a better place now than it was before the pandemic - and that’s not something liberal governors can say today. I’m also leading the fight for parents and students against the poisonous, WOKE elitists to ensure our education system is NOT an indoctrination camp. It’s simple: we’re not going to tell kindergarteners they are racist or they are oppressed. And we’re not going to force-feed our children progressive ideologies that are confusing and wildly inappropriate for their age. We will prepare the next generation for greatness by teaching real history instead of perverting our past to serve the ideological goals of far-left activists who would like our children to hate America and each other. Every student should feel empowered to succeed - and together, we can make sure that they do. If all this is “RADICAL,” then Peter, I think you and I have something in common: we’re both RADICAL. I could use your help continuing what we started here in Florida. Will you chip in now to become an official supporter of my campaign? Make no mistake: this race won't be easy. We know liberals will do anything to win when they’re afraid of the opposition. And they’re VERY afraid of me. They’ve already proven they’ll try anything to keep me out of the Governor’s mansion. Since I became Governor, we have made big moves to ensure Florida’s election laws are free and fair. We made it HARDER TO CHEAT by banning ballot harvesting, strengthening voter ID, and prohibiting "Zuckerbucks." I have no doubt they’ll try harder to make sure we don’t outsmart and outfight them in 2022. That’s why I need the support of patriots like you, to make sure we’re prepared to win whatever battles we face next. Peter, I've seen what we can accomplish in just a short period of time. I've watched us win and lay the foundation for future successes. But I also know that this is just the beginning. That's why I am asking you for your help now. It’s time for patriots like you and me to come together and ensure this “radical” freedom we’re fighting for continues for another four years. In an election year like this one, we cannot afford to give one inch. We cannot lose Florida to the woke progressives who would destroy everything we've worked so hard for. Are you with me? Please donate to my campaign today using this secure . I appreciate you reading my whole letter, Peter. Thank you for your time. Sincerely, | | | | | Ron DeSantis | | | | Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor | | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Team Olikara
subject: We Submitted Our Nomination Papers for Olikara for Senate!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Olikara for Senate
body:
Image of Olikara campaign logo with photo of Steven Olikara and link to campaign website:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/OfS%20logo%20w%20headshot.png]
[https://www.stevenolikara.com]

Dear Peter,

We're very excited to announce that we have submitted our nomination papers to the Wisconsin Elections Commission to get Steven on the ballot! We are incredibly grateful for the help of 79 people who over the last 5 weeks completed 34 community canvasses and walked mile upon mile to collect over 3,200 signatures! We want to offer a special note of thanks for our top signature gatherers: Stephanie Dorman , Ben Douglas , and Anita Olikara. With your help we far surpassed our goal to ensure that Steven's name will appear on the primary ballot on August 9th. Thank you!!!

Photo of Steven submitting our nomination papers at the Wisconsin Elections Commission:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/Steven_signing_form_WI_Elections_Commission.jpg]

Olikara for Senate is a grassroots movement that's growing and picking up momentum with every community canvass, campaign event, and conversation we have with voters. Thank you for being a member of our team and for helping us bring Wisconsinites together to create a new form of politics that delivers positive change to our state and the nation.

With deep gratitude and excitement for the road ahead!
Team Olikara

You can help us continue building this movement by chipping in $25 today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teamolikara/afg22-web?express_lane=false&amount=25.00]
Button that says, "Chip in $25 Today!" with link to campaign donation page: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teamolikara/afg22-web?express_lane=false&amount=25.00]

Photo of Team Olikara standing at the entrance of the Wisconsin Elections Commission with link to campaign donation page:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/Team_Olikara_WI_Elections_Commission.jpeg]
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teamolikara/afg22-web?express_lane=false&amount=25.00

This is a movement to build a more inclusive, honest, and kind form of politics, and we need your help to continue reaching more voters in Wisconsin.
Button that says, "CHIP IN TODAY!" with link to campaign donation page: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teamolikara/afg22-web?refcode=0601email]

[Paid for by Olikara for Senate.]

Facebook logo with link to Steven Olikara's Facebook profile: [https://www.facebook.com/olikaraforsenate]
Twitter logo with link to Steven Olikara's Twitter profile: [https://twitter.com/stevenolikara]
Instagram logo with link to Steven Olikara's Instagram profile: [https://www.instagram.com/stevenolikara/]

Milwaukee, WI 53203

subject: mom and dad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46007315/348424223/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjE3NWE2Yy1lNWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lydQsf2Ei0iuDCIiRom3vzrX2n7jrMD4beq6USfJg-A=&emci=54f6bd27-dbe1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=16175a6c-e5e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=6371843)

Hello,
My mother worked alongside my dad in Lebanon Farm Shop well into their 70s. They refused assistance from their many children even after they lost their life savings in the Savings and Loan debacle of the 1980s. My mom in coveralls, petite as she was, handing tools to my dad is an indelible image I carry with me to this day.
My dad built a business repairing farm implements. In a way, I think he hoped that I’d stick around and take it over, but that wasn’t to be. I joined the Navy after getting a scholarship and my life as a machinist and welder came to a close.
Dad said very little about his service in the Second World War. He had the burns and shrapnel of his first ship sinking, and would provide some quips about surviving a night amongst the flotsam and death off Guadalcanal, but he didn’t dissuade me from enlisting. My mom had the bravery in saying quite simply, “The healthy bird flees the nest.” She wiped her eyes on her apron as I drove up the hill on my way to ‘boot camp.’ It took me some time to understand why.
You could say my mom and dad embodied rural Iowa values in their unique ways: Family, hard work, sacrifice, education, and honesty. And I think of them every day on the campaign trail, because it’s those values that drove me to run for political office.
**After nearly 4 decades serving in the United States Navy, I’m running for Senate against Chuck Grassley because it’s time politicians in Washington fight for everyday people like my folks.**
The early polls all show this will be a close race, so of course, I’m facing down millions of dollars in Super PAC attacks. I don’t come from some political dynasty, and I’m not taking corporate PAC money. Instead, I’m relying entirely on the donations of generous grassroots donors like you.
**There’s less than 36 hours until our critical fundraising deadline, and right now we’re still short of our $35,000 goal and what we need to defeat Chuck Grassley and win. So I have to ask:**
[**Please, may I count on you to make a donation to my campaign today – before our fundraising deadline? Every dollar you can give today will help me build a campaign to defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46007320/348424228/-42398318?refcode=em20220601pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjE3NWE2Yy1lNWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lydQsf2Ei0iuDCIiRom3vzrX2n7jrMD4beq6USfJg-A=)

Thank you,
Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)

name: NDRC Update
subject: bad news first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee
body:
then good news (that you’ll want to see)
|
---

---
Team – good news, bad news, and uncertain news. We'll start with the bad news:
* ★ After an initial court victory, the Kansas Supreme Court **upheld Republicans' gerrymandered congressional map**.

Now for the good news:
* ★ In Missouri, Republicans failed to enact the hyperpartisan 7-1 congressional map they wanted!

And the uncertain news:
* ★ A Florida court ruled that Ron DeSantis' manipulated congressional map cannot be used in the 2022 election. But the **map was put back into effect**, so things are still up in the air.

What does all this mean for us? **_It means that our fight for fair maps goes on._**

We may win some battles and we may lose some, but at the end of the day, A.G. Holder's multi-pronged strategy _is working_ and leading to what some experts are calling **the most balanced congressional map in a generation**.

So we have to keep at it – and with the 2022 elections just over five months away, this fight has never been more urgent. **Will you chip in NOW to help the NDRC keep working toward fair redistricting and a strong democracy?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: then good news (that you’ll want to see) | Team – good news, bad news, and uncertain news. We'll start with the bad news: ★ After an initial court victory, the Kansas Supreme Court upheld Republicans' gerrymandered congressional map. Now for the good news: ★ In Missouri, Republicans failed to enact the hyperpartisan 7-1 congressional map they wanted! And the uncertain news: ★ A Florida court ruled that Ron DeSantis' manipulated congressional map cannot be used in the 2022 election. But the map was put back into effect, so things are still up in the air. What does all this mean for us? It means that our fight for fair maps goes on. We may win some battles and we may lose some, but at the end of the day, A.G. Holder's multi-pronged strategy is working and leading to what some experts are calling the most balanced congressional map in a generation. So we have to keep at it – and with the 2022 elections just over five months away, this fight has never been more urgent. Will you chip in NOW to help the NDRC keep working toward fair redistricting and a strong democracy? | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600 Washington, DC 20005 United States ** if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

subject: Biden's assault on our freedoms... again
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=129629a14fa36843c96b3946c06e4e902278de6779344f9f8d6f32205ba9f9680c5a28d7e86ffb11e53b5941708db1252c89a136e261f9534280e1706bb239d8c3e27a4f405d01a93d59246a651e6753

I wish I was kidding, Peter.

At a time when Americans are facing real challenges, the Brandon administration is putting on another show of COVID theater.

In their latest act, Brandon and his cronies in the federal government are seeking to fight a federal judge’s decision and reimpose forced masking on airplanes.

It appears Brandon is doing everything possible to solidify his standing as America’s most unpopular president – and it’s working.

We shake our heads and make jokes about it, but the underlying motive is dangerous and sinister.

We are facing an American presidential administration that DOES. NOT. CARE. about your freedoms, your rights, or your personal liberties.

That is terrifying.

My promise to you is this, as long as I am your Governor, your freedoms will always be fought for and protected.

The Free State of Florida will continue to fight back against these ridiculous lockdown policies.
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=6fcf20a3a75bff2d745dd13fbfeb045fa3086ac297f9fe7c13e36224c3c8747611cdf53cc2b9731f6a7921f76cbf804b7d5fdd742e21dc994bd7d44cf41046ca
Are you with me, Peter?

I could use your support today,
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=6fcf20a3a75bff2d745dd13fbfeb045fa3086ac297f9fe7c13e36224c3c8747611cdf53cc2b9731f6a7921f76cbf804b7d5fdd742e21dc994bd7d44cf41046ca
so act fast and let me know if you’re still with me in the fight for freedom. Together, we will stop the Brandon administration from trampling on the rights of Floridians.

For freedom,
Ron DeSantis

body:
At 77 years young, I’ve read about a million polls in my life ...
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46007750/348426727/424221126?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1150-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjRiZjExZS1lNmUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ooQH5AeMLGkqcOZtBME4iY2-AXg7dqJgw1r8G3IN9a8=)
Peter – At 77 years young, I’ve read about a million polls in my life, and very few have made me as damn terrified as the one I just reviewed:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46007751/348426728/424221126?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1150-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjRiZjExZS1lNmUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ooQH5AeMLGkqcOZtBME4iY2-AXg7dqJgw1r8G3IN9a8=)
You read that right! Catherine Cortez Masto is L-O-S-I-N-G to her Trump-endorsed extremist opponent. But trust me Peter, this poll didn’t come out of thin air.
**Mitch McConnell’s allies are MASSIVELY outspending Catherine’s campaign. They have already spent more than $4 million on vicious, nasty, lying attack ads to defeat her and the attacks seem to be working.**
**[Ahead of her midnight grassroots fundraising deadline, I’m asking you to split $5 between Catherine and Abby Finkenauer in this make-or-break moment. We need Democrats stepping up RIGHT NOW to help Catherine punch back against McConnell’s attacks.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46007752/348426729/424221126?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1150-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjRiZjExZS1lNmUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ooQH5AeMLGkqcOZtBME4iY2-AXg7dqJgw1r8G3IN9a8=)**
**If we lose Nevada, you can kiss our Senate majority goodbye and hand it to Mitch McConnell on a silver platter.**
So I cannot believe that Democrats would just sit by and let the first and only Latina in the Senate lose to some Trumpist conspiracy theorist wacko!
If Catherine is going to fight back and close this awful polling gap, she needs to raise $25,000 before midnight tonight. But with only hours to go she’s on track to fall short! **I promised Catherine I would help her hit her goal, and Peter, I'm personally counting on your $5 right now:**

clean_body: At 77 years young, I’ve read about a million polls in my life ... | | | = Peter – At 77 years young, I’ve read about a million polls in my life, and very few have made me as damn terrified as the one I just reviewed: = You read that right! Catherine Cortez Masto is L-O-S-I-N-G to her Trump-endorsed extremist opponent. But trust me Peter, this poll didn’t come out of thin air. Mitch McConnell’s allies are MASSIVELY outspending Catherine’s campaign. They have already spent more than $4 million on vicious, nasty, lying attack ads to defeat her and the attacks seem to be working. = If we lose Nevada, you can kiss our Senate majority goodbye and hand it to Mitch McConnell on a silver platter. So I cannot believe that Democrats would just sit by and let the first and only Latina in the Senate lose to some Trumpist conspiracy theorist wacko! If Catherine is going to fight back and close this awful polling gap, she needs to raise $25,000 before midnight tonight. But with only hours to go she’s on track to fall short! I promised Catherine I would help her hit her goal, and Peter, I'm personally counting on your $5 right now: I promise you, Catherine can win this race — but falling short of goals like this means taking ads off the air, fewer doors knocked, and fewer voters registered — and that is NOT an option. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Abby Finkenauer and Catherine Cortez Masto immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for stepping up at this crucial moment. James Carville | |

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANN ROE FOR CONGRESS Ann Roe for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46008210/348429511/-766995749?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmI1ZGQ3My1lOGUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vDa-lmyrE0EiQpL_TfelyoiHDrsqbNkCr-s9ovhmhpY=&emci=96571a27-c0e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=ffb5dd73-e8e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=15639879)

Hi friends,

Don't worry, I'll keep this short.

This email is to say **_thank you_** for all your support last month. Thanks to you, our grassroots supporters, **we hit our May fundraising goal!**

We truly couldn't have done it without you. Our campaign is now in a great place to hit our end-of-quarter deadline that's coming up at the end of this month – and for a campaign like ours fighting against Steil and the corporate PACs backing him, we can't afford to rest on our laurels.

I am running unopposed in the primaries, but we still need to stay competitive for the midterms in November.

**[Friends, to continue to run a great campaign and reach voters with our message, we need to continue to raise money. The stakes are too high for us to let up now. body:
It's time for Secretary Mayorkas to go! | | | [ ](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=ced758154b&e=edf8a4d16d)
---
|
Friend -

_The Biden Administration has presided over unprecedented disaster_ \- projecting weakness and failing the American people at every turn.

Nowhere are their blunders more evident than the crisis at our Southern Border - **and no one is more responsible than DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas.**

[Watch me hold Mayorkas accountable on Fox Business:](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=d5b6971768&e=edf8a4d16d)
---
| [ ](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=0cc3c05b9c&e=edf8a4d16d)
---
| | Overseeing an open borders agenda that has fueled a surge of illegal immigrants, dangerous drugs and human traffickers into our nation, _**Mayorkas has done everything in his power**_ to undermine our security and put American families at risk.

**It is time for him to go.**

---
| [TELL MAYORKAS - TIME TO RESIGN!](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=3fd0ba0b2a&e=edf8a4d16d "TELL MAYORKAS - TIME TO RESIGN!")
---
| | _Secretary Mayorkas is a walking fraud._

[Documents from his own department prove that the Biden Administration acknowledges that their policies are "encouraging mass migration"](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=dd68436b78&e=edf8a4d16d) \- leaving our border overrun and communities threatened.

Republican Attorneys General across the nation have stood with me in[ calling for Mayorkas to resign](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=c2a7f3cacb&e=edf8a4d16d) \- and we have taken action to hold this Administration accountable.

[**Friend, will you stand with Republican Attorneys General today and join the fight to secure the border?**](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=7ddba6aacc&e=edf8a4d16d)

---
| [JOIN THE FIGHT TO SECURE THE BORDER](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=67b0702063&e=edf8a4d16d "JOIN THE FIGHT TO SECURE THE BORDER")
---
| Thank You,
---
|
---
| Ashley Moody
Florida Attorney General

name: Charles Booker
subject: To be honest, I wasn’t sure I was going to make this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Content Warning: This email and the video below contain graphic references
to lynching and racial violence.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Peter,

Earlier today, I posted a video about the family members I’ve lost to
lynching. I spoke about the hate and division holding us back as a
country, and why replacing Rand Paul is so critical in our fight for
healing, humanity, and a brighter future.

Some people told me this video would be controversial. Too jarring.

And honestly, this video was one of the hardest things I have done, but
after a lot of prayer and reflection, I knew this video was an important
message in confronting the trauma of our history.

You see, I’ve had ancestors who were enslaved in Kentucky. Family members
who fought for desegregation in Kentucky. Three of my uncles were lynched
in Kentucky. And I know I’m not alone: there are millions of families in
Kentucky and throughout the South who share this story.

So when Rand Paul single-handedly voted to block the Emmett Till Anti-
Lynching Act two years ago this week — legislation that would finally make
lynching a federal hate crime — I took that personally. This is also the
man who said he would have voted against the Civil Rights Act – the man
that compared expanded health care to slavery.

I know this video will be challenging to watch. I understand the
sensitivity of this issue, and realize the visual will expose some wounds
that have not healed up in our society.

My hope is that by watching this video, folks will understand just how
important this campaign is in our broader mission to realize true freedom,
peace, justice, and democracy.

I hope it will challenge all of us to mobilize and come together in the
work to uproot hate, which includes defeating Rand Paul this year.

You can [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18292?t=1001&akid=2005%2E346206%2EcjVaQ1 ]click here to watch the video:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18292?t=1002&akid=2005%2E346206%2EcjVaQ1 ][IMG]
With love,

Charles

P.S. Thank you for all of your support,
Peter. You’ve already helped us
make history by making me the first Black Kentuckian to receive the
Democratic nomination for U.S. Senate. Together, I know we can continue
moving mountains.

If you’re finished watching the video and want to show your support for
our movement, [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220601.U62N_C&refcode=em20220601-other-2005&t=1003&akid=2005%2E346206%2EcjVaQ1 ]will you chip in $5 or anything you can to
our grassroots funded campaign? It’s going to take all of us working
together to end Rand’s corporate-funded, failed campaign and usher in a
new era of people-first leadership to Kentucky.

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220601-2005-footer&t=1004&refcode2=2005_346206_cjVaQ1&akid=2005%2E346206%2EcjVaQ1

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2005%2E346206%2EcjVaQ1

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Charlie Crist
subject: Happy Pride Month!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
|
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46008544/348430945/-1259897921?amount=25&refcode=20220601_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjRlOTk1MS1lYWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X93x8khTgVmYvm1oNGlvGRXqPn1S6uDEdUNRpZtJZeI=)
---

Folks,

Today marks the beginning of Pride Month here in Florida, and across the country. Pride Month is, in part, a celebration — of identity, of equality, of progress, and of love.

But it is also a commemoration — of those LGBTQ+ leaders who fought for identity, equality, progress, and love.

And perhaps most importantly, it serves as a reminder that this fight is not over.

Just this year, Republican legislators in Florida passed a horrific, discriminatory law banning discussion of LGBTQ+ topics in schools — and Governor Ron DeSantis signed it.

So this Pride Month, it is all the more important that we send a message loud and clear: **In Florida we _DO_ SAY GAY.**

Throughout the month, I’ll be joining communities and activists across the state to celebrate Pride, honor LGBTQ+ leaders, and recommit to the fight for equality. I hope to see you out there!

Happy Pride,

Charlie Crist

_P.S. To show your support, you can purchase our “Say Gay” t-shirt** _[by clicking here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46008545/348430946/1794313017?refcode=20220601_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjRlOTk1MS1lYWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X93x8khTgVmYvm1oNGlvGRXqPn1S6uDEdUNRpZtJZeI=&emci=adce39e3-23e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=164e9951-eae1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=8807089)_**!_

name: Claudia Zapata for Congress
subject: Taking on the NRA & its puppets
body:
| |
---
Hola Friend, **I'm going to be brutally honest--we need your help. The massacre in Uvalde is a bleak reminder of what happens when those in power do not care about human life.** **The NRA has donated $11,763 to Incumbent Chip Roy.** **Help us match that number.** **I believe we protect our 2nd amendment right when we raise the standard by which it takes to use it.** **Red flag laws, background checks, waiting periods, safe storage, raising the age to purchase a gun from 18 to 21 and more are all actions we can AND must take to save lives.**
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Senator=20Brian=20Dahle?=
subject: Track your ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brian Dahle for Governor 2022
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=7458a0daf8&e=f9133ea432)
---
|
Hi ,
I’ll keep this brief today.

We are now just 6 days away from the June 7th primary vote!

In this election, “Every Vote Counts” has never been more true.

Whether you choose to vote in person or by mail, we are counting on you to stand up for your values and let your voice be heard by casting a vote for Brian Dahle for Governor.

You may be thinking - “ _I already mailed in my ballot, I hope it didn’t get lost in the mail_ ”.

I wanted to let you know that you can actually [track your mail-in-ballot by going here.](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=ab36b60ca9&e=f9133ea432)

This is our time to take back California.

\- Senator Brian Dahle

---
| |

---
|
---
| At Brian Dahle For Governor, we are strongly committed to protecting your privacy and providing a safe online experience for all of our visitors while offering a high-quality user experience here at https://briandahle.com/. We know that you care about how the information you provide to us is used and shared. We have developed this Privacy Policy to inform you of our policies regarding the collection, use, and disclosure of Information we receive from users of the Website. To manage your receipt of marketing and non-transactional communications, you may unsubscribe by clicking the “unsubscribe” link located on the bottom of any related email from the Company. Emails related to the purchase or delivery of orders are provided automatically – Customers are not able to opt out of transactional emails. We will try to accommodate any requests related to the management of Personal Information in a timely manner. However, it is not always possible to completely remove or modify information in our databases (for example, if we have a legal obligation to keep it for certain timeframes, for example).

Hilmar, CA 95324
