_Former Attorney General Doug Gansler speaks to reporters about his crime plan at a May 31 press conference in front of Baltimore City Hall._ **BALTIMORE** -- Former Attorney General Doug Gansler and former Hyattsville Mayor Candace Hollingsworth, who are running for governor and lieutenant governor, today formally rolled out their **[Safe Maryland plan](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0jlFmy0tHsxupmAVrXqus7XTsEmUAegbPULqCVpnZ-BzfvBEjeVgZlzRpITo-T1O8aTLCYafa_7RczsDYSv7bdzCeTcjhF2EZ4dnEWNEUsG6zUKd-dCgSPA26X-Wcp2-z78Xfq7Nv1oqglpA9mnehRU8EiRxIB2hl7EpE2NSDWltTDjw2STCp-gQL_NSk0xHCrP-QgJuahNRpl_1BgjRWb5r2ML4XY3jG80fUP8l7St3_4QpbkkJPyPgEHXWtelbN4UymVowpVYkmKRXhGcrGt4VUz0AB0TnlYTTJqURaB6A5KTfBH3par-6nXKIS0sHD3H5geiTO17WhQA97m1KrJClTt6OoxmoDBs6ujjK87RH6YLlcqrNFx37PdJ1JD_DE0NVHqIQ2zsiAflGkTCZVTZg44AnkV6b1bkPPut-1gEC/3mj/xt5mzjwxQ-6C8JwmKhxfhQ/h3/W6xsgjK_BPK7El4Mm0ml-U2y_93Y2FsrJ7d3-JQloW8)** at a press conference outside Baltimore City Hall. The pair were joined at the event by Baltimore City State's Attorney Candidate **[Thiru Vignarajah](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/oZT1C-8NKsWHlAiWATd-7EA_tcc9Wv7QVLoog0wPqxVNuKudr_SuV8iDKI9D32CDuwuK5Iu5qDRVGfTKpJ4p95N9QfuGOrmw25iK06N-K5YLcKRZ7dZGK6QX3s6pISTLCMZj_nbJmyEVtpvTNABkbNu-RjnMhPE3f4ywlbztsp_RG533Ac5HzMB_sVPfSquXZyEQc49JCUkhba6alC7T0C8RlWsPZ7kcJqSajjK9VjZK6NXeJMDRd7f7RTW9v-I0VclIDkOmdOUIwLB6Ia2xX3ppwTsTk1WZaIIfdRMsvYzY4quU4u9xok_275IIS03ByMyNVwkvrbq5aThIF5RGzPEURNhpDfghGphRMZKTN_39vl_f8DVgf7XMK4qncHTKZm0dg_KIV9eK-zb6QmgzD013UaD8eD9m8cb-9G0IHpAEp_PoMIVI040DdZlUadiU/3mj/xt5mzjwxQ-6C8JwmKhxfhQ/h4/7pQS7h6OZE2uVNUei4ejH0hExtcFXzWYsCx9s7_ugJc)** and Rev. Al Gwynn of the Interdenominational Ministerial Alliance. "It's the one issue that is on everybody's minds: crime in Baltimore City," said **Gansler** , who has served as a federal prosecutor and as Montgomery County State's Attorney. "Baltimore is a beautiful, wonderful city that has not realized its promise and cannot realize its promise until we make it safe. Right now we're in a city that has almost 400 murders a year. People sit at a red light wondering whether they are going to be the next victim of a carjacking or not, and there is no other person running right now who has a scintilla of experience in criminal justice. We want to make sure we have someone who understands the problem, who is laser-focused on the problem, and who is making sure we solve the problem by bringing crime down and justice up. It's a pretty binary choice. If you want to eradicate crime, if you want to make Baltimore safe, if you want to solve the murders that are outstanding - only 41 percent are solved now - we ask for your support. If you are satisfied with 400 murders a year and being the person at the red light wondering if you are going to be the next carjacking victim, you should probably consider voting for someone else." "I'm excited about partnering with Doug not just because he knows how to address crime but because he knows that the main ingredient to building a safe community is by investing deeply and equitably in the things those communities need," said **Hollingsworth**. "Resources like jobs, housing, transportation, education and a strong local economy. Baltimore is a jewel in Maryland's crown. And we have to treat it like the jewel that it is. And unfortunately for too many years Baltimore and its people have been neglected. And it is time for Baltimore to have partners in the statehouse who understand the importance and the richness of Baltimore's history, the cultural richness of its communities, and are committed to making sure that maintains as it builds a safer environment. We know that the solutions of the 90s did not work to address public safety. What we are proposing is a radically different alternative. Where the two of us are focused is on building safe communities with an attention to justice. We've seen far too long that communities that are built safe usually means that those who are living there can no longer afford to live there. But when we talk about making Maryland safer, when we talk about making Baltimore safer, we are talking about making Baltimore safer for Baltimoreans so that everyday people can be proud to live in the city of Baltimore." "I am so grateful that the former Attorney General has put crime in Baltimore front and center. Not because I want that to be the top agenda item for the governor, but because it has to be," said **Vignarajah**. "This city is in crisis. It's been in crisis for years. If we think we can do it alone, if we think we can do it without fresh ideas, without additional resources, without partnerships with the U.S. Attorney's Office, with the Governor's Office, you're not paying attention. You're not realizing that we have tried to pretend like things are under control here in Baltimore for years. They're not. Our murder rate is out of control. Our carjackings, our burglaries, our robberies are also setting records for the nation. And I'm so encouraged to hear someone with Mr. Gansler's background, with his expertise in crime, making this issue front and center. Because if you make crime part of your agenda, it becomes part of your problem to solve. That is what leaders have to do." Highlights of the plan, which can be read in full at [**safemaryland.com**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0jlFmy0tHsxupmAVrXqus7XTsEmUAegbPULqCVpnZ-Bz_jka-5_Vx7Rs8SNX9ZDLcqMwvMQ8BJ2kfaa65d0ImydZuclwMWqPRyohfUkMpGBupkwrtS2P5cf2FV0i5b6qIPIZBIwqKrLPh9LQTVmqUU8ZbaM-MYArW8s90tWxurixjrGzCyNJ5QjAwZcPaM70MEhhkPOaFLevFmZUZGVFU_uNY7Ceheqi1ScbmsWq4BWfeyyEXZx1FCl2Vn3AtFXTm6hJ_xUWopSPDvSi0jFjt6DyE_BW4qs_aWIprbs095YalFKlZm8m5YTp1VA3kMwaIQR_NQHlRmqD2N0uRASjwVSl-RqSDiYwKy1Xps1pzJBmqmW1qQFr7TOV2aq6mXyZXXcWzi8w4HxKeuypETIXAt6EI6h2UUzl7CvwicTp1dea/3mj/xt5mzjwxQ-6C8JwmKhxfhQ/h5/MRXz0Fg5jg2iN2WeZ6SnonReMDhVTCOYpseo7VKhCZs) , include:
* Hire 1,000 more well-paid and well-trained police officers on the streets across the state. These officers will be trained in de-escalation tactics.
* Install 10,000 street lights in Baltimore City
* Re-establish the Criminal Justice Coordinating Council
* Implement community prosecution, which is prosecuting by neighborhood instead of by crime
* Meaningful drug courts and domestic violence courts in all 24 of Maryland's jurisdictions
* Put every police shooting in front of a grand jury
* Clear out stale warrants
* Papering, so prosecutors are involved in the front-end of cases
* Work with the U.S. Attorney's Office to take all gun cases. Anyone who is a convicted felon who commits a gun crime should go to federal court where there are mandatory-minimums
* Put well-trained School Resource Officers in every school
* Ensure mental health professionals are available for all first responders

_Former Hyattsville Mayor and Lt. Governor candidate Candace Hollingsworth speaks to reporters about how to make Maryland safe at a May 31 press conference in front of Baltimore City Hall._
---
### _Former Attorney General Doug Gansler is running for governor to make Maryland safe. Gansler has 22 years of experience fighting crime - first as a federal prosecutor, then as Montgomery County State's Attorney, and finally as Attorney General. In addition to prosecuting some of the state's most high-profile cases, including the Beltway Sniper, Gansler has a record of launching innovative and successful programs to protect the public while instituting progressive reforms to the criminal justice system. _ _Former Hyattsville Mayor Candace Hollingsworth was the city 's youngest and first Black mayor. After a combined nine years of service on City Council and as mayor, Candace founded the national organization Our Black Party to wake folks up and fortify a change-making relationship between the Black community and the political system. As mayor, Candace focused on making Hyattsville a safe and just community through expanding education, economic opportunities and civic engagement for young people while supporting the long-term sustainability of her city._
---

As governor I will treat members of law enforcement like heroes and criminals like criminals.
I always have and always will stand firmly with the brave men and women in law enforcement who put their lives on the line to protect us. It is humbling to have earned the trust and support of so many of these heroes from across the state – they deserve a governor who has their back, and that’s what they’ll have when I’m elected.
Thank You,

Kelly Schulz Candidate for Governor

I always have and always will stand firmly with the brave men and women in law enforcement who put their lives on the line to protect us. It is humbling to have earned the trust and support of so many of these heroes from across the state – they deserve a governor who has their back, and that’s what they’ll have when I’m elected. subject: The state of America’s energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape.

Dear Fellow Conservative,
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans.
There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape.
That’s why I’m sending you this email today.
I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family.
[**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=cc84b59ba7ba42da9d94e56143e0c40a&_e=-vVk_UYDEO2trMijwEte6_dCXqgQ6Qrhb3qxkeuCyH8_MeXXaotqbwNYUWIgro3tskRa4ovAWgD1CEGkSIgZstRq5lZTLzmvWRLud44hxKoFYP4hBn1XpaQ4iUJ2q5eTNZBbwxQ6bqOON89i-aISlHB9jebDwQednXUHf-OWG9i5s0OKgtm-ujGqaUelNjeAqSFI8mDL0UgSCvHDbdO-EIK28_n6fI_2xNm5M5ra7unU6ff5T4FSwlT1-Fg4IKciGFoYLH9rfvX_5uqbdPoQJlqXdgCrnFqAQEljUAQjK3hQXRHgSyRj--sw52TdL0yKDDPh_oudNfX9iLveyAgSjItacSfwViy3GfiqZ_JP0FTCI-pgDnt16jI11s3Iu2KTnLvDiMWqsJphiFZClph_htbmB9Ex-dH9cGACdUiAjpMq4tUhjwAK8v-Nspcab8ct623j2dSYJ0vxYtRP4Hvv5w%3D%3D)
By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda.
The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=cc84b59ba7ba42da9d94e56143e0c40a&_e=-vVk_UYDEO2trMijwEte6_dCXqgQ6Qrhb3qxkeuCyH8_MeXXaotqbwNYUWIgro3tskRa4ovAWgD1CEGkSIgZstRq5lZTLzmvWRLud44hxKoFYP4hBn1XpaQ4iUJ2q5eTNZBbwxQ6bqOON89i-aISlHB9jebDwQednXUHf-OWG9i5s0OKgtm-ujGqaUelNjeAqSFI8mDL0UgSCvHDbdO-EIK28_n6fI_2xNm5M5ra7unU6ff5T4FSwlT1-Fg4IKciE4IwfEk98i-I0JaAyXit-VjWJi-vhdMaTAs7TcnGAZytvpDVpRd9fNtwmfFrUE_CO2RRdKhU--nRXGypus_SmcaFrFLc6CK6SrxY86fZHwWgqcUBP8xlt2OTdQVrr-aRYrZxqYiuk5jKFzQy5oAgZ_WJq1WrNeMgayGTLKgKxc1ERHYsyBRYchmlb3s22YJ0n8ww3UZrBVygAaBPDJuEAg%3D%3D)/**
Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful.
Best,
Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

clean_body: Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. You can get started right now using this secure link: Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe VP, Development | | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002 To Unsubscribe by email, please reply to this message with Unsubscribe as the Subject Line. .

Liz did something important for her state, for our country, and for the Republican Party. **She officially filed to run for re-election to represent the great state of Wyoming in the U.S. House of Representatives.**
[**PLEASE, BE ONE OF THE FIRST TO OFFICIALLY DONATE TO THIS CAMPAIGN**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=b420b542ab0d4b67a896c9e643693a08&_e=WOnhMpmExPNHRWWLkY6PG81awLJ8ie7PfLa-VKf5ls5p12iRVqF-KcdfYDDmKnZvc88gfSBaD-1qKevlacYHdGgM1TvZyMIqp81Ex8Px9AKfJoQyIqXvwDbCalucb3pKtTWYHjOIIHq3zKRtSEJBFkYsy3_KKG6efaAlF1bFXlLCeBojKWYW2CUoBF87RfrZBa0ZAdZoeKc9UGep2ZKCJLD4SOwUc8tShMkIK1d_gObfBk83w_m4yW_7-6efDpWTsP2-Vuky4-EFvjl5ALujOKtfNMv-QSzISzw-cezTqyg9X87uFhlHGR8GLIixIuK3Szzml9De92Pxdd5g_w2el2pjmttc9-2027lHnwjwnpEU6QxU3-y9DzrV5M_lxXxZwBLNCAz-LHgsL2tbiy0b8pYxH6AGk3r5ar4NB6LxAZ2I7hYrLkHQvtc1w_R9Dw3yvZuXhWw9RSa9JnwxbjPJ95NafVx6ssAuA7A6Ku124zFSOJWytpV6JQimLF--vd0PELLksQpY72oTcJCGS6--Yg%3D%3D) | [**DONATE HERE** ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=b420b542ab0d4b67a896c9e643693a08&_e=WOnhMpmExPNHRWWLkY6PG81awLJ8ie7PfLa-VKf5ls5p12iRVqF-KcdfYDDmKnZvc88gfSBaD-1qKevlacYHdGgM1TvZyMIqp81Ex8Px9AKfJoQyIqXvwDbCalucb3pKtTWYHjOIIHq3zKRtSEJBFkYsy3_KKG6efaAlF1bFXlLCeBojKWYW2CUoBF87RfrZBa0ZAdZoeKc9UGep2ZKCJLD4SOwUc8tShMkIK1d_gObfBk83w_m4yW_7-6efDpWTsP2-Vuky4-EFvjl5ALujOKtfNMv-QSzISzw-cezTqyg9X87uFhlHGR8GLIixIuK3lgWqIqRmmgm3AaENW_cflI7ewBIOZsYOhTQ6sAaPsyEm3LxptzV34GA6JhjUQGGMzoz2M4XiJXTlhELatyF3hBKHsOv7VU5QrM60LVwc4C5U5Y_6kckTcpyJFI33LhUovqVhfIShn8AkM9UtU0Fv5aso0xvq98qjLEU7chrZoZBw_YsfrGm5GQhSuAW0nljEmZkNgQ_a25J2RkNC2O080w%3D%3D)

**The stakes of this race could not be higher. We’re at a perilous moment and are forced to confront some key questions:**

In this time of testing, will we do our duty and elect leaders who are serious and willing to tell the truth? Or will we look away from the danger, ignore the threats, and embrace the lies?

[**We are here to ask for your support**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=b420b542ab0d4b67a896c9e643693a08&_e=WOnhMpmExPNHRWWLkY6PG81awLJ8ie7PfLa-VKf5ls5p12iRVqF-KcdfYDDmKnZvc88gfSBaD-1qKevlacYHdGgM1TvZyMIqp81Ex8Px9AKfJoQyIqXvwDbCalucb3pKtTWYHjOIIHq3zKRtSEJBFkYsy3_KKG6efaAlF1bFXlLCeBojKWYW2CUoBF87RfrZBa0ZAdZoeKc9UGep2ZKCJLD4SOwUc8tShMkIK1d_gObfBk83w_m4yW_7-6efDpWTsP2-Vuky4-EFvjl5ALujOKtfNMv-QSzISzw-cezTqyg9X87uFhlHGR8GLIixIuK35XBEgoMoXjys3xPoJx6VqaZrkSA4usPgCbqGEtG6BIHKWdllMHu7b7njyubWmL5ozbgbDvlv_3SIC3Ni2GbCK6dxPKlHB7x9hS3r-NtsxdDWq3v6igHpcHN5W1Od_Ia8wOIwEkRE1NABqRVauqamTUDFXtpHjfw1nXV1pCOIZBgI2zbsoZDIyijhY8vFasze7vLwx7RIaRaKmpnPOhApHQ%3D%3D) as we kick off this campaign so that Liz may continue to represent the great people of Wyoming in a principled and responsible way, and ensure that we have a voice in Washington who will always put Wyoming values and allegiance to the Constitution first.

Thank you,
Team Cheney

clean_body: | Liz did something important for her state, for our country, and for the Republican Party. She officially filed to run for re-election to represent the great state of Wyoming in the U.S. House of Representatives. | The stakes of this race could not be higher. We’re at a perilous moment and are forced to confront some key questions: In this time of testing, will we do our duty and elect leaders who are serious and willing to tell the truth? Or will we look away from the danger, ignore the threats, and embrace the lies? as we kick off this campaign so that Liz may continue to represent the great people of Wyoming in a principled and responsible way, and ensure that we have a voice in Washington who will always put Wyoming values and allegiance to the Constitution first. Thank you, Team Cheney Paid for by Liz Cheney for Wyoming Our mailing address is: PO Box 3167 Cheyenne, Wyoming 82003 To Unsubscribe by email, please reply to this message with Unsubscribe as the Subject Line. .

name: Nan Whaley
subject: What can be done to combat gun violence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Whaley/Stephens
body:
There have been more mass shootings in our country in 2022 than there have been days in the year. It has to end.

Team,

When I was mayor of Dayton, a troubled young man with too-easy access to a gun shot and killed nine people, injuring dozens more. It was not the only mass shooting in America that week.
We called on Mike DeWine to take action to make our communities safer. He looked us in the eye and said he would – and instead, he turned around and signed laws removing training and permit requirements for concealed carry in Ohio. Rather than working to prevent another senseless tragedy, he made the situation worse.

**[Yesterday, I spoke on MSNBC about the need for commonsense action to protect our communities. Take a moment to watch, and then share to help us spread the word.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46009496/348435109/-848205821?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODgxYjJkOC1lZWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RHf3TykrTpSgIwSVYRngKfc6GXuVYtlClcyAy10OFP8=&emci=cc1bb4d1-eee1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=1881b2d8-eee1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=24357242)**

****[SHARE ON TWITTER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46009499/348435112/343342365?text=I%27m%20standing%20with%20%40NanWhaley%20--%20we%20need%20action%20on%20gun%20violence%20and%20we%20need%20it%20now.%20https%3A//twitter.com/nanwhaley/status/1531728543545274369&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODgxYjJkOC1lZWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RHf3TykrTpSgIwSVYRngKfc6GXuVYtlClcyAy10OFP8=&emci=cc1bb4d1-eee1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=1881b2d8-eee1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=24357242)****
This past month alone, we have seen too many communities suffer devastating mass shootings. There have been more mass shootings in our country in 2022 than there have been days in the year. It has to end.

Our communities will never be the same. But we can take real, meaningful action to prevent more communities from experiencing the kind of pain felt in Dayton in 2019 currently being felt in Uvalde, Buffalo, and too many other places.
We can, and we must. But Mike DeWine is choosing to do the exact opposite.
**[Watch right now to learn more about what we can do to combat the gun violence epidemic – and then tell your friends.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46009500/348435113/-848205821?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODgxYjJkOC1lZWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RHf3TykrTpSgIwSVYRngKfc6GXuVYtlClcyAy10OFP8=&emci=cc1bb4d1-eee1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=1881b2d8-eee1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=24357242)**
Onward,
Nan

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: The meaning of Pride
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46009672/348435942/-528360723?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220601_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzRlYmExMy1mMGUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kvTV818czitxcJEAo_aqS_pWXzEd3lYRJFyq_TcDqF8=)

Happy Pride Month, friend.
Pride is an opportunity to celebrate the progress the LGBTQ+ community has made, reflect on the work it’s taken to get here, and reaffirm our commitment to the work that remains to secure justice and equality for all LGBTQ+ people.
At a time when LGBTQ+ rights, and trans rights in particular, are under attack from the far right, it is as important as ever that we fight to create a world where every LGBTQ+ person can live and thrive as their authentic selves.
**[I’m fighting in Congress to make this country a better, safer place for LGBTQ+ people everywhere — but if I’m going to stay in this fight, I need your help. To kick off Pride Month, can you make a contribution to my re-election campaign today? Every dollar you give will make a huge impact for our movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46009673/348435943/1513024438?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220601_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzRlYmExMy1mMGUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kvTV818czitxcJEAo_aqS_pWXzEd3lYRJFyq_TcDqF8=)**
This Pride Month is especially significant to me because I’m running in New York’s 10th Congressional District – which includes the birthplace of the LGBTQ+ liberation movement, the Stonewall Uprising, which was led by queer people of color. It remains home to one of the most vibrant LGBTQ+ communities in the nation.
I learned how to be my authentic self in what is now NY-10, in New York City.
When I arrived at law school, I was still closeted. I was too nervous to come out to my classmates but I found refuge with the gay community of the West Village, finally in a place that felt accepting to me. Following law school, I moved to the city, where I gained my footing as a young lawyer, working in offices in Midtown and lower Manhattan. Through my experiences in this city, I found the courage to come out to my family and friends.
It was in the West Village that I attended my first Pride Parade. I will never forget how nervous I was that day. But I will always remember how it felt to march alongside other queer people, including queer people of color, like me. How it felt to really see myself in the people around me and be seen by them, cheered on by the allies who embraced us.
Growing up closeted, and in the many years since, this community has been an oasis for me as I navigated becoming who I am today. Yet, it has never had an openly gay representative in Congress. With your help, I would be honored to become the first.
I am proud to have been elected the nation’s first openly gay, Black member of Congress in 2020, and have served as a progressive champion. NY-10 deserves representation that represents its values.
Today, LGBTQ+ folks have rights that were unimaginable back then, but also still face many of the same challenges. We can't mark Pride without addressing the crisis of violence against trans people in America. LGBTQ+ youth are twice as likely to be homeless as their straight, cisgender counterparts. And the far-right majority on the Supreme Court is poised to overturn marriage equality.
So this Pride Month, as we proudly parade in the streets, may we also recommit to our fight for justice and equity for the whole LGBTQ+ community.
None of us are free until we are all free to live and love how we choose. I believe that the people of NY-10 and I share a vision of a future where everyone — and I mean everyone — can live in dignity.
[**If you’re able, please make a contribution to my re-election campaign, so I can keep up the fight in Congress for full LGBTQ+ equality.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46009674/348435944/1513024438?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220601_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzRlYmExMy1mMGUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kvTV818czitxcJEAo_aqS_pWXzEd3lYRJFyq_TcDqF8=)
Thank you for your ongoing support! 🌈🌈🌈
Onward,
Mondaire

**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46009675/348435945/1401769761?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220601_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzRlYmExMy1mMGUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kvTV818czitxcJEAo_aqS_pWXzEd3lYRJFyq_TcDqF8=)**

* * *
[Website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46009676/348435946/-6145312?refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220601_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzRlYmExMy1mMGUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kvTV818czitxcJEAo_aqS_pWXzEd3lYRJFyq_TcDqF8=&emci=6c50e40c-f0e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=774eba13-f0e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=24719896) | [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46009677/348435947/1405969458?refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220601_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzRlYmExMy1mMGUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kvTV818czitxcJEAo_aqS_pWXzEd3lYRJFyq_TcDqF8=&emci=6c50e40c-f0e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=774eba13-f0e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=24719896) | [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46009678/348435948/660234743?refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220601_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzRlYmExMy1mMGUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kvTV818czitxcJEAo_aqS_pWXzEd3lYRJFyq_TcDqF8=&emci=6c50e40c-f0e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=774eba13-f0e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=24719896) | [Instagram](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46009679/348435961/24960265?refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220601_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzRlYmExMy1mMGUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kvTV818czitxcJEAo_aqS_pWXzEd3lYRJFyq_TcDqF8=&emci=6c50e40c-f0e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=774eba13-f0e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=24719896)

I will never forget how nervous I was that day. But I will always remember how it felt to march alongside other queer people, including queer people of color, like me. How it felt to really see myself in the people around me and be seen by them, cheered on by the allies who embraced us. Growing up closeted, and in the many years since, this community has been an oasis for me as I navigated becoming who I am today. Yet, it has never had an openly gay representative in Congress. With your help, I would be honored to become the first. I am proud to have been elected the nation’s first openly gay, Black member of Congress in 2020, and have served as a progressive champion. NY-10 deserves representation that represents its values. Today, LGBTQ+ folks have rights that were unimaginable back then, but also still face many of the same challenges. We can't mark Pride without addressing the crisis of violence against trans people in America. LGBTQ+ youth are twice as likely to be homeless as their straight, cisgender counterparts. And the far-right majority on the Supreme Court is poised to overturn marriage equality. So this Pride Month, as we proudly parade in the streets, may we also recommit to our fight for justice and equity for the whole LGBTQ+ community. None of us are free until we are all free to live and love how we choose. I believe that the people of NY-10 and I share a vision of a future where everyone — and I mean everyone — can live in dignity. = Thank you for your ongoing support! 🌈🌈🌈 Onward, Mondaire = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 122 C Street NW Suite 360 Washington, DC 20001 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Mondaire with a contribution, =.

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: I'm just getting started
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60501312:6KH69ZoNC:m:1:3317145305:D50EAC2F7FE030D172827303EFF9C254:r)
---
Peter, When I was elected Governor in 2018, there were 263,000 more Democrats registered in the state of Florida than Republicans. Flash forward to now, in 2022, as I write this to you. Last year, for the first time in Florida's history, Republicans outnumber the amount of registered Democrats - **and we will NEVER go back!** This is a direct result of our freedom-first leadership in the Sunshine State. Since day one, I have advocated for the protection of the God-given individual liberties enshrined in our Constitution. **_[Pledge your support for our freedom-first mission>>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60501312:6KH69ZoNC:m:1:3317145305:D50EAC2F7FE030D172827303EFF9C254:r)_** I decided to run for Congress because of the same idea: what Obama and his cronies were doing was totally inconsistent with the founding of our country and our constitutional principles. I could write pages worth of examples from the Obama era, and now the Biden administration, in which liberal elites in Washington acted in their own self-interest rather than for those whom they were elected to _represent_. Perhaps the most recent example is the _entire year 2020_. Today, millions of Americans look to Florida as freedom's vanguard because, for the last two years, we have stood strong against the dishonest, left-wing media, Big Tech Oligarchs, and lockdown Democrats, keeping Florida open and free. _**_[These are accomplishments I'm proud of, and I could use your help to keep going.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60501312:6KH69ZoNC:m:1:3317145305:D50EAC2F7FE030D172827303EFF9C254:r)_**_ I remember the summer of 2020 distinctly, Florida stood virtually alone in refusing to shut down our schools. In fact, I remember how viciously _attacked_ I was for it. I was right. They were proven wrong. A fact the Biden administration simply cannot stand. **My promise to you is this** : as long as I am Governor, _we will never let the state of Florida descend into a Faucian dystopia in which our freedoms are curtailed_. We will lead so that others may follow. **__[Will you stand with us?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60501312:6KH69ZoNC:m:1:3317145305:D50EAC2F7FE030D172827303EFF9C254:r)__** If we had bent a knee to the Biden administration and not stood strong against vaccine passports, sanctuary cities, and "catch and release" policies for illegal aliens, our Florida economy would not be booming like it is today. In my next term, I will continue to stand strong against wokeness (aka cultural Marxism) as their cadres try to censor, intimidate, and cancel anyone who disagrees with Biden's radical agenda. **In 2022, we will keep Florida free, grow our economy, lead the nation in job growth, and reject unconstitutional mandates handed down by the federal government._[Will you chip in now and stand with us?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60501312:6KH69ZoNC:m:1:3317145305:D50EAC2F7FE030D172827303EFF9C254:r)_** As excited as I am to continue to serve Florida in this way, I cannot do it without your help and support. That's why I am depending on a small number of carefully selected patriots who are willing and able to step up and make an extraordinary difference as I prepare to take on each day's new challenges. I was a political outsider when I won my first campaign for Congress - _and I still consider myself one now_. **I 'm running for reelection because I love freedom and seek to protect it in Florida.** I've shown the liberal media I'm willing to fight for what I love and what I believe in. Together, we can win again and keep up the fight for America's future. **_[Will you join me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60501312:6KH69ZoNC:m:1:3317145305:D50EAC2F7FE030D172827303EFF9C254:r)_** Sincerely,
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60501312:6KH69ZoNC:m:1:3317145305:D50EAC2F7FE030D172827303EFF9C254:r)
---
|
---
| | Ron DeSantis __
---
[**JOIN THE FIGHT**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60501312:6KH69ZoNC:m:1:3317145305:D50EAC2F7FE030D172827303EFF9C254:r)
---
|

| |

We’re losing in the fundraising battle against our Radical Leftist opponent, and we need your help. | Let’s make one thing clear: A LOT CAN HAPPEN IN A FEW HOURS. If we don’t make our first fundraising deadline, that’ll be a bad sign for our campaign heading into November. We can’t let off the gas – we need to keep the momentum going! We’re triple matching all donations that come in before midnight to ensure that we win. TRIPLE YOUR IMPACT NOW! Everything’s on the line. This is your chance to ensure victory! Thanks, Team Budd | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader running for Senate in North Carolina. name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: CTA June 1st: Is GOP going soft on gun rights?
body:
| | | [](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._-YXA)
---
|
---
---
This week, for our Call to Action, we are launching our campaign to hold Republicans (and a few key Democrats) firm on defending our 2nd Amendment rights. For whatever reason, there are always at least some Republicans whose spines go wobbly, and we cannot allow them to go wobbly on this most fundamental, natural right. Make sure to share it online and through email and text to your network! We need to bombard them with the message to Stand up for the 2nd Amendment! [**Use our AlignAct campaign**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) to email, post to social media, sign a petition, and get phone numbers and a call script, to make sure Republicans stand firm on the 2nd Amendment.
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
| | _Note: Occasionally, we receive an email from someone who has a technical issue with the AlignAct platform. Please continue to email us to let us know. We forward those issues on to the developers, so they can fix the problem._
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
Yes, the Biden administration is actually still trying to appeal the travel mask mandate ruling. In fact, on Tuesday, May 31st, the Biden DOJ Tuesday filed a brief with the 11th U.S. Circuit Court of Appeals to reinstate the national mask mandate for public transit. Therefore, [**our campaign to tell them to drop the appeal is still active.**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._7DJrNQ4FUI5AiPbGkaw)
---
|
---
| | State Farm was recruiting agent volunteers in Florida to donate transgender-in-training books to kindergarten classrooms, an email [provided by a whistleblower](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ1MzgwJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/G1cMN4Sh1P9uyQ1tY8pGhg) to the nonprofit consumer advocacy organization Consumers' Research revealed. The three books are titled _A Kids Book About Being Transgender_ , _A Kids Book About Being Non-Binary_ , and _A Kids Book About Being Inclusive_. State Farm initially denied the claim, at least until a Facebook post from one school surfaced [thanking State Farm for the books](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.). After an uproar from customers and agents, the company [announced](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ1MzgwJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/Un8H_hS7dlStla0lH51Brg) that it was ending its relationship with the controversial organization Gender Cool and dropping the book distribution program.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxNTItMmI5YzUxMDc2MTE0NDNmODhmOWY2YTYxYmNmMTc4YjYiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiOSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL2JvcmRlci1zZWN1cml0eS1ub3c_bWlkPTQ1MzgwJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/mgmm7NOjWkxrXFSlVxY34Q)
---
There are five Democrat Senators that publicly claim to care about Biden ending Title 42, but when given the chance to stop the Biden administration’s attempts to end it, they do nothing. The courts have temporarily halted Biden’s actions, and Title 42 is still in place, but these five Democrats need to step up and ensure that Biden cannot end Title 42. [**Use our Title 42 AlignAct campaign**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) to contact those five Democrats to let them know they need to vote in accordance with their public statements.
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---
| | [The American Rescue Plan Act](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.), which passed in March 2021 without a single Republican vote, was touted by Democratic officials as an economic necessity for getting through the pandemic. But as it turns out, millions of dollars of the so-called relief bill went to programs promoting the Left’s racial justice, gender equality and global warming agenda. For example, $3.5 million went to the American Council of Learned Societies to fund a university program addressing "racial equity, climate change, international relations, pandemic recovery, and strengthening democracy.” The $1.9 trillion Covid relief package is under intense scrutiny for its pivotal role in unleashing runaway inflation. Even a former U.S. Treasury official under the Obama administration conceded that the spending plan “[will go down in history as an extraordinary mistake](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.).”
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-Q1ZKF5slgAJhf3uQ)
---
Sadly, this is still an issue that deserves our attention, because Americans cannot afford the cost of gas. In fact, we are slowly seeing Democrats here and there begin to break from the Biden administration on the issue of domestic oil and gas production. Let’s keep the pressure on by using our [**Keystone Pipeline AlignAct campaign!**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._2TEgBxJS_jHqQ)
---
|
---
| | An Iraqi citizen affiliated with ISIS and living in Columbus, Ohio, [was arrested last week](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ1MzgwJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/t6-eOvedQcifMQlBW58vjA) for his participation in an alleged plot to assassinate former President George W. Bush. The suspect, 52-year-old Shihab Ahmed Shihab Shihab, assisted in an attempt to illegally smuggle four Iraqi nationals on a mission to kill the former president into the United States through the porous southern border. In a separate incident, U.S. Border Patrol agents [released a suspected terrorist](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) into the United States in April 18 after he illegally crossed the border. The FBI identified Colombian national Isnardo Garcia-Amado as being a match on the terror watch list on April 21. It wasn’t until May 6 that he was apprehended in Florida. In addition to increasing the risk of terrorism, the Biden administration’s open border policies are accelerating America’s fentanyl crisis and the flow of illegal narcotics.
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxNTItMmI5YzUxMDc2MTE0NDNmODhmOWY2YTYxYmNmMTc4YjYiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTkiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy9kb25hdGU_bWlkPTQ1MzgwJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/YTZuo6yRkURfEBIbeRKKvw)
---
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxNTItMmI5YzUxMDc2MTE0NDNmODhmOWY2YTYxYmNmMTc4YjYiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy8_bWlkPTQ1MzgwJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/YINVbZtG6O7od6xmJDvnlA)

name: Peter Welch
subject: Where we’re at
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
We had a very busy weekend on the campaign trail, and I’m proud of this team for all that we’re building.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=481%2E61531%2E431CYg)
Hello,
May was a big month for our campaign, and I wanted to send you a short note of gratitude for your support.
It’s your support that will help us take on the huge sums of money Mitch McConnell and national Republicans could pour into our state. It’s your support that will help us keep Vermont, and the Senate, in Democratic hands. And it’s your support that will help us lower the price of prescription drugs, take on climate change, and defend our democracy.
[](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2895?t=3&akid=481%2E61531%2E431CYg)
This past weekend, we had the opportunity to meet Vermonters from across the state. It’s the best part of running for office: listening, hearing what’s on folks’ minds, and then getting to work.
[](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2892?t=4&akid=481%2E61531%2E431CYg)
And know that, whether old or young, your ideas about the future and your opinions about how we get there matter to me. Thanks for being here—now, let’s get it done.
Peter

---
| [DONATE ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pwfv-em-22jun?refcode=em_20220601_f_p_ty&refcode2=481_61531_431CYg&akid=481%2E61531%2E431CYg)
---
---
| [ ](https://www.facebook.com/welchforvermont) | [ ](https://twitter.com/WelchForVT) | [ ](https://www.instagram.com/welchforvermont/)
---|---|---
PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
Welch for Vermont
P.O Box 909
Richmond, VT 05477
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe you received this email in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, please [unsubscribe here](https://act.welchforvermont.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=481%2E61531%2E431CYg).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Emily=20Beach?=
subject: Volunteer rally call: this week is critical!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Beach for Congress
body:
I need your help | | | | [ ](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=7775da7cbc&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

It’s officially _less than one week_ until the June 7th Primary Election! Thanks to you, our campaign and volunteers have incredible momentum. However, voter turnout is trending low this year, so that’s why we need “all hands on deck” to help ensure all of our supporters return their ballots now. [Can you please sign up for one volunteer shift this week?](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=36fe9450f4&e=de8b2615ea)

**Here are three ways you can make a difference:**

**1) [GOTV Virtual Phone Bank](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=fc65734057&e=de8b2615ea)**
**Today! Wednesday, June 1
5:30 pm – 7:00 pm**
Join us via Zoom tonight and we’ll set you up with everything you need to call voters from the comfort of your own home.

**2) [Burlingame Community Canvass](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=ea47cb66ad&e=de8b2615ea)**
**Saturday, June 4
10:30 am – 12:00 pm**
Join Team Beach for our final GOTV canvassing rally of the primary campaign on my home turf. Bring a friend or family member and get your steps in! Canvassing for us is a powerful way to participate in democracy and invest in your government.

**3) [Send a Beach Connector Email – final call! ](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=f2b2a47154&e=de8b2615ea)**
Here is another important way to support our grassroots campaign: [Send a Beach Connector Email](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=2fa8cab946&e=de8b2615ea) to your network of friends and family about why you are supporting Emily Beach for Congress. Nothing is more important than peer-to-peer communication and your message could be the reason someone remembers to return their ballot. Check out the easy-to-follow directions [here.](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=1d42714640&e=de8b2615ea)

I can’t thank you enough for your help during this critical week to ensure we are one of the top-2 vote-getters who advance into the November general election. See you soon on the campaign trail!
---
| Onward–

Emily Beach
---
| [Donate](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=f3e61af3b1&e=de8b2615ea "Donate")
---

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: This marine needs your help

Fellow American,

_So, I know a leader when I see one._

And my friend Tyler Kistner is a strong, proven leader that we need representing us in Congress. Tyler served nine years in the U.S. Marine Corps, and five of those years were spent in the elite Marine Special Operation Forces – the Marine Raiders. name: Conor Lamb
subject: Help Dr. Venkat flip a KEY PA House seat blue!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONOR LAMB FOR SENATE Conor Lamb for Senate
body:
|
---

Hey everyone, There are a lot of critical elections this November up and down the ballot. The top races on the ticket tend to get the most attention, but we all know it’s just as important for us to keep working to win the majority in our state legislature, where Republicans are focused on undermining democracy and attacking women’s right to choose. That’s why I want to tell you about my friend Dr. Arvind Venkat, the Democratic nominee for Pennsylvania’s State House District 30 in Pittsburgh’s northern suburbs. _**This is one of the most competitive districts**_ in Pennsylvania’s new State House map, and Dr. Venkat is a tremendous candidate who can flip it blue in November. [_**But he can’t do it without our help. Can you chip in $50 right now to help Dr. Venkat flip this seat?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46009957/348437594/-157498554?refcode=20220601LambEM&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTU2MDY1Ni1mMmUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PsX4pX7aVm-rMCIL3Wvr-Gwf-ikiYcbs1y-v3BHhbV8=) Arvind is an Emergency Room doctor who has served on the front lines of the battle against the pandemic, has been a tireless advocate for his patients and for health care reform across Pennsylvania, and has been an active leader in his community in McCandless. Dr. Venkat knows the problems that too many working families face getting quality health care they can afford — problems that existed before the pandemic and have only gotten worse. He knows that all women have the right to access abortion services without interference from politicians, and he’ll fight back against the Republican attempts to take away the right to chose. I know Arvind, and I know he is someone we can always trust to know his community, represent his community, and fight for what his community needs. And most importantly, I know he can win this race and flip a key State House seat blue. [_**This is one of the most competitive districts in Pennsylvania. Can you rush a donation of $50 right now to help Arvind hit the campaign trail hard and flip this seat blue?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46009958/348437595/-157498554?refcode=20220601LambEM&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTU2MDY1Ni1mMmUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PsX4pX7aVm-rMCIL3Wvr-Gwf-ikiYcbs1y-v3BHhbV8=) Thanks so much for your help. _Conor_

* * *
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you no longer wish to hear from us you can [unsubscribe here](https://secure.conorlamb.com/p/GfnS1SRBy0WUM2I3U1wdBA2?unsubscribedata=tfIf%2Fhg4dibMP1wfK3WcXJ7dLA915RLbSGbHA6LhIJWyAwKYPnNLiNAr8r17JCwboE75fpKwYADt1Xfwt5mLB8X5aGaXBO7s7JoIXgo7ECL%2FTe7YyP96kejQ6%2BvZDR%2BFECF2HOIwpgWYf0bQhX762tnvC9VVqNyOA7eHnOAcPcT9LUdhCSVf0hRRL4Ez5gBmG800cII8KXXXBi%2FDQnAXOtElU8cyYthj9w%2Bu%2FEPxrKm58sv0EpdqlXlYDl9E2RbQPyiAoKHkqy9SDKR0%2Bs%2F7hhdR7ON5wiwzcMhLG21j9uZR6qLG6Hr9%2BoE9iHVP6pbBd7nCQzXEhPC72R%2FOBaRLYHVTpSa1kW7oO8ce1ipqykjY%2FAXyPvQMX0HmOp8IVgB4cEKYSddgfvbOK4cmc3bCbrEcjGKDW12UxAdnNtClsd%2FKgOLxEmT6F3kO5WRjlTt5).

name: Susan Wild
subject: Thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
Thanks to you, I’ll be able to spend less time dialing for dollars and more time communicating with voters.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46010008/348438014/278639227?refcode=blu-swc-20220601-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjNhYTc0NS1mM2UxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dx8RzIoNNu0bJIVl7SW0pqQyXHNv_2MgsJwPXRWu9k0=)
---
| Thank you, Peter. Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, this team hit our May fundraising goal with flying colors.

Thanks to you, in the coming months, I’ll be able to spend less time dialing for dollars and more time communicating with voters on the issues that matter to families across the greater Lehigh Valley and the United States, like good jobs, affordable health care, and strong infrastructure.

**But with this district being forecast to “Lean Republican” by the Cook Political Report, we can’t slow down now.** Republicans are already spending millions to attack me and get me out of Congress. We need to keep up our grassroots momentum to defend this toss-up seat and keep the House blue in November.

I look forward to continuing to make change with you Peter.

Thank you,
Susan
---
| | _Susan Wild is running for re-election in PA-07, a district that the Cook Political Report is saying “Leans Republican.” To ensure Susan has the resources to stay in Congress and keep Democrats in the House majority, consider making a contribution today._
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46010010/348438016/278639227?refcode=blu-swc-20220601-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjNhYTc0NS1mM2UxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dx8RzIoNNu0bJIVl7SW0pqQyXHNv_2MgsJwPXRWu9k0=)

clean_body: Thanks to you, I’ll be able to spend less time dialing for dollars and more time communicating with voters. | = | Thank you, Peter. Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, this team hit our May fundraising goal with flying colors. Thanks to you, in the coming months, I’ll be able to spend less time dialing for dollars and more time communicating with voters on the issues that matter to families across the greater Lehigh Valley and the United States, like good jobs, affordable health care, and strong infrastructure. But with this district being forecast to “Lean Republican” by the Cook Political Report, we can’t slow down now. Republicans are already spending millions to attack me and get me out of Congress. We need to keep up our grassroots momentum to defend this toss-up seat and keep the House blue in November. I look forward to continuing to make change with you Peter. Thank you, Susan | | Susan Wild is running for re-election in PA-07, a district that the Cook Political Report is saying “Leans Republican.” To ensure Susan has the resources to stay in Congress and keep Democrats in the House majority, consider making a contribution today. | = | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. May fundraising goal.

Not by a lot—but with our FEC quarterly fundraising deadline at the end of

or one less door knocked in the race that will decide Senate control.

campaign up for victory. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13943?t=1008&amount=25&akid=3993%2E3611125%2E6YqZXE ]Can you chip in

name: Team Maggie
subject: Join Senator Hassan!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Join Senator Hassan on filing day! | | |
---
Hello, Please join us on Friday, June 10, as Senator Maggie Hassan officially files for reelection at the New Hampshire State House! Don’t miss out on this exciting opportunity to hear from Senator Hassan and show your support for our campaign. **Join Senator Hassan on Filing Day**
Friday, June 10, 11:30am – 1:30pm | | [Click Here to RSVP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46010277/348439112/584805084?utm_source=mh-em-20220602&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmQwMDM1My1mNWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PKXU9dqMXhVWyceeEE_fqxUYVTnHhXk3cwbjhYt1J5Y=&emci=71236e1c-e7e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=abd00353-f5e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=5452893)

Meet at the Secretary of State’s office to cheer on the Senator as she officially files for re-election. Afterward, head across the street to hear directly from Senator Hassan about the importance of this election and what’s at stake for New Hampshire.
Thank you for your support,
\- Team Maggie

name: Dan Kildee
subject: Thank you for your continued support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| Hi team —

I wanted to reach out to say thank you. With your support, we met our May fundraising goal and continue to build a strong campaign that will lead us to victory in November.

This will be a tough race. Our district is now one of the most competitive in the country after redistricting. That’s why my opponents have already been spending to distort my record with negative attack ads.

**And now one of our opponents has said that if _Roe vs. Wade_ is struck down, he would favor an abortion ban—with no exception for rape or incest. The stakes of this race are too high for anyone to sit this out.**

This month brings the end of the fundraising quarter and a big deadline for our campaign. Whatever we raise between now and the end of the month will be made public and our opponents will be able to see the strength of our campaign. **This is the most important deadline we’ve faced so far this year.**

**[I wouldn’t be asking if it weren’t critical. Can you chip in $15 or any amount right now to help my team prepare for the tough race ahead? Anything you give helps us show our strength at the end of the month when our fundraising reports go public.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46010579/348440891/781711077?amount=15&contactdata=b0petA9MG4dW7hsiwIeimgNyJNS7IrmDyrn5nnz%2FjN1fDqkayIIObv6dDTGlUw6vZjnDlS7bVz6XLNYJiKKA9sab87ng2HYNNzFxgZxl5v2rPYj2Gauy7cXD21rGBcVmGpNrAs1Xqs3Fu%2BuO%2FyOTqA%3D%3D&refcode2=6ebee75d-f6e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&refcode=DK_EM_FR_1MO_220601_4_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWJlZTc1ZC1mNmUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G3CMpE4qoiddyDjBY40u8pPceZ89ctWN_sI0_nYVKjI=)**

It’s an honor to represent mid-Michigan in Congress. I’m fighting to lower costs for everyday items like gasoline, groceries, and prescription drugs. And I’m working to protect your rights that my opponents hope to take away if elected to Congress. **We can’t let that happen, and I know that with you onboard, we can win in November.**

Thanks for all you do. You make our movement possible.

— Dan

* * *
Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to protect the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! clean_body: | Hi team — I wanted to reach out to say thank you. With your support, we met our May fundraising goal and continue to build a strong campaign that will lead us to victory in November. This will be a tough race. Our district is now one of the most competitive in the country after redistricting. That’s why my opponents have already been spending to distort my record with negative attack ads. And now one of our opponents has said that if Roe vs. Wade is struck down, he would favor an abortion ban—with no exception for rape or incest. The stakes of this race are too high for anyone to sit this out. This month brings the end of the fundraising quarter and a big deadline for our campaign. Whatever we raise between now and the end of the month will be made public and our opponents will be able to see the strength of our campaign. This is the most important deadline we’ve faced so far this year. = If you saved your payment information with ActBlue Express clicking a button below will cause your donation to process instantly | | = | = | = It’s an honor to represent mid-Michigan in Congress. I’m fighting to lower costs for everyday items like gasoline, groceries, and prescription drugs. And I’m working to protect your rights that my opponents hope to take away if elected to Congress. We can’t let that happen, and I know that with you onboard, we can win in November. Thanks for all you do. You make our movement possible. — Dan Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to protect the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! = | = | = Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee Friends of Dan Kildee P.O. Box 248 Flint, MI 48501 United States **

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: what keeps me up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46010774/348441530/396464211?refcode=em-logo&refcode2=106fefc2-f6e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&contactdata=iN9LBj5nscypoJWIV%2FnSWrxhXv4buimFgC7dyfLXzOz3gGbqtKkHllM7MLWLUwtw&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDZmZWZjMi1mNmUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D2p8k9T7pXTgT0v_1SYZjeKygwllThFEH7n7zddWVms=)
This week in Uvalde, Texas a mourning community is holding 21 funerals for the fourth graders and teachers gunned down last week. Meanwhile the community in Buffalo, New York is still grieving for the 10 people murdered one week earlier by a 19 year old gunman's hate-driven act of domestic terrorism.
America is not the only country in the world that has experienced violent rampages by shooters. But we ARE the only country that has refused to take action to prevent these individuals from having easy access to guns — including to the most modern military-style weapons of human destruction.
We have been here before — but we cannot afford to become numb to these mass murders or to the daily toll of gun violence in our communities. We live in a country where it’s easier to purchase an AR-15 than it is to get a driver's license. And that needs to end.
[**Please click here to commit yourself to the real work before us — demanding Republican Senators _at the very least_ immediately support universal background checks and limits on the availability of AR-15s to help prevent the next mass shooting, and electing officials up and down the ballot this November who put the safety of our children before the gun industry's profits!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46010775/348441531/-177134572?refcode=em220601guns&refcode2=106fefc2-f6e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&contactdata=iN9LBj5nscypoJWIV%2FnSWrxhXv4buimFgC7dyfLXzOz3gGbqtKkHllM7MLWLUwtw&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDZmZWZjMi1mNmUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D2p8k9T7pXTgT0v_1SYZjeKygwllThFEH7n7zddWVms=&emci=00358a90-e4e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=106fefc2-f6e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=2216363)
**[Demand Action](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46010776/348441533/-177134572?refcode=em220601guns&refcode2=106fefc2-f6e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&contactdata=iN9LBj5nscypoJWIV%2FnSWrxhXv4buimFgC7dyfLXzOz3gGbqtKkHllM7MLWLUwtw&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDZmZWZjMi1mNmUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D2p8k9T7pXTgT0v_1SYZjeKygwllThFEH7n7zddWVms=&emci=00358a90-e4e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=106fefc2-f6e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=2216363)**
What keeps me up at night is knowing that just a few more votes in the Senate could help save lives — like those beautiful children and their teachers in Uvalde and the community members in Buffalo — and so many others.
We cannot afford to give in or give up. We have 160 days until the November election — and we need to make every one of them count!
Thank you,
Chris

clean_body: = This week in Uvalde, Texas a mourning community is holding 21 funerals for the fourth graders and teachers gunned down last week. Meanwhile the community in Buffalo, New York is still grieving for the 10 people murdered one week earlier by a 19 year old gunman's hate-driven act of domestic terrorism. America is not the only country in the world that has experienced violent rampages by shooters. But we ARE the only country that has refused to take action to prevent these individuals from having easy access to guns — including to the most modern military-style weapons of human destruction. We have been here before — but we cannot afford to become numb to these mass murders or to the daily toll of gun violence in our communities. We live in a country where it’s easier to purchase an AR-15 than it is to get a driver's license. And that needs to end. What keeps me up at night is knowing that just a few more votes in the Senate could help save lives — like those beautiful children and their teachers in Uvalde and the community members in Buffalo — and so many others. We cannot afford to give in or give up. We have 160 days until the November election — and we need to make every one of them count! Thank you, Chris Van Hollen for Senate 10605 Concord St. Ste 202 Kensington, MD 20895 PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, you can , but we'd be very sorry to see you go.

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Roe, and my thoughts after taking a breath
disclaimer_text: Paid for BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220601&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220601&amount=28]
Hey there:
It’s been a few weeks since the leaked decision came out from the Supreme Court regarding the future of Roe v. Wade.
I know many candidates and elected officials quickly put out emails that expressed their outrage immediately after the leak, and I understood their frustration. This is no longer a theoretical conversation, or just another political news cycle. The overturning of 50 years of Roe will endanger women across the country.
But I took a second to reflect – particularly since, in Michigan, a 1931 law currently on the books would snap back into effect that makes abortion a felony. After a few weeks, I realized that my frustration on this issue comes from a number of very distinct places – one being the clear attack on personal freedom. The other is the lack of a real plan on how to prevent and now deal with this decision – but that’s for another time.
On the issue of personal freedom, a conversation I had the other week on the plane from Detroit to D.C. perfectly encapsulates where I’m coming from.
I ended up sitting next to two very nice strangers, and one of them brought up the leaked decision. The first woman, who identified herself as a senior lawyer, said that she was strongly pro-life. She didn’t think, personally, that she could terminate a pregnancy for any reason. The second woman also described herself as pro-life. But years ago she had a miscarriage and her body wasn’t responding well. She had a procedure that was technically considered an abortion. She explained that she did it to protect her health and her ability to have children in the future, which she did.
But here’s what these two women said that I think captures things perfectly: while they both had their own personal views, both made clear that they wouldn’t impose *their* views on other women. While they personally considered themselves pro-life, they didn’t support forcing anyone else to live by any code that they had individually chosen. And they both felt that the reversal of Roe was going to wreak havoc for women, particularly for those who had been through trauma like rape and incest.
This is the heart of it for me: it’s an issue of personal freedom. I believe women should have the right to make private, personal choices about their lives without government imposition. Everyone is facing different circumstances. We don’t know the medical history of a woman seeking out an abortion, we don’t know the details of her home life or the factors she considers when making such a personal decision – and I don’t want the government dictating what a woman and her doctor are able to discuss.
Ironically, it’s often the same people who otherwise advocate for personal freedom that are the first to turn around and dictate how others must live on this issue. But you can’t pretend to fight for the right to make your own choices, and then in the next breath tell others how to live their lives. At best, it’s hypocritical. At worst, it’s helping the government to assert their will on the public in a way that runs contrary to so much that our founders professed.
I believe this is a common feeling for many of the women I’ve talked to in the last few weeks. To be sure, this is a sensitive issue, and reasonable people can feel passionately about where the line is drawn. But I think that most people also believe that there are some circumstances – if a woman’s life is in danger, if she’s raped, if she’s a victim of incest – that she should be able to have a conversation about her decision with her doctor, without the government in the room.
It’s why I voted for the Women’s Health Protection Act in the House, which codifies a woman’s right to an abortion prior to fetal viability. It’s why, in the conservative-leaning town of Holly, 20 brave people protested with the “Don’t tread on me” sign.
Live and let live. And allow our granddaughters the same freedom to make decisions as our grandmothers had.

Elissa

**** Peter — **_[Can you make a $5 contribution to stand with the Primary Sinema Project and our movement to kick Kyrsten Sinema out of Congress?](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeS-yzM-8A3P_-OhnVymYXzE8Xd2NLVPYXQciEdRaCia5k4hhow6tS2aBiToKmo9BnsbYNU2KrrUfaRh5dHG1vZuFEmaMZ6VB-UTRRDr9-Ibdh8AaEs9DByZX3S4YtdRRGLhtliHVI2ID_JyFePSMrU6Di8QfgfQPevto8NIHYc1QvmUHkLXg-Q-a-ZUUtxC3W2QQYVBcNYZT0KtSF3zOHSxHxjzUrOXgaRuJtWfCRCklYo4J7SBIKTTuBHhZXnTX5R6qe03mpirPgQyiAQWe-KyP9-GfXVEj7zy30YVrv4IchbWaOQb6X8PeRIpTBD_Jtr/3mj/LTqnThF2S2y0_nXhdSEnEQ/h1/DucJtUYVUfr1ZDhZww_6eyJHHEI_LAryBB0reBjR0t4)_** Sorry to be so blunt, but this is really important. Last week we told you about our goal to raise $5,000 by midnight on May 31. Unfortunately, we fell short. **And that’s why we’re extending our fundraising deadline for 24 more hours.** One of the biggest obstacles our movement will face is that Kyrsten Sinema and her corporate friends can raise obscene amounts of money to try and buy her seat in Congress, even when her popularity with Arizona voters is at rock-bottom. Defeating Sinema is key to passing gun violence legislation, voting rights, climate investments, and protecting _Roe v. Wade_. If we want to achieve any progress at all we must oust her from Congress. **_[Can you pitch in $5 — or anything you can — to help us reach our goal of $5,000? If we don’t meet this goal we’ll lose critical ground to Sinema and her millionaire and billionaire donors.](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeS-yzM-8A3P_-OhnVymYXzE8Xd2NLVPYXQciEdRaCia5kqNyJGn3IbqSQkXFGufzwtXfDyUxxPiVyl7xIM-C5TiQb57mGWik0QOc4EpOSh8DtWKhwzMH6T-Mgs9seZnjo4ZyGlMn2vlePdtXGf-gsCEzwbQiFS8QIzdYQ8bvJKXFi26Mz53D3BPv3GudP_OcV7W8o45I6dH1qBvE9Gcsb4t9WnHW4uY-JcH8NbZ5p1DUnozP0PtjF2inG0i9PGowxCeiBHIG-T19-IXTpcliWEKxX1CRNBTx4WkkaW8zio23qagtNoPn5A8CB1_ZYPnDTQ/3mj/LTqnThF2S2y0_nXhdSEnEQ/h2/FV3lgonVhl5tGfYYIUoE_b3QmD2fJ3nWZkFZBqF6Oo4)_** **__** **[Contribute $5](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeS-yzM-8A3P_-OhnVymYXzE54fv-BIokC8GvxxL_oImSb40NYuWBRmJMI2C9PEVIstjJkaw3FY5iWhGHmk78K_93WLFvvMLH_uCEOnMvNKs2tp2eKF65VTiNIdPXkPhdgvOPVlwORzkjMhDNinx0K6a8pftEHZwtbyzLCjDfYWHMpauTLDD7-wqamXZ_VoUieh7tgJgxWg62KM7UecM-Qs-U3I7mzQ_r-p9hnAv3eY652NfwaXklfswqcMGngtUr9hAhUZcFHfinpmf73Xjq7SQhV1Pmpa0lq5xKst2IiGUrpADtH-Hlj_vz4zr1X4wvOu/3mj/LTqnThF2S2y0_nXhdSEnEQ/h3/J_AsdeF3RCr9bcHOSPzT38f9M9zLHD_a7gEPMCJHO3Y)** We know this is an uphill battle, but we have the people on our side. This is a grassroots, people-powered movement, and we’re laying the groundwork now to primary Sinema and do everything we can to make it so she’s never in a seat of power again. Reaching this goal means that we’ll be able to move ahead with our plans to oust Kyrsten Sinema from the Senate without compromise. A donation of $5**** may not seem like much when we’re up against millionaires, corporations, and special interests — but when we all come together with donations of $3, $5, or more it adds up quickly. **_[Hitting this goal would mean an incredible amount to our team and our movement, Peter, so will you pitch in and help us get there today?](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeS-yzM-8A3P_-OhnVymYXzE8Xd2NLVPYXQciEdRaCia5nXnKhotUwOgOOAaaiReGZFx11rMgs95j8BYlGn2VQLoMnjHJlKfZWUYHsZCxr2KvkzEKNZkvETNcUv-tai6w7aQxPWY-sYsL3suR38Sxf6e7AW2fR7XHOUjAS27Okcsb4tOKidbyzFh6isIBaDviKEUoJGcQTkq06vjHeexLio7u1XqlL2VKMtJ4aHzBNNvn_G00luWAc0zzHSwNF8by2L8mYccdlNZhZlqrl7Wkq-JuX_qe_iGcwSGZKLkfYI2CG0motsN5H7FprgUNy10ZD_/3mj/LTqnThF2S2y0_nXhdSEnEQ/h4/BDCT-nfty-QeBpqdxjlI_ZF9fKUoX2fKhrEbbfa_e_Y)_** Thanks for being with us, Primary Sinema Project

subject: Communists calling me, a Navy Seal Veteran, a coward!? ➡
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zinke for Congress
body:
There's 6 days left and we're on the brink of failure

**[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60501244:J7hPtZoNQ:m:1:3253819041:1E08E5D59F25056B89882E9CB7DA39C8:r)** Peter, I'm sorry to bother you, but this important news had to reach you today. **I just got word from my campaign team that Pelosi has MILLIONS to destroy my chances of winning the most crucial House race in the nation.** **This is Navy SEAL Ryan Zinke. I served as Trump 's Secretary of the Interior where I helped make America's Patriotic Energy Sector a global powerhouse. ** Now, I'm running for Congress to fight back against the America Last Democrats who want to ship our jobs overseas, rely on Communist nations for oil and gas, and turn our country into a socialist wasteland. But my campaign is being sandbagged by Never Trump "Republicans" and Democrats who want to see me fail. If I don't start raising money before election day, **which is just** **11 days away**, not only will I be letting Trump down but our chances of winning the House majority will be GONE! **I 've been told that I only need THREE more donations from Conservatives in your area code to win this race.** _**So far, NO ONE has answered my plea for help.**_ [**Will you please be the America First Patriot that starts the Red Wave and is the reason why Conservatives win back the House in November?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60501244:J7hPtZoNQ:m:1:3253819041:1E08E5D59F25056B89882E9CB7DA39C8:r) [**CHIP IN $5 -> TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60501244:J7hPtZoNQ:m:1:3253819041:1E08E5D59F25056B89882E9CB7DA39C8:r) [**CHIP IN $10 -> TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60501244:J7hPtZoNQ:m:1:3253819041:1E08E5D59F25056B89882E9CB7DA39C8:r) [**CHIP IN $15 -> TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60501244:J7hPtZoNQ:m:1:3253819041:1E08E5D59F25056B89882E9CB7DA39C8:r) [**CHIP IN $25 -> TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60501244:J7hPtZoNQ:m:1:3253819041:1E08E5D59F25056B89882E9CB7DA39C8:r) [**CHIP IN $50 -> TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60501244:J7hPtZoNQ:m:1:3253819041:1E08E5D59F25056B89882E9CB7DA39C8:r) **I have 20+ years of military experience as a Navy SEAL and I 'm committed to making America Great Again.** But I can't do that without your immediate support. Voting starts in just 6 DAYS and if the election happened today, we'd lose and Democrats would win. **We need all hands on deck.** [**Chip in today to help a Navy SEAL and Trump Patriot win this race and secure the House majority!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60501244:J7hPtZoNQ:m:1:3253819041:1E08E5D59F25056B89882E9CB7DA39C8:r) Thank you for your support, Ryan Zinke

clean_body: With voters across the Palmetto State heading to the polls to vote early now through June 10th, | | Hey , With voters across the Palmetto State heading to the polls to vote early now through June 10th, I hope I can count on you to at this critical moment. Let me explain: Mia sent you the email below earlier in the week where she broke down why our campaign is counting on your donations. I hope you'll give it a read, because it's true, every dollar we raise between now and our June 14th primary helps us fund radio and digital ads, knock doors, and spread Mia's message to voters across South Carolina. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Our team is so grateful for your support. With gratitude, Team Mia -- BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE -- , Early voting for the June 14th primary starts THIS WEEK! Our team has been hard at work finalizing our GOTV plans, and I'm headed out the door to meet with voters-- I only have a minute to send this message. I just spoke with my campaign team, and we're closing in on our fundraising goal for this period. We've been preparing for this moment for months, and I'm so grateful to you and all of #TeamMia for getting us this far. We can't come up short now; doing so would force us to cut critical funding to our voter contact efforts in these final days before the primary. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: You know we wouldn't ask if it wasn't so important. Grassroots contributions from folks like you are what make our voter outreach possible. With gratitude, Heidi Mia for SC About Senator Mia McLeod: Senator Mia McLeod is a working mom, small business owner, and seventh-generation South Carolinian from Bennettsville, South Carolina. She is a former State Representative, current State Senator representing District 22, and is running as a Democratic candidate for Governor. | | | Please, disregard if you are a registered lobbyist. We're officially less than **one week** from the June 7th primary election in our campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy. We've come a long way, and with Election Day coming up, I wanted to take a moment to remind you why I'm in this race.

It's pretty simple:

I'm a mother, a wife, and an educator who has spent decades teaching students in this district. I've met hundreds of parents and did my utmost to improve the lives of the kiddos I served. **I'm running because I'm sick and tired of seeing our community come dead last -- in income, job opportunities, environmental quality, and so much more.** Generation after generation, year after year, nothing seems to change.

**Kevin McCarthy hasn't just ignored our community, he works against us.** He's out for vain leadership roles, plays politics, and appeases Trump at every turn. Someone needed to step up. That's what I've always done, and it's why I'm in this race:

The tides are turning in this district, and folks are starting to see McCarthy for who he really is. Even conservative news outlets are publishing op-eds imploring Republicans to vote against him. His approval rating has plummeted amongst registered voters, which makes this primary a critical opportunity.

**[This week we are running a second flight of mailers to let undecided voters know there's a strong Democratic alternative to McCarthy. Please chip in $3 to fully fund our mail program so we can send an honest voice to Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46011237/348443893/-674430938?refcode=em-6.1.22-nopen-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmY1MWJjZi1mYWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LoPSmx5QsUPRfMmTipDuRMoYKoGXNNyz5Uoa-qB_7hw=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46011238/348443894/-674430938?refcode=em-6.1.22-nopen-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmY1MWJjZi1mYWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LoPSmx5QsUPRfMmTipDuRMoYKoGXNNyz5Uoa-qB_7hw=)
