name: Wiley Nickel
subject: So much happened in May
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
Hey Peter, this is Wiley. What a month! First of all, I wanted to say Happy Pride Month! I always enjoy honoring and celebrating the LGBTQIA+ community, the sacrifices and progress they’ve made, and continuing the push forward for a better world for our LGBTQIA+ citizens to live in. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46011267/348444066/1668440331?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGQ0YWQxNy1mYmUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C3r3SWccOdSl7aMhO9ULnmotyCTO299dO21YbOnfDN4=&emci=8afd73cb-f3e0-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=48d4ad17-fbe1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=28008880) Hey Peter, this is Wiley. First of all, I wanted to say Happy Pride Month! I always enjoy honoring and celebrating the LGBTQ+ community, the progress they've fought for, and how we can continue to push for a better world and equality for all. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46011268/348444067/1668440331?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGQ0YWQxNy1mYmUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C3r3SWccOdSl7aMhO9ULnmotyCTO299dO21YbOnfDN4=&emci=8afd73cb-f3e0-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=48d4ad17-fbe1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=28008880) Now to the events of May. We won a primary! We somehow also still eclipsed a monthly goal in just two weeks following the win! The race is going to heat up in our toss-up district as we face off against a Madison Cawthorn 2.0. We’ve got a lot of work ahead, but I wanted to say thank you so much for the incredible support you've shown the entire way. I'm honored to have you by my side as we push forward to victory in November. Let’s keep this momentum rolling towards election day! Thank you for your work, Wiley [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46011269/348444068/1668440331?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGQ0YWQxNy1mYmUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C3r3SWccOdSl7aMhO9ULnmotyCTO299dO21YbOnfDN4=&emci=8afd73cb-f3e0-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=48d4ad17-fbe1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=28008880) Wiley Nickel is a Democrat running for North Carolina's 13th Congressional District. I always enjoy honoring and celebrating the LGBTQIA+ community, the sacrifices and progress they’ve made, and continuing the push forward for a better world for our LGBTQIA+ citizens to live in. | | | Hey Peter, this is Wiley. First of all, I wanted to say Happy Pride Month! I always enjoy honoring and celebrating the LGBTQ+ community, the progress they've fought for, and how we can continue to push for a better world and equality for all. Now to the events of May. We won a primary! We somehow also still eclipsed a monthly goal in just two weeks following the win! The race is going to heat up in our toss-up district as we face off against a Madison Cawthorn 2.0. We’ve got a lot of work ahead, but I wanted to say thank you so much for the incredible support you've shown the entire way. I'm honored to have you by my side as we push forward to victory in November. Let’s keep this momentum rolling towards election day! Thank you for your work, Wiley Wiley Nickel is a Democrat running for North Carolina's 13th Congressional District. name: Sam Ricketts, Evergreen Action
subject: Shutting down solar and keeping coal plants online
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
We have to act right now to stop this.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4311?t=2&akid=12976%2E53494%2EdIS-b6) | Our clean energy future is under threat. A groundless investigation is hamstringing U.S. solar production, and each day of delay jeopardizes the entire industry.

**If you want affordable solar energy in the U.S., we need you to sign on right now.**

| [ACT NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4311?t=3&akid=12976%2E53494%2EdIS-b6)
---
Friend,
Three hundred solar projects delayed or canceled. 100,000 solar industry jobs at risk. Two-thirds of this year's solar capacity installations are in jeopardy.
Right now, the future of solar energy in the U.S. is in danger.
The Department of Commerce is pursuing a groundless investigation into the U.S. solar supply chain. By doing so, it's putting solar projects on hold across the country, imperiling jobs and keeping soon-to-be retired coal plants online.
**We are out of time to act on climate, and further delay would be catastrophic.[_That's why we're partnering with climate groups across the country to tell Commerce Secretary Gina Raimondo to intervene now—sign your name to join us!_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4311?t=4&akid=12976%2E53494%2EdIS-b6)**
[SIGN ON](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4311?t=5&akid=12976%2E53494%2EdIS-b6)
---
The Department of Commerce's wild goose chase began when a small solar manufacturer complained about a potential Chinese trade loophole. Simply put, it isn't true—but Commerce is still considering raising tariffs on imported solar equipment from trading partners in Malaysia, Thailand, Cambodia, and Vietnam.
These tariffs would raise the price of solar and threaten the entire industry's future. The investigation is already doing damage—since it began in April, more than 300 solar projects across the country have been canceled or delayed, putting 24 gigawatts of clean power at risk.
Commerce Secretary Raimondo has the authority to issue a preliminary determination in the investigation this month. She must intervene right now to prevent a truly catastrophic outcome for the climate, and we need to make sure she gets the message loud and clear.
[_**Tell the Department of Commerce to end the solar tariff investigation now!**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4311?t=6&akid=12976%2E53494%2EdIS-b6)
[SIGN YOUR NAME](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4311?t=7&akid=12976%2E53494%2EdIS-b6)
---
Together,
Sam Ricketts
Co-founder, Evergreen Action
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=12976%2E53494%2EdIS-b6). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

clean_body: I was so hyped to talk about our campaign. | | | Hey Peter, Imagine randomly checking your phone just to see a message “Vogue reached out & wants to interview you.” Now imagine the surprise on my face when I realized it was real! 😲 I was so hyped to talk about our campaign and speak truth to power in this interview. From the city to the holler, we’re gonna redefine what it means to be from the South and make Tennessee a bright beacon of what we could be. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: We’re shaking up the status quo in Southern politics, and I’m so glad to have you on our team. Thank you, good people! Odessa P.S. | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

clean_body: It will be a great opportunity for Doug and Candace to speak with you directly about their vision for Maryland. | Hi friends, On June 5th, you're invited to join Team Gansler-Hollingsworth for a backyard reception in Chevy Chase! It will be a great opportunity for Doug and Candace to speak with you directly about their vision for Maryland. If you would like to attend, please RSVP by emailing me at: mailto:tom@ganslerformaryland.com?subject=6/5 Chevy Chase Event RSVP&body=. For more details, check out the information below or . We hope to see you there! name: Chief Val Demings
subject: while I was working the midnight shift...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Marco Rubio was plotting his trajectory as a career politician
| | |
---
Friend, Marco Rubio is attacking my 27 years of law enforcement service, so I'm reaching out to set the record straight.

Back in 1983, **I answered a call to serve because I loved my community and wanted to protect it from harm.** And while I was working the midnight shift, Marco Rubio was plotting his trajectory as a career politician.

But the problem is, some voters have only heard Marco Rubio's lies about me, and I need more resources to share my story of service with more Floridians before it's too late. Please understand, friend: How quickly I'm able to correct the record for voters will make or break this election.

**[If you can spare $5, will you donate before midnight to help me counter Rubio's attacks?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46012253/348447846/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3371-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTFlYmI5NS1mZWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HaPfd78Ll2a8YkVSioWey8vfQwptD-UG-Q9Y_JvI4u4=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46012256/348447849/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3371-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTFlYmI5NS1mZWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HaPfd78Ll2a8YkVSioWey8vfQwptD-UG-Q9Y_JvI4u4=)
I was one of eight women in a class of 30 when I joined the police academy – but I always remembered what my mom had told me: "Be the best you can be, even if people say you don't belong."
And when it came time to choose a class president, one of the other women in our class convinced me to run. I was nervous, but I went for it – and I won by a landslide.
**I graduated not only as class president, but at the top of my class.** When I got out of the academy, I went straight to work protecting and serving my community. And after decades of service, **I became the first Black woman to serve as Orlando's chief of police.**
Fast forward to today, I'm about to take on my biggest challenge yet. There are obstacles ahead, but with my "never tire" attitude and a massive grassroots movement behind me, I know that I can become Florida's next U.S. senator and expand our Democratic Senate majority.

**[If you're on my side, please donate $5 or whatever you can right now to help me share my story with more voters and defeat Marco Rubio.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46012259/348447852/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3371-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTFlYmI5NS1mZWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HaPfd78Ll2a8YkVSioWey8vfQwptD-UG-Q9Y_JvI4u4=)**

**I'm no stranger to adversity, friend. If naysayers like Rubio think their attacks will make me feel defeated, they've got another thing coming. I've heard it all before – and I've only come out stronger.**
Thank you for joining this grassroots movement.

Chief Val Demings
| | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, **[click here if you’re on mobile](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46012262/348447855/1417698435?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTFlYmI5NS1mZWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HaPfd78Ll2a8YkVSioWey8vfQwptD-UG-Q9Y_JvI4u4=&emci=8da68e19-0ee1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=251ebb95-fee1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=20244100) or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates.**

I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider [making a donation today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46012277/348447870/-890400302?recurring=0&refcode=jtk3371-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTFlYmI5NS1mZWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HaPfd78Ll2a8YkVSioWey8vfQwptD-UG-Q9Y_JvI4u4=). You can also click here to [receive fewer emails](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46012280/348447873/-144803992?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTFlYmI5NS1mZWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HaPfd78Ll2a8YkVSioWey8vfQwptD-UG-Q9Y_JvI4u4=&emci=8da68e19-0ee1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=251ebb95-fee1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=20244100) or click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/hmC0qfqgmEqyHNrEYyYQgg2?unsubscribedata=%2FySAkRO7rxUIgQIq1%2FkhwYhnYydBQJo5aghJw470a6sbhcVUs8CyLIpIckgeCgAW8hnPVcmg0FU8Ph%2BpGAgNfrvyYcJDQE0BHE2xtxCvA4e69szmEXYYxO6nhuGAPfnhzmYZeDZMMI6hewEiYTMznsba4u02jEjoNZ6aD4zIK9P12YG%2FueWsQJruRv0lFfZoIMgQ%2Bs5q6qPwp5Ek1roRGB4EZVxRveKCGZLcA4Iy44ehVi10mazp13kS2I7B1XEwG2ruhA4egyqBWIrHti61xBlJbkqaZXWPnShM3KH7mTyYsXbnrHfurDEmP0eh7zrUAyN9UvZbgjX4KqjjDavs%2FWf%2FRY4zvKjBl06K%2FCGAz%2Bk%2B262zCRjfXY6uxHS%2B4nK6gY9cxDQ1KRzOIp2eSW1JQgwvSqSPKVlx4Ldov7wbABb0Y9FLHSlT5FZ7MFwfcTh0).

We've made a ton of progress towards our goal thanks to this grassroots army (remember, we don't take a dime of corporate PAC money) - but we're still about $2,000 short of fully funding all of our Get Out the Vote efforts. clean_body: | | Hey Peter, We're only one week out to Election Day! If you could be in our office right now this is what you 'd see: volunteers with clipboards, organizers giving trainings, and me a bit frantic ha. It's always stressful when you have 7 days left, and add on top of that a fundraising deadline, and yeah, you get a stressed Camille. We've made a ton of progress towards our goal thanks to this grassroots army (remember, we don't take a dime of corporate PAC money) - but we're still about $2,000 short of fully funding all of our Get Out the Vote efforts. If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | We are full steam ahead and we have to hit this fundraising goal in order to fund our final week of volunteer door knocking before the election. Our grassroots army is up against Kevin McCarthy's $100 million political machine, plus the negative TV ads our opponents are already funding. So there's a lot on the line right now. \- Camille Torres Campaign Manager, Josh Harder * = =

body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60502492:6aC-XZohN:m:1:3317145305:176058F6D8A4162E9CBB666722736465:r)

Peter,

Democrats like Adam Schiff are afraid, and they should be.

They know they WILL lose power in the 2022 elections.

But Adam Schiff still thinks he's in a safe seat, protected by Democrat voters.

**_Schiff is wrong, _**_**Peter**_.

I'm going to defeat Schiff. I am the Republican up against Adam Schiff and I am emailing you with an urgent request.

[_**Can you donate $5, $10, $20.22, or any amount you can spare to take out the trash - Adam Schiff?**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60502492:6aC-XZohN:m:1:3317145305:176058F6D8A4162E9CBB666722736465:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60502492:6aC-XZohN:m:1:3317145305:176058F6D8A4162E9CBB666722736465:r)

I am an America First conservative who is fed up with defunct Democrats like Schiff. I'm fed up with his failed policies that hold back our communities.

I am tired of reading the news and seeing America failing. We can keep stock of baby formula, gas prices are high, children can't get a decent education, and our foreign policy is an embarrassment.

If he gets re-elected, Adam Schiff will continue to abuse his power and attack conservative voices instead of solving the crisis our country faces.

**Democrats have utterly destroyed our country these last two years.**

Peter, it's time to take back Congress. This year is critical.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60502492:6aC-XZohN:m:1:3317145305:176058F6D8A4162E9CBB666722736465:r)

I am an America-first patriot with a proven record of fighting for our rights.

I stopped California from shutting down gun stores during the pandemic with my lawsuit.

Now I'll defeat Adam Schiff.

It won't be easy, Peter. I need a national coalition of conservative, America-first patriots to help me clean up the mess left by a big pile of Schiff.

Will you stand with me and show the Democrats that American Patriots are still fighting? Click any button to donate.

clean_body: Peter, Democrats like Adam Schiff are afraid, and they should be. They know they WILL lose power in the 2022 elections. But Adam Schiff still thinks he's in a safe seat, protected by Democrat voters. Schiff is wrong, Peter_. I'm going to defeat Schiff. I am the Republican up against Adam Schiff and I am emailing you with an urgent request. I am an America First conservative who is fed up with defunct Democrats like Schiff. I'm fed up with his failed policies that hold back our communities. I am tired of reading the news and seeing America failing. We can keep stock of baby formula, gas prices are high, children can't get a decent education, and our foreign policy is an embarrassment. If he gets re-elected, Adam Schiff will continue to abuse his power and attack conservative voices instead of solving the crisis our country faces. Democrats have utterly destroyed our country these last two years. Peter, it's time to take back Congress. This year is critical. I am an America-first patriot with a proven record of fighting for our rights. I stopped California from shutting down gun stores during the pandemic with my lawsuit. Now I'll defeat Adam Schiff. It won't be easy, Peter. I need a national coalition of conservative, America-first patriots to help me clean up the mess left by a big pile of Schiff. Will you stand with me and show the Democrats that American Patriots are still fighting? Click any button to donate. Thank you, Ronda Kennedy This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 1, 2022. body:
| | | **MAJOR EMBARRASSMENT: Donald Trump DROPPED from _TIME_ ’s 100 Most Influential list!**

**President Biden made the cut, but Trump was _snubbed_ from this year's list. Now, we need to hear from you:****

Do you approve of Donald Trump?**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/8271?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220601-TrumpAlert-Time100-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220601-TrumpAlert-Time100-ETG-sl1&akid=4567%2E9716520%2EgfCgjL)

It's a HUGE honor to be named to this list. President Biden and Ketanji Brown Jackson both made the cut -- but this year, **_Trump is nowhere to be found._**

It's clear that Trump's power and influence are tanking, so we've launched an URGENT Live Poll of Democrats to find out just how much he's fallen. But the poll closes at midnight, and **we still need 49 more responses from Pennsylvania! Please, tell us right now:**

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: How concerned are you about rising gas prices in America?
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo0o7ub3dq060gh372le241j1m7onvvg8psh07u8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chh66ob5chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfdc74mopm9dbjmsrrco5gchqjattn6sobbcpgmep3dcdje8rb9ojnmmqecplgc3jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8q6cc5gmdhmfchlcoob1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvfs6kj09ihf7ss4u1kp8ql3m3kobvql275sa6qg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chh66ob5chh2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8ju8hoaa9pcca73ni4opsiv7l76i5502ve661tg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chh66ob5chh2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zveoq84c785ccoq96s4t6bv9lotlths86fa5nhbg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1chh66ob5chh2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

subject: Justin Trudeau Announces Handgun Freeze
body:

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Jessica needs our help in TX-28
body:
There's still work to do against the NRA "A-rated" anti-abortion Democrat Henry Cuellar.
#
Peter,
On election night, Jessica Cisneros was down by only 177 votes to anti-abortion, NRA "A-rated" Democrat Henry Cuellar. The race is still too close to call with a recount likely imminent. Despite every effort by Nancy Pelosi, corporate Super PACs, and the political establishment to defeat us in TX-28, Jessica can still pull this off.
**Jessica needs to refuel for a likely recount, because she poured every dollar she had into the runoff.** [Can you split a donation to Jessica's recount fund and Justice Democrats right away?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110157?refcode=em20220601-23647&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=23647%2E1203867%2EFV7IP7)
**[Contribute](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110157?refcode=em20220601-23647&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=23647%2E1203867%2EFV7IP7)**
We know that Cuellar’s corporate backers are going to spend as much money as they can on legal challenges, trying to muddy the waters and get as many of our votes thrown out as they can. And remember, Henry Cuellar is backed by the NRA, Big Oil, and the private prison industry which have lots of money to burn.
Jessica's team has been working tirelessly to ensure all votes are counted — that means going door-to-door, calling voters, doing research, all to make sure voters follow-up on their mail-in ballots to confirm they’ve been counted. It’s a lot of work, Peter. And we’ll have even more work to do if we head into a recount.
We need to be ready to counter Cuellar’s unlimited resources and make sure that every vote is counted and everyone’s voice is heard. [Please support Jessica’s recount fight and our work alongside her by making a contribution today. We need all the support we can get right now.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110157?refcode=em20220601-23647&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=23647%2E1203867%2EFV7IP7)
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220601-23647-footer&t=22&refcode2=23647_1203867_FV7IP7&akid=23647%2E1203867%2EFV7IP7)**

Peter, On election night, Jessica Cisneros was down by only 177 votes to anti-abortion, NRA "A-rated" Democrat Henry Cuellar. The race is still too close to call with a recount likely imminent. Despite every effort by Nancy Pelosi, corporate Super PACs, and the political establishment to defeat us in TX-28, Jessica can still pull this off. Jessica needs to refuel for a likely recount, because she poured every dollar she had into the runoff. We know that Cuellar’s corporate backers are going to spend as much money as they can on legal challenges, trying to muddy the waters and get as many of our votes thrown out as they can. And remember, Henry Cuellar is backed by the NRA, Big Oil, and the private prison industry which have lots of money to burn. Jessica's team has been working tirelessly to ensure all votes are counted — that means going door-to-door, calling voters, doing research, all to make sure voters follow-up on their mail-in ballots to confirm they’ve been counted. It’s a lot of work, Peter. And we’ll have even more work to do if we head into a recount. We need to be ready to counter Cuellar’s unlimited resources and make sure that every vote is counted and everyone’s voice is heard. subject: Re: The New York Times and Black Republicans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
The New York Times is out with another hit piece that focuses on my skin color instead of the issues important in this Senate race. __ |
[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=a34251d7d13442a6ad37800fc81899fe&_e=KSGoLBI74R824gQkCJZ5cPlZsACcQYxDSpa8zcKfh-OXj4RgOONT574K2HW0Gwy1EDY_alHK-tzqj0EwwA_OZRamYmeXfCRXl3lhNJiaTv4R6qpWZzKLrbHH41PGR9si88_dWw1vOO9mEas6-g5cB0bM9EeGlKbtKWXok47rDnefKIJjbJstsUX3fKaH5gjuVSWMjSfVuVyj9nnaIjk_ymf3Et6ORjlEf_ZeEMj0tmzQJ4OIbad1o2vGy4lF38001CRfmF1T-Dv6-4ASduw9pqjwDCtG--dovRkgle-w5S71DrobOSdggmCvqR4141OXOHKjQsIl7O9zCRCQvDRHwv9Z3p-APCPwi1gqHejyCHbJh5ZNR_qviODm-jXsyIdRrIr7tf-B0sduCRBDbFnT_i6vGXRnb-TYqT57M_R_Jm3mRASxXkZT9GVs5bXVNoXDJJyEH-Fkd7Pdt40bwQq0BHNJqVb-lZHHtsEb-txBJ4U%3D)

---
Fellow American,

The race-based attacks against me just keep coming.

As much as we try to focus this campaign on the issues that matter to voters like gas prices, record-high inflation, and crime, the Democrats and their allies in the media only want to talk about race.

Check out this recent headline from _The New York Times_ :

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=a34251d7d13442a6ad37800fc81899fe&_e=KSGoLBI74R824gQkCJZ5cPlZsACcQYxDSpa8zcKfh-OXj4RgOONT574K2HW0Gwy1EDY_alHK-tzqj0EwwA_OZRamYmeXfCRXl3lhNJiaTv4R6qpWZzKLrbHH41PGR9si88_dWw1vOO9mEas6-g5cB0bM9EeGlKbtKWXok47rDnefKIJjbJstsUX3fKaH5gjuVSWMjSfVuVyj9nnaIjk_ymf3Et6ORjlEf_ZeEMj0tmzQJ4OIbad1o2vGy4lF38001CRfmF1T-Dv6-4ASduw9ptKPnTyD5HnzTcxL1Op9SzdnxUBIkJkLPKCZACCZvQHORMHFchoJByx_Zsa9b-rqNMZ1chbjDicdmkQH-z2XWg5plq18SffB9qK8c3SB_CyLR5N4ufoCdNugyymC6iI3HlqKJbDjKkC0WbcUGcbxcwSy2gSNERsfeWqGVb--MJgpzTt4_cXt8mFSgRKq66jp9z2zlc11OvvYBf-8itybcpE%3D)
The liberal "journalists" at the _Times_ just don't understand Black Republicans, so they build their stories about our Senate race around quotes like this one:

| _**"Mr. Walker was merely a vessel for the G.O.P. and Mr. Trump's ambitions."**_
---

And this:

_**"He's a puppet on a string, and somebody's pulling those strings really good."**_
---

**That's absolutely ridiculous.**

Let me be clear about something: I'm Herschel Walker, and I make my own decisions. Nobody tells me what to do.

clean_body: The New York Times is out with another hit piece that focuses on my skin color instead of the issues important in this Senate race. | Fellow American, The race-based attacks against me just keep coming. As much as we try to focus this campaign on the issues that matter to voters like gas prices, record-high inflation, and crime, the Democrats and their allies in the media only want to talk about race. Check out this recent headline from The New York Times : The liberal "journalists" at the Times just don't understand Black Republicans, so they build their stories about our Senate race around quotes like this one: | "Mr. Walker was merely a vessel for the G.O.P. and Mr. Trump's ambitions." And this: "He's a puppet on a string, and somebody's pulling those strings really good." That's absolutely ridiculous. Let me be clear about something: I'm Herschel Walker, and I make my own decisions. Nobody tells me what to do. I'm running for the Senate because Raphael Warnock is taking our country in the wrong direction and does not represent Georgia values. I'm running to unite Americans and get our nation back on track before it's too late. It's becoming clearer by the day the Democrats and the liberal media are going to do everything in their power to distract voters from real issues and the disastrous Biden agenda. After all, if this race is a referendum on our unstable economy, record-high prices of groceries, unsecure border, or catastrophic pullout of troops from Afghanistan, Democrats will lose...and they know it. Your donation will help us ensure that voters understand who I am and what I stand for. - If we're going to win this race, IT'S CRITICAL WE GO ON OFFENSE AND FOCUS THIS RACE ON ISSUES - NOT DISTRACTIONS. Hello,
I am old enough to recall when Donald Trump was first impeached for holding military aid to Ukrainian President Zelensky hostage: ‘You either begin an investigation into Joe Biden or you won’t get the Javelin missiles Congress authorized.’
I’m also old enough to remember when my opponent, Senator Chuck Grassley, said that Trump’s behavior was perfectly fine – and voted against his removal from office.
Thankfully, we now have a President who understands the real threat Russia poses, and American missiles are currently helping Ukrainians defend themselves against Russian tanks.
**We need more leaders in the Senate who will defend democracy and put the interests of America and our allies first – not partisan political gain and the whims of a deranged demagogue. Chuck Grassley has proven that’s not him.**
If I defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue this November, I will be the most senior military person ever-elected to the United States Senate. But grassroots contributions keep campaigns going, and I need your help today if we’re going to win.
**We’ve set a goal of raising another $35,000 before midnight tomorrow so that we can fight back against all of McConnell’s Super PAC attacks. Right now, we’re still falling dangerously short, but there’s still time to make up the gap if grassroots donors like you chip in now:**
[**Please, may I count on you to give $5 or more right now – whatever you can afford before our fundraising deadline at midnight tomorrow – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46012998/348451851/-42398318?refcode=em20220601pm2-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjEzNmVmNy0wNmUyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sfTjb4GAms4O2NeycReEn8oT_ZssI-rSU1Jr9kqo1cs=)

Joe Biden, Abigail Spanberger, and the Radical Democrats don't know how to lead. In fact, the only place they're leading our country is straight off a cliff. While **they make excuses for record high gas prices and inflation** not seen in a generation, **real American families are hurting!** I've served my country my entire life, and **I take my oath to serve the Constitution seriously**. When you elect me to Congress, you will always be able to **count on me to fight for the hard working families of Virginia** , and not try to score cheap political points at your expense.

|

clean_body: Peter, we're coming down to the wire and need your help | | | | | | | | Peter, We have our last major federal campaign contribution reporting deadline TONIGHT at midnight. As you know, these reporting deadlines are our opportunity to show opponents the strength of our campaign and to prove to voters that we have what it takes to win! | | | | | Joe Biden, Abigail Spanberger, and the Radical Democrats don't know how to lead. In fact, the only place they're leading our country is straight off a cliff. While they make excuses for record high gas prices and inflation not seen in a generation, real American families are hurting! I've served my country my entire life, and I take my oath to serve the Constitution seriously. When you elect me to Congress, you will always be able to count on me to fight for the hard working families of Virginia , and not try to score cheap political points at your expense. | This is a critical district that Republicans must win to reclaim a majority in Congress. can make a tremendous difference in this race! Remember, I'm counting on our grassroots conservative supporters to As always, I am incredibly humbled by the support you've shown me during this campaign, and I 'm honored to know that I can count on you to have my back in this fight. | Thank you! Peter – it's Abby. Can I have just one minute of your time to ask you to make your first donation to my campaign tonight?
There are a million reasons why this campaign is worth fighting for, but let me share just a few of the ones that are most on my mind right now:
This campaign is worth fighting for because polling has revealed that 64% of likely Iowa voters do NOT want to reelect Sen. Grassley.
**This campaign is worth fighting for because, right now, Sen. Grassley is also facing a RECORD-HIGH disapproval rating.**
This campaign is worth fighting for because, after seven terms in the Senate, Sen. Grassley has left working families, like my own, behind.
This campaign is worth fighting for because I promise that nobody – _nobody –_ will work harder than I will to defeat Sen. Grassley and protect our Democratic Senate majority.
I know you care about this race, and your support means the world to me. Thanks to your belief in my campaign, we're able to truly compete. Thanks to you, we're going to _defeat_ Sen. Grassley and expand our Senate majority.
I don't want to sugarcoat things though – with Republicans attacking me and trying to kick me off the ballot, hitting these grassroots fundraising goals is more important than ever. So, if you share my belief that this campaign is worth fighting for, can you make a contribution right now?
**[Donate $5 or more right now to help me defeat Sen. Grassley and protect our Senate majority. Every donation gets us that much closer to flipping this seat blue, so please chip in whatever you can right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46013348/348454490/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1163-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2MzZDZhNS0wN2UyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sm1ikiNVgixHujBpIesPmhyJrxhDhMK3j2Hnjgirk4A=)**

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: What we are fighting for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
http://engelforarizona.com [http://engelforarizona.com]

Friend,

Can I count on you to chip in a few dollars before tonight's midnight deadline? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/engelaz?refcode=X_053122_EOM_F&amount=25]

I know I don't need to remind you just how much is at stake in this race. Democrats hold the House majority by just a handful of seats, and our race will be one of the few to determine which party controls the House.

If we lose the Democratic majority, it will be that much harder to fight for Arizona families. With a Republican majority we won’t be able to pass legislation that will help protect our children and students, lower the cost of health care, or help fight the climate crisis.

I’m fighting for policies that will address the very real issues Arizona families are facing. However I cannot do it alone. Can I count on you to chip in before time runs out? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/engelaz?refcode=X_053122_EOM_F&amount=25]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=2752%2E878179%2EaMZlxM). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=2752%2E878179%2EaMZlxM).**

name: Arizona Democrats
subject: Celebrating Pride Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | Get to know some LGBTQ+ trailblazers | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXZWR2KKIhW0cWEHg7CuUN_aVOLJydwuws9xePm6Rxxm2tBBVKE18A21D04Io3ODegA2KiIxKzdSRmf7lFT9svz077cwfMssNGbolboG3jbujdHTkXY_5FFzRuvpeacoy3Dyjw1-8rfjXvPGwyxgtmifdzpIGrL5p9x7vXm_2-bOFGcJ20JDU40BZmHgt1g6g1aN4-zgifU-MpLqE-XOnKHTnAUeyV4m3OIMg_TlqhnkatGKfQTQz-AazWLy4J_0BMo2coCEvFUP-Qvv_KAlX-YwGBDp6bSYDRPZNjbtnsePImATdQ0QuQxJycZSDRcHPllft8Yw3cHGK3s-hAy6Pf6M/3mj/TLPtOvALSZux92Qf1qM8Zg/h0/UXzecY1XHzp9qzYsf_iAeNygI59jBjovVB7jBNa7srQ)
---
| Team, June is the start of Pride Month, where we celebrate the LGBTQ+ community and remember the struggles it took for the community to get the rights they deserve.

Before we introduce you to some trailblazing AZ Dems, we want to acknowledge the work is not finished when it comes to LGBTQ+ rights. Our AZ Dems continue to fight to make sure no one is fired or discriminated against due to their sexual orientation. And we continue to fight against harmful legislation targeting transgender youth.

The work is not done, but we will celebrate those who have fought so hard to get us to where we are now.

| [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXYE2ISxcYJGTSbjhaSGBTh_OzWuyr9Xf7I__8G3STU5YbnAlTQ11gO98yYlSU4jwaK18SzYyVJtFkFlpdo658b7IE4zbI-CIrnByfpxF_hIGq6zT6D1Z0clMe7Tt6L2Wei726-X1FVkYBhqdepc-gY0V1RMImSQ9VjyF_YSUC35gWxZZm86YU3fiZ_Hx0yAt_Bx2oTfT2GaSICSbYcsh0xZm4yov6c_KJmPQOelNcbpa/3mj/TLPtOvALSZux92Qf1qM8Zg/h1/_I0eJqpwHL7vXX3sesQqWbQq9A2QHBRB6Ynb7eyv1GA)
**Ken Cheuvront** was the first openly gay man elected to the Arizona House of Representatives after winning election to the 15th district in 1994. Cheuvront was re-elected to the State House several times and rose to lead the Democratic caucus in that chamber in 2001. Term limits forced Cheuvront to run for the State Senate in 2002, serving until 2011 due to term limits. He currently serves as a justice of the peace in Maricopa County.

| [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXYE2ISxcYJGTSbjhaSGBTh_mOb_rd-jpU7LQSTnCvRZmgWAon5xrNwCL0MF_PQ4ILubC-DrSq521kR3Y851UVmN4hzqT2fHEglRKiZDMC7dbaBAuj4v24uXxkSykDxeyefQz9SW5pRq7EGcga8E3LNW6-hwdPWB1lo7KktEQAQAwt_LO4PPO_RGeOGL3dEUwIXyLPvDqIdjqM-xV6qgrPSK0t2ll56sFNSn4H93koy2y/3mj/TLPtOvALSZux92Qf1qM8Zg/h2/G9K4Ip5DMYCIsZ8LnppUiWLC9E6caXqz-XoqdYfrZXE) [](?link_id=3&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-celebrating-aapi-heritage-month-2&email_referrer=email_1561209&email_subject=celebrating-pride-month)
**Paula Aboud** was the first openly lesbian member of the Arizona legislature. A longtime member of the Tucson Democratic Party, Aboud was first appointed to the State Senate in 2006. She successfully ran for a full term in 2006 and was re-elected until term limits prevented her from running again in 2012.

| [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXYE2ISxcYJGTSbjhaSGBTh8GT3MqGvXr4y8Wx3MGMohxXH8X6qLjST-N3CX-Pex9QscpxKBgGW-Hx3voyQnSMn6SLYdGg-M_fZqqIJmdwAkgMmP3kz5wUYJZRda8zOzXlGhEfDp1F0XjRDndQuYkfe3CFZ2nPe5vbreVXPyazclZfWNxou5wsHFQ-q7M1WcLhEoLFIG2aQaAdLdm_IT4hcxS4288svu-gkg4VUkDwodu/3mj/TLPtOvALSZux92Qf1qM8Zg/h3/HQqPQPs95b72w9Akp9ArldWnkvsr7y3PUaCYlWPOAhs) [](?link_id=5&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-celebrating-aapi-heritage-month-2&email_referrer=email_1561209&email_subject=celebrating-pride-month)
**State Rep. Robert Meza** currently serves the 30th district in the Arizona House of Representatives. In 2002, Meza became the first openly gay Hispanic legislator in the U.S. Meza won consecutive terms for the 14th District, then switched to the State Senate due to term limits. When term limits did not allow him to run for the State Senate any longer, Meza returned to the State House to represent District 30. He has won 10 consecutive elections since his first race in 2002. Meza joined others in creating the LGBTQ caucus in 2017.

_While the work is not finished, we are thankful for these trailblazers and their work in Arizona._

Sincerely,

Arizona Democrats

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dr.=20Paul=20Gosar?=
subject: They want us defenseless
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
Democrats are teaming up with RINOs and the Fake News media | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drpaulgosar/democrats-are-teaming-up-with-rinos-and-the-fake-news-media?e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=e82eb425e5&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter,
The Democrats are teaming up with RINOs and the Fake News media to try and take away our guns so we will be completely defenseless.

**We cannot let them control our livelihoods any longer. The Left shut down our country for two years over COVID hysteria and now they’re going to try and force us to give up our guns.**

While weak Republicans like Mitch McConnell may be willing to work with Democrats on this issue, I **_REFUSE_** to fight against the Second Amendment.

**I will always fight for the rights given to Americans in the Second Amendment.**

_**[If you want to continue seeing your rights protected, chip in to my reelection campaign](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=62a213f6c3&e=645b3b1338)****.**_

The DC establishment is working to get me out of Washington because I am **unafraid** to represent what Americans want!

I am passionately pro-life, pro-free speech, and pro-second amendment. With your help, I can get reelected and continue working to:

* **Secure the Southern Border and protect American families from the dangerous cartels.**
* **Unleash American energy to stabilize our economy and gas prices.**
* **Put a stop to critical race theory and LGBT radicalism in our schools.**
* **Prioritize America’s wellbeing over foreign countries like Ukraine.**
* **Ensure our election process is fair and secure.**

If you want to send a message to the Left and to the sell-out establishment Republicans like Mitch McConnell, [**support my campaign**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=51492990a5&e=645b3b1338).

America needs strong, fearless Republicans to take over a majority in Congress this midterm to make sure Biden’s mission to destroy the country is stopped.

In just two years, Biden has severely hurt middle-class Americans by letting inflation and gas prices reach record-highs while also sitting back silently as baby formula is in scarce supply.

Two more years of unchecked tyrannical rule by Biden will bring America to the brink of destruction. We can make change [**_right now_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=9288db036f&e=645b3b1338) by securing a Republican majority! But, this can only be done with your [**support**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=97421b2761&e=645b3b1338).

[**Can I count on you?**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=83395b5355&e=645b3b1338)
[**< < DONATE $10 TO SECURE A MAJORITY >>**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=59263c5e09&e=645b3b1338)

[**< < DONATE $25 TO SECURE A MAJORITY >>**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=8574c82f2f&e=645b3b1338)

[**< < DONATE $50 TO SECURE A MAJORITY >>**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=dc1c8f0b4e&e=645b3b1338)

[**< < DONATE $75 TO SECURE A MAJORITY >>**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=3acc1b1bce&e=645b3b1338)

[**< < DONATE $100 TO SECURE A MAJORITY >>**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=88fae10386&e=645b3b1338)
With your help, we can change the course of America!
In Liberty,
[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=9c86da5497&e=645b3b1338) Paul Gosar, D.D.S. Congressman for Arizona’s 4th CD _**[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=f945d1f4ab&e=645b3b1338)**_

P.S.: Mitch McConnell and other establishment Republicans are starting to work with the Democrats to try and take away our right to bear arms. I am running for reelection as one of the few Republicans who refuse to cede our Second Amendment rights. [**Support my campaign by donating today!**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=9233f4555c&e=645b3b1338) Thank you in advance for your generosity.

clean_body: | | | Peter, First -- thank you to everyone who responded to my team's email earlier today and generously donated to our campaign. Your support means the world to me! I’ll keep this email brief. Right now, I'm roughly $850 short of my quarterly fundraising goal. Bottom line -I still need your help. We only have 20 days left until the Republican Primary on Tuesday, June 21st, and I am asking you personally to make a donation before our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline at midnight. Here's the best link to donate: Thank you again for your continued support! Our campaign is receiving so much encouragement as we knock doors, make phone calls, and host events in the community. God bless, | | | | | Crystal VanuchRepublican Candidate for Congress P.S. \-- Donate online at or by sending a check to Crystal Vanuch for Congress, Post Office Box 549, Stafford, Virginia 22554.

My race is becoming the most competitive and expensive in 2022, and we will only win with all hands on deck.

\- Complete **CONTROL** by the Far Left in California
\- Two more **LONG** years of Pelosi and Washington Democrats in power

[**Please, I 'm Humbly Asking: will you foil Pelosi's dark plan to STEAL my seat? **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60501381:607YxZoNp:m:1:3253819041:6E29FE051AA28B58553868AF121802FA:r)

Young Kim

name: Michelle Vallejo
subject: We’re going to the general!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress
body:
You are the backbone of this movement and I am so thankful to have you standing by my historic bid for Congress. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/tTBUZwcBH_2q13Ow12s-jc-9PHkp7BkSZ-MbOY7TNqbHMZZ7e6z8fxUUbQYxgrxk6a2v4Aw9Ux80o37VicMJ_2RUROn59OUiTeeVHLXdV7VQ6UP0B003zvnUXl-_g03dnCRo8vcC0j15UQvn93PrMrh2L4AsGne3Ull4-rMbnlWVYLBYd7NXBlIkakBG0ak7nwjsm_MlT1Lmvo_uORd_n_RzqO7T7LjOCNw_EV2MIG6AtjHQhpw8c4M5h7-Cke5SK6HZIu5pegcSwcpP04h23Q/3mj/iZkPAMIVQeehtvQF2rqrzw/h0/m7xca9T_voFxYH2ySVS_TYCCZ3R5B5Yf9qgl4RVWLdE)
---
Thank you so much for all your support, Peter. **Our people-powered campaign is advancing to the TX-15 general election!** Without your support, it would not have been possible for us to get to this point. Thank you for getting out and voting, for making calls, talking to your neighbors, and contributing financially to this campaign. **You are the backbone of this movement and I am so thankful to have you standing by my historic bid for Congress.** Peter, since this was such a close election – _we won by just 33 votes_ – there is still a chance our opponent might call for a recount, so we need to be ready. **[Will you chip in to our Voter Protection Fund to make sure we have the resources we need to keep up our momentum and be ready for whatever may come our way?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zkW1GKFpf5sfDT0xnR92j0Wt5ajs6KgxiVnjhkTJohd3UXxo9myYv-MqqxNBJk6V-3jDhvaRO2BAAlJk656MWAp9aPQYfLZKW293WLLBJ9-RroCM3qFKoJk7R46eS7d6BNUJMgyGDJr9Jhxsg7iUyY6FPhwQPY9EfLa-rPJr012NX1g5U8RXPekXC1Zt8H6L2ReEpZKOwWIpWCq48U57r-wiR6IoL6_E5IcSNfAmKAIsLFmK8MxT8xR1Z2_NX9dYFZIzdIHYgB5jMrh1cOb0SKany-sFzl3-SqyTTgJkPooUKwedUHfMC6C3aL-fk0SZc/3mj/iZkPAMIVQeehtvQF2rqrzw/h1/2jzDcgZRuvnyyThy3-m64ScSCYbvj891RswGa7raBBo)** **[Donate](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zkW1GKFpf5sfDT0xnR92j0Wt5ajs6KgxiVnjhkTJohd3SpgdhNPxElerkubKR_-_J2Rm1hSmY6zZHv9UQEfF1deN0CE86FujyifNivcJXKBBSDIinLvunwAAqKJUE5XzhpoiujYJezNcXXr6WukIIktti526FexgLa1rHGVqYYtCACIOmZ0wBXQD_Di8RMDSvRQVhvVcGZ5wlE88Ctg1DoEXW3z6HD3mowyWLTh1sQ6eRzPss2v7g3DckCCbnCfpnwZwBlcDat2g8WwBxy9xcoHC9KqDGCwbonqCBHyD3zYgtat0znwLIR1iDC4AltNds/3mj/iZkPAMIVQeehtvQF2rqrzw/h2/UyiOuOuR_pXS4WxB4IAe5Jvox7CDDjhjOC9TaETVkq4)** I stepped into this race because I believe that South Texans deserve more— affordable health care, affordable college, higher wages, good-paying jobs, and investments that put people over profits. That’s what it’s going to take to get our economy back on track and keep our families safe. I come from a big family of farm workers, immigrants, and entrepreneurs. I know what it means to roll up my sleeves and work hard to deliver results to my community. South Texas needs a fresh voice in order to hold this seat in November and I am honored that the people have chosen me to keep fighting for our pueblo and the chance to become the first woman to ever represent Texas’s 15th Congressional District. The stakes this November are too high – Monica De La Cruz would push an extreme agenda that would put our rights on the chopping block. **But we know better.** We know that South Texans look out for each other – Monica De La Cruz only looks out for herself. Together, we are building a movement that is reclaiming the power of Latino voters in South Texas. **We’ve made it this far. We still have work to do. Now, let’s finish the job.** ¡Vamos Por Quince! clean_body: You are the backbone of this movement and I am so thankful to have you standing by my historic bid for Congress. | | | Thank you so much for all your support, Peter. Our people-powered campaign is advancing to the TX-15 general election! Without your support, it would not have been possible for us to get to this point. Thank you for getting out and voting, for making calls, talking to your neighbors, and contributing financially to this campaign. You are the backbone of this movement and I am so thankful to have you standing by my historic bid for Congress. Peter, since this was such a close election – we won by just 33 votes – there is still a chance our opponent might call for a recount, so we need to be ready. I stepped into this race because I believe that South Texans deserve more— affordable health care, affordable college, higher wages, good-paying jobs, and investments that put people over profits. That’s what it’s going to take to get our economy back on track and keep our families safe. I come from a big family of farm workers, immigrants, and entrepreneurs. I know what it means to roll up my sleeves and work hard to deliver results to my community. South Texas needs a fresh voice in order to hold this seat in November and I am honored that the people have chosen me to keep fighting for our pueblo and the chance to become the first woman to ever represent Texas’s 15th Congressional District. The stakes this November are too high – Monica De La Cruz would push an extreme agenda that would put our rights on the chopping block. But we know better. We know that South Texans look out for each other – Monica De La Cruz only looks out for herself. Together, we are building a movement that is reclaiming the power of Latino voters in South Texas. We’ve made it this far. We still have work to do. Now, let’s finish the job. ¡Vamos Por Quince! Michelle Vallejo | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress Michelle Vallejo for Congress PO Box 1265 Mission, TX 78573

name: Sheriff Joe Arpaio
subject: Sheriff Joe Arpaio - America Needs DeLuzio In Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
"He's one of us, he can be trusted, and he won't let us down." \- Sheriff Joe Arpaio

| | |
---
| |
---
| Sheriff Joe Arpaio - America Needs DeLuzio In Congress

---
American Patriot,

I have been fighting to preserve our great nation all my life; now, I’m afraid we’re nearly out of time to turn America around. We need to send patriots with unwavering principles and real leadership experience to Washington to block Biden’s disastrous policies and put us back on track.

**In Arizona’s Second Congressional District, conservative Mark DeLuzio is right for the job.** Like President Trump, he’s a self-made businessman whose expertise saved thousands of American jobs. Inspired by his sons, who both served in Afghanistan – where one of them lost his life – Mark is determined to carry on their fight for freedom and security.

Mark DeLuzio is the only candidate who can defeat liberal Tom O’Halleran in November. Mark has the _courage to defy the swamp in Washington_ , _help seal the borde_ _r_ , _restore economic sanity in DC_ , and _combat the evil threat from Communist China_. We can count on him to stand up for the rights of Veterans, military families, first responders and law enforcement. He will work tirelessly to return our great nation to its founding Constitutional principles.

**I am extremely proud to offer my full endorsement to Mark DeLuzio. I encourage you to support him, as he is one of us, he can be trusted, and he won’t let us down. **

Very truly yours,

---
---
Sheriff Joe Arpaio

---
|
---

name: Jessica Cisneros
subject: This movement is about all of us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JESSICA CISNEROS FOR CONGRESS** ](https://click
body:
We’re done with the status quo. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUE58-gKmoLipeUYDmC3rfDZdOhdX7Q34UX3pMSiBKBYQhbqcaKpJ4fxIf8mmdMUigXXNExrHUk7otffRqLPEg-SVp_M9XzWcGs6ZGfhR67Uqyrb7TVVWYD8kLSufkEy0A6894u5EQ_QUTu0uXQr-RDBj0VU4WP-SVlsSUHRzuodC1WpVut1tJA0iuAfPWaMcXRXplTs77STWpNkBBXicqwT-5aj2n93lTmApQUrChauOEel2qF7Z945gBDTN6rXSuEuqfATUet_U1PN2FsS7VhDsKVvyaWFk5px7aNp3m00YTjdu5Iy2C9WWpC6bZgve-/3mj/JdzwzR2nRcu3pioFOAKyVw/h0/1NJD5I_HMjELLiiIlf0QS0TpvGSR-l9YPHpBZ0ounz0) Peter, As we fight with everything we have to overcome corporate money and the status quo to bring essential change to TX-28, I think about all of the communities we are fighting for — communities left behind by current representation in Congress. All across this country, there are congressional districts with shocking levels of inequality. Many corporate Democrats, who are currently representing these districts, are more than happy to treat Congress like an invite to an exclusive club while their constituents struggle. That’s why I chose to run – and why Kina Collins in Illinois chose to run in the first place. We are tired of seeing our communities struggle while those in power line their own pockets and vote against our best interests. We are running to win because we will not sit quietly while our communities are left behind. [_**Peter, we are up against corporate interests bent on keeping the status quo. But our grassroots movement can win with you on our side. Will you split a contribution between Kina and our recount campaign right now?**_](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCVmuYzR6o5oVTBUzMlhAAbvrxESHPJYQy0BJu-nqjeJFhTu-rBPalEmkQdhbt2HhsFfvBI9LMpUTea449-Lk1r54XfswXbG58GLy36vDr4gA9iFmGAV1-u2KkdqNNvkaj4S03YzLQzNMPIeb_tmP2AaSMT2aL17AYrOKv8UnraIeOjrtaiA5Or-aLWecUB6XtKlpOy-6FcOiGOKkjFJiaxOR7KAbgE-50pmunn5OIQqXxEXeUanXff5vZiheveprOFnBg22DOHYJzrnqHKV8XRR8cwZaRdt0QRaEWo6VuW8WV2EgD5eUFXXcPOcEzcpQ1oX7Fpn7650Aj8qA9fT0Pjw/3mj/JdzwzR2nRcu3pioFOAKyVw/h1/D4S9WE4GNRxLfgaS5Aaaa8d-Jz1MEJs3L51dKzqXEtc) [Contribute »](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCVmuYzR6o5oVTBUzMlhAAbvrxESHPJYQy0BJu-nqjeJGhjj771Tc5ZGY37BZzq2cQpT12abuNxoIU8jj8l1uNCr8NAScinUKa8o9y3zM_4F5_-rRr1txSMzxtc0-0EbUf8rXrhVxfU2UFoOlvgAHUDsCpuPTGaHxjsaS9idZGSUL9TK-a8N5uItl_8EwesxS9iLkTXjdBDDbMaHFoMPnOIKpvfrQ-TiHofExttbKT9ayKnFMyvUydtMRzgADvKXqPQmmUybraoILOqtOxE7ldFhydDzIAIyPBzxqoaqtlNvfJCzgYtumoLKiIydqNIIPDAe0wKtwQgwBevC8o2Svnwg/3mj/JdzwzR2nRcu3pioFOAKyVw/h2/CJ1pc7O2B8ivV1mp-BUiVPS8ePkc2Sm1xi2-3vNU-Ic) Kina Collins’ district is one of the most unequal districts, just like TX-28. In the downtown Chicago portion of IL-07, the life expectancy is 90 years, while in the predominantly African American Englewood portion, life expectancy is 60. Same district, different world. Kina has been fighting this inequality for over a decade, but she’s seen, just as I have, that we desperately need more support from Congress to address the pressing issues in our neighborhoods. clean_body: We’re done with the status quo. | | | Peter, As we fight with everything we have to overcome corporate money and the status quo to bring essential change to TX-28, I think about all of the communities we are fighting for — communities left behind by current representation in Congress. All across this country, there are congressional districts with shocking levels of inequality. Many corporate Democrats, who are currently representing these districts, are more than happy to treat Congress like an invite to an exclusive club while their constituents struggle. That’s why I chose to run – and why Kina Collins in Illinois chose to run in the first place. We are tired of seeing our communities struggle while those in power line their own pockets and vote against our best interests. We are running to win because we will not sit quietly while our communities are left behind. Kina Collins’ district is one of the most unequal districts, just like TX-28. In the downtown Chicago portion of IL-07, the life expectancy is 90 years, while in the predominantly African American Englewood portion, life expectancy is 60. Same district, different world. Kina has been fighting this inequality for over a decade, but she’s seen, just as I have, that we desperately need more support from Congress to address the pressing issues in our neighborhoods. We are fighting for people who haven’t had a voice in decades, and our cause is more urgent than ever. It won’t be easy but we are not backing down from this fight. We’re taking on corporate forces determined to undermine our people-first movement. Gracias, Jessica Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sam=20Alleman=2C=20LGBTQ+=20Coalitions=20Director=2C=20DNC?=
subject: Honoring Pride Month at the DNC
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
| Hello Democrats! Happy Pride Month! Pride Month is both a time of celebration and a critical time that we remember all of the organizers and activists who fought for LGBTQ people to achieve the rights they have today. That’s why the Democratic National Committee launched our signature program to organize the LGBTQ community, ‘Democrats Are Out & Proud’. This program will ensure we have critical resources like those below in order to mobilize LGBTQ Democrats and their allies ahead of the 2022 midterm elections. We hope you will join us in amplifying the DNC’s messaging and joining us for the following actions in the coming days.
Sincerely,
Sam Alleman (He/Him)
LGBTQ Coalitions Director
Democratic National Committee
---
|
---
| [**Statement: DNC on the Start of Pride Month**](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=301074f1e6&e=d6c5c7d7ec) DNC Chair Jaime Harrison and LGBTQ Caucus Chair Earl Fowlkes issued the following joint statement marking the start of Pride month: “Today marks the start of Pride month. This month, we celebrate love, self-expression, and the freedom to be one’s authentic self. The LGBTQ+ movement is full of remarkable, everyday people who had the courage to assert their freedom. From the first brick at Stonewall to marriage equality, the DNC honors the tremendous progress made to expand LGBTQ+ rights and joins in solidarity as we continue to fight for complete equality. This month, we also reaffirm the work ahead. We cannot allow this hard-won progress for the LGBTQ+ community to be undone. Republican attacks on LGBTQ+ people — especially on queer and transgender children — are unacceptable. Democrats across the country have and will continue to push back against the onslaught of homophobic and transphobic attacks we’ve seen in state legislatures. We are proud of the work the Biden-Harris administration has done thus far: from issuing one of the most comprehensive executive orders in the history of LGBTQ+ rights, to providing Americans with a gender neutral passport marker, to prioritizing the needs of queer and trans foster kids, and fighting for safety and justice for missing and murdered trans BIPOC people. Inclusion can and must be the law of the land. That’s why, as Democrats, we firmly support the Equality Act. It is long past time to codify equal protection on the basis of gender identity and sexual orientation into law. This Pride month, we recommit to building a country where all Americans can be their true selves — no matter who they love or how they identify.”
---
|
---
| **SOCIAL MEDIA TO AMPLIFY** Please consider sharing the following content with your networks and on your social media pages.
**Twitter** Please click the link to each of these tweets, retweet them, and like them. **@JoeBiden:[ I want every member of the LGBTQ+ community to know you are loved just as you are. During Pride Month, we celebrate the contributions of the LGBTQ+ community and will continue fighting for every person to be treated with the dignity they deserve.](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=9e13a2d9b9&e=d6c5c7d7ec)** **@KamalaHarris: [The fight for LGBTQ+ rights is a fight for civil rights. Today marks the first day of Pride Month. While we should celebrate how far we’ve come, we must continue standing in solidarity with LGBTQ+ Americans in their ongoing struggle against discrimination and injustice.](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=35be27eff1&e=d6c5c7d7ec)** **@TheDemocrats: [Pride Month is about celebrating the right of every American to be proud, love openly, and live authentically. Happy Pride!](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=e2c6c64847&e=d6c5c7d7ec)** **@JaimeHarrison: [This month, we celebrate how far we’ve come in the struggle for equality while still acknowledging how far we have to go. Happy Pride, everyone!](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=02974ea70a&e=d6c5c7d7ec)** **Instagram** Please click the links to the following Instagram posts, like each one, and share them to your Instagram story. **[@JoeBiden](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=3190b1052f&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**
**[@KamalaHarris](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=6847506e99&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**
**[@JaimeHarrison](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=0f99009a0f&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**
---
|
---
| **HOST AND OUT AND PROUD PRIDE EVENT** We are looking for volunteers and activists just like you to step and host an 'Out & Proud' Pride event this June. Hosting these events will give you a chance to mobilize your networks ahead of key elections this November and to share why voting for Democrats up and down the ballot is important to the LGBTQ community. If you're interested, please complete the form at the button below with your event details and you will receive a tool kit and additional resources to host a successful event. Upon submission, your event will automatically publish on the DNC’s Mobilize America page. Please note, you will be able to export any event RSVPs or lists generated from this event form.
---
| [Took Kit Sign Up](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=958cac2933&e=d6c5c7d7ec "Took Kit Sign Up")
---
|
---
| **REGISTER YOUR PRIDE EVENT WITH THE DNC** We are asking all volunteers, partners, and local Democratic clubs engaging at Pride Festivals and Parades to consider registering your event engagement at the link below. Doing so will allow anyone coming to the DNC’s Mobilize America page (how we host events and track RSVP’s) to join you at Pride. Doing so will provide you a convenient tool to manage your event attendee registrations and allow us to direct volunteers to your event or activity.
---
| [Register Here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=e935b8430f&e=d6c5c7d7ec "Register Here")
---
|
---
| **ATTEND A SOCIAL AMBASSADOR TRAINING** On Tuesday, June 14 at 7 PM ET the DNC’s Social Ambassador program will host a special virtual training session for the LGBTQ+ community. Social Ambassadors is a grassroots volunteer program that combats disinformation online by amplifying achievements of both the Democrats and the Biden-Harris administration over your personal social media networks.
---
| [RSVP Here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=af4710a997&e=d6c5c7d7ec "RSVP Here")
---
|
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | Hello Democrats! Happy Pride Month! Pride Month is both a time of celebration and a critical time that we remember all of the organizers and activists who fought for LGBTQ people to achieve the rights they have today. That’s why the Democratic National Committee launched our signature program to organize the LGBTQ community, ‘Democrats Are Out & Proud’. This program will ensure we have critical resources like those below in order to mobilize LGBTQ Democrats and their allies ahead of the 2022 midterm elections. We hope you will join us in amplifying the DNC’s messaging and joining us for the following actions in the coming days. Sincerely, Sam Alleman (He/Him) LGBTQ Coalitions Director Democratic National Committee | | DNC Chair Jaime Harrison and LGBTQ Caucus Chair Earl Fowlkes issued the following joint statement marking the start of Pride month: “Today marks the start of Pride month. This month, we celebrate love, self-expression, and the freedom to be one’s authentic self. The LGBTQ+ movement is full of remarkable, everyday people who had the courage to assert their freedom. From the first brick at Stonewall to marriage equality, the DNC honors the tremendous progress made to expand LGBTQ+ rights and joins in solidarity as we continue to fight for complete equality. This month, we also reaffirm the work ahead. We cannot allow this hard-won progress for the LGBTQ+ community to be undone. Republican attacks on LGBTQ+ people — especially on queer and transgender children — are unacceptable. Democrats across the country have and will continue to push back against the onslaught of homophobic and transphobic attacks we’ve seen in state legislatures. We are proud of the work the Biden-Harris administration has done thus far: from issuing one of the most comprehensive executive orders in the history of LGBTQ+ rights, to providing Americans with a gender neutral passport marker, to prioritizing the needs of queer and trans foster kids, and fighting for safety and justice for missing and murdered trans BIPOC people. Inclusion can and must be the law of the land. That’s why, as Democrats, we firmly support the Equality Act. It is long past time to codify equal protection on the basis of gender identity and sexual orientation into law. This Pride month, we recommit to building a country where all Americans can be their true selves — no matter who they love or how they identify.” | | SOCIAL MEDIA TO AMPLIFY Please consider sharing the following content with your networks and on your social media pages. Twitter Please click the link to each of these tweets, retweet them, and like them. @JoeBiden: @KamalaHarris: @TheDemocrats: @JaimeHarrison: Instagram Please click the links to the following Instagram posts, like each one, and share them to your Instagram story. | | HOST AND OUT AND PROUD PRIDE EVENT We are looking for volunteers and activists just like you to step and host an 'Out & Proud' Pride event this June. Hosting these events will give you a chance to mobilize your networks ahead of key elections this November and to share why voting for Democrats up and down the ballot is important to the LGBTQ community. If you're interested, please complete the form at the button below with your event details and you will receive a tool kit and additional resources to host a successful event. Upon submission, your event will automatically publish on the DNC’s Mobilize America page. Please note, you will be able to export any event RSVPs or lists generated from this event form. | "Took Kit Sign Up" | | REGISTER YOUR PRIDE EVENT WITH THE DNC We are asking all volunteers, partners, and local Democratic clubs engaging at Pride Festivals and Parades to consider registering your event engagement at the link below. Doing so will allow anyone coming to the DNC’s Mobilize America page (how we host events and track RSVP’s) to join you at Pride. Doing so will provide you a convenient tool to manage your event attendee registrations and allow us to direct volunteers to your event or activity. | "Register Here" | | ATTEND A SOCIAL AMBASSADOR TRAINING On Tuesday, June 14 at 7 PM ET the DNC’s Social Ambassador program will host a special virtual training session for the LGBTQ+ community. Social Ambassadors is a grassroots volunteer program that combats disinformation online by amplifying achievements of both the Democrats and the Biden-Harris administration over your personal social media networks. | "RSVP Here" | | | | Copyright © 2022 DNC Community Engagement, All rights reserved. This is a test distribution list. Our mailing address is: DNC Community Engagement430 S Capitol Street, SEWashington, DC 20003 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

Peter,

**We have less than 15 days until the South Carolina primary.** On the ground we are knocking on doors, getting ready for debates, running radio ads, and doing everything we can to secure a win for South Carolina.

And now that Trump endorsed me, this race is really heating up.

My team and I are doing everything in our power to keep this seat in solid Republican hands, but it might not be enough. We need to raise $20,000 before my primary on June 14th, or else we risk losing this seat and losing the House to Nancy Pelosi.

South Carolina has been a massive target state for Democrats since 2020, when they dumped over $130 million into the U.S. Senate race. We fought them off then, and we will fight them now because **South Carolina is not for sale.**

[**Despite all my efforts to reach you, now it is crunch time and I really need your help.**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=a6486bdd44d24cbf9d4ea8ff6b948465&_e=_zQiAlSVT-_S5EgHe_56P_MkDqBlN61SisOt14uQYAVkmMWZGbYOo0TNMlxriZ5Jqg6aNdNmvCxSFCmUUHsID7Cbn1M6atLzHzMxZQMhfdgGPM_yo8O7OPXfo6cI2rJFaj5yBBnoAHjSFZQyUp_0y5jULHKlibeUk-viI_vtsZUU4etxPhAQ2r7YPfAg7qyPV-5NNBQ6f0FsjGO-qJIi2sMzGgK7YvaWrHEveHiT-YUr8CR8u3G9MJpXHPxqe1Lhux5l1DRamIyIF1HIGI9Y71Gtnp617ltBSZZNyos_Ijrmh8QNZ5oQB7MgerCZKitSGYJ3NdZirZ2EvwxuhnvhZ1ufxlOGw8fQT8v0uqURr9FXBY0Kpqcw5JENVdTsfQDw_VZz71Wrp6GEXErL2YFGXD0RdyzqjdOMNucvXd5mmnx72Y7j6AX8D3J_acwjMA_kSslNH0iQLlD4o_auzU6Psg%3D%3D)

clean_body: On the ground we are knocking on doors, getting ready for debates, running radio ads, and doing everything we can to secure a win for South Carolina. | No longer want to receive emails from Timmons for Congress? You may . Peter, We have less than 15 days until the South Carolina primary. On the ground we are knocking on doors, getting ready for debates, running radio ads, and doing everything we can to secure a win for South Carolina. And now that Trump endorsed me, this race is really heating up. My team and I are doing everything in our power to keep this seat in solid Republican hands, but it might not be enough. We need to raise $20,000 before my primary on June 14th, or else we risk losing this seat and losing the House to Nancy Pelosi. South Carolina has been a massive target state for Democrats since 2020, when they dumped over $130 million into the U.S. Senate race. We fought them off then, and we will fight them now because South Carolina is not for sale. Respectfully, William Timmons | ABOUT WILLIAM TIMMONS * William Timmons is a conservative reformer with a small business background committed to finding solutions to everyday problems. He is honored to represent South Carolina’s 4th Congressional District in the United States Congress, where he has been fighting for our Upstate conservative values since 2019. | Paid for by William Timmons for Congress

name: Karen Bass Finance Team
subject: We hit our goal, but it isn't enough.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
Help us reach voters before polls close next Tuesday.

Team, we need to touch base with you about the primary next week.

**First, the good news:** Because so many of you chipped in what you could, we surpassed our final end-of-month goal before the primary! Momentum is building for Karen's historic campaign for L.A. mayor, so thank you to everyone who contributed before the deadline.

**But, we also have some bad news:** Rick Caruso has spent over $37.5 _million_ of his own money to buy this race, and he has even more funds on hand. **We can't leave the primary to chance, which is why today, we're announcing a $75,000 stretch fundraising goal.**

If you've been waiting for the right moment to chip in to Karen's campaign for mayor, it's right now. **[We need all hands on deck to make sure we can share Karen's message with voters across the city. Will you support Karen today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46013839/348478414/-1030761386?ms=em22_220601_prim1_fndd_gq_act___KBFT_ettx&refcode=em22_220601_prim1_fndd_gq_act___KBFT_ettx&source=em22_220601_prim1_fndd_gq_act___KBFT_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220601_prim1_fndd_gq_act___KBFT_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=t8KyFt1ZlTcNNTdIhRe6Mg%2FfqIgCgISrgr2cncUiEmMh9AnhavlYahPPZxVXOuPS1nlax25icrox8LoRxHcYULn8Rs1ON7%2B1mFWOV9aj0xwvbFHswOffpVGHw2q4L3ICWzCtAqt4l6Po3%2FznPQB%2BAA%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2E5ZWUxMy0xM2UyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fz2DTU9s5-3hwb2yT3xd-y4GKH0ABl0rCw8TRPkzJk0=&emci=89dd7ff5-d0e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=5ca9ee13-13e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=2429742)**

This is officially the most expensive mayoral election in Los Angeles history. Our campaign urgently needs grassroots supporters to step up and help us reach voters before polls close next Tuesday.

**[Rick Caruso might be willing to burn through his own personal wealth to win, but we have a team who has Karen's back. If it's in your budget, chip in today to help us reach our stretch goal before Tuesday's primary.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46013840/348478415/-1030761386?ms=em22_220601_prim1_fndd_gq_act___KBFT_ettx&refcode=em22_220601_prim1_fndd_gq_act___KBFT_ettx&source=em22_220601_prim1_fndd_gq_act___KBFT_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220601_prim1_fndd_gq_act___KBFT_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=t8KyFt1ZlTcNNTdIhRe6Mg%2FfqIgCgISrgr2cncUiEmMh9AnhavlYahPPZxVXOuPS1nlax25icrox8LoRxHcYULn8Rs1ON7%2B1mFWOV9aj0xwvbFHswOffpVGHw2q4L3ICWzCtAqt4l6Po3%2FznPQB%2BAA%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2E5ZWUxMy0xM2UyLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fz2DTU9s5-3hwb2yT3xd-y4GKH0ABl0rCw8TRPkzJk0=&emci=89dd7ff5-d0e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=5ca9ee13-13e2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=2429742)**

clean_body: Help us reach voters before polls close next Tuesday. Team, we need to touch base with you about the primary next week. First, the good news: Because so many of you chipped in what you could, we surpassed our final end-of-month goal before the primary! Momentum is building for Karen's historic campaign for L.A. mayor, so thank you to everyone who contributed before the deadline. But, we also have some bad news: Rick Caruso has spent over $37.5 million of his own money to buy this race, and he has even more funds on hand. We can't leave the primary to chance, which is why today, we're announcing a $75,000 stretch fundraising goal. If you've been waiting for the right moment to chip in to Karen's campaign for mayor, it's right now. This is officially the most expensive mayoral election in Los Angeles history. Our campaign urgently needs grassroots supporters to step up and help us reach voters before polls close next Tuesday. Thank you, Karen Bass Finance Team With less than a week before the primary, our voter outreach efforts are in full swing to reach Angelenos with Karen's vision for Los Angeles. Rush a donation today to support Karen's voter engagement efforts: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328) Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 777 S Figueroa St STE 4050 Los Angeles, CA 90017 United States Additional information is available at . | | ---|---|--- We rely on this email to communicate with this grassroots team, but if you no longer want to receive our emails, please .

| | Peter, Democrat Rep. Elaine Luria may talk a big talk about “holding tech companies accountable” but she is being _very_ dishonest to the American people. Luria claims to be “fighting back” against Facebook and Twitter but **_her stock portfolio says otherwise_**.

Rep. Luria, like most of the Democrats, is a swamp politician. **_Here’s what makes her one of the worst Democrats in DC: Luria is the LARGEST Facebook shareholder in all of Congress_. **

**_Is this someone you can truly trust to have your best interests at heart?

_**

I am running for Congress to defeat Rep. Luria because Americans cannot trust politicians who are so heavily invested in anti-free speech companies like Facebook and Twitter.

**Under Rep. Luria’s leadership, Facebook and all the Big Tech companies will continue to censor Conservative voices, meddle in our elections, and support extreme LGBT policies.**
