name: Cheri Beasley
subject: grateful for you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
I wanted to reach out today to simply say thank you — from the bottom of my heart.
#

Hey team -
I wanted to reach out today to simply say thank you — from the bottom of my heart.
I know we asked a lot of this team ahead of last night’s May fundraising deadline, but thanks to you, we are in a strong position as the general election begins in earnest.
The challenges ahead are steep, but with hard work and faith, we can move mountains and deliver real change for our families. The people of North Carolina deserve a voice in the U.S. Senate, and I promise to be a champion for the people when we flip this seat together.
We will not accept Washington’s failure and gridlock. We are going to fight tirelessly to fix the broken status quo that’s put our democracy, our planet and our rights at risk — while giant corporations and the ultra-wealthy make record profits.
So thank you again. All of us here at Team Beasley HQ are so grateful for the outpouring of support since we secured the Democratic nomination last month. It is an honor and privilege to be your Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate in North Carolina, and I know that together, we will be victorious in November.
Thank you so much,
Cheri Beasley
If you didn’t have a chance to contribute last month, will you chip in today to become a General Election Founding Donor? We have an official FEC deadline at the end of this month, so this is important.
[**Please consider making a donation to our campaign to flip North Carolina today. After this month’s FEC deadline, we’ll have to report our fundraising numbers publicly, and we need our strongest showing yet.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-june22.-3KU-G&refcode=em220601-1-ma&refcode2=981.357359.foSTE0&t=3&akid=981%2E357359%2EfoSTE0)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-june22.-3KU-G&refcode=em220601-1-ma&refcode2=981.357359.foSTE0&t=4&akid=981%2E357359%2EfoSTE0)**

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=5&akid=981%2E357359%2EfoSTE0). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=981%2E357359%2EfoSTE0). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=981_357359_foSTE0&akid=981%2E357359%2EfoSTE0) today to help us make history.

name: AOC Organizing Team
subject: You’re Invited
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
There’s never been a better and more urgent time to get involved. We know that when we, the people build grassroots knowledge and power together, we make change happen.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220601-3074-header&t=1&akid=3074%2E2526796%2E42_8yC)
Welcome to Summer with Team AOC!
We’re gearing up for a whole month of renewed organizing efforts. This year, join Team AOC for a series of one and a half hour trainings led by our staff. Each week will feature a different topic, and we encourage you to attend as many as you can in order to get the full experience. These trainings are virtual and will be conducted via Zoom. You can join from anywhere in the country!
Upcoming events:
---
[Team AOC Summer Session: Organizing Trainings!](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14649?source=em20220601-3074&utm_source=em20220601-3074&t=2&akid=3074%2E2526796%2E42_8yC)
Thursdays at 7:00 PM EDT**[Get more info or RSVP](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14649?source=em20220601-3074&utm_source=em20220601-3074&t=3&akid=3074%2E2526796%2E42_8yC)** **Schedule of Trainings** _Week 1:_ Understanding the US Medical System's Finances _Week 2:_ Organizing Tactics and Workplace Organizing _Week 3:_ The Green New Deal Intersections: How Climate = Communities _Week 4:_ The US Congress and How You Can Influence Your Elected Officials
These trainings are designed for everyone, whether you are an experienced organizer or a supporter looking to get more involved with our campaign for the first time. After each session, we will provide a number of ways you can take action.
There’s never been a better and more urgent time to get involved. We know that when we, the people build grassroots knowledge and power together, we make change happen.
We hope to see you at an organizing training this month!
In solidarity,
Team AOC

clean_body: There’s never been a better and more urgent time to get involved. We know that when we, the people build grassroots knowledge and power together, we make change happen. Welcome to Summer with Team AOC! We’re gearing up for a whole month of renewed organizing efforts. This year, join Team AOC for a series of one and a half hour trainings led by our staff. Each week will feature a different topic, and we encourage you to attend as many as you can in order to get the full experience. These trainings are virtual and will be conducted via Zoom. You can join from anywhere in the country! Upcoming events: Thursdays at 7:00 PM EDT Schedule of Trainings Week 1: Understanding the US Medical System's Finances Week 2: Organizing Tactics and Workplace Organizing Week 3: The Green New Deal Intersections: How Climate = Communities Week 4: The US Congress and How You Can Influence Your Elected Officials These trainings are designed for everyone, whether you are an experienced organizer or a supporter looking to get more involved with our campaign for the first time. After each session, we will provide a number of ways you can take action. There’s never been a better and more urgent time to get involved. We know that when we, the people build grassroots knowledge and power together, we make change happen. We hope to see you at an organizing training this month! In solidarity, Team AOC | | Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

subject: Are you more comfortable since Biden is president?

body:
According to the president, “a higher percentage of Americans reported feeling financially comfortable at the end of 2021 than at any time since 2013.
Friend,

We read President Biden’s op-ed in the Wall Street Journal and we’re having a hard time believing what he’s saying. We’re wondering if you might, too.

According to the president, **“a higher percentage of Americans reported feeling financially comfortable at the end of 2021 than at any time since 2013.”**

**_Do you feel more financially comfortable now than when President Trump was in office? We really need to know._**

[**< < yes >>**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=fa1433336da1413bbb9f9cc4a949eeff&_e=HcS29KyzZ1ZMw0mESX_dZjK-qD1i4gb0kFWd6CfWyF2-nxK2P_i4tda-TH3qC-FIFpCJRuARnMNeIyk175z13UYTGdpe1DgGCzauCf2w3GiSiQ1CW3VC7dqKG7tWS5XCMaBMJw8DRYA505Rk2TQzOB4tED8bqXq6vCPX7ohRPIZk4cNY52M-lWzgdKw1oQBKZYURhlEsiMH3vOQUsGxIZLJjoZBzLtC5VruextxC70ry0jpwQ6toWq_vWbvs5krh9UWXufzRX1bKSWJrRrb-wrsqr7ELt0eddXo8QBMBHqvA4k1CBxRrabJFDrHgC9_D42SK-yT-eoEpmylJdj7RIKthp9181RqnE78h4sZ8A5EwLhRpOI6fbi4vm9vbxsjXnstFCxh-ItnSKlSwN5482bLDCelbYTpNtaknEVjKfNSE4vZFRh72W1JjuMPXiBhFQ7HX_SgPhf8wPQ6wtJaMZDcqW64g0BidRFt5SmnRf2e5P2yw2W0Xj2l9GOZLOyXx4pSRrCP9URl7qvgUfIB7Nw%3D%3D) [**< < no >>**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=fa1433336da1413bbb9f9cc4a949eeff&_e=HcS29KyzZ1ZMw0mESX_dZjK-qD1i4gb0kFWd6CfWyF2-nxK2P_i4tda-TH3qC-FIFpCJRuARnMNeIyk175z13UYTGdpe1DgGCzauCf2w3GiSiQ1CW3VC7dqKG7tWS5XCMaBMJw8DRYA505Rk2TQzOB4tED8bqXq6vCPX7ohRPIZk4cNY52M-lWzgdKw1oQBKZYURhlEsiMH3vOQUsGxIZLJjoZBzLtC5VruextxC70ry0jpwQ6toWq_vWbvs5krh9UWXufzRX1bKSWJrRrb-wrsqr7ELt0eddXo8QBMBHqvA4k1CBxRrabJFDrHgC9_DjV0m9vtiyLyG_Vy2jxZ2x9vjrwqfsjH7lSCrVI0-UOMRxztilViiM55Y8Hwk1SBz-ezhNoj9FuVMw_fDDH2pJN69uN3aCLGNiiAzPrmBhT6sH8aNFMXUOI4F6BVscUEEgw5Otr02hwFZfdG1umVVH63hs0dqonZYpVcgMuiFOoQTOzIcu_SdYGviCxP-UqKu493FcBx1DbVeRSe0F3GSUg%3D%3D)

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Losing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc
body:
Everyone I’ve been talking to is concerned about this election.
Hey Fellow American,

I wanted to make a point of personally touching base with you today. I spoke with my team earlier and **_I’m worried_** we’re not going to be able to win back the Senate majority [**without your help.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5c1d2628bdf943d1aebceb1e08a9de05&_e=XV7CdpfzBO2FvYGQfW0kUtOt3dpny12WCb5K9aDzzk65GNMwNNptIHwbR5CTeOISalCjT56ZaB7lXRTreQ2jrm1-eUUG8oE60qNYIFigpwFoH6uDSmo1xZd-iiriKVm7q0Gp8fMw1NYpn6xWpK5US5BYhyyrpT6_dcV_0IQecZRG6vcfvrkqzrZfHswUjOOJHrhvFGaYSNNoQrolkKQdLj1KoU101lskJ6tQQsf96AQcc49ZJQ_5jWwi75oTZf1Bi2yxTVjLBII6taDwoRcif7uDfg7dZ2ncctusW6E_noUb_p6Wp8lTSAtuYDiahNs1JMEMtGrUphiuAWXhAwEpFsq01Gscs8DSCXvZcY8ZZ5ywu9d427-MBZzxcxwURN5y)

The Democrats are dumping HUNDREDS OF MILLIONS OF DOLLARS into red states and [**the only way we can win is if you and 250 donors give $5 or $10 before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5c1d2628bdf943d1aebceb1e08a9de05&_e=XV7CdpfzBO2FvYGQfW0kUtOt3dpny12WCb5K9aDzzk65GNMwNNptIHwbR5CTeOISalCjT56ZaB7lXRTreQ2jrm1-eUUG8oE60qNYIFigpwFoH6uDSmo1xZd-iiriKVm7q0Gp8fMw1NYpn6xWpK5US5BYhyyrpT6_dcV_0IQecZQQ7SL5OAawiGDufa4RHeFnqjgogGwctnLQqfXIKtyhiDYUQVI2OwFJcEh6sUx2zlwxssRpXcC55p8r8z9HzEQRL--cNXAK3nuyRzmlmmOouwWzuyAh2MSpJWI9d-dNbp3QvLR0l33dTgsGF4zmq6aJfJErzbxs2PGw6k9hHXX7IFvvYupf2Zyvju_3fzTk6zjQVrRuukLfMP1r_tWaZAf9)

Can you step up and help me and Senator Mike Lee win our races and Save America? We’re counting on hearing from you before time runs out and we fall short.

[**GIVE NOW ⇒**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5c1d2628bdf943d1aebceb1e08a9de05&_e=XV7CdpfzBO2FvYGQfW0kUtOt3dpny12WCb5K9aDzzk65GNMwNNptIHwbR5CTeOISalCjT56ZaB7lXRTreQ2jrm1-eUUG8oE60qNYIFigpwFoH6uDSmo1xZd-iiriKVm7q0Gp8fMw1NYpn6xWpK5US5BYhyyrpT6_dcV_0IQecZTQF-S1CVwUKqWVyM3Kg0o-pgYSLPw8TnMaof0HF4iRkZ4NINNZOIJuK7-3X6F9CnyZK8uQHj9YOav8s_SYjnBM-KFaTXdl7ou41_M01ULolPWQYIJt_9uh75B_UQZs5njiCYCtbASWjTiNjV2icUka8cHd5VxS-3ZBFozSTHAmoREtLn7lNvZfObVVQcjL9mGCJ2Ora7ViAG8mKu4gYC1m)
It’s not just me, Fellow American, everyone I’ve been talking to is concerned about this election. It’s going to be close and I’m counting on hearing from every single one of my supporters in order to help push us over the finish line.

But the Democrats are doubling their efforts and dumping MILLIONS into red states.

We cannot take anything for granted and we’re falling short of our midnight goal. [**Will you give $5 or $10 and be one of the 250 donors I need to win?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5c1d2628bdf943d1aebceb1e08a9de05&_e=XV7CdpfzBO2FvYGQfW0kUtOt3dpny12WCb5K9aDzzk65GNMwNNptIHwbR5CTeOISalCjT56ZaB7lXRTreQ2jrm1-eUUG8oE60qNYIFigpwFoH6uDSmo1xZd-iiriKVm7q0Gp8fMw1NYpn6xWpK5US5BYhyyrpT6_dcV_0IQecZTrW6e0S41t6v7aOKu8Usj2hky2vvEi-kc2echb1OcRaBE2mTGxta_XVBpYpum8TppbChybJqCkIiKG3ovjTZKvODi7IRwLcoH-S9YX131qEIWA53pgVG9Z-ZarxA0IDPCMrjR6Xl1gU-P2Z8LDYM26mMAT1MYTBewgB7DvnZ_nVBEu--Gnob9nZKplInufgw7kb-XUXiBGgAmEsO7gUw0I)

[**GIVE NOW ⇒**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5c1d2628bdf943d1aebceb1e08a9de05&_e=XV7CdpfzBO2FvYGQfW0kUtOt3dpny12WCb5K9aDzzk65GNMwNNptIHwbR5CTeOISalCjT56ZaB7lXRTreQ2jrm1-eUUG8oE60qNYIFigpwFoH6uDSmo1xZd-iiriKVm7q0Gp8fMw1NYpn6xWpK5US5BYhyyrpT6_dcV_0IQecZSta492fKunXDxZir03IySRg1ySWiO9K9xlynkPpUksf5vcqooy1Ftgx_iaX7GB74RiJwWPZI9EwimP80Ah1yuYOCWnEiy0OjbtunFTpVJmrcStID5ch0dIO70pKBkCvYH_UU4w4bCR0QYK360wf2oZvtIy2MNGxKQBO4J4MmjsPw8_xwgJrlCa2Lu6y2B-1VBlOvppXhe2Ze1_FVD9MTcK)

subject: Will you endorse me?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We’re going to be working non-stop to make sure we talk to every voter possible from now until November 8th. |
[](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=7e6bf7597e6a4e1c8a4d4d7824b83ef9&_e=yhddI4ci72J8WIu9MQ2RKdarLX5_LDZDM_e_EUS_Ub0CPQ_aXsAt5XTphQjOh63Vs5gFb-h-280JuFNs_PiXDSHXAprFzBXMcacNqCBnrxh-6bHnywwcynLo_8eOtFeoMoTMrEVob68w7F0rQxzwODQhWT-yJXZYx0NlHXvZSkDmymkdzVVRwKAw04fjk6IrBlzPk0eYCli1yvquNh_l99RZTbO1BeMJebE8JP5MepnDgReC4I6YST8Z2vOwjEpnxsdoyIT7gFOys8gmiA2ghGppvdLa_ECCAay8y2VbTEgrBkj8LpUs9oYzdnyS1KSOmDWmLoQtsbpdI1NWjJclzucV1eTpV5caqTlFtrQkBCQl90Kyse0hwKf-VxLR3uH0Z_mRXYedAhQa0o1EfpnEqDZv-JZRETcdqLfepRxogwUspZ1dHSrMrLJZG2qgbSYPONzrO2e695UNQoJ4IyrcO5qmNnWdKza2foBfHYnK0mvkAGw5oCeM3NFlsoEUHSw_moNQTRl6_i53e5oEaYb2YXJrVuwqJkNvYVF2QeQFxP2sO0jUuOx6bWjDCBNlwjVT0pFWmGirdsNt0TqEkqOUV5g7fSIVV57Zqv2dj3RGZiF9SZFYCa0-8vs7F8vUQ_uw)

---
Peter,

Every vote matters.

Team Herschel is going to be working EVERY DAY through November 8th to secure Georgians' votes to win this Senate seat and help Republicans take back the majority.

Peter, that's where you come in. Now that I am officially the Republican nominee, **[I am personally asking you for your endorsement to help us build on our primary win!](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=7e6bf7597e6a4e1c8a4d4d7824b83ef9&_e=yhddI4ci72J8WIu9MQ2RKdarLX5_LDZDM_e_EUS_Ub0CPQ_aXsAt5XTphQjOh63Vs5gFb-h-280JuFNs_PiXDSHXAprFzBXMcacNqCBnrxh-6bHnywwcynLo_8eOtFeoMoTMrEVob68w7F0rQxzwODQhWT-yJXZYx0NlHXvZSkDmymkdzVVRwKAw04fjk6IrBlzPk0eYCli1yvquNh_l99RZTbO1BeMJebE8JP5MepnDgReC4I6YST8Z2vOwjEpnxsdoyIT7gFOys8gmiA2ghGppvdLa_ECCAay8y2VbTEgrBkj8LpUs9oYzdnyS1KSOmDWmLoQtsbpdI1NWjJclzucV1eTpV5caqTlFtrQkBCQl90Kyse0hwKf-VxLR3uH0Z_mRXYedAhQa0o1EfpnEqDZv-JZRETcdqLfepRxogwVR4VSEQqGwq5TKHunOfTgayhlWZ5FKWjtJnv_qKHTPoETSxvQdVp5wSzA9MB5FSrx5L1k03L1bnhzInFy0AOd56XQmweWfhbcXZXUWCK8Djsxv9Hkn3_87u8KmCE3lD4iLmnmsqdK3N1Bu7lmwRF1LsW_2jEUgwngg3AauVPtO3TAw5leXfmw0EGSYBFxFJVsxoNfrJw9zwOEg011SBSQY)**

[**Endorse Herschel Walker for Senate ->**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=7e6bf7597e6a4e1c8a4d4d7824b83ef9&_e=yhddI4ci72J8WIu9MQ2RKdarLX5_LDZDM_e_EUS_Ub0CPQ_aXsAt5XTphQjOh63Vs5gFb-h-280JuFNs_PiXDSHXAprFzBXMcacNqCBnrxh-6bHnywwcynLo_8eOtFeoMoTMrEVob68w7F0rQxzwODQhWT-yJXZYx0NlHXvZSkDmymkdzVVRwKAw04fjk6IrBlzPk0eYCli1yvquNh_l99RZTbO1BeMJebE8JP5MepnDgReC4I6YST8Z2vOwjEpnxsdoyIT7gFOys8gmiA2ghGppvdLa_ECCAay8y2VbTEgrBkj8LpUs9oYzdnyS1KSOmDWmLoQtsbpdI1NWjJclzucV1eTpV5caqTlFtrQkBCQl90Kyse0hwKf-VxLR3uH0Z_mRXYedAhQa0o1EfpnEqDZv-JZRETcdqLfepRxogwXbIBssQkKszSr7QxStbi2ZMkTzmDz9e7JGkhAeIy-343fd_40IXFPd0FtgBCsexB29OwhZQ7h1OMC-iCkheDZM90CkWi1d3bbknDTwYQh5O_bBhawChKqJdSgOqemxtzh1Rf28Pb8NRpUbraKNs1Spuis1YkGiRt0_clL93wrlQByvgxd8VZEfaE2ZxwMq3YK7PEnKjdJRGc4J_GArS6kx)
By giving your endorsement, you are signaling to your friends, family, and neighbors that you're ready to take back the Senate majority this November.

I believe in strong conservative values. I believe in smaller government, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL AMERICANS - regardless of income level, race, or religion - can pursue their dreams.

We're at a fork in the road. _**We have a clear choice.**_

Raphael Warnock and Joe Biden have dragged us down the path of skyrocketing inflation. There's violence in the streets and chaos at our border. Shelves are empty at our grocery stores. There's disrespect for our Constitution, censorship, and racial division.

Under a Democrat-controlled Washington, America isn't trusted by our allies or feared by our enemies. Instead of energy independence, we buy oil from dictators who hate us.

clean_body: We’re going to be working non-stop to make sure we talk to every voter possible from now until November 8th. | Peter, Every vote matters. Team Herschel is going to be working EVERY DAY through November 8th to secure Georgians' votes to win this Senate seat and help Republicans take back the majority. Peter, that's where you come in. Now that I am officially the Republican nominee, By giving your endorsement, you are signaling to your friends, family, and neighbors that you're ready to take back the Senate majority this November. I believe in strong conservative values. I believe in smaller government, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL AMERICANS - regardless of income level, race, or religion - can pursue their dreams. We're at a fork in the road. We have a clear choice. Raphael Warnock and Joe Biden have dragged us down the path of skyrocketing inflation. There's violence in the streets and chaos at our border. Shelves are empty at our grocery stores. There's disrespect for our Constitution, censorship, and racial division. Under a Democrat-controlled Washington, America isn't trusted by our allies or feared by our enemies. Instead of energy independence, we buy oil from dictators who hate us. If you're ok with this agenda, you can send Senator Warnock back to Washington. He'll give you more of it. Guaranteed. But if you're as sick as I am about what's happening in Washington, Democrats know that I'm the biggest threat to their Senate majority, so they are already raising record sums of money to cling to their razor-thin majority. Thanks for being on Team Herschel! Sincerely, Herschel Walker Republican Nominee for Senate P.S. Even if you don't live in Georgia, you can have a huge impact in this race. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

body:
| | | Team, Your support is what drives us on, day after day, as we enter the final few weeks of our campaign. **Every donation we’ve received so far shows us how we have the people on our side.** Throughout this race, this team has stepped up to out-raise Steny Hoyer in small-dollar grassroots donations time and time again. I couldn’t be more grateful. Running for election is hard. There are so many barriers to everyday people that I couldn’t even grasp until I started doing this. **I don’t have a network of wealthy lobbyists I can call upon to fund our campaign. We’ve done it the hard way – person to person, email by email, vote by vote._Every_ donation we’ve gotten has symbolized somebody else joining our movement.** That’s powerful y’all! I’m excited to see where the next few weeks take us. I’m so grateful each and every one of you is along for the ride. **For those who have been wondering when to step up, when to make that first donation, if it can really make a difference, let me tell you:_the time is now and yes it does!_** Thank you, from the bottom of my heart, Mckayla | [ DONATE

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Cruelty, incompetence, and corruption
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Last week made it more clear than ever that if we care about protecting
the lives of our fellow Texans, if we want every child in this state to be
healthy and happy, if we want to safeguard those who are closest to us
from violent crime and gun violence, then we must overcome and defeat Greg
Abbott.

After each mass shooting in Texas, he has promised solutions but provided
none. In fact, he’s made it easier for violent criminals to carry guns on
our streets and set the stage for more tragedies like Uvalde,
Midland-Odessa, El Paso, Santa Fe, and Sutherland Springs.

And if anyone still gave him the benefit of the doubt, he cleared that up
Tuesday night when he read the details of the school shooting to the press
like he was reading the weather forecast and then, instead of traveling
the 245 miles to Uvalde to be with grieving families, he chose to travel
300 miles in the opposite direction to a fundraiser. He was literally
counting dollars while first responders in Uvalde were counting bodies.

Who does that? Who responds to gun violence by making it easier to carry
guns in Texas without a background check? Who shows up to a press
conferences feigning concern for the victims only after stuffing his
pockets with campaign cash, and then proposes no solutions to help prevent
the next tragedy?

It’s the exact same guy who bans women from making their own health care
decisions in a state with one of the highest rates of maternal mortality
in the developed world, and sets a $10,000 bounty on the back of any Texan
who helps any woman seek an abortion.

It’s the same person who does nothing after being told repeatedly by a
Federal judge that his Child Protective Services is understaffed and
unaccountable, and that children emerge from the foster care system “more
damaged than when they entered.” Over 100 Texas kids have died in Abbott’s
child welfare system since 2020. Instead of fixing it, he’d rather try to
scare you about transgender kids and prosecute their loving parents.

It’s the same governor who couldn’t keep the lights on or the heat running
in the energy capital of the world, causing more than 700 Texans —
including children — to die because he cared more about his donors’
profits than about fixing the grid after being warned it could fail.

We must overcome his cruelty, incompetence, and corruption if we are going
to save lives and allow our children to live without the constant fear of
being murdered in their schools, supermarkets, and places of worship; or
be left to fend for themselves in a foster care system that has gone from
bad to worse on his watch.

We overcome that by beating Greg Abbott in November.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220601.oSnXFR&refcode=ema20220601-192002&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=192002%2E444211%2EbjgCjy ]Help me by ensuring we have the resources to reach every Texas voter
and ensure they know the cost and consequence of keeping Abbott in office,
and our opportunity to choose a better future for ourselves and our kids.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220601.oSnXFR&refcode=ema20220601-192002&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=192002%2E444211%2EbjgCjy ]Contribute $3

Your help makes our victory possible.

Thank you,

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1021&akid=192002%2E444211%2EbjgCjy

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

* * *
**Where We've Been:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46011449/348444995/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjgwNzI0ZS1mZWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=92T1JT5qyYX9f_53NdN1mCHSMfR2mZtScKf8wHdpYJ0=&emci=e9903d65-e3e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=bb80724e-fee1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=14684837) Tom kicked off his weekend with Delegate Julie Palokovich-Carr in Rockville for the Hometown Holidays Festival. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46011450/348444996/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjgwNzI0ZS1mZWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=92T1JT5qyYX9f_53NdN1mCHSMfR2mZtScKf8wHdpYJ0=&emci=e9903d65-e3e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=bb80724e-fee1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=14684837) He was honored to also celebrate the legacy of Mayor David Chapman in Lake Arbor. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46011451/348444997/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjgwNzI0ZS1mZWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=92T1JT5qyYX9f_53NdN1mCHSMfR2mZtScKf8wHdpYJ0=&emci=e9903d65-e3e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=bb80724e-fee1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=14684837) Shannon spent her Saturday joining her former city council colleagues and friends for a great day in Baltimore City! In the morning, she joined Councilman Ryan Dorsey at the Waverly Farmers Market, and later she headed to West Baltimore to attend the Baltimore Herb Festival with Councilman Burnett. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46011452/348444998/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjgwNzI0ZS1mZWUxLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=92T1JT5qyYX9f_53NdN1mCHSMfR2mZtScKf8wHdpYJ0=&emci=e9903d65-e3e1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=bb80724e-fee1-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=14684837) Shannon was also excited to join Senator McCray and volunteers to doorknock throughout East Baltimore! clean_body: Hi friends, We are officially less than 50 days away from election day, and our #momenTOM is real! Just last week we announced two more major endorsements: Progressive Maryland and The United Association of Union Plumbers and Pipefitters! We are so grateful for your continued support, and we look forward to working together to achieve our vision of expanding jobs, justice, and opportunity for Marylanders across the state. Where We've Been: Tom kicked off his weekend with Delegate Julie Palokovich-Carr in Rockville for the Hometown Holidays Festival. He was honored to also celebrate the legacy of Mayor David Chapman in Lake Arbor. Shannon spent her Saturday joining her former city council colleagues and friends for a great day in Baltimore City! In the morning, she joined Councilman Ryan Dorsey at the Waverly Farmers Market, and later she headed to West Baltimore to attend the Baltimore Herb Festival with Councilman Burnett. Shannon was also excited to join Senator McCray and volunteers to doorknock throughout East Baltimore! Tom was excited to join him for his annual “Great Big Walk” where he walks every block of Maryland’s 46th district. name: Herschel Walker
subject: The New York Times is attacking me…again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
The New York Times is out with another hit piece that focuses on my skin color instead of the issues important in this Senate race. __ |
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=383befebc5274f568aa913128d835793&_e=04lO6jzgWIKAvv7BroExy9jZpBkjdirbFOwUqG_YNgyDftbRuHcR5IsKUDt1xJB30TRMayGtOi9XyNoiBydz3Rz8AxB-CiznWe8khsmzsj3-7hT3iPI1KiMHRqXuakuN0gqnr05xn1RJ_KqKxi1T9wyWiuCvRpthOo-oXoscC5P4PpHZ2XgUhUmUMlRYMY3d88suPV5M1hyCGhBUAINcfX9DkNrWlKFbM4JjJWk3SHzUHHGmty2sozcR9MpwN5D_kilVkrQhb93SjC8ctDyv36lA18sHqMvpYyPvCNKAveoLlNLDe1yoe00BQdqBbtnQ9HhM2p2InKpKu2Yxh2DAUYRARYmVo1BtCSXPyNgPYVfTd75cGJeaiLDqM4dvc7D_1oqWoBm30UQxFO01X4wUkrzz1argM9JVw45d7XOxAtMWbz66f2gwfYqLBHqeYl9AthtBrm929M6t4pZrNoDzNFbI29bjwwx552m0YxWsNno%3D)

---
Fellow American,

The race-based attacks against me just keep coming.

As much as we try to focus this campaign on the issues that matter to voters like gas prices, record-high inflation, and crime, the Democrats and their allies in the media only want to talk about race.

Check out this recent headline from _The New York Times_ :

name: Christopher Kurka
subject: It's Official!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kurka for Governor PO Box 871181 Wasilla AK 99687
body:
I'm on the ballot to be Alaska's next Governor!

| Hi Peter, Late last week my running mate Paul Hueper and I finalized paperwork with the Alaska Division of Elections making us the first **_proven_ **Conservative Ticket to enter the 2022 race for Alaska’s Governor and Lieutenant Governor! I have spent a majority of the past three months fulfilling my duties as House Representative for District 7 in the Alaska Legislature while my capable team has been holding down the fort on the campaign front. I am ready and eager to get back out on the campaign trail myself now that the Legislative session is over (in the coming days I will send you an email with some updates on my legislative voting record). Paul Hueper and I have outlined an aggressive plan to **secure election integrity, guarantee medical freedom and personal liberty, restore statutory distribution of the Permanent Fund Dividend, criminalize and defund abortion** , enact meaningful administrative reforms and reduce government spending, deregulate private business and industry, investigate government corruption, and fight Federal overreach. Peter, **please help us get our message out to more Alaskans by[making a generous contribution to our campaign](https://kurkaforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=HTIUaYWGgtW-Sq8jttULzW-zEK-3Z9mAZxjdCeR3iqLWUT4kcfhLZxsXf_4rl-GR&e=c3e286dcf444e6546a293f48f4c73831&utm_source=kurkaforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=filing_fundraising_email&n=1)! ** Alaska voters deserve a better kind of Republican Governor... **a Governor who will pledge and deliver on key conservative issues** , who will not cave to deep-state special interests at the first sign of trouble, or who will be willing to make ‘deals’ designed to undermine the core principles and values of Conservatism. As my running mate, Paul Hueper said, "No one else who has filed for Governor or Lieutenant Governor up to this point has been willing to take an official position, or to discuss their plans for addressing the many issues our ticket is prepared to tackle.” Things are heating up again on the campaign front ****and******we are pleased to accept the endorsement of Soldotna Minister and Doctor of Chiropractic, Greg Madden** who wrote, _“How long will we vote for politicians? We need representation that _does not compromise on core values._ Compare every candidate in detail and I believe you’ll agree—**My vote is for Kurka/Hueper!** ”_ Now that Legislative session is over, I am able to receive contributions again! Please consider helping us fund our summer campaign efforts by clicking on the link below: [](https://kurkaforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=HTIUaYWGgtW-Sq8jttULzW-zEK-3Z9mAZxjdCeR3iqLWUT4kcfhLZxsXf_4rl-GR&e=c3e286dcf444e6546a293f48f4c73831&utm_source=kurkaforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=filing_fundraising_email&n=2) Soli Deo Gloria, Christopher Kurka [www.ChrisKurka.com](https://kurkaforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=HTIUaYWGgtW-Sq8jttULzZYHrXjSSqDZFm4adezdWWY&e=c3e286dcf444e6546a293f48f4c73831&utm_source=kurkaforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=filing_fundraising_email&n=3) Paid for by Kurka for Governor PO Box 871181 Wasilla AK 99687.
---
-=-=- Kurka for Governor · AK 99654, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kurkaforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=c3e286dcf444e6546a293f48f4c73831&utm_source=kurkaforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=filing_fundraising_email&n=4).
You can also keep up with Kurka for Governor on [Facebook](https://kurkaforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6ilrRvoagJJ3hXGIDxBq5m74vU4UQnY59xhORaChVYxU&e=c3e286dcf444e6546a293f48f4c73831&utm_source=kurkaforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=filing_fundraising_email&n=5). -=-=-
Created with [NationBuilder](https://kurkaforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=c3e286dcf444e6546a293f48f4c73831&utm_source=kurkaforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=filing_fundraising_email&n=6), software for leaders.

Peter, Now that Sarah is officially the Republican Nominee for Governor, she wants to hear directly from you about the issues that matter most. She asked us to send a quick note to some of our top supporters and see if you would take a few minutes to fill out her Official Republican Nominee Issues Survey? She will be going over the results at the end of the week.
---
[**TAKE THE SURVEY NOW**](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=41e13a3068a44b1e89dde9be4d4bf73d&_e=rUTEJXw1rmvq5dw9FIcfdfqjWgIa7ceWieHJkDQs5-5Vjd4SKwLMMVKddvbJkaaXNN7uKHm4W_Cd9XWs2Ss4q9CkACJ_A_4K6GSN9QBMPkdKZMl3gguo04ti7-Avfqf9isuZRgjVwDH1Ck5g4Iyq9zNSc4pz1dN2aYzJALLcFYpu0eDlc5JZzqkdVMRH4-Jnsx-Km2zP4Y4r1Al9UYR7_ci32ON272iGuESeKXXnWR1fZq21JSwGVBM0TXMgX4BiUFYJmNhyegJ9VnmltS12FID3opQF6znMoW7qQLBeMfzmqj2dG97Ek0f2nQa2hnwzWhMzzmNOG24-MM0r7nG6DHcNWF0tCEHg4EyL-iGCvuru5paZ-TG0lX404IjeRRDLaMYHa03fDde1jsCtpq7sRHYuOf4IAebFDUg-IcP4T-o%3D)

Sarah will always:
* **Say NO to Joe Biden and the Radical Left**
* **Phase out the state income tax**
* **Educate – not indoctrinate – our kids**
* **Stand with our brave men and women in law enforcement**

And now she wants to know where you stand on some of the most important issues facing our state and nation.
---
[**WEIGH IN NOW**](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=41e13a3068a44b1e89dde9be4d4bf73d&_e=rUTEJXw1rmvq5dw9FIcfdfqjWgIa7ceWieHJkDQs5-5Vjd4SKwLMMVKddvbJkaaXNN7uKHm4W_Cd9XWs2Ss4q9CkACJ_A_4K6GSN9QBMPkdKZMl3gguo04ti7-Avfqf9isuZRgjVwDH1Ck5g4Iyq9zNSc4pz1dN2aYzJALLcFYpu0eDlc5JZzqkdVMRH4-Jnsx-Km2zP4Y4r1Al9UYR7_a7K-B9QyZSKiH9m0ue8-goMRwCYhagnXivXrxDfwGiMEb6CeSwt91DWk5X3cwup2Tz2bflPYBZnHoW5BH93w_q56Q1hD0KqBzMIYJH4BBrCsgU76VaUHpu1dxNa_X5FB1TlIz621XWhmUshfDCZtZVwSt5TVLfvb2NWPC1LoTaLeqyrQqrWOBLQod3f6RMzlZ03eiluOfF6fmHjCmAErP0%3D)

subject: Joe Biden has gone too far
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yesli Vega for Virginia
body:
| [ ](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=0ac438da5b5447d8addb8782f13f71f5&_e=vOYsG5vKPUp9GPor4KagE8Ean2QPMc5DnM3Fsb4N3kejlJxLmG-SrPh6zwCJfk9Q5A_keRQv7DcXAPR-oMiWBR4f3t4AWb7dxWMYZ0WU1mv5Co3Augygqc9Z5Lmd7w129uQLlgD3C5iHZEkLFz7oB1t0PcccI_TXR8MI61ueJYX7B1sfdx_f3JPqhHl1N6YW9FxmEZ7wqlPpPjLV9zwbzn92rpvacIjFRMPOxfFsd1m6kK7IR3E2W-JZ-qS0WllEnFdjEbF8BEZPphUTmi9ZyXuAO3XxymFiRSwRC9jhgEHMA9By3eX8DpgwLAxdIhDC0rYxTlsKIga6EJNO_ysJYOTNLjqOZnp_Hd8RIUqjprwCpVdY7zyC2HxoqmFQiAHRBrMHuYyR3UYFt-B4U8kyFds156irrOiYIz7XMaOnwHQAGAtOoOIzePj35m-QXXLqSRYs4NvvqcIQ93HGk2zg5rY_CGFMrt0c4YwfGDry2rOarQME3SpXQEDAqQnCPt_eaKVTWPLxl2lejiMiS0YfRZJ-Ozk-FXNX8G3gQeH9qnc%3D)

You need to hear this.
